class="file-info">文件路径: src/App.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;app-container&quot;&gt; &lt;aside class=&quot;sidebar&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;sidebar-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;logo&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon :size=&quot;32&quot; class=&quot;logo-icon&quot;&gt;&lt;Sunrise /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;logo-text&quot;&gt;智慧照明系统&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-menu :default-active=&quot;activeMenu&quot; mode=&quot;vertical&quot; class=&quot;sidebar-menu&quot; background-color=&quot;#001529&quot; text-color=&quot;#fff&quot; active-text-color=&quot;#1890ff&quot; :collapse=&quot;isCollapse&quot; &gt; &lt;template v-for=&quot;menu in menuList&quot; :key=&quot;menu.path&quot;&gt; &lt;el-sub-menu :index=&quot;menu.path&quot;&gt; &lt;template #title&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;component :is=&quot;menu.icon&quot; /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;span&gt;{{ menu.name }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;el-menu-item v-for=&quot;sub in menu.children&quot; :key=&quot;sub.path&quot; :index=&quot;sub.path&quot; @click=&quot;handleMenuClick(sub.path)&quot; &gt; {{ sub.name }} &lt;/el-menu-item&gt; &lt;/el-sub-menu&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-menu&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;collapse-btn&quot; @click=&quot;isCollapse = !isCollapse&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;component :is=&quot;isCollapse ? icons.ArrowRight : icons.ArrowLeft&quot; /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/aside&gt; &lt;main class=&quot;main-content&quot;&gt; &lt;header class=&quot;header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-left&quot;&gt; &lt;router-link to=&quot;/&quot; class=&quot;system-title&quot;&gt;城市智慧照明系统后台管理&lt;/router-link&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-right&quot;&gt; &lt;el-dropdown&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;user-info&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon class=&quot;user-icon&quot;&gt;&lt;UserFilled /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;span&gt;管理员&lt;/span&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;ArrowDown /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/span&gt; &lt;template #dropdown&gt; &lt;el-dropdown-menu&gt; &lt;el-dropdown-item&gt;个人中心&lt;/el-dropdown-item&gt; &lt;el-dropdown-item&gt;退出登录&lt;/el-dropdown-item&gt; &lt;/el-dropdown-menu&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dropdown&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/header&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;content-wrapper&quot;&gt; &lt;router-view /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/main&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { useRoute, useRouter } from 'vue-router' import { Sunrise, Lightning, Cpu, Grid, List, ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, UserFilled, ArrowDown } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' const route = useRoute() const router = useRouter() const isCollapse = ref(false) const icons = { Lightbulb: Sunrise, Zap: Lightning, Server: Cpu, Layout: Grid, ClipboardList: List, ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, User: UserFilled, ChevronDown: ArrowDown } const menuList = [ { name: '智慧照明', path: '/lighting', icon: icons.Lightbulb, children: [ { name: '快捷首页', path: '/lighting/home' }, { name: 'GIS地图', path: '/lighting/map' }, { name: '照明策略', path: '/lighting/strategy' }, { name: '策略管理', path: '/lighting/manage' }, { name: '历史下发策略', path: '/lighting/history' }, { name: '灯具管理', path: '/lighting/lamp' }, { name: '分组管理', path: '/lighting/group' } ] }, { name: '供电管理', path: '/power', icon: icons.Zap, children: [ { name: '配电柜', path: '/power/distribution' }, { name: '线路信息', path: '/power/line' }, { name: '集控设备', path: '/power/central' }, { name: '回路控制', path: '/power/circuit' }, { name: '模块信息', path: '/power/module' }, { name: '强电场景', path: '/power/strong-electric' }, { name: '历史下发场景', path: '/power/history-scene' }, { name: '回路分组', path: '/power/circuit-group' }, { name: '灯控绑定', path: '/power/lamp-control-bind' }, { name: '负荷展示', path: '/power/load' } ] }, { name: '设备管理', path: '/device', icon: icons.Server, children: [ { name: '灯杆管理', path: '/device/lamp-post' }, { name: '灯控管理', path: '/device/lamp-control' }, { name: '灯具管理', path: '/lighting/lamp' }, { name: '录像机', path: '/device/video-recorder' }, { name: '摄像头', path: '/device/camera' }, { name: '传感器设备', path: '/device/environment-sensor', children: [ { name: '环境传感器', path: '/device/environment-sensor' }, { name: '光照度传感器', path: '/device/detail/4' }, { name: '水浸传感器', path: '/device/detail/5' }, { name: '烟雾传感器', path: '/device/detail/6' } ] } ] }, { name: '智能场景', path: '/scene', icon: icons.Layout, children: [ { name: '快捷操作', path: '/scene/quick-operation' }, { name: '场景管理', path: '/scene/manage' }, { name: '场景联动', path: '/scene/linkage' }, { name: '联动管理', path: '/scene/linkage-manage' }, { name: '场景模板', path: '/scene/template' }, { name: '一键触发', path: '/scene/trigger' }, { name: '定时场景', path: '/scene/schedule' } ] }, { name: '工单管理', path: '/workorder', icon: icons.ClipboardList, children: [ { name: '工单列表', path: '/workorder/list' }, { name: '工单类型配置', path: '/workorder/create' }, { name: '告警自动派单', path: '/workorder/alarm-dispatch' } ] } ] const activeMenu = computed(() =&gt; { return route.path }) const handleMenuClick = (path) =&gt; { router.push(path) } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .app-container { display: flex; height: 100vh; overflow: hidden; } .sidebar { width: 220px; background: #001529; color: #fff; display: flex; flex-direction: column; position: relative; transition: width 0.3s; &amp;.collapsed { width: 64px; } } .sidebar-header { padding: 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid #002140; } .logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .logo-icon { color: #1890ff; } .logo-text { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; } .sidebar-menu { flex: 1; border-right: none; overflow-y: auto; } .sidebar-menu :deep(.el-menu-item) { padding: 0 20px !important; margin: 0 !important; height: 44px !important; line-height: 44px !important; } .sidebar-menu :deep(.el-sub-menu__title) { padding: 0 20px !important; margin: 0 !important; height: 44px !important; line-height: 44px !important; } .collapse-btn { position: absolute; right: -15px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 30px; height: 30px; background: #001529; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; color: #fff; z-index: 10; border: 1px solid #002140; } .main-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #f0f2f5; } .header { height: 64px; background: #fff; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 0 20px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); } .system-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; text-decoration: none; } .header-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; } .user-info { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer; color: #666; font-size: 14px; } .user-icon { width: 28px; height: 28px; line-height: 28px; background: #f0f0f0; border-radius: 50%; text-align: center; } .content-wrapper { flex: 1; padding: 20px; overflow-y: auto; } &lt;/style&gt;</div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-5">src/data/mockData.js</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/data/mockData.js</div> <div from 'element-plus' import 'element-plus/dist/index.css' import './style/index.scss' import App from './App.vue' import router from './router' const app = createApp(App) app.use(ElementPlus) app.use(router) app.mount('#app') </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-7">src/router/index.js</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/router/index.js</div> <div class="code-block">import { createRouter, createWebHistory } from 'vue-router' const routes = [ { path: '/', redirect: '/lighting/home' }, { path: '/lighting', name: 'lighting', redirect: '/lighting/home', children: [ { path: 'home', name: 'lighting-home', component: () =&gt; import('@/views/lighting/LightingHome.vue') }, { path: 'map', name: 'lighting-map', component: () =&gt; import('@/views/lighting/GisMap.vue') }, { path: 'strategy', name: 'lighting-strategy', component: () =&gt; import('@/views/lighting/LightingStrategy.vue') }, { path: 'manage', name: 'lighting-manage', component: () =&gt; 'lighting-lamp', component: () =&gt; import('@/views/lighting/LampManage.vue') }, { path: 'group', name: 'lighting-group', component: () =&gt; import('@/views/lighting/GroupManage.vue') } ] }, { path: '/power', name: 'power', redirect: '/power/distribution', children: [ { path: 'distribution', name: 'power-distribution', component: () =&gt; import('@/views/power/DistributionBox.vue') }, { path: 'line', name: 'power-line', component: () =&gt; import('@/views/power/LineInfo.vue') }, { path: 'central', name: 'power-central', component: () =&gt; import('@/views/power/CentralControl.vue') }, { path: 'circuit', name: 'power-circuit', component: () =&gt; import('@/views/power/CircuitControl.vue') }, { path: 'load', name: 'power-load', component: () =&gt; import('@/views/power/LoadMonitor.vue') }, { path: 'module', name: 'power-module', component: () =&gt; import('@/views/power/ModuleInfo.vue') }, { path: 'strong-electric', name: import('@/views/workorder/AlarmDispatch.vue') } ] } ] const router = createRouter({ history: createWebHistory(), routes }) export default router </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-8">src/style/index.scss</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/style/index.scss</div> <div class="code-block">$primary-color: #1890ff; $success-color: #52c41a; $warning-color: #faad14; $danger-color: #f5222d; $info-color: #1890ff; $bg-color: #f0f2f5; $sidebar-bg: #001529; $header-bg: #ffffff; $text-primary: #1f1f1f; $text-secondary: #666666; $text-light: #999999; $border-color: #e8e8e8; $shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); @mixin flex-center { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } @mixin flex-between { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } @mixin ellipsis { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .page-container { padding: 20px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: $shadow; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid $border-color; .title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: $text-primary; } } .el-table { --el-table-row-hover-bg-color: #fafafa; } .el-button { --el-button-primary-bg-color: $primary-color; --el-button-primary-border-color: $primary-color; } </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-9">src/views/device/CameraManage.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/device/CameraManage.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;main-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;left-sidebar&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;sidebar-header&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;treeSearch&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入层级名称&quot; class=&quot;sidebar-search&quot; &gt; &lt;template #prefix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Search /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-tree :data=&quot;treeData&quot; :props=&quot;defaultProps&quot; show-checkbox node-key=&quot;id&quot; :default-expand-all=&quot;true&quot; :expand-on-click-node=&quot;false&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;right-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleAdd&quot;&gt;新增&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; :disabled=&quot;selectedRows.length === 0&quot; @click=&quot;handleBatchDelete&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filterProduct&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择所属产品&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;海康枪机摄像头&quot; value=&quot;海康枪机摄像头&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;海康球机摄像头&quot; value=&quot;海康球机摄像头&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;filterKeyword&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入名称或编号查&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filterNetworkStatus&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择网络状态&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;在线&quot; value=&quot;online&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;离线&quot; value=&quot;offline&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSearch&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleReset&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;table-wrapper&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredData&quot; border class=&quot;data-table&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleSelectionChange&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;product&quot; label=&quot;所属产品&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;deviceNo&quot; label=&quot;设备编号&quot; min-width=&quot;180&quot; sortable&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;设备名称&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot; sortable&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;deviceType&quot; label=&quot;设备类型&quot; width=&quot;80&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lampPost&quot; label=&quot;所属灯杆&quot; min-width=&quot;100&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;networkStatus&quot; label=&quot;网络状态&quot; width=&quot;90&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lastOnline&quot; label=&quot;最后在线时间&quot; min-width=&quot;160&quot; sortable&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;150&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleEdit(row)&quot;&gt;修改&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDetail(row)&quot;&gt;详情&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDelete(row)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot; v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot; :total=&quot;total&quot; layout=&quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&gt;, total&quot; @size-change=&quot;handleSizeChange&quot; @current-change=&quot;handleCurrentChange&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;新增&quot; v-model=&quot;showAddDialog&quot; width=&quot;600px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot; class=&quot;form-container&quot;&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*所属产品&quot; prop=&quot;product&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.product&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择所属产品&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;海康枪机摄像头&quot; value=&quot;海康枪机摄像头&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;海康球机摄像头&quot; value=&quot;海康球机摄像头&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*设备编号&quot; prop=&quot;deviceNo&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.deviceNo&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入设备编号&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*设备名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入设备名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;设备型号&quot; prop=&quot;model&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*摄像头类型&quot; prop=&quot;cameraType&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.cameraType&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择摄像头类型&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;枪机&quot; value=&quot;枪机&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;半球&quot; value=&quot;半球&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*所属层级&quot; prop=&quot;level&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.level&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择所属层级&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;长沙&quot; value=&quot;长沙&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;岳麓区&quot; value=&quot;岳麓区&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;先导路&quot; value=&quot;先导路&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天1栋&quot; value=&quot;力唯中天1栋&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; placeholder=&quot;请选择&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;展厅隧道灯&quot; value=&quot;展厅隧道灯&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;光亚展灯杆&quot; value=&quot;光亚展灯杆&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;1号楼-极简05&quot; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;设备经度&quot; prop=&quot;longitude&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.longitude&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入&quot;&gt; &lt;template #suffix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;MapLocation /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;设备纬度&quot; prop=&quot;latitude&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.latitude&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入&quot;&gt; &lt;template #suffix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;MapLocation /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; placeholder=&quot;请输入IP地址&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;端口号&quot; prop=&quot;port&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.port&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入端口号&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showAddDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleConfirm&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;详情&quot; v-model=&quot;showDetailDialog&quot; width=&quot;500px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-descriptions :column=&quot;2&quot; :data=&quot;detailData&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;所属产品&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.product }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;设备编号&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.deviceNo }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;设备名称&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.name }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;设备型号&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.model }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;摄像头类型&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.cameraType }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;所属层级&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.level }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;所属灯杆&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.lampPost }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;设备经度&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.longitude }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;设备纬度&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.latitude }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;IP地址&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.ipAddress }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;端口号&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.port }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;网络状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;detailData.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ detailData.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;最后在线时间&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.lastOnline }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue'; import { Search, MapLocation } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'; const treeSearch = ref(''); const filterProduct = ref(''); const filterKeyword = ref(''); const filterNetworkStatus = ref(''); const currentPage = ref(1); const pageSize = ref(15); const selectedRows = ref([]); const showAddDialog = ref(false); const showDetailDialog = ref(false); const formData = ref({ product: '', deviceNo: '', name: '', model: '', cameraType: '枪机', level: '', lampPost: '', longitude: '', latitude: '', ipAddress: '', port: '' }); const detailData = ref({}); const treeData = ref([ { id: 1, label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 2, label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 3, label: '先导路' }, { id: 4, label: '力唯中天1栋' } ] } ] } ]); const defaultProps = { children: 'children', label: 'label' }; const mockData = ref([ { no: 1, product: '海康枪机摄像头', deviceNo: 'd31c52e77ed045db87', name: '特种照明', deviceType: '枪机', lampPost: '展厅隧道灯', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-01-10 19:10:00' }, { no: 2, product: '海康枪机摄像头', deviceNo: '66c0443f92f94d0ebce', name: '展厅入口', deviceType: '枪机', lampPost: '展厅隧道灯', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-01-10 19:10:00' }, { no: 3, product: '海康枪机摄像头', deviceNo: 'df56e1193c464153bf1', name: '路灯全景', deviceType: '枪机', lampPost: '展厅隧道灯', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 17:50:00' }, { no: 4, product: '海康枪机摄像头', deviceNo: '5dfe7819888140f9b7d', name: '路灯大屏', deviceType: '枪机', lampPost: '展厅隧道灯', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 17:50:00' }, { no: 5, product: '海康枪机摄像头', deviceNo: '2572900662644fe7b0d', name: '隧道直筒摄像头', deviceType: '枪机', lampPost: '展厅隧道灯', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 17:50:00' }, { no: 6, product: '海康枪机摄像头', deviceNo: 'a41b5ab812454bc69f3', name: '思科来展厅', deviceType: '枪机', lampPost: '展厅隧道灯', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 17:50:00' }, { no: 7, product: '海康球机摄像头', deviceNo: 'f05921c29d02420b90d', name: '展会监控', deviceType: '半球', lampPost: '光亚展灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-07-11 10:40:00' }, { no: 8, product: '海康球机摄像头', deviceNo: '199b98f8b87d498ab03', name: '展厅入口', deviceType: '球机', lampPost: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-11-30 10:10:00' }, { no: 9, product: '海康球机摄像头', deviceNo: '199b98f8b87d498ab03', name: '路灯展厅操作区监控', deviceType: '球机', lampPost: '1号楼-极简05', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-11-30 10:10:00' }, { no: 10, product: '海康球机摄像头', deviceNo: '4606f32216694897a26', name: '路灯展厅灯杆区监控', deviceType: '球机', lampPost: '2号楼-极简08', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-11-30 10:10:00' }, { no: 11, product: '海康球机摄像头', deviceNo: '30faa1258de945c7acd', name: '路灯展厅隧道区监控', deviceType: '球机', lampPost: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-11-30 10:10:00' }, { no: 12, product: '海康球机摄像头', deviceNo: '1f7a35628d3a4c718f6', name: '路灯展厅模组区监控', deviceType: '球机', lampPost: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-11-30 10:10:00' } ]); const total = computed(() =&gt; mockData.value.length); const filteredData = computed(() =&gt; { let data = [...mockData.value]; if (filterProduct.value) { data = data.filter(item =&gt; item.product === filterProduct.value); } if (filterKeyword.value) { const keyword = filterKeyword.value.toLowerCase(); data = data.filter(item =&gt; item.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword) || item.deviceNo.toLowerCase().includes(keyword)); } if (filterNetworkStatus.value) { data = data.filter(item =&gt; item.networkStatus === filterNetworkStatus.value); } return data.slice((currentPage.value - 1) * pageSize.value, currentPage.value * pageSize.value); }); const handleSearch = () =&gt; { currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleReset = () =&gt; { filterProduct.value = ''; filterKeyword.value = ''; filterNetworkStatus.value = ''; currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&gt; { selectedRows.value = val; }; const handleAdd = () =&gt; { showAddDialog.value = true; formData.value = { product: '', deviceNo: '', name: '', model: '', cameraType: '枪机', level: '', lampPost: '', longitude: '', latitude: '', ipAddress: '', port: '' }; }; const handleEdit = (row) =&gt; { showAddDialog.value = true; formData.value = { ...row }; }; const handleDetail = (row) =&gt; { showDetailDialog.value = true; detailData.value = { ...row }; }; const handleDelete = (row) =&gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.deviceNo === row.deviceNo); if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1); } }; const handleBatchDelete = () =&gt; { selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.deviceNo === row.deviceNo); if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1); } }); selectedRows.value = []; }; const handleConfirm = () =&gt; { if (!formData.value.product || !formData.value.deviceNo || !formData.value.name || !formData.value.cameraType || !formData.value.level) { alert('请填写所有必填字段'); return; } const newRecord = { no: mockData.value.length + 1, product: formData.value.product, deviceNo: formData.value.deviceNo, name: formData.value.name, deviceType: formData.value.cameraType, lampPost: formData.value.lampPost || '-', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: new Date().toLocaleString() }; mockData.value.push(newRecord); showAddDialog.value = false; }; const handleSizeChange = (val) =&gt; { pageSize.value = val; currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleCurrentChange = (val) =&gt; { currentPage.value = val; }; &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { display: flex; height: calc(100vh - 60px); } .main-content { display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .left-sidebar { width: 200px; background: #fafafa; border-right: 1px solid #e8e8e8; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .sidebar-header { padding: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .sidebar-search { width: 100%; } .right-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; padding: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; } .filter-select { width: 180px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .table-wrapper { flex: 1; overflow-x: auto; overflow-y: auto; min-height: 0; } .data-table { width: 100%; min-width: 1200px; } .pagination-bar { display: flex; justify-content: center; padding: 15px 0; } .form-container { padding: 10px 0; } .form-select { width: 100%; } &lt;/style&gt;</div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-10">src/views/device/DeviceAdd.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/device/DeviceAdd.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;新增设备&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;router-link to=&quot;/device/list&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button&gt;返回列表&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/router-link&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; label-width=&quot;120px&quot; class=&quot;device-form&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;section-title&quot;&gt;基本信息&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;设备编号&quot; prop=&quot;id&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.id&quot; placeholder=&quot;自动生成&quot; disabled /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;设备名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot; required&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入设备名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;设备型号&quot; prop=&quot;model&quot; required&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.model&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入设备型号&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;设备类型&quot; prop=&quot;type&quot; required&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.type&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择设备类型&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;LED路灯&quot; value=&quot;LED路灯&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;高压钠灯&quot; value=&quot;高压钠灯&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;金卤灯&quot; value=&quot;金卤灯&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;其他&quot; value=&quot;其他&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;section-title&quot;&gt;安装信息&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;安装位置&quot; prop=&quot;location&quot; required&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.location&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入安装位置&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;安装日期&quot; prop=&quot;installDate&quot;&gt; &lt;el-date-picker v-model=&quot;formData.installDate&quot; type=&quot;date&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择安装日期&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;section-title&quot;&gt;设备参数&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;额定电压(V)&quot; prop=&quot;voltage&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.voltage&quot; type=&quot;number&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入额定电压&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;额定功率(W)&quot; prop=&quot;power&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.power&quot; type=&quot;number&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入额定功率&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;亮度(%)&quot; prop=&quot;brightness&quot;&gt; &lt;el-slider v-model=&quot;formData.brightness&quot; :min=&quot;0&quot; :max=&quot;100&quot; :step=&quot;1&quot; show-input /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;section-title&quot;&gt;维护信息&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;上次维护日期&quot; prop=&quot;lastMaintenance&quot;&gt; &lt;el-date-picker v-model=&quot;formData.lastMaintenance&quot; type=&quot;date&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择维护日期&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;备注信息&quot; prop=&quot;remark&quot;&gt; &lt;el-textarea v-model=&quot;formData.remark&quot; rows=&quot;3&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入备注信息&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;router-link to=&quot;/device/list&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/router-link&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;submitForm&quot;&gt;提交&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref } from 'vue' import { useRouter } from 'vue-router' const router = useRouter() const formData = ref({ id: '', name: '', model: '', type: '', location: '', installDate: '', voltage: 220, power: 150, brightness: 80, lastMaintenance: '', remark: '', status: 'offline' }) const generateId = () =&gt; { const timestamp = Date.now().toString(36).toUpperCase() return 'DVC' + timestamp.slice(-3) + String(Math.random()).slice(-3).toUpperCase() } const submitForm = () =&gt; { if (!formData.value.name || !formData.value.model || !formData.value.type || !formData.value.location) { ElMessage.warning('请填写必填项') return } formData.value.id = generateId() ElMessage.success('设备添加成功') router.push('/device/list') } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .device-form { max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; } .form-section { margin-bottom: 25px; padding: 20px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 8px; } .section-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; color: #333; } .form-actions { display: flex; gap: 15px; justify-content: center; padding-top: 20px; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-11">src/views/device/DeviceDetail.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/device/DeviceDetail.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;设备详情&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;router-link to=&quot;/device/list&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button&gt;返回列表&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/router-link&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div v-if=&quot;device&quot; class=&quot;detail-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;detail-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;device-title&quot;&gt; &lt;h2&gt;{{ device.name }}&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getStatusTagType(device.status)&quot; class=&quot;status-tag&quot;&gt; {{ getStatusText(device.status) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;device-id&quot;&gt;设备编号: {{ device.id }}&lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;detail-grid&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;detail-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-title&quot;&gt;基本信息&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-form label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;设备型号&quot;&gt;{{ device.model }}&lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;设备类型&quot;&gt;{{ device.type }}&lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;安装位置&quot;&gt;{{ device.location }}&lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;安装日期&quot;&gt;{{ device.installDate }}&lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;detail-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-title&quot;&gt;设备参数&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-form label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;额定电压&quot;&gt;{{ device.voltage }}V&lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;额定功率&quot;&gt;{{ device.power }}W&lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;当前亮度&quot;&gt; &lt;el-progress :percentage=&quot;device.brightness&quot; :show-text=&quot;true&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item v-if=&quot;device.faultReason&quot; label=&quot;故障原因&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag type=&quot;danger&quot;&gt;{{ device.faultReason }}&lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;detail-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-title&quot;&gt;维护信息&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-form label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;上次维护&quot;&gt;{{ device.lastMaintenance }}&lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;下次维护&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag type=&quot;info&quot;&gt;{{ getNextMaintenance(device.lastMaintenance) }}&lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;detail-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;router-link :to=&quot;'/device/add'&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot;&gt;复制新增&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/router-link&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;goBack&quot;&gt;返回列表&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, onMounted } from 'vue' import { useRoute, useRouter } from 'vue-router' import { deviceList } from '@/data/mockData' const route = useRoute() const router = useRouter() const device = ref(null) onMounted(() =&gt; { const id = route.params.id device.value = deviceList.find(d =&gt; d.id === id) || deviceList[0] }) const getStatusTagType = (status) =&gt; { switch (status) { case 'online': return 'success' case 'offline': return 'info' case 'fault': return 'danger' default: return 'info' } } const getStatusText = (status) =&gt; { switch (status) { case 'online': return '在线' case 'offline': return '离线' case 'fault': return '故障' default: return status } } const getNextMaintenance = (lastDate) =&gt; { if (!lastDate) return '未维护' const date = new Date(lastDate) date.setMonth(date.getMonth() + 3) return date.toISOString().split('T')[0] } const goBack = () =&gt; { router.push('/device/list') } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .detail-header { margin-bottom: 25px; padding: 20px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); border-radius: 8px; color: #fff; } .device-title { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 10px; } .device-title h2 { margin: 0; font-size: 24px; } .status-tag { font-size: 12px; } .device-id { font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.9; } .detail-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 25px; } .detail-card { background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); } .card-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0; color: #333; } .detail-actions { display: flex; gap: 15px; justify-content: center; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-12">src/views/device/DeviceList.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/device/DeviceList.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;设备台账&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;router-link to=&quot;/device/add&quot; class=&quot;add-btn&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot;&gt; &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.Plus&quot; /&gt; 新增设备 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/router-link&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stats-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-item online&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-value&quot;&gt;{{ onlineCount }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-label&quot;&gt;在线&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-item offline&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-value&quot;&gt;{{ offlineCount }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-label&quot;&gt;离线&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-item fault&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-value&quot;&gt;{{ faultCount }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-label&quot;&gt;故障&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-item total&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-value&quot;&gt;{{ totalCount }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-label&quot;&gt;总计&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;statusFilter&quot; placeholder=&quot;状态筛选&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;全部&quot; value=&quot;&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;在线&quot; value=&quot;online&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;离线&quot; value=&quot;offline&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;故障&quot; value=&quot;fault&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;searchKeyword&quot; placeholder=&quot;搜索设备名称或编号&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredData&quot; border class=&quot;data-table&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;id&quot; label=&quot;设备编号&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;设备名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;model&quot; label=&quot;设备型号&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;type&quot; label=&quot;设备类型&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;status&quot; label=&quot;状态&quot; width=&quot;100&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getStatusTagType(scope.row.status)&quot;&gt; {{ getStatusText(scope.row.status) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;location&quot; label=&quot;安装位置&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;installDate&quot; label=&quot;安装日期&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lastMaintenance&quot; label=&quot;维护日期&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;180&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt; &lt;router-link :to=&quot;'/device/detail/' + scope.row.id&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;详情&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/router-link&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; type=&quot;warning&quot; @click=&quot;editDevice(scope.row)&quot;&gt;编辑&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; type=&quot;danger&quot; @click=&quot;deleteDevice(scope.row)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;编辑设备&quot; :visible.sync=&quot;editDialogVisible&quot; width=&quot;550px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;设备名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入设备名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;设备型号&quot; prop=&quot;model&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.model&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入设备型号&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;设备类型&quot; prop=&quot;type&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.type&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;LED路灯&quot; value=&quot;LED路灯&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;高压钠灯&quot; value=&quot;高压钠灯&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;金卤灯&quot; value=&quot;金卤灯&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;其他&quot; value=&quot;其他&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;安装位置&quot; prop=&quot;location&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.location&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入安装位置&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;额定电压&quot; prop=&quot;voltage&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.voltage&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入额定电压&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;额定功率&quot; prop=&quot;power&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.power&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入额定功率&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;editDialogVisible = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;saveEdit&quot;&gt;保存&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { deviceList } from '@/data/mockData' const icons = { Plus } const statusFilter = ref('') const searchKeyword = ref('') const editDialogVisible = ref(false) const formData = ref({}) const tableData = ref([...deviceList]) const totalCount = computed(() =&gt; tableData.value.length) const onlineCount = computed(() =&gt; tableData.value.filter(item =&gt; item.status === 'online').length) const offlineCount = computed(() =&gt; tableData.value.filter(item =&gt; item.status === 'offline').length) const faultCount = computed(() =&gt; tableData.value.filter(item =&gt; item.status === 'fault').length) const filteredData = computed(() =&gt; { return tableData.value.filter(item =&gt; { const statusMatch = !statusFilter.value || item.status === statusFilter.value const keywordMatch = !searchKeyword.value || item.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchKeyword.value.toLowerCase()) || item.id.toLowerCase().includes(searchKeyword.value.toLowerCase()) return statusMatch &amp;&amp; keywordMatch }) }) const getStatusTagType = (status) =&gt; { switch (status) { case 'online': return 'success' case 'offline': return 'info' case 'fault': return 'danger' default: return 'info' } } const getStatusText = (status) =&gt; { switch (status) { case 'online': return '在线' case 'offline': return '离线' case 'fault': return '故障' default: return status } } const editDevice = (row) =&gt; { formData.value = { ...row } editDialogVisible.value = true } const deleteDevice = (row) =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( '确定要删除该设备吗？', '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&gt; { const index = tableData.value.findIndex(d =&gt; d.id === row.id) if (index &gt; -1) { tableData.value.splice(index, 1) } ElMessage.success('删除成功') }).catch(() =&gt; { ElMessage.info('已取消删除') }) } const saveEdit = () =&gt; { const index = tableData.value.findIndex(d =&gt; d.id === formData.value.id) if (index &gt; -1) { tableData.value[index] = { ...formData.value } } ElMessage.success('修改成功') editDialogVisible.value = false } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .stats-card { display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .stat-item { flex: 1; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; &amp;.online { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #11998e 0%, #38ef7d 100%); } &amp;.offline { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4facfe 0%, #00f2fe 100%); } &amp;.fault { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ee5a24 100%); } &amp;.total { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); } } .stat-value { display: block; font-size: 32px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 5px; color: #fff; } .stat-label { font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.9; color: #fff; } .filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; justify-content: flex-end; } .filter-select { width: 150px; } .filter-input { width: 250px; } .data-table { width: 100%; } .add-btn { text-decoration: none; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-13">src/views/device/EnvironmentSensorManage.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: show-checkbox node-key=&quot;id&quot; :default-expand-all=&quot;true&quot; :expand-on-click-node=&quot;false&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;right-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filterProduct&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择所属产品&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;环境传感器&quot; value=&quot;环境传感器&quot; /&gt; placeholder=&quot;请选择连接方式&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;网关透传&quot; value=&quot;网关透传&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filterNetworkStatus&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择网络状态&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;在线&quot; value=&quot;online&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;离线&quot; value=&quot;offline&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSearch&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleReset&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;table-wrapper&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredData&quot; border class=&quot;data-table&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleSelectionChange&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;product&quot; label=&quot;所属产品&quot; min-width=&quot;100&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;connection&quot; label=&quot;连接方式&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;deviceNo&quot; label=&quot;设备编号&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot; sortable&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;设备名称&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot; sortable&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lampPost&quot; label=&quot;所属灯杆&quot; min-width=&quot;100&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;networkStatus&quot; label=&quot;网络状态&quot; width=&quot;90&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lastOnline&quot; label=&quot;最后在线时间&quot; min-width=&quot;160&quot; sortable&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;200&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleHistory(row)&quot;&gt;历史数据&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleEdit(row)&quot;&gt;修改&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDetail(row)&quot;&gt;详情&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot; v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot; :total=&quot;total&quot; layout=&quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&gt;, total&quot; @size-change=&quot;handleSizeChange&quot; &lt;el-option label=&quot;岳麓区&quot; value=&quot;岳麓区&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;先导路&quot; value=&quot;先导路&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天1栋&quot; value=&quot;力唯中天1栋&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*设备名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入设备名称&quot;
