&lt;el-option label=&quot;-&quot; value=&quot;-&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;展厅隧道灯&quot; value=&quot;展厅隧道灯&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;光亚展灯杆&quot; value=&quot;光亚展灯杆&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;备注说明&quot; prop=&quot;remark&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.remark&quot; type=&quot;textarea&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入&quot; :maxlength=&quot;50&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;资产信息&quot; name=&quot;asset&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;assetData&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot; class=&quot;form-container&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;资产编号&quot; prop=&quot;assetNo&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;assetData.assetNo&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入资产编号&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;安装位置&quot; prop=&quot;installLocation&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;assetData.installLocation&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入安装位置&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;安装日期&quot; prop=&quot;installDate&quot;&gt; &lt;el-date-picker v-model=&quot;assetData.installDate&quot; type=&quot;date&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择安装日期&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;维护日期&quot; prop=&quot;maintainDate&quot;&gt; &lt;el-date-picker v-model=&quot;assetData.maintainDate&quot; type=&quot;date&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择维护日期&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;供应商&quot; prop=&quot;supplier&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;assetData.supplier&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入供应商&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;备注&quot; prop=&quot;remark&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;assetData.remark&quot; type=&quot;textarea&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入备注&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;/el-tabs&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showAddDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleConfirm&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;详情&quot; v-model=&quot;showDetailDialog&quot; width=&quot;500px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-descriptions :column=&quot;2&quot; :data=&quot;detailData&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;所属产品&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.product }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;连接方式&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.connection }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;设备编号&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.deviceNo }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;设备名称&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.name }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;RS485地址&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.rs485Address }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;所属层级&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.level }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;所属灯杆&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.lampPost }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;备注说明&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.remark }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;网络状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;detailData.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ detailData.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;最后在线时间&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.lastOnline }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;历史数据&quot; v-model=&quot;showHistoryDialog&quot; width=&quot;600px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;historyData&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;time&quot; label=&quot;时间&quot; min-width=&quot;160&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;temperature&quot; label=&quot;温度(°C)&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;humidity&quot; label=&quot;湿度(%)&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showHistoryDialog = false&quot;&gt;关闭&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue'; import { Search } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'; const treeSearch = ref(''); const filterProduct = ref(''); const filterKeyword = ref(''); const filterConnection = ref(''); const filterNetworkStatus = ref(''); const currentPage = ref(1); const pageSize = ref(15); const selectedRows = ref([]); const showAddDialog = ref(false); const showDetailDialog = ref(false); const showHistoryDialog = ref(false); const activeTab = ref('basic'); const formData = ref({ product: '', connection: '', deviceNo: '', name: '', rs485Address: '', level: '', lampPost: '-', remark: '' }); const assetData = ref({ assetNo: '', installLocation: '', installDate: '', maintainDate: '', supplier: '', remark: '' }); const detailData = ref({}); const historyData = ref([]); const treeData = ref([ { id: 1, label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 2, label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 3, label: '先导路' }, { id: 4, label: '力唯中天1栋' } ] } ] } ]); const defaultProps = { children: 'children', label: 'label' }; const mockData = ref([ { no: 1, product: '环境传感器', connection: '网关透传', deviceNo: '00-14-97-4B-A1-46', name: '温湿度', lampPost: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-04-22 10:26:58' } ]); const total = computed(() =&gt; mockData.value.length); const filteredData = computed(() =&gt; { let data = [...mockData.value]; if (filterProduct.value) { data = data.filter(item =&gt; item.product === filterProduct.value); } if (filterKeyword.value) { const keyword = filterKeyword.value.toLowerCase(); data = data.filter(item =&gt; item.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword)); } if (filterConnection.value) { data = data.filter(item =&gt; item.connection === filterConnection.value); } if (filterNetworkStatus.value) { data = data.filter(item =&gt; item.networkStatus === filterNetworkStatus.value); } return data.slice((currentPage.value - 1) * pageSize.value, currentPage.value * pageSize.value); }); const handleSearch = () =&gt; { currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleReset = () =&gt; { filterProduct.value = ''; filterKeyword.value = ''; filterConnection.value = ''; filterNetworkStatus.value = ''; currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&gt; { selectedRows.value = val; }; const handleAdd = () =&gt; { showAddDialog.value = true; formData.value = { product: '', connection: '', deviceNo: '', name: '', rs485Address: '', level: '', lampPost: '-', remark: '' }; assetData.value = { assetNo: '', installLocation: '', installDate: '', maintainDate: '', supplier: '', remark: '' }; activeTab.value = 'basic'; }; const handleEdit = (row) =&gt; { showAddDialog.value = true; formData.value = { ...row }; activeTab.value = 'basic'; }; const handleDetail = (row) =&gt; { showDetailDialog.value = true; detailData.value = { ...row }; }; const handleHistory = (row) =&gt; { showHistoryDialog.value = true; historyData.value = [ { time: '2024-04-22 10:26:58', temperature: '25.3', humidity: '65' }, { time: '2024-04-22 10:25:00', temperature: '25.1', humidity: '64' }, { time: '2024-04-22 10:24:00', temperature: '25.0', humidity: '63' }, { time: '2024-04-22 10:23:00', temperature: '24.9', humidity: '62' }, { time: '2024-04-22 10:22:00', temperature: '24.8', humidity: '61' } ]; }; const handleDelete = (row) =&gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.deviceNo === row.deviceNo); if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1); } }; const handleBatchDelete = () =&gt; { selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.deviceNo === row.deviceNo); if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1); } }); selectedRows.value = []; }; const handleConfirm = () =&gt; { if (!formData.value.product || !formData.value.connection || !formData.value.deviceNo || !formData.value.name || !formData.value.rs485Address || !formData.value.level) { alert('请填写所有必填字段'); return; } const newRecord = { no: mockData.value.length + 1, product: formData.value.product, connection: formData.value.connection, deviceNo: formData.value.deviceNo, name: formData.value.name, lampPost: formData.value.lampPost || '-', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: new Date().toLocaleString() }; mockData.value.push(newRecord); showAddDialog.value = false; }; const handleSizeChange = (val) =&gt; { pageSize.value = val; currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleCurrentChange = (val) =&gt; { currentPage.value = val; }; &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { display: flex; height: calc(100vh - 60px); } .main-content { display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .left-sidebar { width: 200px; background: #fafafa; border-right: 1px solid #e8e8e8; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .sidebar-header { padding: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .sidebar-search { width: 100%; } .right-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; padding: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; } .filter-select { width: 180px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .table-wrapper { flex: 1; overflow-x: auto; overflow-y: auto; min-height: 0; } .data-table { width: 100%; min-width: 1200px; } .pagination-bar { display: flex; justify-content: center; padding: 15px 0; } .form-container { padding: 10px 0; } .form-select { width: 100%; } &lt;/style&gt;</div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-14">src/views/device/LampControlManage.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/device/LampControlManage.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;main-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;left-sidebar&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;sidebar-header&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;treeSearch&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入层级名称&quot; class=&quot;sidebar-search&quot; &gt; &lt;template #prefix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Search /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-tree :data=&quot;treeData&quot; :props=&quot;defaultProps&quot; show-checkbox node-key=&quot;id&quot; :default-expand-all=&quot;true&quot; :expand-on-click-node=&quot;false&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;right-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;灯控管理&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleAdd&quot;&gt;新增&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button&gt;批量导入&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button&gt;批量导出&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; :disabled=&quot;selectedRows.length === 0&quot; @click=&quot;handleBatchDelete&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-dropdown&gt; &lt;el-button&gt;更多操作&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;template #dropdown&gt; &lt;el-dropdown-menu&gt; &lt;el-dropdown-item&gt;设置&lt;/el-dropdown-item&gt; &lt;el-dropdown-item&gt;调试&lt;/el-dropdown-item&gt; &lt;el-dropdown-item&gt;转移&lt;/el-dropdown-item&gt; &lt;el-dropdown-item&gt;同步经纬度&lt;/el-dropdown-item&gt; &lt;el-dropdown-item&gt;数据转发&lt;/el-dropdown-item&gt; &lt;/el-dropdown-menu&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dropdown&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filterProduct&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择所属产品&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;全部&quot; value=&quot;&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;EXC-CAT1&quot; value=&quot;EXC-CAT1&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;电信CAT1&quot; value=&quot;电信CAT1&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filterStatus&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择网络状态&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;全部&quot; value=&quot;&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;在线&quot; value=&quot;online&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;离线&quot; value=&quot;offline&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;searchKeyword&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入IMEI号或名称&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSearch&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleReset&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredData&quot; border class=&quot;data-table&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleSelectionChange&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;60&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;product&quot; label=&quot;所属产品&quot; min-width=&quot;100&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;imei&quot; label=&quot;IMEI号&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot; sortable&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;灯控名称&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot; sortable&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;circuitCount&quot; label=&quot;回路数量&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;poleName&quot; label=&quot;灯杆名称&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot; sortable&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;networkStatus&quot; label=&quot;网络状态&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lastOnline&quot; label=&quot;最后在线时间&quot; min-width=&quot;160&quot; sortable&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;200&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleEdit(row)&quot;&gt;修改&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;info&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDetail(row)&quot;&gt;详情&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDelete(row)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-wrapper&quot;&gt; &lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot; v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot; :total=&quot;total&quot; :page-sizes=&quot;[10, 15, 20, 50, 100]&quot; layout=&quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&gt;, sizes, total&quot; &gt;&lt;/el-pagination&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;!-- 新增/编辑灯控对话框 --&gt; &lt;el-dialog :title=&quot;isEdit ? '修改灯控' : '新增灯控'&quot; v-model=&quot;showDialog&quot; width=&quot;700px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tabs v-model=&quot;activeTab&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;基本信息&quot; name=&quot;basic&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; :rules=&quot;formRules&quot; ref=&quot;formRef&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*所属产品&quot; prop=&quot;product&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.product&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择所属产品&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;EXC-CAT1&quot; value=&quot;EXC-CAT1&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;电信CAT1&quot; value=&quot;电信CAT1&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*IMEI号&quot; prop=&quot;imei&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.imei&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入灯控IMEI&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*灯控名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入灯控名称&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;绑定线路&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.circuit&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天1栋1号配电柜-主照明回路&quot; value=&quot;circuit1&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天1栋1号配电柜-景观照明回路&quot; value=&quot;circuit2&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天1栋2号配电柜-主照明回路&quot; value=&quot;circuit3&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天1栋2号配电柜-景观照明回路&quot; value=&quot;circuit4&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*所属灯杆&quot; prop=&quot;poleName&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.poleName&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择所属灯杆&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天1栋1号灯杆&quot; value=&quot;力唯中天1栋1号灯杆&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天1栋2号灯杆&quot; value=&quot;力唯中天1栋2号灯杆&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天1栋3号灯杆&quot; value=&quot;力唯中天1栋3号灯杆&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天1栋4号灯杆&quot; value=&quot;力唯中天1栋4号灯杆&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*回路数&quot; prop=&quot;circuitCount&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.circuitCount&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择回路数&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;1&quot; :value=&quot;1&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;2&quot; :value=&quot;2&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;3&quot; :value=&quot;3&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;4&quot; :value=&quot;4&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;调光类型&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio-group v-model=&quot;formData.dimmingType&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;正向&quot;&gt;正向&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;逆向&quot;&gt;逆向&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;/el-radio-group&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;资产信息&quot; name=&quot;asset&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;asset-content&quot;&gt; &lt;p&gt;资产信息模块开发中...&lt;/p&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;/el-tabs&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSubmit&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;!-- 详情对话框 --&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;灯控详情&quot; v-model=&quot;showDetailDialog&quot; width=&quot;800px&quot;&gt; &lt;div v-if=&quot;selectedItem&quot; class=&quot;detail-content&quot;&gt; &lt;el-descriptions :column=&quot;2&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;所属产品&quot;&gt;{{ selectedItem.product }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;IMEI号&quot;&gt;{{ selectedItem.imei }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;灯控名称&quot;&gt;{{ selectedItem.name }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;灯杆名称&quot;&gt;{{ selectedItem.poleName }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;回路数量&quot;&gt;{{ selectedItem.circuitCount }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;网络状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;selectedItem.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ selectedItem.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;最后在线&quot;&gt;{{ selectedItem.lastOnline }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus' import { Search } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(15) const total = ref(61) const searchKeyword = ref('') const filterProduct = ref('') const filterStatus = ref('') const showDialog = ref(false) const showDetailDialog = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const activeTab = ref('basic') const selectedRows = ref([]) const selectedItem = ref(null) const treeSearch = ref('') const formRef = ref(null) const defaultProps = { label: 'label', children: 'children' } const treeData = ref([ { id: 1, label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 2, label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 3, label: '先导路' }, { id: 4, label: '力唯中天1栋' } ] } ] } ]) const lampControlData = ref([ { no: 1, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066803780', name: '展示0303Z08', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋1号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-06-07 18:19:15' }, { no: 2, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066830981', name: '展示0401Z10', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋2号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-10-15 05:05:40' }, { no: 3, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066389699', name: '展示0504Z02', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋3号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-06-07 16:26:54' }, { no: 4, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066368727', name: '展示0503Z02', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋4号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-09-28 15:16:56' }, { no: 5, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066365889', name: '展示0502Z01', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋1号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-09-28 15:16:59' }, { no: 6, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066389038', name: '展示0501Z01', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋2号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-11-22 18:55:35' }, { no: 7, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066361359', name: '展示0204Z05', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋3号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-29 21:19:55' }, { no: 8, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066801586', name: '展示0203Z05', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋4号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-01-12 15:02:40' }, { no: 9, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066368735', name: '展示0202Z05', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋1号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-03-20 10:47:38' }, { no: 10, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066392321', name: '展示0201Z05', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋2号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-02-26 15:24:25' }, { no: 11, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066785755', name: '展示0304Z08', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋3号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-06-07 18:19:58' }, { no: 12, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066817368', name: '展示0302Z08', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋4号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-06-16 11:34:39' }, { no: 13, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066841392', name: '展示0301Z08', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋1号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-03-24 10:54:54' }, { no: 14, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066392024', name: '展示0404Z10', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋2号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-11-26 15:16:32' }, { no: 15, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066793361', name: '展示0403Z10', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋3号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-01-30 18:48:58' } ]) const formData = ref({ product: '', imei: '', name: '', circuit: '', poleName: '', circuitCount: '', dimmingType: '正向' }) const formRules = { product: [{ required: true, message: '请选择所属产品', trigger: 'change' }], imei: [{ required: true, message: '请输入IMEI号', trigger: 'blur' }], name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入灯控名称', trigger: 'blur' }], poleName: [{ required: true, message: '请选择所属灯杆', trigger: 'change' }], circuitCount: [{ required: true, message: '请选择回路数', trigger: 'change' }] } const filteredData = computed(() =&gt; { let result = lampControlData.value if (filterProduct.value) { result = result.filter(item =&gt; item.product === filterProduct.value) } if (filterStatus.value) { result = result.filter(item =&gt; item.networkStatus === filterStatus.value) } if (searchKeyword.value) { result = result.filter(item =&gt; item.imei.includes(searchKeyword.value) || item.name.includes(searchKeyword.value) ) } return result }) const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const handleSearch = () =&gt; { ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const handleReset = () =&gt; { searchKeyword.value = '' filterProduct.value = '' filterStatus.value = '' } const handleAdd = () =&gt; { isEdit.value = false formData.value = { product: '', imei: '', name: '', circuit: '', poleName: '', circuitCount: '', dimmingType: '正向' } showDialog.value = true } const handleEdit = (row) =&gt; { isEdit.value = true formData.value = { product: row.product, imei: row.imei, name: row.name, circuit: '', poleName: row.poleName, circuitCount: row.circuitCount, dimmingType: '正向' } showDialog.value = true } const handleDetail = (row) =&gt; { selectedItem.value = row showDetailDialog.value = true } const handleDelete = (row) =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要删除灯控【${row.name}】吗？`, '删除确认', { type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&gt; { const index = lampControlData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.imei === row.imei) if (index !== -1) { lampControlData.value.splice(index, 1) } ElMessage.success('删除成功') }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const handleBatchDelete = () =&gt; { if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要删除的灯控') return } ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要删除选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个灯控吗？`, '批量删除确认', { type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&gt; { const imeis = selectedRows.value.map(row =&gt; row.imei) lampControlData.value = lampControlData.value.filter(item =&gt; !imeis.includes(item.imei)) selectedRows.value = [] ElMessage.success('批量删除成功') }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const handleSubmit = () =&gt; { formRef.value?.validate((valid) =&gt; { if (valid) { if (isEdit.value) { const index = lampControlData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.imei === formData.value.imei) if (index !== -1) { lampControlData.value[index].name = formData.value.name lampControlData.value[index].poleName = formData.value.poleName lampControlData.value[index].circuitCount = formData.value.circuitCount } ElMessage.success('修改成功') } else { const newNo = lampControlData.value.length &gt; 0 ? Math.max(...lampControlData.value.map(item =&gt; item.no)) + 1 : 1 lampControlData.value.push({ no: newNo, product: formData.value.product, imei: formData.value.imei, name: formData.value.name, circuitCount: formData.value.circuitCount, poleName: formData.value.poleName, networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN') }) ElMessage.success('新增成功') } showDialog.value = false } }) } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #fff; padding: 20px; } .main-content { display: flex; gap: 20px; height: 100%; } .left-sidebar { width: 200px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e8e8e8; padding: 15px; flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .sidebar-header { margin-bottom: 15px; } .sidebar-search :deep(.el-input__wrapper) { background: #fff; } .left-sidebar :deep(.el-tree) { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; } .right-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .page-header .title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; padding: 12px 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 8px; } .filter-select { width: 150px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .data-table { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .detail-content { padding: 10px 0; } .asset-content { padding: 40px; text-align: center; color: #6b7a8f; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-15">src/views/device/LampPostManage.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/device/LampPostManage.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-right&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleAdd&quot;&gt;新增&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button&gt;批量导入&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button&gt;批量导出&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; :disabled=&quot;selectedRows.length === 0&quot; @click=&quot;handleBatchDelete&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button class=&quot;map-btn&quot;&gt;地图&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;content-area&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;left-panel&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;treeSearch&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入层级名称&quot; class=&quot;tree-search&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;treeSearch2&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入层级名称&quot; class=&quot;tree-search&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;el-tree :data=&quot;treeData&quot; :props=&quot;treeProps&quot; :default-expand-all=&quot;true&quot; show-checkbox node-key=&quot;id&quot; class=&quot;tree-component&quot; &gt;&lt;/el-tree&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;right-panel&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;searchKeyword&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入名称进行查询&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSearch&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleReset&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;lampPostData&quot; border class=&quot;data-table&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleSelectionChange&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;60&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lampPostName&quot; label=&quot;灯杆名称&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lampPostNo&quot; label=&quot;灯杆编号&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;specification&quot; label=&quot;规格(米)&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;mountedCount&quot; label=&quot;挂载设备数&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;150&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; fixed=&quot;right&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleEdit(row)&quot;&gt;修改&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDelete(row)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-wrapper&quot;&gt; &lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot; v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot; :total=&quot;total&quot; :page-sizes=&quot;[10, 15, 20, 50, 100]&quot; layout=&quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&gt;, sizes, total&quot; &gt;&lt;/el-pagination&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-dialog :title=&quot;dialogTitle&quot; v-model=&quot;showDialog&quot; width=&quot;900px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; label-width=&quot;120px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;灯杆名称&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.lampPostName&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;灯杆编号&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.lampPostNo&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;灯杆规格&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.specification&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;span style=&quot;margin-left: 5px;&quot;&gt;米&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;所属层级&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.level&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;长沙&quot; value=&quot;1&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;岳麓区&quot; value=&quot;2&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;先导路&quot; value=&quot;3&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天1栋&quot; value=&quot;4&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天2栋&quot; value=&quot;5&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;灯杆经度&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.longitude&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;灯杆纬度&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.latitude&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSubmit&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref } from 'vue' import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus' const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(15) const total = ref(50) const searchKeyword = ref('') const showDialog = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const selectedRows = ref([]) const treeSearch = ref('') const treeSearch2 = ref('') const dialogTitle = ref('新增') const treeProps = { label: 'label', children: 'children' } const treeData = ref([ { id: 1, label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 2, label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 3, label: '先导路', children: [ { id: 4, label: '力唯中天1栋' }, { id: 5, label: '力唯中天2栋' } ] } ] } ] } ]) const lampPostData = ref([ { no: 1, lampPostName: '美人广场新1', lampPostNo: '美人广场新1', specification: 11, mountedCount: 0 }, { no: 2, lampPostName: '灯具展示06', lampPostNo: 'ZS06', specification: 3, mountedCount: 3 }, { no: 3, lampPostName: '灯具展示05', lampPostNo: 'ZS05', specification: 3, mountedCount: 4 }, { no: 4, lampPostName: '灯具展示04', lampPostNo: 'ZS04', specification: 3, mountedCount: 4 }, { no: 5, lampPostName: '灯具展示03', lampPostNo: 'ZS03', specification: 3, mountedCount: 4 }, { no: 6, lampPostName: '灯具展示02', lampPostNo: 'ZS02', specification: 3, mountedCount: 4 }, { no: 7, lampPostName: '灯具展示01', lampPostNo: 'ZS01', specification: 3, mountedCount: 4 }, { no: 8, lampPostName: '彩云街路灯', lampPostNo: 'X001', specification: 0, mountedCount: 0 }, { no: 9, lampPostName: '太阳能测试', lampPostNo: 'T001', specification: 0, mountedCount: 1 }, { no: 10, lampPostName: '光亚展灯杆', lampPostNo: 'GYZ0036', specification: 10, mountedCount: 3 }, { no: 11, lampPostName: 'Z08灯杆(左)', lampPostNo: 'ZT-Z08', specification: 3, mountedCount: 1 }, { no: 12, lampPostName: 'Z05灯杆(中)', lampPostNo: 'ZT-Z05', specification: 3, mountedCount: 1 }, { no: 13, lampPostName: 'Z10灯杆(右)', lampPostNo: 'ZT-Z10', specification: 3, mountedCount: 1 }, { no: 14, lampPostName: '1号楼-极简05', lampPostNo: 'L05', specification: 6, mountedCount: 2 }, { no: 15, lampPostName: '1号楼-极简06', lampPostNo: 'L06', specification: 6, mountedCount: 2 } ]) const formData = ref({ lampPostName: '', lampPostNo: '', specification: '', level: '', longitude: '', latitude: '' }) const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const handleSearch = () =&gt; { ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const handleReset = () =&gt; { searchKeyword.value = '' } const handleAdd = () =&gt; { isEdit.value = false dialogTitle.value = '新增' formData.value = { lampPostName: '', lampPostNo: '', specification: '', level: '', longitude: '', latitude: '' } showDialog.value = true } const handleEdit = (row) =&gt; { isEdit.value = true dialogTitle.value = '编辑灯杆' formData.value = { lampPostName: row.lampPostName, lampPostNo: row.lampPostNo, specification: row.specification, level: '1', longitude: '', latitude: '' } showDialog.value = true } const handleDelete = (row) =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要删除灯杆【${row.lampPostName}】吗？`, '删除确认', { type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&gt; { const index = lampPostData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.no === row.no) if (index !== -1) { lampPostData.value.splice(index, 1) } ElMessage.success('删除成功') }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const handleBatchDelete = () =&gt; { if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要删除的灯杆') return } ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要删除选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个灯杆吗？`, '批量删除确认', { type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&gt; { const nos = selectedRows.value.map(row =&gt; row.no) lampPostData.value = lampPostData.value.filter(item =&gt; !nos.includes(item.no)) selectedRows.value = [] ElMessage.success('批量删除成功') }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const handleSubmit = () =&gt; { if (isEdit.value) { const index = lampPostData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.lampPostNo === formData.value.lampPostNo) if (index !== -1) { lampPostData.value[index].lampPostName = formData.value.lampPostName } ElMessage.success('修改成功') } else { const newNo = lampPostData.value.length &gt; 0 ? Math.max(...lampPostData.value.map(item =&gt; item.no)) + 1 : 1 lampPostData.value.push({ no: newNo, lampPostName: formData.value.lampPostName, lampPostNo: formData.value.lampPostNo, specification: formData.value.specification, mountedCount: 0 }) ElMessage.success('新增成功') } showDialog.value = false } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; } .header-right { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .content-area { flex: 1; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); padding: 15px; display: flex; gap: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .left-panel { width: 220px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; padding: 15px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .tree-search { margin-bottom: 10px; } .tree-component { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; } .right-panel { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .data-table { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-16">src/views/device/VideoRecorderManage.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/device/VideoRecorderManage.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;main-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;left-sidebar&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;sidebar-header&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;treeSearch&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入层级名称&quot; class=&quot;sidebar-search&quot; &gt; &lt;template #prefix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Search /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-tree :data=&quot;treeData&quot; :props=&quot;defaultProps&quot; show-checkbox node-key=&quot;id&quot; :default-expand-all=&quot;true&quot; :expand-on-click-node=&quot;false&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;right-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleAdd&quot;&gt;新增&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; :disabled=&quot;selectedRows.length === 0&quot; @click=&quot;handleBatchDelete&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filterProduct&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择所属产品&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;EXC-CAT1&quot; value=&quot;EXC-CAT1&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;电信CAT1&quot; value=&quot;电信CAT1&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;filterKeyword&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入名称或编号查&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filterNetworkStatus&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择网络状态&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;在线&quot; value=&quot;online&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;离线&quot; value=&quot;offline&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSearch&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleReset&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;table-wrapper&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredData&quot; border class=&quot;data-table&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleSelectionChange&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;product&quot; label=&quot;所属产品&quot; min-width=&quot;100&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;deviceNo&quot; label=&quot;设备编号&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot; sortable&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;设备名称&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot; sortable&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lampPost&quot; label=&quot;所属灯杆&quot; min-width=&quot;100&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;networkStatus&quot; label=&quot;网络状态&quot; width=&quot;90&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lastOnline&quot; label=&quot;最后在线时间&quot; min-width=&quot;160&quot; sortable&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDetail(row)&quot;&gt;详情&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleEdit(row)&quot;&gt;修改&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDelete(row)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot; v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot; :total=&quot;total&quot; layout=&quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&gt;, total&quot; @size-change=&quot;handleSizeChange&quot; @current-change=&quot;handleCurrentChange&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;新增&quot; v-model=&quot;showAddDialog&quot; width=&quot;600px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tabs v-model=&quot;activeTab&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;基本信息&quot; name=&quot;basic&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot; class=&quot;form-container&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*所属产品&quot; prop=&quot;product&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.product&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择所属产品&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;EXC-CAT1&quot; value=&quot;EXC-CAT1&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;电信CAT1&quot; value=&quot;电信CAT1&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*设备编号&quot; prop=&quot;deviceNo&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.deviceNo&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入设备编号&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*设备名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入设备名称&quot;
