&lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*IP地址&quot; prop=&quot;ipAddress&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.ipAddress&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入IP地址&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*端口号&quot; prop=&quot;port&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.port&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入端口号&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*所属层级&quot; prop=&quot;level&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.level&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择所属层级&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;长沙&quot; value=&quot;长沙&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;岳麓区&quot; value=&quot;岳麓区&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;先导路&quot; value=&quot;先导路&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天1栋&quot; value=&quot;力唯中天1栋&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;所属灯杆&quot; prop=&quot;lampPost&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.lampPost&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;灯具展示01&quot; value=&quot;灯具展示01&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;灯具展示02&quot; value=&quot;灯具展示02&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;灯具展示03&quot; value=&quot;灯具展示03&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;设备经度&quot; prop=&quot;longitude&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.longitude&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入&quot;&gt; &lt;template #suffix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;MapLocation /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;设备纬度&quot; prop=&quot;latitude&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.latitude&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入&quot;&gt; &lt;template #suffix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;MapLocation /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*通道数&quot; prop=&quot;channels&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.channels&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择通道数&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;1&quot; value=&quot;1&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;2&quot; value=&quot;2&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;4&quot; value=&quot;4&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;8&quot; value=&quot;8&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*用户名&quot; prop=&quot;username&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.username&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入用户名&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*密码&quot; prop=&quot;password&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.password&quot; type=&quot;password&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入密码&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;资产信息&quot; name=&quot;asset&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;assetData&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot; class=&quot;form-container&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;资产编号&quot; prop=&quot;assetNo&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;assetData.assetNo&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入资产编号&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;安装位置&quot; prop=&quot;installLocation&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;assetData.installLocation&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入安装位置&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;安装日期&quot; prop=&quot;installDate&quot;&gt; &lt;el-date-picker v-model=&quot;assetData.installDate&quot; type=&quot;date&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择安装日期&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;维护日期&quot; prop=&quot;maintainDate&quot;&gt; &lt;el-date-picker v-model=&quot;assetData.maintainDate&quot; type=&quot;date&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择维护日期&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;供应商&quot; prop=&quot;supplier&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;assetData.supplier&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入供应商&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;备注&quot; prop=&quot;remark&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;assetData.remark&quot; type=&quot;textarea&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入备注&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;/el-tabs&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showAddDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleConfirm&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;详情&quot; v-model=&quot;showDetailDialog&quot; width=&quot;500px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-descriptions :column=&quot;2&quot; :data=&quot;detailData&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;所属产品&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.product }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;设备编号&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.deviceNo }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;设备名称&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.name }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;设备型号&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.model }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;IP地址&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.ipAddress }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;端口号&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.port }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;所属层级&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.level }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;所属灯杆&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.lampPost }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;设备经度&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.longitude }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;设备纬度&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.latitude }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;通道数&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.channels }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;网络状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;detailData.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ detailData.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;最后在线时间&quot;&gt;{{ detailData.lastOnline }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt;import { ref, computed } from 'vue'; import { Search, MapLocation } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'; const treeSearch = ref(''); const filterProduct = ref(''); const filterKeyword = ref(''); const filterNetworkStatus = ref(''); const currentPage = ref(1); const pageSize = ref(15); const selectedRows = ref([]); const showAddDialog = ref(false); const showDetailDialog = ref(false); const activeTab = ref('basic'); const formData = ref({ product: '', deviceNo: '', name: '', model: '', ipAddress: '', port: '', level: '', lampPost: '', longitude: '', latitude: '', channels: '', username: '', password: '' }); const assetData = ref({ assetNo: '', installLocation: '', installDate: '', maintainDate: '', supplier: '', remark: '' }); const detailData = ref({}); const treeData = ref([ { id: 1, label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 2, label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 3, label: '先导路' }, { id: 4, label: '力唯中天1栋' } ] } ] } ]); const defaultProps = { children: 'children', label: 'label' }; const mockData = ref([ { no: 1, product: 'EXC-CAT1', deviceNo: 'DVRC001', name: '主入口摄像机', lampPost: '灯具展示01', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2025-06-15 09:30:00' }, { no: 2, product: '电信CAT1', deviceNo: 'DVRC002', name: '停车场摄像机', lampPost: '灯具展示02', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2025-06-15 09:28:00' }, { no: 3, product: 'EXC-CAT1', deviceNo: 'DVRC003', name: '办公楼摄像机', lampPost: '灯具展示03', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-06-14 18:00:00' }, { no: 4, product: '电信CAT1', deviceNo: 'DVRC004', name: '园区摄像机', lampPost: '灯具展示01', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2025-06-15 09:25:00' }, { no: 5, product: 'EXC-CAT1', deviceNo: 'DVRC005', name: '仓库摄像机', lampPost: '灯具展示02', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-06-13 10:00:00' } ]); const total = computed(() =&gt; mockData.value.length); const filteredData = computed(() =&gt; { let data = [...mockData.value]; if (filterProduct.value) { data = data.filter(item =&gt; item.product === filterProduct.value); } if (filterKeyword.value) { const keyword = filterKeyword.value.toLowerCase(); data = data.filter(item =&gt; item.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword) || item.deviceNo.toLowerCase().includes(keyword)); } if (filterNetworkStatus.value) { data = data.filter(item =&gt; item.networkStatus === filterNetworkStatus.value); } return data.slice((currentPage.value - 1) * pageSize.value, currentPage.value * pageSize.value); }); const handleSearch = () =&gt; { currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleReset = () =&gt; { filterProduct.value = ''; filterKeyword.value = ''; filterNetworkStatus.value = ''; currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&gt; { selectedRows.value = val; }; const handleAdd = () =&gt; { showAddDialog.value = true; formData.value = { product: '', deviceNo: '', name: '', model: '', ipAddress: '', port: '', level: '', lampPost: '', longitude: '', latitude: '', channels: '', username: '', password: '' }; assetData.value = { assetNo: '', installLocation: '', installDate: '', maintainDate: '', supplier: '', remark: '' }; activeTab.value = 'basic'; }; const handleEdit = (row) =&gt; { showAddDialog.value = true; formData.value = { ...row }; activeTab.value = 'basic'; }; const handleDetail = (row) =&gt; { showDetailDialog.value = true; detailData.value = { ...row }; }; const handleDelete = (row) =&gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.deviceNo === row.deviceNo); if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1); } }; const handleBatchDelete = () =&gt; { selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.deviceNo === row.deviceNo); if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1); } }); selectedRows.value = []; }; const handleConfirm = () =&gt; { if (!formData.value.product || !formData.value.deviceNo || !formData.value.name || !formData.value.ipAddress || !formData.value.port || !formData.value.level || !formData.value.channels || !formData.value.username || !formData.value.password) { alert('请填写所有必填字段'); return; } const newRecord = { no: mockData.value.length + 1, product: formData.value.product, deviceNo: formData.value.deviceNo, name: formData.value.name, lampPost: formData.value.lampPost || '-', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: new Date().toLocaleString() }; mockData.value.push(newRecord); showAddDialog.value = false; }; const handleSizeChange = (val) =&gt; { pageSize.value = val; currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleCurrentChange = (val) =&gt; { currentPage.value = val; }; &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { display: flex; height: calc(100vh - 60px); } .main-content { display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .left-sidebar { width: 200px; background: #fafafa; border-right: 1px solid #e8e8e8; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .sidebar-header { padding: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .sidebar-search { width: 100%; } .right-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; padding: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; } .filter-select { width: 180px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .table-wrapper { flex: 1; overflow-x: auto; overflow-y: auto; min-height: 0; } .data-table { width: 100%; min-width: 1000px; } .pagination-bar { display: flex; justify-content: center; padding: 15px 0; } .form-container { padding: 10px 0; } .form-select { width: 100%; } &lt;/style&gt;</div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-17">src/views/lighting/GisMap.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/lighting/GisMap.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;GIS地图&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;searchText&quot; placeholder=&quot;按IMEI号或名称搜索&quot; style=&quot;width: 200px; margin-right: 10px;&quot; clearable &gt; &lt;template #prefix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Search /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;refreshMap&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Refresh /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 刷新 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;map-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;map-toolbar&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;toolbar-left&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio-group v-model=&quot;statusFilter&quot; size=&quot;default&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio-button label=&quot;all&quot;&gt;全部&lt;/el-radio-button&gt; &lt;el-radio-button label=&quot;on&quot;&gt;开灯&lt;/el-radio-button&gt; &lt;el-radio-button label=&quot;off&quot;&gt;关灯&lt;/el-radio-button&gt; &lt;el-radio-button label=&quot;alert&quot;&gt;告警&lt;/el-radio-button&gt; &lt;el-radio-button label=&quot;offline&quot;&gt;离线&lt;/el-radio-button&gt; &lt;/el-radio-group&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;toolbar-right&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio-group v-model=&quot;mapMode&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio-button label=&quot;satellite&quot;&gt;卫星&lt;/el-radio-button&gt; &lt;el-radio-button label=&quot;2d&quot;&gt;2D&lt;/el-radio-button&gt; &lt;el-radio-button label=&quot;3d&quot;&gt;3D&lt;/el-radio-button&gt; &lt;/el-radio-group&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;map-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;map-area&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;map-placeholder&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;map-grid&quot;&gt; &lt;div v-for=&quot;(light, index) in filteredLights&quot; :key=&quot;light.id&quot; class=&quot;map-light&quot; :class=&quot;getLightClass(light.status)&quot; :style=&quot;getLightPosition(index)&quot; @click=&quot;showLightDetail(light)&quot; &gt; &lt;div class=&quot;light-icon&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Sunrise /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;light-info&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;light-name&quot;&gt;{{ light.name }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;light-status&quot;&gt;{{ getStatusText(light.status) }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;map-legend&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;legend-title&quot;&gt;图例&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;legend-items&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;legend-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;legend-dot online&quot;&gt;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span&gt;在线开灯&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;legend-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;legend-dot offline-off&quot;&gt;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span&gt;在线关灯&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;legend-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;legend-dot alert&quot;&gt;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span&gt;告警&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;legend-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;legend-dot offline&quot;&gt;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span&gt;离线&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;map-sidebar&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;sidebar-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;section-title&quot;&gt;设备统计&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-list&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-dot online&quot;&gt;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-label&quot;&gt;在线&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-value&quot;&gt;{{ stats.online }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-dot offline&quot;&gt;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-label&quot;&gt;离线&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-value&quot;&gt;{{ stats.offline }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-dot alert&quot;&gt;&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-label&quot;&gt;告警&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-value&quot;&gt;{{ stats.alert }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;sidebar-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;section-title&quot;&gt;快捷操作&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;quick-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;batchControl('on')&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Sunrise /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 批量开灯 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;batchControl('off')&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Moon /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 批量关灯 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;showTimedControl = true&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Timer /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 定时控制 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;sidebar-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;section-title&quot;&gt;选中设备信息&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div v-if=&quot;selectedLight&quot; class=&quot;device-info&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;info-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;info-label&quot;&gt;设备名称&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;info-value&quot;&gt;{{ selectedLight.name }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;info-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;info-label&quot;&gt;IMEI号&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;info-value&quot;&gt;{{ selectedLight.imei }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;info-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;info-label&quot;&gt;状态&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;info-value&quot; :class=&quot;'status-' + selectedLight.status&quot;&gt; {{ getStatusText(selectedLight.status) }} &lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;info-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;info-label&quot;&gt;亮度&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;info-value&quot;&gt;{{ selectedLight.brightness }}%&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;info-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;info-label&quot;&gt;电压&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;info-value&quot;&gt;{{ selectedLight.voltage }}V&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;info-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;info-label&quot;&gt;电流&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;info-value&quot;&gt;{{ selectedLight.current }}A&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;info-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;info-label&quot;&gt;功率&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;info-value&quot;&gt;{{ selectedLight.power }}W&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;action-buttons&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;controlLight(selectedLight, 'on')&quot;&gt; 开灯 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;controlLight(selectedLight, 'off')&quot;&gt; 关灯 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;showBrightnessDialog(selectedLight)&quot;&gt; 调光 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div v-else class=&quot;no-selection&quot;&gt; &lt;span&gt;点击地图上的路灯查看详情&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-dialog v-model=&quot;showTimedControl&quot; title=&quot;定时控制&quot; width=&quot;500px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;timedForm&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;控制类型&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio-group v-model=&quot;timedForm.type&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;on&quot;&gt;开灯&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;off&quot;&gt;关灯&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;dim&quot;&gt;调光&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;/el-radio-group&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;执行时间&quot;&gt; &lt;el-time-picker v-model=&quot;timedForm.time&quot; format=&quot;HH:mm&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择时间&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item v-if=&quot;timedForm.type === 'dim'&quot; label=&quot;亮度值&quot;&gt; &lt;el-slider v-model=&quot;timedForm.brightness&quot; :min=&quot;0&quot; :max=&quot;100&quot; show-input /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;重复&quot;&gt; &lt;el-checkbox-group v-model=&quot;timedForm.days&quot;&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;1&quot;&gt;周一&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;2&quot;&gt;周二&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;3&quot;&gt;周三&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;4&quot;&gt;周四&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;5&quot;&gt;周五&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;6&quot;&gt;周六&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;0&quot;&gt;周日&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;/el-checkbox-group&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showTimedControl = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;submitTimedControl&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;el-dialog v-model=&quot;showBrightness&quot; title=&quot;亮度调节&quot; width=&quot;400px&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;brightness-control&quot;&gt; &lt;el-slider v-model=&quot;brightnessValue&quot; :min=&quot;0&quot; :max=&quot;100&quot; show-input /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showBrightness = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;submitBrightness&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed, reactive } from 'vue' import { Search, Refresh, Sunrise, Moon, Timer } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' const searchText = ref('') const statusFilter = ref('all') const mapMode = ref('2d') const selectedLight = ref(null) const showTimedControl = ref(false) const showBrightness = ref(false) const brightnessValue = ref(80) const timedForm = reactive({ type: 'on', time: '', brightness: 80, days: [] }) const lights = ref([ { id: 1, name: '中山路01号灯', imei: '861234567890001', status: 'online-on', brightness: 100, voltage: 220, current: 2.5, power: 550, x: 10, y: 15 }, { id: 2, name: '中山路02号灯', imei: '861234567890002', status: 'online-on', brightness: 80, voltage: 218, current: 2.0, power: 440, x: 25, y: 15 }, { id: 3, name: '人民路01号灯', imei: '861234567890003', status: 'online-off', brightness: 0, voltage: 220, current: 0, power: 0, x: 40, y: 30 }, { id: 4, name: '人民路02号灯', imei: '861234567890004', status: 'alert', brightness: 60, voltage: 180, current: 1.5, power: 330, x: 55, y: 30 }, { id: 5, name: '解放路01号灯', imei: '861234567890005', status: 'offline', brightness: 0, voltage: 0, current: 0, power: 0, x: 70, y: 45 }, { id: 6, name: '解放路02号灯', imei: '861234567890006', status: 'online-on', brightness: 90, voltage: 219, current: 2.2, power: 484, x: 85, y: 45 }, { id: 7, name: '公园路01号灯', imei: '861234567890007', status: 'online-on', brightness: 70, voltage: 221, current: 1.8, power: 396, x: 15, y: 60 }, { id: 8, name: '公园路02号灯', imei: '861234567890008', status: 'online-off', brightness: 0, voltage: 220, current: 0, power: 0, x: 30, y: 60 }, { id: 9, name: '文化路01号灯', imei: '861234567890009', status: 'alert', brightness: 50, voltage: 160, current: 1.2, power: 264, x: 45, y: 75 }, { id: 10, name: '文化路02号灯', imei: '861234567890010', status: 'online-on', brightness: 100, voltage: 220, current: 2.5, power: 550, x: 60, y: 75 } ]) const stats = computed(() =&gt; { const result = { online: 0, offline: 0, alert: 0 } lights.value.forEach(light =&gt; { if (light.status === 'offline') result.offline++ else if (light.status === 'alert') result.alert++ else result.online++ }) return result }) const filteredLights = computed(() =&gt; { if (!searchText.value) { if (statusFilter.value === 'all') return lights.value return lights.value.filter(l =&gt; l.status.startsWith(statusFilter.value)) } return lights.value.filter(l =&gt; l.name.includes(searchText.value) || l.imei.includes(searchText.value) ) }) const getLightClass = (status) =&gt; { const classMap = { 'online-on': 'light-on', 'online-off': 'light-off', 'alert': 'light-alert', 'offline': 'light-offline' } return classMap[status] || '' } const getLightPosition = (index) =&gt; { const light = filteredLights.value[index] if (light) { return { left: light.x + '%', top: light.y + '%' } } return {} } const getStatusText = (status) =&gt; { const textMap = { 'online-on': '在线-开灯', 'online-off': '在线-关灯', 'alert': '告警', 'offline': '离线' } return textMap[status] || status } const showLightDetail = (light) =&gt; { selectedLight.value = light } const controlLight = (light, action) =&gt; { if (action === 'on') { light.status = 'online-on' } else { light.status = 'online-off' } } const showBrightnessDialog = (light) =&gt; { brightnessValue.value = light.brightness showBrightness.value = true } const submitBrightness = () =&gt; { if (selectedLight.value) { selectedLight.value.brightness = brightnessValue.value if (brightnessValue.value &gt; 0) { selectedLight.value.status = 'online-on' } else { selectedLight.value.status = 'online-off' } } showBrightness.value = false } const batchControl = (action) =&gt; { lights.value.forEach(light =&gt; { if (light.status !== 'offline') { if (action === 'on') { light.status = 'online-on' } else { light.status = 'online-off' } } }) } const submitTimedControl = () =&gt; { console.log('定时控制配置:', timedForm) showTimedControl.value = false ElMessage.success('定时控制已设置') } const refreshMap = () =&gt; { console.log('刷新地图') } import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus' &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .map-container { background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .map-toolbar { padding: 15px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .map-content { display: flex; height: calc(100vh - 300px); } .map-area { flex: 1; position: relative; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f5f7fa 0%, #e4e8eb 100%); } .map-placeholder { width: 100%; height: 100%; position: relative; } .map-grid { width: 100%; height: 100%; position: relative; } .map-light { position: absolute; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s; } .map-light:hover { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.1); } .light-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 5px; } .light-on .light-icon { background: #52c41a; color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(82, 196, 26, 0.5); } .light-off .light-icon { background: #d9d9d9; color: #666; } .light-alert .light-icon { background: #f5222d; color: #fff; animation: blink 1s infinite; } .light-offline .light-icon { background: #8c8c8c; color: #fff; } @keyframes blink { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.5; } } .light-info { text-align: center; font-size: 12px; } .light-name { display: block; color: #333; font-weight: 500; } .light-status { color: #666; } .map-legend { position: absolute; bottom: 20px; left: 20px; background: #fff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .legend-title { font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #333; } .legend-items { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .legend-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 13px; } .legend-dot { width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 50%; } .legend-dot.online { background: #52c41a; } .legend-dot.offline-off { background: #d9d9d9; } .legend-dot.alert { background: #f5222d; } .legend-dot.offline { background: #8c8c8c; } .map-sidebar { width: 300px; background: #fafafa; border-left: 1px solid #e8e8e8; padding: 15px; overflow-y: auto; } .sidebar-section { margin-bottom: 20px; } .section-title { font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; color: #333; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .stat-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; } .stat-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; } .stat-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; } .stat-dot.online { background: #52c41a; } .stat-dot.offline { background: #8c8c8c; } .stat-dot.alert { background: #f5222d; } .stat-label { flex: 1; color: #666; } .stat-value { font-weight: 600; color: #333; } .quick-actions { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; } .quick-actions .el-button { width: 100%; justify-content: center; } .device-info { background: #fff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 4px; } .info-item { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0; } .info-item:last-of-type { border-bottom: none; } .info-label { color: #666; } .info-value { font-weight: 500; color: #333; } .status-online-on { color: #52c41a; } .status-online-off { color: #999; } .status-alert { color: #f5222d; } .status-offline { color: #8c8c8c; } .action-buttons { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-top: 15px; justify-content: center; } .no-selection { text-align: center; color: #999; padding: 30px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; } .brightness-control { padding: 20px; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-18">src/views/lighting/GroupManage.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/lighting/GroupManage.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;main-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;left-sidebar&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;sidebar-header&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;searchTreeText&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入层级名称&quot; class=&quot;sidebar-search&quot; &gt; &lt;template #prefix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Search /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-tree :data=&quot;treeData&quot; :props=&quot;defaultProps&quot; show-checkbox node-key=&quot;id&quot; :expand-on-click-node=&quot;false&quot; @check-change=&quot;handleCheckChange&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;right-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;分组管理&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;showAddDialog = true&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Plus /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 新增 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;refreshData&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Refresh /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 刷新 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;success&quot; @click=&quot;handleExport&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Download /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 导出 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; @click=&quot;batchDelete&quot; :disabled=&quot;selectedRows.length === 0&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Delete /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 删除 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;filters.search&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入分组名称&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot; &gt; &lt;template #prefix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Search /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filters.type&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择分组类型&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;全部类型&quot; value=&quot;&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;路段分组&quot; value=&quot;road&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;功能分组&quot; value=&quot;function&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;自定义分组&quot; value=&quot;custom&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filters.hierarchy&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择所属区域&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;全部区域&quot; value=&quot;&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;长沙-岳麓区-先导路&quot; value=&quot;xiandao&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;长沙-岳麓区-力唯中天1栋&quot; value=&quot;liwei&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;searchGroups&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;resetFilters&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredGroups&quot; border @selection-change=&quot;handleSelectionChange&quot; &gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;序号&quot; width=&quot;60&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;分组名称&quot; min-width=&quot;180&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;type&quot; label=&quot;分组类型&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getTypeTagType(row.type)&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;{{ getTypeText(row.type) }}&lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;hierarchy&quot; label=&quot;所属区域&quot; min-width=&quot;180&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; {{ getHierarchyText(row.hierarchy) }} &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lampCount&quot; label=&quot;关联灯具数&quot; width=&quot;110&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;lamp-count&quot; @click=&quot;showLampDialog(row)&quot;&gt; {{ row.lampCount }} &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;View /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/span&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;createTime&quot; label=&quot;创建时间&quot; width=&quot;160&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;300&quot; fixed=&quot;right&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;viewLamps(row)&quot;&gt;查看关联&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;success&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;editGroup(row)&quot;&gt;编辑&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;warning&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;batchControl(row)&quot;&gt;批量控制&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;deleteGroup(row)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-wrapper&quot;&gt; &lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot; v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot; :total=&quot;total&quot; :page-sizes=&quot;[10, 20, 30, 50]&quot; layout=&quot;total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-dialog v-model=&quot;showAddDialog&quot; :title=&quot;isEdit ? '编辑分组' : '新增分组'&quot; width=&quot;900px&quot; @close=&quot;resetForm&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form ref=&quot;formRef&quot; :model=&quot;form&quot; :rules=&quot;rules&quot; label-width=&quot;110px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;分组名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入分组名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;路段分组&quot; value=&quot;road&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;功能分组&quot; value=&quot;function&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;自定义分组&quot; value=&quot;custom&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;所属区域&quot; prop=&quot;hierarchy&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;form.hierarchy&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择所属区域&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;长沙-岳麓区-先导路&quot; value=&quot;xiandao&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;长沙-岳麓区-力唯中天1栋&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入备注信息&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;选择灯具&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;lamp-selector&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;selector-left&quot;&gt; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;searchLeftLamps&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;resetLeftSearch&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;availableLamps&quot; border size=&quot;small&quot; height=&quot;280&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleLeftSelection&quot; &gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;40&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;序号&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;code&quot; label=&quot;灯具编号&quot; min-width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;addSelectedLamps&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;ArrowRight /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;removeSelectedLamps&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;ArrowLeft /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;selector-right&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;selector-header&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;rightSearch&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入灯具名称或编号&quot; class=&quot;search-input&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;searchRightLamps&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;selectedLamps&quot; border size=&quot;small&quot; height=&quot;240&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleRightSelection&quot; &gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;40&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;序号&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;code&quot; label=&quot;灯具编号&quot; min-width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;灯具名称&quot; min-width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;poleName&quot; label=&quot;所属灯杆&quot; min-width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showAddDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;submitForm&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;el-dialog v-model=&quot;showLampListDialog&quot; title=&quot;关联灯具列表&quot; width=&quot;800px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;currentGroupLamps&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;序号&quot; width=&quot;60&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;code&quot; label=&quot;灯具编号&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;灯具名称&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;poleName&quot; label=&quot;所属灯杆&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;status&quot; label=&quot;灯具状态&quot; width=&quot;90&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.status === 'on' ? 'success' : 'info'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.status === 'on' ? '开灯' : '关灯' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;networkStatus&quot; label=&quot;网络状态&quot; width=&quot;90&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showLampListDialog = false&quot;&gt;关闭&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;el-dialog v-model=&quot;showControlDialog&quot; title=&quot;分组批量控制&quot; width=&quot;500px&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;control-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;control-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;control-label&quot;&gt;操作类型：&lt;/span&gt; &lt;el-radio-group v-model=&quot;controlType&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;on&quot;&gt;开灯&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;off&quot;&gt;关灯&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;dim&quot;&gt;调光&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;/el-radio-group&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;control-item&quot; v-if=&quot;controlType === 'dim'&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;control-label&quot;&gt;亮度值：&lt;/span&gt; &lt;el-slider v-model=&quot;brightnessValue&quot; :min=&quot;0&quot; :max=&quot;100&quot; show-input /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showControlDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;submitControl&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue' import { Plus, Refresh, Download, Delete, Search, ArrowRight, ArrowLeft, View } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus' const searchTreeText = ref('') const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(20) const total = ref(5) const showAddDialog = ref(false) const showLampListDialog = ref(false) const showControlDialog = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const formRef = ref(null) const selectedRows = ref([]) const leftSearch = ref('') const rightSearch = ref('') const controlType = ref('on') const brightnessValue = ref(80) const defaultProps = { children: 'children', label: 'label' } const treeData = ref([ { id: 1, label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 11, label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 111, label: '先导路' }, { id: 112, label: '力唯中天1栋' } ] } ] } ]) const filters = reactive({ search: '', type: '', hierarchy: '' }) const form = reactive({ name: '', type: 'road', hierarchy: '', remark: '' }) const rules = { name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入分组名称', trigger: 'blur' }], type: [{ required: true, message: '请选择分组类型', trigger: 'change' }], hierarchy: [{ required: true, message: '请选择所属区域', trigger: 'change' }] } const allLamps = ref([ { id: 1, no: 1, code: '862715067560391', name: '光亚展灯具', poleName: '光亚展灯杆', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'online' }, { id: 2, no: 2, code: '863123069184162', name: '1号楼-极简07', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'online' }, { id: 3, no: 3, code: '863123069133946', name: '宿舍楼02', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'offline' }, { id: 4, no: 4, code: '863123069031165', name: '3号楼-极简13', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'offline' }, { id: 5, no: 5, code: '863123069267413', name: '食堂-极简18辅路', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'offline' }, { id: 6, no: 6, code: '863123069265714', name: '食堂-极简18', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'offline' }, { id: 7, no: 7, code: '863123069201446', name: '食堂-极简17', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'offline' }, { id: 8, no: 8, code: '864900066365673', name: '0104Z11', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'offline' }, { id: 9, no: 9, code: '862715067560392', name: '先导路路灯1', poleName: '先导路1号灯杆', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'online' }, { id: 10, no: 10, code: '862715067560393', name: '先导路路灯2', poleName: '先导路2号灯杆', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'online' }, { id: 11, no: 11, code: '862715067560394', name: '力唯中天1栋路灯1', poleName: '力唯中天1栋1号灯杆', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'online' }, { id: 12, no: 12, code: '862715067560395', name: '力唯中天1栋路灯2', poleName: '力唯中天1栋2号灯杆', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'online' } ]) const groups = ref([ { id: 1, no: 1, name: '先导路主干道路灯分组', type: 'road', hierarchy: 'xiandao', lampCount: 5, createTime: '2024-01-15 10:30:00', remark: '', lampIds: [1, 9, 10] }, { id: 2, no: 2, name: '先导路景观灯分组', type: 'function', hierarchy: 'xiandao', lampCount: 3, createTime: '2024-01-20 14:20:00', remark: '', lampIds: [2, 3, 4] }, { id: 3, no: 3, name: '力唯中天1栋照明分组', type: 'road', hierarchy: 'liwei', lampCount: 4, createTime: '2024-02-01 09:00:00', remark: '', lampIds: [11, 12, 5, 6] }, { id: 4, no: 4, name: '园区节假日专用', type: 'custom', hierarchy: 'xiandao', lampCount: 2, createTime: '2024-02-10 16:45:00', remark: '', lampIds: [7, 8] }, { id: 5, no: 5, name: '展厅演示分组', type: 'function', hierarchy: 'liwei', lampCount: 3, createTime: '2024-03-01 11:00:00', remark: '', lampIds: [1, 2, 3] } ]) const selectedLampIds = ref([]) const tempLeftSelection = ref([]) const tempRightSelection = ref([]) const currentGroupLamps = ref([]) const availableLamps = computed(() =&gt; { let result = allLamps.value.filter(l =&gt; !selectedLampIds.value.includes(l.id)) if (leftSearch.value) { result = result.filter(l =&gt; l.name.includes(leftSearch.value) || l.code.includes(leftSearch.value)) } return result }) const selectedLamps = computed(() =&gt; { let result = allLamps.value.filter(l =&gt; selectedLampIds.value.includes(l.id)) if (rightSearch.value) { result = result.filter(l =&gt; l.name.includes(rightSearch.value) || l.code.includes(rightSearch.value)) } return result }) const filteredGroups = computed(() =&gt; { let result = groups.value if (filters.search) { result = result.filter(g =&gt; g.name.includes(filters.search)) } if (filters.type) { result = result.filter(g =&gt; g.type === filters.type) } if (filters.hierarchy) { result = result.filter(g =&gt; g.hierarchy === filters.hierarchy) } return result }) const getTypeText = (type) =&gt; { const map = { road: '路段分组', function: '功能分组', custom: '自定义分组' } return map[type] || type } const getTypeTagType = (type) =&gt; { const map = { road: 'primary', function: 'success', custom: 'warning' } return map[type] || '' } const getHierarchyText = (hierarchy) =&gt; { const map = { xiandao: '长沙-岳麓区-先导路', liwei: '长沙-岳麓区-力唯中天1栋' } return map[hierarchy] || hierarchy } const handleCheckChange = () =&gt; {} const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const searchGroups = () =&gt; { currentPage.value = 1 ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const resetFilters = () =&gt; { Object.assign(filters, { search: '', type: '', hierarchy: '' }) currentPage.value = 1 } const refreshData = () =&gt; { ElMessage.success('数据已刷新') } const handleExport = () =&gt; { ElMessage.success('导出成功') } const batchDelete = () =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要删除选中的${selectedRows.value.length}个分组吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' }).then(() =&gt; { const selectedIds = selectedRows.value.map(g =&gt; g.id) groups.value = groups.value.filter(g =&gt; !selectedIds.includes(g.id)) total.value = groups.value.length selectedRows.value = [] ElMessage.success('批量删除成功') }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const handleLeftSelection = (selection) =&gt; { tempLeftSelection.value = selection } const handleRightSelection = (selection) =&gt; { tempRightSelection.value = selection } const addSelectedLamps = () =&gt; { tempLeftSelection.value.forEach(item =&gt; { if (!selectedLampIds.value.includes(item.id)) { selectedLampIds.value.push(item.id) } }) tempLeftSelection.value = [] } const removeSelectedLamps = () =&gt; { tempRightSelection.value.forEach(item =&gt; { const index = selectedLampIds.value.indexOf(item.id) if (index &gt; -1) { selectedLampIds.value.splice(index, 1) } }) tempRightSelection.value = [] } const searchLeftLamps = () =&gt; {} const resetLeftSearch = () =&gt; { leftSearch.value = '' } const searchRightLamps = () =&gt; {} const resetRightSearch = () =&gt; { rightSearch.value = '' } const resetForm = () =&gt; { Object.assign(form, { name: '', type: 'road', hierarchy: '', remark: '' }) selectedLampIds.value = [] tempLeftSelection.value = [] tempRightSelection.value = [] } const editGroup = (row) =&gt; { isEdit.value = true Object.assign(form, { name: row.name, type: row.type, hierarchy: row.hierarchy, remark: row.remark }) selectedLampIds.value = [...(row.lampIds || [])] showAddDialog.value = true } const deleteGroup = (row) =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要删除分组&quot;${row.name}&quot;吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' }).then(() =&gt; { const index = groups.value.findIndex(g =&gt; g.id === row.id) if (index &gt; -1) { groups.value.splice(index, 1) total.value-- ElMessage.success('删除成功') } }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const submitForm = () =&gt; { formRef.value.validate((valid) =&gt; { if (valid) { if (isEdit.value) { const index = groups.value.findIndex(g =&gt; g.id === form.id) if (index &gt; -1) { groups.value[index] = { ...groups.value[index], ...form, lampCount: selectedLampIds.value.length, lampIds: [...selectedLampIds.value] } } ElMessage.success('分组修改成功') } else { const newId = Math.max(...groups.value.map(g =&gt; g.id)) + 1 groups.value.push({ id: newId, no: groups.value.length + 1, ...form, lampCount: selectedLampIds.value.length, lampIds: [...selectedLampIds.value], createTime: new Date().toLocaleString() }) total.value++ ElMessage.success('分组添加成功') } showAddDialog.value = false isEdit.value = false resetForm() } }) } const viewLamps = (row) =&gt; { currentGroupLamps.value = allLamps.value.filter(l =&gt; row.lampIds?.includes(l.id)) showLampListDialog.value = true } const showLampDialog = (row) =&gt; { viewLamps(row) } const batchControl = (row) =&gt; { showControlDialog.value = true } const submitControl = () =&gt; { const action = controlType.value === 'on' ? '开灯' : controlType.value === 'off' ? '关灯' : `调光至${brightnessValue.value}%` ElMessage.success(`批量${action}成功`) showControlDialog.value = false } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { padding: 20px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .main-content { display: flex; gap: 20px; } .left-sidebar { width: 200px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); padding: 15px; flex-shrink: 0; } .sidebar-header { margin-bottom: 15px; } .right-content { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .page-header .title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-select { width: 160px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 20px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .lamp-count { color: #409eff; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .lamp-count:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .lamp-selector { display: flex; gap: 15px; height: 350px; } .selector-left, .selector-right { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .selector-header { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; } .search-input { flex: 1; } .selected-count { color: #409eff; font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 5px; } .selector-buttons { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; } .control-content { padding: 20px; } .control-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .control-label { width: 80px; font-weight: 500; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-19">src/views/lighting/HistoryStrategy.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/lighting/HistoryStrategy.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;历史下发策略&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;success&quot; @click=&quot;handleExport&quot; :disabled=&quot;selectedRows.length === 0&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Download /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 导出记录 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;refreshData&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Refresh /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 刷新 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;filters.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入策略名称&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot; clearable &gt; &lt;template #prefix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Search /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filters.status&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择执行状态&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot; clearable&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;成功&quot; value=&quot;success&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;部分成功&quot; value=&quot;partial&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;失败&quot; value=&quot;fail&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-date-picker v-model=&quot;filters.dateRange&quot; type=&quot;daterange&quot; range-separator=&quot;至&quot; start-placeholder=&quot;开始时间&quot; end-placeholder=&quot;结束时间&quot; class=&quot;filter-date&quot; value-format=&quot;YYYY-MM-DD&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;searchRecords&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;resetFilters&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredRecords&quot; border class=&quot;record-table&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleSelectionChange&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;55&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;id&quot; label=&quot;序号&quot; width=&quot;80&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;strategyName&quot; label=&quot;策略名称&quot; min-width=&quot;200&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-link type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;viewDetail(row)&quot;&gt;{{ row.strategyName }}&lt;/el-link&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;sendTime&quot; label=&quot;下发时间&quot; width=&quot;180&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;operator&quot; label=&quot;下发人员&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;deviceCount&quot; label=&quot;关联设备数&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;successCount&quot; label=&quot;成功数&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;span style=&quot;color: #52c41a; font-weight: 500;&quot;&gt;{{ row.successCount }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;failCount&quot; label=&quot;失败数&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;span style=&quot;color: #f5222d; font-weight: 500;&quot;&gt;{{ row.failCount }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;status&quot; label=&quot;执行结果&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getStatusTagType(row.status)&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ getStatusText(row.status) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;260&quot; fixed=&quot;right&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleCopy(row)&quot;&gt;复制&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;info&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleExportSingle(row)&quot;&gt;导出&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;default&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;viewDetail(row)&quot;&gt;查看详情&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-wrapper&quot;&gt; &lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot; v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot; :total=&quot;total&quot; :page-sizes=&quot;[10, 20, 50, 100]&quot; layout=&quot;total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper&quot; @size-change=&quot;handleSizeChange&quot; @current-change=&quot;handleCurrentChange&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-dialog v-model=&quot;detailVisible&quot; title=&quot;策略执行详情&quot; width=&quot;900px&quot;&gt; &lt;div v-if=&quot;currentRecord&quot; class=&quot;detail-content&quot;&gt; &lt;el-descriptions :column=&quot;2&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;策略名称&quot;&gt;{{ currentRecord.strategyName }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;下发时间&quot;&gt;{{ currentRecord.sendTime }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;下发人员&quot;&gt;{{ currentRecord.operator }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;执行结果&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getStatusTagType(currentRecord.status)&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ getStatusText(currentRecord.status) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;关联设备数&quot; :span=&quot;2&quot;&gt;{{ currentRecord.deviceCount }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions&gt; &lt;el-tabs v-model=&quot;activeTab&quot; class=&quot;detail-tabs&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;策略配置&quot; name=&quot;config&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;config-content&quot;&gt; &lt;el-descriptions :column=&quot;2&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;策略类型&quot;&gt;{{ getTypeText(currentRecord.strategyType) }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;执行动作&quot;&gt;{{ getActionText(currentRecord.action) }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;执行时间&quot; :span=&quot;2&quot;&gt;{{ currentRecord.executeTime || '-' }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;策略描述&quot; :span=&quot;2&quot;&gt;{{ currentRecord.description || '-' }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;关联设备&quot; name=&quot;devices&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;device-list&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;currentRecord.devices&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;序号&quot; width=&quot;80&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;设备名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;imei&quot; label=&quot;IMEI号&quot; width=&quot;150&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;result&quot; label=&quot;执行结果&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.result === 'success' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.result === 'success' ? '成功' : '失败' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;message&quot; label=&quot;消息&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;执行日志&quot; name=&quot;logs&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;log-list&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;currentRecord.logs&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;time&quot; label=&quot;时间&quot; width=&quot;180&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;type&quot; label=&quot;类型&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.type === 'info' ? '' : (row.type === 'warning' ? 'warning' : 'danger')&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.type === 'info' ? '信息' : (row.type === 'warning' ? '警告' : '错误') }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;content&quot; label=&quot;内容&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;/el-tabs&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleCopy(currentRecord)&quot;&gt;复制策略&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;detailVisible = false&quot;&gt;关闭&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;el-dialog v-model=&quot;copyVisible&quot; title=&quot;复制策略&quot; width=&quot;600px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form ref=&quot;copyFormRef&quot; :model=&quot;copyForm&quot; :rules=&quot;copyRules&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;原策略名称&quot;&gt; &lt;span&gt;{{ copyForm.originalName }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;新策略名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;copyForm.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入新策略名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;策略类型&quot; prop=&quot;type&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;copyForm.type&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择策略类型&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;定时策略&quot; value=&quot;time&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;光感策略&quot; value=&quot;light&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;手动策略&quot; value=&quot;manual&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;执行时间&quot; prop=&quot;executeTime&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;copyForm.executeTime&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入执行时间&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;copyVisible = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;submitCopy&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue' import { Refresh, Search, Download } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus' import router from '@/router' const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(10) const total = ref(0) const selectedRows = ref([]) const detailVisible = ref(false) const copyVisible = ref(false) const currentRecord = ref(null) const copyFormRef = ref(null) const activeTab = ref('config') const filters = reactive({ name: '', status: '', dateRange: [] }) const copyForm = reactive({ originalName: '', name: '', type: '', executeTime: '' }) const copyRules = { name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入新策略名称', trigger: 'blur' }], type: [{ required: true, message: '请选择策略类型', trigger: 'change' }], executeTime: [{ required: true, message: '请输入执行时间', trigger: 'blur' }] } const records = ref([ { id: 1, strategyName: '城市主干道夜间照明', strategyType: 'time', action: 'dim', executeTime: '每日18:00-次日06:00', description: '城市主干道夜间照明策略，亮度调节为70%', sendTime: '2024-04-28 17:30:00', operator: 'admin', deviceCount: 50, successCount: 48, failCount: 2, status: 'partial', devices: [ { no: 1, name: '先导路01号灯', imei: '862715067560391', result: 'success', message: '执行成功' }, { no: 2, name: '先导路02号灯', imei: '863123069184162', result: 'success', message: '执行成功' }, { no: 3, name: '先导路03号灯', imei: '863123069133946', result: 'fail', message: '设备离线' }, { no: 4, name: '先导路04号灯', imei: '863123069031165', result: 'success', message: '执行成功' }, { no: 5, name: '力唯中天1栋大堂灯', imei: '863123069267413', result: 'success', message: '执行成功' } ], logs: [ { time: '2024-04-28 17:30:00', type: 'info', content: '开始执行策略' }, { time: '2024-04-28 17:30:01', type: 'info', content: '连接50个设备' }, { time: '2024-04-28 17:30:05', type: 'warning', content: '先导路03号灯连接超时' }, { time: '2024-04-28 17:30:10', type: 'info', content: '策略执行完成' } ] }, { id: 2, strategyName: '园区展厅照明', strategyType: 'time', action: 'on', executeTime: '工作日08:00-22:00', description: '园区展厅照明策略，营业时间全亮', sendTime: '2024-04-28 07:55:00', operator: 'admin', deviceCount: 20, successCount: 20, failCount: 0, status: 'success', devices: [ { no: 1, name: '展厅主灯', imei: '863123069265714', result: 'success', message: '执行成功' }, { no: 2, name: '展厅侧灯', imei: '863123069201446', result: 'success', message: '执行成功' } ], logs: [ { time: '2024-04-28 07:55:00', type: 'info', content: '开始执行策略' }, { time: '2024-04-28 07:55:02', type: 'info', content: '连接20个设备' }, { time: '2024-04-28 07:55:08', type: 'info', content: '策略执行完成' } ] }, { id: 3, strategyName: '园区照明光感控制', strategyType: 'light', action: 'dim', executeTime: '根据光线自动调节', description: '根据光线强度自动开关灯，自动调节亮度', sendTime: '2024-04-27 18:00:00', operator: 'operator', deviceCount: 35, successCount: 35, failCount: 0, status: 'success', devices: [], logs: [] }, { id: 4, strategyName: '特殊活动照明', strategyType: 'manual', action: 'on', executeTime: '手动控制', description: '特殊活动时使用的照明策略', sendTime: '2024-04-26 20:00:00', operator: 'operator', deviceCount: 10, successCount: 0, failCount: 10, status: 'fail', devices: [], logs: [] } ]) total.value = records.value.length const filteredRecords = computed(() =&gt; { let result = records.value if (filters.name) { result = result.filter(r =&gt; r.strategyName.includes(filters.name)) } if (filters.status) { result = result.filter(r =&gt; r.status === filters.status) } return result }) const getTypeText = (type) =&gt; { const map = { time: '定时策略', light: '光感策略', manual: '手动策略' } return map[type] || type } const getActionText = (action) =&gt; { const map = { on: '开灯', off: '关灯', dim: '调光' } return map[action] || action } const getStatusText = (status) =&gt; { const map = { success: '成功', partial: '部分成功', fail: '失败' } return map[status] || status } const getStatusTagType = (status) =&gt; { const map = { success: 'success', partial: 'warning', fail: 'danger' } return map[status] || '' } const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const searchRecords = () =&gt; { currentPage.value = 1 ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const resetFilters = () =&gt; { Object.assign(filters, { name: '', status: '', dateRange: [] }) currentPage.value = 1 } const refreshData = () =&gt; { ElMessage.success('数据已刷新') } const viewDetail = (row) =&gt; { currentRecord.value = row detailVisible.value = true activeTab.value = 'config' } const handleCopy = (row) =&gt; { currentRecord.value = row Object.assign(copyForm, { originalName: row.strategyName, name: row.strategyName + ' (副本)', type: row.strategyType, executeTime: row.executeTime }) copyVisible.value = true } const submitCopy = async () =&gt; { if (!copyFormRef.value) return await copyFormRef.value.validate((valid) =&gt; { if (valid) { ElMessage.success(`策略「${copyForm.name}」复制成功`) copyVisible.value = false router.push('/lighting/strategy') } }) } const handleExportSingle = (row) =&gt; { ElMessage.success(`正在导出「${row.strategyName}」的执行记录...`) setTimeout(() =&gt; { ElMessage.success('导出成功，文件已开始下载') }, 500) } const handleExport = () =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要导出选中的${selectedRows.value.length}条记录吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'info' }).then(() =&gt; { ElMessage.success('正在导出...') setTimeout(() =&gt; { ElMessage.success('导出成功，Excel文件已开始下载') }, 500) }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const handleSizeChange = (val) =&gt; { pageSize.value = val } const handleCurrentChange = (val) =&gt; { currentPage.value = val } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { padding: 20px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .page-header .title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .filter-select { width: 150px; } .filter-date { width: 300px; } .record-table { margin-bottom: 20px; } .pagination-wrapper { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .detail-content { padding: 10px 0; } .detail-tabs { margin-top: 20px; } .config-content, .device-list, .log-list { margin-top: 15px; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-20">src/views/lighting/LampManage.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/lighting/LampManage.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;main-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;left-sidebar&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;sidebar-header&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;treeSearch&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入层级名称&quot; class=&quot;sidebar-search&quot; &gt; &lt;template #prefix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Search /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-tree :data=&quot;treeData&quot; :props=&quot;defaultProps&quot; show-checkbox node-key=&quot;id&quot; :default-expand-all=&quot;true&quot; :expand-on-click-node=&quot;false&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;right-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button class=&quot;control-btn&quot; @click=&quot;handleTurnOn&quot;&gt;开灯&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button class=&quot;control-btn&quot; @click=&quot;handleTurnOff&quot;&gt;关灯&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button class=&quot;control-btn&quot; @click=&quot;showDimmingDialog = true&quot;&gt;调光&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-dropdown&gt; &lt;el-button class=&quot;default-btn&quot;&gt;更多操作&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;template #dropdown&gt; &lt;el-dropdown-menu&gt; &lt;el-dropdown-item&gt;自检&lt;/el-dropdown-item&gt; &lt;el-dropdown-item&gt;状态设置&lt;/el-dropdown-item&gt; &lt;el-dropdown-item&gt;批量导出&lt;/el-dropdown-item&gt; &lt;/el-dropdown-menu&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dropdown&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filterProduct&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择所属产品&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;全部&quot; value=&quot;&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;电信CAT1&quot; value=&quot;电信CAT1&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;EXC-CAT1&quot; value=&quot;EXC-CAT1&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filterLampStatus&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择灯具状态&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;全部&quot; value=&quot;&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;开&quot; value=&quot;on&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;关&quot; value=&quot;off&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filterNetworkStatus&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择网络状态&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;全部&quot; value=&quot;&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;在线&quot; value=&quot;online&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;离线&quot; value=&quot;offline&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filterEnabled&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择可用状态&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;全部&quot; value=&quot;&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;启用&quot; value=&quot;enabled&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;不启用&quot; value=&quot;disabled&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;searchKeyword&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入IMEI号或名称&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSearch&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleReset&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;table-wrapper&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredData&quot; border class=&quot;data-table&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleSelectionChange&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;product&quot; label=&quot;所属产品&quot; min-width=&quot;90&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;imei&quot; label=&quot;IMEI号&quot; min-width=&quot;140&quot; sortable&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;灯具名称&quot; min-width=&quot;110&quot; sortable&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;power&quot; label=&quot;功率(W)&quot; width=&quot;75&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;voltage&quot; label=&quot;电压(V)&quot; width=&quot;75&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;current&quot; label=&quot;电流(mA)&quot; width=&quot;80&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lampStatus&quot; label=&quot;灯具状态&quot; width=&quot;75&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.lampStatus === 'on' ? 'success' : 'warning'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.lampStatus === 'on' ? '开' : '关' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;brightness&quot; label=&quot;亮度(%)&quot; width=&quot;85&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;span :class=&quot;row.brightness === '-' ? 'text-muted' : ''&quot;&gt;{{ row.brightness }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;networkStatus&quot; label=&quot;网络状态&quot; width=&quot;85&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lastOnline&quot; label=&quot;最后在线时间&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot; sortable&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;currentStrategy&quot; label=&quot;当前策略&quot; min-width=&quot;110&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;switchRecord&quot; label=&quot;开关灯记录&quot; width=&quot;70&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; @click=&quot;handleViewSwitchRecord(row)&quot;&gt;查看&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;enabled&quot; label=&quot;可用状态&quot; width=&quot;80&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.enabled ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.enabled ? '启用' : '不启用' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;115&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDetail(row)&quot;&gt;详情&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleMore(row)&quot;&gt;更多&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-wrapper&quot;&gt; &lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot; v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot; :total=&quot;total&quot; :page-sizes=&quot;[10, 15, 20, 50, 100]&quot; layout=&quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&gt;, sizes, total&quot; &gt;&lt;/el-pagination&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;!-- 调光对话框 --&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;调光控制&quot; v-model=&quot;showDimmingDialog&quot; width=&quot;400px&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;dimming-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;dimming-label&quot;&gt;亮度值：{{ brightnessValue }}%&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-slider v-model=&quot;brightnessValue&quot; :min=&quot;0&quot; :max=&quot;100&quot; show-input /&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;quick-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;brightnessValue = 100&quot;&gt;全亮&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;brightnessValue = 75&quot;&gt;75%&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;brightnessValue = 50&quot;&gt;50%&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;brightnessValue = 25&quot;&gt;25%&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showDimmingDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleDimming&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;!-- 详情对话框 --&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;灯具详情&quot; v-model=&quot;showDetailDialog&quot; width=&quot;800px&quot;&gt; &lt;div v-if=&quot;selectedItem&quot; class=&quot;detail-content&quot;&gt; &lt;el-descriptions :column=&quot;2&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;所属产品&quot;&gt;{{ selectedItem.product }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;IMEI号&quot;&gt;{{ selectedItem.imei }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;灯具名称&quot;&gt;{{ selectedItem.name }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;功率(W)&quot;&gt;{{ selectedItem.power }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;电压(V)&quot;&gt;{{ selectedItem.voltage }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;电流(mA)&quot;&gt;{{ selectedItem.current }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;灯具状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;selectedItem.lampStatus === 'on' ? 'success' : 'warning'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ selectedItem.lampStatus === 'on' ? '开' : '关' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;亮度(%)&quot;&gt;{{ selectedItem.brightness }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;网络状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;selectedItem.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ selectedItem.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;最后在线&quot;&gt;{{ selectedItem.lastOnline }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;当前策略&quot;&gt;{{ selectedItem.currentStrategy }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;可用状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;selectedItem.enabled ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ selectedItem.enabled ? '启用' : '不启用' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed } from showDetailDialog = ref(false) const brightnessValue = ref(80) const selectedRows = ref([]) const selectedItem = ref(null) const treeSearch = ref('') const defaultProps = { label: 'label', children: 'children' } const treeData = ref([ { id: 1, label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 2, label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 3, label: '先导路' }, { id: 4, label: '力唯中天1栋' } ] } ] } ]) const lampData = ref([ { id: 1,
