233.5, current: 110, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 04:52:09', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: false }, { id: 6, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069265714', name: '食堂-极简18', power: 25, voltage: 233.8, current: 125, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 04:51:17', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: false }, { id: 7, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069277032', name: '3号楼-极简14', power: 24, voltage: 234.9, current: 122, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 04:46:48', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true }, { id: 8, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069201446', name: '食堂-极简17', power: 26, voltage: 234.3, current: 130, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 04:46:48', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true }, { id: 9, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069081624', name: '宿舍楼01', power: 48, voltage: 0, current: 218, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 04:53:13', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true }, { id: 10, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069146013', name: '宿舍楼03', power: 47, voltage: 233.2, current: 214, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 04:52:12', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true }, { id: 11, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069236392', name: '食堂-极简16', power: 26, voltage: 234.4, current: 130, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 04:40:04', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true }, { id: 12, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066365673', name: '0104Z11', power: 103, voltage: 233.3, current: 445, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-24 18:20:10', currentStrategy: '-', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: false }, { id: 13, product: '电信CAT1', imei: '863123069231120', name: '1号楼-极简05', power: 44, voltage: 234.3, current: 202, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-23 17:45:55', currentStrategy: '光明园区照明管理(勿删)', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true }, { id: 14, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066361359', name: '展示0204Z05', power: 232, voltage: 237.9, current: 999, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-09 21:19:55', currentStrategy: '-', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true } ]) const filteredData = computed(() =&gt; { let result = lampData.value if (filterProduct.value) { result = result.filter(item =&gt; item.product === filterProduct.value) } if (filterLampStatus.value) { result = result.filter(item =&gt; item.lampStatus === filterLampStatus.value) } if (filterNetworkStatus.value) { result = result.filter(item =&gt; item.networkStatus === filterNetworkStatus.value) } if (filterEnabled.value) { result = result.filter(item =&gt; filterEnabled.value === 'enabled' ? item.enabled : !item.enabled) } if (searchKeyword.value) { result = result.filter(item =&gt; item.imei.includes(searchKeyword.value) || item.name.includes(searchKeyword.value) ) } return result }) const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const handleSearch = () =&gt; { ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const handleReset = () =&gt; { searchKeyword.value = '' filterProduct.value = '' filterLampStatus.value = '' filterNetworkStatus.value = '' filterEnabled.value = '' } const handleTurnOn = () =&gt; { if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要控制的灯具') return } ElMessage.success(`已开启 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个灯具`) } const handleTurnOff = () =&gt; { if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要控制的灯具') return } ElMessage.success(`已关闭 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个灯具`) } const handleDimming = () =&gt; { if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要调光的灯具') return } ElMessage.success(`已将 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个灯具亮度设置为 ${brightnessValue.value}%`) showDimmingDialog.value = false } const handleDetail = (row) =&gt; { selectedItem.value = row showDetailDialog.value = true } const handleMore = (row) =&gt; { ElMessage.info(`更多操作: ${row.name}`) } const handleViewSwitchRecord = (row) =&gt; { ElMessage.info(`查看 ${row.name} 的开关灯记录`) } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #fff; padding: 20px; } .main-content { display: flex; gap: 20px; height: 100%; } .left-sidebar { width: 200px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e8e8e8; padding: 15px; flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .sidebar-header { margin-bottom: 15px; } .sidebar-search :deep(.el-input__wrapper) { background: #fff; } .left-sidebar :deep(.el-tree) { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; } .right-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; overflow: visible; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end; } .control-btn { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1890ff 0%, #096dd9 100%); border: none; color: #fff; white-space: nowrap; } .control-btn:hover { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #40a9ff 0%, #1890ff 100%); } .default-btn { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #d9d9d9; color: #666; white-space: nowrap; } .default-btn:hover { color: #1890ff; border-color: #1890ff; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; padding: 12px 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-select { width: 140px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .table-wrapper { flex: 1; overflow-x: auto; overflow-y: auto; min-height: 0; } .data-table { width: 100%; min-width: 1400px; } .data-table :deep(.text-muted) { color: #999; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .detail-content { padding: 10px 0; } .dimming-content { padding: 20px; } .dimming-label { text-align: center; font-size: 16px; color: #333; margin-bottom: 20px; } .quick-actions { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 15px; margin-top: 20px; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-21">src/views/lighting/LightControl.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/lighting/LightControl.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;远程控制&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;batchControl&quot;&gt; &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.Batch&quot; /&gt; 批量控制 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;control-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;section-title&quot;&gt;区域选择&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;area-selector&quot;&gt; &lt;div v-for=&quot;area in areas&quot; :key=&quot;area.id&quot; :class=&quot;['area-card', { active: selectedArea === area.id }]&quot; @click=&quot;selectArea(area.id)&quot; &gt; &lt;component :is=&quot;area.icon&quot; class=&quot;area-icon&quot; /&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;area-name&quot;&gt;{{ area.name }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;area-count&quot;&gt;{{ getAreaCount(area.id) }}盏&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;control-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;section-title&quot;&gt;控制操作&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;control-panel&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;control-row&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;control-btn-group&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;large&quot; @click=&quot;controlAll('on')&quot;&gt; &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.Power&quot; /&gt; 全部开启 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;large&quot; @click=&quot;controlAll('off')&quot;&gt; &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.PowerOff&quot; /&gt; 全部关闭 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;control-row&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;brightness-control&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;control-label&quot;&gt;亮度调节&lt;/span&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;brightness-slider&quot;&gt; &lt;el-slider v-model=&quot;brightnessValue&quot; :min=&quot;0&quot; :max=&quot;100&quot; :step=&quot;5&quot; @change=&quot;onBrightnessChange&quot; /&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;brightness-value&quot;&gt;{{ brightnessValue }}%&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;quick-buttons&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button v-for=&quot;level in brightnessLevels&quot; :key=&quot;level&quot; @click=&quot;setBrightness(level)&quot;&gt; {{ level }}% &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;control-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;section-title&quot;&gt;路灯列表&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredLights&quot; border class=&quot;data-table&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;55&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;id&quot; label=&quot;设备编号&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;路灯名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;location&quot; label=&quot;安装位置&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;status&quot; label=&quot;状态&quot; width=&quot;100&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getStatusTagType(scope.row.status)&quot;&gt; {{ getStatusText(scope.row.status) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;brightness&quot; label=&quot;亮度(%)&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;power&quot; label=&quot;功率(W)&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;180&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; :type=&quot;scope.row.status === 'on' ? 'default' : 'primary'&quot; @click=&quot;toggleLight(scope.row)&quot; &gt; {{ scope.row.status === 'on' ? '关闭' : '开启' }} &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;adjustBrightness(scope.row)&quot;&gt;调亮度&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;亮度调节&quot; :visible.sync=&quot;brightnessDialogVisible&quot; width=&quot;400px&quot;&gt; &lt;div v-if=&quot;currentLight&quot; class=&quot;brightness-dialog&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;light-info&quot;&gt;{{ currentLight.name }}&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-slider v-model=&quot;currentBrightness&quot; :min=&quot;0&quot; :max=&quot;100&quot; :step=&quot;1&quot; show-input /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;brightnessDialogVisible = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;confirmBrightness&quot;&gt;确认&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { VideoPlay, VideoPause, Grid, MapLocation } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { lightStatusData } from '@/data/mockData' const icons = { Power: VideoPlay, PowerOff: VideoPause, Batch: Grid, MapPin: MapLocation } const selectedArea = ref('all') const brightnessValue = ref(80) const brightnessDialogVisible = ref(false) const currentLight = ref(null) const currentBrightness = ref(80) const selectedLights = ref([]) const areas = [ { id: 'all', name: '全部区域', icon: MapLocation }, { id: 'zhongshan', name: '中山路', icon: MapLocation }, { id: 'renmin', name: '人民路', icon: MapLocation }, { id: 'jiefang', name: '解放路', icon: MapLocation }, { id: 'gongyuan', name: '公园路', icon: MapLocation }, { id: 'wenhua', name: '文化路', icon: MapLocation } ] const brightnessLevels = [30, 50, 70, 85, 100] const tableData = ref([...lightStatusData]) const filteredLights = computed(() =&gt; { if (selectedArea.value === 'all') return tableData.value const areaMap = { zhongshan: '中山路', renmin: '人民路', jiefang: '解放路', gongyuan: '公园路', wenhua: '文化路' } return tableData.value.filter(item =&gt; item.location.includes(areaMap[selectedArea.value])) }) const getAreaCount = (areaId) =&gt; { if (areaId === 'all') return tableData.value.length const areaMap = { zhongshan: '中山路', renmin: '人民路', jiefang: '解放路', gongyuan: '公园路', wenhua: '文化路' } return tableData.value.filter(item =&gt; item.location.includes(areaMap[areaId])).length } const getStatusTagType = (status) =&gt; { switch (status) { case 'on': return 'success' case 'off': return 'info' case 'fault': return 'danger' default: return 'info' } } const getStatusText = (status) =&gt; { switch (status) { case 'on': return '开启' case 'off': return '关闭' case 'fault': return '故障' default: return status } } const selectArea = (areaId) =&gt; { selectedArea.value = areaId } const controlAll = (action) =&gt; { filteredLights.value.forEach(light =&gt; { if (light.status !== 'fault') { light.status = action light.brightness = action === 'on' ? brightnessValue.value : 0 } }) } const toggleLight = (row) =&gt; { if (row.status === 'fault') return row.status = row.status === 'on' ? 'off' : 'on' row.brightness = row.status === 'on' ? brightnessValue.value : 0 } const onBrightnessChange = (val) =&gt; { filteredLights.value.forEach(light =&gt; { if (light.status === 'on') { light.brightness = val } }) } const setBrightness = (level) =&gt; { brightnessValue.value = level onBrightnessChange(level) } const adjustBrightness = (row) =&gt; { if (row.status === 'fault') return currentLight.value = row currentBrightness.value = row.brightness brightnessDialogVisible.value = true } const confirmBrightness = () =&gt; { if (currentLight.value &amp;&amp; currentLight.value.status !== 'fault') { currentLight.value.brightness = currentBrightness.value if (currentLight.value.status === 'off') { currentLight.value.status = 'on' } } brightnessDialogVisible.value = false } const batchControl = () =&gt; { selectedLights.value.forEach(id =&gt; { const light = tableData.value.find(l =&gt; l.id === id) if (light &amp;&amp; light.status !== 'fault') { light.status = 'on' light.brightness = brightnessValue.value } }) } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .control-section { margin-bottom: 25px; } .section-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 15px; color: #333; } .area-selector { display: flex; gap: 15px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .area-card { flex: 0 0 calc(16.666% - 12px); min-width: 120px; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #e8e8e8; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; text-align: center; &amp;:hover { border-color: #1890ff; background: #f0f7ff; } &amp;.active { border-color: #1890ff; background: #e6f7ff; } } .area-icon { font-size: 24px; color: #1890ff; margin-bottom: 8px; } .area-name { display: block; font-size: 14px; color: #333; } .area-count { display: block; font-size: 12px; color: #999; margin-top: 4px; } .control-panel { background: #fafafa; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; } .control-row { margin-bottom: 20px; &amp;:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; } } .control-btn-group { display: flex; gap: 15px; } .brightness-control { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px; } .control-label { font-weight: 500; color: #666; } .brightness-slider { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; } .brightness-value { font-weight: 600; color: #1890ff; min-width: 60px; } .quick-buttons { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .data-table { width: 100%; } .brightness-dialog { padding: 20px 0; } .light-info { font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #333; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-22">src/views/lighting/LightStatus.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/lighting/LightStatus.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;路灯实时状态&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;refreshData&quot;&gt; &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.Refresh&quot; /&gt; 刷新数据 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stats-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-value online&quot;&gt;{{ onlineCount }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-label&quot;&gt;在线&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-value offline&quot;&gt;{{ offlineCount }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-label&quot;&gt;离线&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-value fault&quot;&gt;{{ faultCount }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-label&quot;&gt;故障&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-value total&quot;&gt;{{ totalCount }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-label&quot;&gt;总数&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;statusFilter&quot; placeholder=&quot;状态筛选&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;全部&quot; value=&quot;&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;开启&quot; value=&quot;on&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;关闭&quot; value=&quot;off&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;故障&quot; value=&quot;fault&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;searchKeyword&quot; placeholder=&quot;搜索路灯名称或位置&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredData&quot; border class=&quot;data-table&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;id&quot; label=&quot;设备编号&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;路灯名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;location&quot; label=&quot;安装位置&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;status&quot; label=&quot;状态&quot; width=&quot;100&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getStatusTagType(scope.row.status)&quot;&gt; {{ getStatusText(scope.row.status) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;brightness&quot; label=&quot;亮度(%)&quot; width=&quot;100&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt; &lt;el-progress :percentage=&quot;scope.row.brightness&quot; :show-text=&quot;false&quot; width=&quot;80&quot; /&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;progress-text&quot;&gt;{{ scope.row.brightness }}%&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;power&quot; label=&quot;功率(W)&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lastUpdate&quot; label=&quot;更新时间&quot; width=&quot;180&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;120&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;viewDetail(scope.row)&quot;&gt;详情&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;路灯详情&quot; :visible.sync=&quot;detailDialogVisible&quot; width=&quot;500px&quot;&gt; &lt;div v-if=&quot;selectedLight&quot; class=&quot;detail-content&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;设备编号&quot;&gt;{{ selectedLight.id }}&lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;路灯名称&quot;&gt;{{ selectedLight.name }}&lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;安装位置&quot;&gt;{{ selectedLight.location }}&lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;当前状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getStatusTagType(selectedLight.status)&quot;&gt; {{ getStatusText(selectedLight.status) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;亮度&quot;&gt; &lt;el-progress :percentage=&quot;selectedLight.brightness&quot; :show-text=&quot;true&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;功率&quot;&gt;{{ selectedLight.power }}W&lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;最后更新&quot;&gt;{{ selectedLight.lastUpdate }}&lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Refresh } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { lightStatusData } from '@/data/mockData' const icons = { Refresh } const statusFilter = ref('') const searchKeyword = ref('') const detailDialogVisible = ref(false) const selectedLight = ref(null) const tableData = ref([...lightStatusData]) const totalCount = computed(() =&gt; tableData.value.length) const onlineCount = computed(() =&gt; tableData.value.filter(item =&gt; item.status === 'on').length) const offlineCount = computed(() =&gt; tableData.value.filter(item =&gt; item.status === 'off').length) const faultCount = computed(() =&gt; tableData.value.filter(item =&gt; item.status === 'fault').length) const filteredData = computed(() =&gt; { return tableData.value.filter(item =&gt; { const statusMatch = !statusFilter.value || item.status === statusFilter.value const keywordMatch = !searchKeyword.value || item.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchKeyword.value.toLowerCase()) || item.location.toLowerCase().includes(searchKeyword.value.toLowerCase()) return statusMatch &amp;&amp; keywordMatch }) }) const getStatusTagType = (status) =&gt; { switch (status) { case 'on': return 'success' case 'off': return 'info' case 'fault': return 'danger' default: return 'info' } } const getStatusText = (status) =&gt; { switch (status) { case 'on': return '开启' case 'off': return '关闭' case 'fault': return '故障' default: return status } } const refreshData = () =&gt; { tableData.value = [...lightStatusData] } const viewDetail = (row) =&gt; { selectedLight.value = row detailDialogVisible.value = true } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .stats-card { display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .stat-item { flex: 1; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; color: #fff; } .stat-value { display: block; font-size: 32px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 5px; } .stat-label { font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.9; } .filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; justify-content: flex-end; } .filter-select { width: 150px; } .filter-input { width: 250px; } .data-table { width: 100%; } .progress-text { margin-left: 10px; font-size: 12px; color: #666; } .detail-content { padding: 10px 0; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-23">src/views/lighting/LightingHome.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/lighting/LightingHome.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;快捷首页&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-date-picker v-model=&quot;dateRange&quot; type=&quot;daterange&quot; range-separator=&quot;至&quot; start-placeholder=&quot;开始日期&quot; end-placeholder=&quot;结束日期&quot; style=&quot;margin-right: 10px;&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;refreshData&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Refresh /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 刷新数据 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot; class=&quot;statistics-row&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;6&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-icon blue&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Postcard /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-info&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-value&quot;&gt;{{ statistics.poleCount }}&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-label&quot;&gt;灯杆总数&lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;6&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-icon green&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Cpu /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-info&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-value&quot;&gt;{{ statistics.controllerCount }}&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-label&quot;&gt;控制器数量&lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;6&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-icon orange&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Sunrise /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-info&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-value&quot;&gt;{{ statistics.lampCount }}&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-label&quot;&gt;灯具总数&lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;6&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-icon purple&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Timer /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-info&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-value&quot;&gt;{{ statistics.onlineRate }}%&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-label&quot;&gt;在线率&lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot; class=&quot;statistics-row&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-title&quot;&gt;能耗统计&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;energy-grid&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;energy-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;energy-label&quot;&gt;昨日能耗&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;energy-value&quot;&gt;{{ energy.yesterday }} kWh&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;energy-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;energy-label&quot;&gt;本周能耗&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;energy-value&quot;&gt;{{ energy.thisWeek }} kWh&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;energy-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;energy-label&quot;&gt;本月能耗&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;energy-value&quot;&gt;{{ energy.thisMonth }} kWh&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;energy-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;energy-label&quot;&gt;年度能耗&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;energy-value&quot;&gt;{{ energy.thisYear }} kWh&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;6&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-title&quot;&gt;开关灯时间&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;time-info&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;time-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;time-label&quot;&gt;开灯时间&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;time-value&quot;&gt;{{ switchTime.on }} &lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;time-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;time-label&quot;&gt;关灯时间&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;time-value&quot;&gt;{{ switchTime.off }} &lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;6&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-title&quot;&gt;亮灯率&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;rate-display&quot;&gt; &lt;el-progress type=&quot;dashboard&quot; :percentage=&quot;lightingRate&quot; :width=&quot;120&quot; :stroke-width=&quot;10&quot; color=&quot;#52c41a&quot; &gt; &lt;template #default&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;rate-value&quot;&gt;{{ lightingRate }}%&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-progress&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot; class=&quot;statistics-row&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-title&quot;&gt;告警统计&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;8&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;alert-stat&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;alert-value today&quot;&gt;{{ alerts.today }}&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;alert-label&quot;&gt;今日告警&lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;8&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;alert-stat&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;alert-value recovered&quot;&gt;{{ alerts.recovered }}&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;alert-label&quot;&gt;已恢复&lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;8&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;alert-stat&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;alert-value continuing&quot;&gt;{{ alerts.continuing }}&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;alert-label&quot;&gt;持续中&lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-title&quot;&gt;故障分析&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;fault-chart&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;fault-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;fault-label&quot;&gt;通讯故障&lt;/span&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;bar-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;bar-fill comm&quot; :style=&quot;{ width: faultAnalysis.comm + '%' }&quot;&gt;&lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;fault-value&quot;&gt;{{ faultAnalysis.comm }}%&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;fault-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;fault-label&quot;&gt;灯具故障&lt;/span&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;bar-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;bar-fill lamp&quot; :style=&quot;{ width: faultAnalysis.lamp + '%' }&quot;&gt;&lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;fault-value&quot;&gt;{{ faultAnalysis.lamp }}%&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;fault-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;fault-label&quot;&gt;电源故障&lt;/span&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;bar-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;bar-fill power&quot; :style=&quot;{ width: faultAnalysis.power + '%' }&quot;&gt;&lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;fault-value&quot;&gt;{{ faultAnalysis.power }}%&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;fault-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;fault-label&quot;&gt;其他故障&lt;/span&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;bar-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;bar-fill other&quot; :style=&quot;{ width: faultAnalysis.other + '%' }&quot;&gt;&lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;fault-value&quot;&gt;{{ faultAnalysis.other }}%&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, reactive } from 'vue' import { Refresh, Postcard, Cpu, Sunrise, Timer } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' const dateRange = ref([]) const lightingRate = ref(98.5) const statistics = reactive({ poleCount: 1256, controllerCount: 1256, lampCount: 2512, onlineRate: 99.2 }) const energy = reactive({ yesterday: 4521.8, thisWeek: 31652.6, thisMonth: 135862.4, thisYear: 1623458.8 }) const switchTime = reactive({ on: '18:30', off: '06:15' }) const alerts = reactive({ today: 12, recovered: 8, continuing: 4 }) const faultAnalysis = reactive({ comm: 35, lamp: 28, power: 22, other: 15 }) const refreshData = () =&gt; { console.log('刷新数据') } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .statistics-row { margin-bottom: 20px; } .stat-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; } .stat-icon { width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 28px; } .stat-icon.blue { background: #e6f7ff; color: #1890ff; } .stat-icon.green { background: #f6ffed; color: #52c41a; } .stat-icon.orange { background: #fff7e6; color: #fa8c16; } .stat-icon.purple { background: #f9f0ff; color: #722ed1; } .stat-info { flex: 1; } .stat-value { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; line-height: 1.2; } .stat-label { font-size: 14px; color: #666; margin-top: 4px; } .chart-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); height: 200px; } .chart-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .energy-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 15px; } .energy-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 10px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; } .energy-label { font-size: 12px; color: #666; margin-bottom: 4px; } .energy-value { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1890ff; } .time-info { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px; padding-top: 10px; } .time-item { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 10px 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; } .time-label { font-size: 14px; color: #666; } .time-value { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #1890ff; } .rate-display { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 140px; } .rate-value { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600; color: #52c41a; } .alert-stat { text-align: center; padding: 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; } .alert-value { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 5px; } .alert-value.today { color: #fa8c16; } .alert-value.recovered { color: #52c41a; } .alert-value.continuing { color: #f5222d; } .alert-label { font-size: 14px; color: #666; } .fault-chart { padding-top: 10px; } .fault-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .fault-label { width: 70px; font-size: 13px; color: #666; } .bar-container { flex: 1; height: 20px; background: #f0f0f0; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; } .bar-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 4px; transition: width 0.3s; } .bar-fill.comm { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1890ff, #69c0ff); } .bar-fill.lamp { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #fa8c16, #ffbb40); } .bar-fill.power { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f5222d, #ff7875); } .bar-fill.other { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #722ed1, #b37feb); } .fault-value { width: 40px; text-align: right; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-24">src/views/lighting/LightingStrategy.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/lighting/LightingStrategy.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;照明策略&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleBatchIssue&quot; :disabled=&quot;selectedRows.length === 0&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Promotion /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 批量下发 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;warning&quot; @click=&quot;handleBatchPause&quot; :disabled=&quot;selectedRows.length === 0&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;VideoPause /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 批量暂停 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;refreshData&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Refresh /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 刷新 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;main-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;left-sidebar&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;sidebar-header&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;searchTreeText&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入层级名称&quot; class=&quot;sidebar-search&quot; &gt; &lt;template #prefix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Search /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-tree :data=&quot;treeData&quot; :props=&quot;defaultProps&quot; show-checkbox node-key=&quot;id&quot; :expand-on-click-node=&quot;false&quot; @check-change=&quot;handleCheckChange&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;right-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;filters.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入策略名称&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot; clearable &gt; &lt;template #prefix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Search /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filters.type&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择策略类型&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot; clearable&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;定时策略&quot; value=&quot;time&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;光感策略&quot; value=&quot;light&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;手动策略&quot; value=&quot;manual&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filters.status&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择执行状态&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot; clearable&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;未下发&quot; value=&quot;not_issued&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;已下发&quot; value=&quot;issued&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;暂停&quot; value=&quot;paused&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;过期&quot; value=&quot;expired&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;searchStrategies&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;resetFilters&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredStrategies&quot; border class=&quot;strategy-table&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleSelectionChange&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;55&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;序号&quot; width=&quot;80&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;策略名称&quot; min-width=&quot;180&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;type&quot; label=&quot;策略类型&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getTypeTagType(row.type)&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ getTypeText(row.type) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;executeTime&quot; label=&quot;执行时间&quot; min-width=&quot;180&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;status&quot; label=&quot;执行状态&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getStatusTagType(row.status)&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ getStatusText(row.status) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;220&quot; fixed=&quot;right&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;success&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleIssue(row)&quot; v-if=&quot;row.status === 'not_issued'&quot;&gt;下发&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;warning&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handlePause(row)&quot; v-if=&quot;row.status === 'issued'&quot;&gt;暂停&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;info&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;viewDetail(row)&quot;&gt;详情&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-wrapper&quot;&gt; &lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot; v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot; :total=&quot;total&quot; :page-sizes=&quot;[10, 20, 50, 100]&quot; layout=&quot;total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper&quot; @size-change=&quot;handleSizeChange&quot; @current-change=&quot;handleCurrentChange&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-dialog v-model=&quot;detailVisible&quot; title=&quot;策略详情&quot; width=&quot;600px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-descriptions v-if=&quot;currentStrategy&quot; :column=&quot;2&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;策略名称&quot;&gt;{{ currentStrategy.name }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;策略类型&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getTypeTagType(currentStrategy.type)&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ getTypeText(currentStrategy.type) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;执行时间&quot; :span=&quot;2&quot;&gt;{{ currentStrategy.executeTime }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;执行状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getStatusTagType(currentStrategy.status)&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ getStatusText(currentStrategy.status) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;描述&quot; :span=&quot;2&quot;&gt;{{ currentStrategy.description }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;detailVisible = false&quot;&gt;关闭&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue' import { Refresh, Search, Promotion, VideoPause } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus' const searchTreeText = ref('') const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(10) const total = ref(0) const selectedRows = ref([]) const detailVisible = ref(false) const currentStrategy = ref(null) const filters = reactive({ name: '', type: '', status: '' }) const defaultProps = { children: 'children', label: 'label' } const treeData = ref([ { id: 1, label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 11, label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 111, label: '先导路' }, { id: 112, label: '力唯中天1栋' } ] } ] } ]) const strategies = ref([ { id: 1, no: 1, name: '城市主干道夜间照明', type: 'time', executeTime: '每日18:00-次日06:00', status: 'issued', description: '城市主干道夜间照明策略，亮度调节为70%' }, { id: 2, no: 2, name: '园区展厅照明', type: 'time', executeTime: '工作日08:00-22:00', status: 'issued', description: '园区展厅照明策略，营业时间全亮' }, { id: 3, no: 3, name: '园区照明光感控制', type: 'light', executeTime: '根据光线自动调节', status: 'paused', description: '根据光线强度自动开关灯，自动调节亮度' }, { id: 4, no: 4, name: '特殊活动照明', type: 'manual', executeTime: '手动控制', status: 'not_issued', description: '特殊活动时使用的照明策略' }, { id: 5, no: 5, name: '节假日照明', type: 'time', executeTime: '节假日全天', status: 'expired', description: '节假日照明策略' }, { id: 6, no: 6, name: '景观灯照明', type: 'time', executeTime: '每晚19:00-23:00', status: 'issued', description: '景观灯照明策略' }, { id: 7, no: 7, name: '地下车库照明', type: 'light', executeTime: '根据光线自动调节', status: 'issued', description: '地下车库照明策略' } ]) total.value = strategies.value.length const filteredStrategies = computed(() =&gt; { let result = strategies.value if (filters.name) { result = result.filter(s =&gt; s.name.includes(filters.name)) } if (filters.type) { result = result.filter(s =&gt; s.type === filters.type) } if (filters.status) { result = result.filter(s =&gt; s.status === filters.status) } return result }) const getTypeText = (type) =&gt; { const map = { time: '定时策略', light: '光感策略', manual: '手动策略' } return map[type] || type } const getTypeTagType = (type) =&gt; { const map = { time: 'primary', light: 'success', manual: 'warning' } return map[type] || '' } const getStatusText = (status) =&gt; { const map = { not_issued: '未下发', issued: '已下发', paused: '暂停', expired: '过期' } return map[status] || status } const getStatusTagType = (status) =&gt; { const map = { not_issued: 'info', issued: 'success', paused: 'warning', expired: 'danger' } return map[status] || '' } const handleCheckChange = (data, checked) =&gt; { console.log('selected hierarchy:', data, checked) } const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const searchStrategies = () =&gt; { currentPage.value = 1 ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const resetFilters = () =&gt; { Object.assign(filters, { name: '', type: '', status: '' }) currentPage.value = 1 } const refreshData = () =&gt; { ElMessage.success('数据已刷新') } const viewDetail = (row) =&gt; { currentStrategy.value = row detailVisible.value = true } const handleIssue = (row) =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要下发策略「${row.name}」吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'primary' }).then(() =&gt; { row.status = 'issued' ElMessage.success(`策略「${row.name}」下发成功`) }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const handlePause = (row) =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要暂停策略「${row.name}」吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' }).then(() =&gt; { row.status = 'paused' ElMessage.success(`策略「${row.name}」已暂停`) }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const handleBatchIssue = () =&gt; { const notIssuedCount = selectedRows.value.filter(r =&gt; r.status === 'not_issued').length if (notIssuedCount === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择未下发的策略') return } ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要批量下发选中的 ${notIssuedCount} 个策略吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'primary' }).then(() =&gt; { selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&gt; { if (row.status === 'not_issued') { row.status = 'issued' } }) ElMessage.success(`已成功下发 ${notIssuedCount} 个策略`) }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const handleBatchPause = () =&gt; { const issuedCount = selectedRows.value.filter(r =&gt; r.status === 'issued').length if (issuedCount === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择已下发的策略') return } ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要批量暂停选中的 ${issuedCount} 个策略吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' }).then(() =&gt; { selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&gt; { if (row.status === 'issued') { row.status = 'paused' } }) ElMessage.success(`已成功暂停 ${issuedCount} 个策略`) }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const handleSizeChange = (val) =&gt; { pageSize.value = val } const handleCurrentChange = (val) =&gt; { currentPage.value = val } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { padding: 20px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .page-header .title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; } .main-content { display: flex; gap: 20px; } .left-sidebar { width: 200px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); padding: 15px; flex-shrink: 0; } .sidebar-header { margin-bottom: 15px; } .right-content { flex: 1; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .filter-select { width: 150px; } .strategy-table { margin-bottom: 20px; } .pagination-wrapper { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-25">src/views/lighting/StrategyManage.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/lighting/StrategyManage.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;策略管理&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;showAddDialog&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Plus /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 新增策略 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;strategies&quot; border style=&quot;width: 100%; margin-top: 20px;&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;策略名称&quot; width=&quot;180&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;type&quot; label=&quot;策略类型&quot; width=&quot;120&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getTypeTag(row.type)&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ getTypeText(row.type) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;action&quot; label=&quot;执行动作&quot; width=&quot;100&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getActionTag(row.action)&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ getActionText(row.action) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;startDate&quot; label=&quot;开始日期&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;endDate&quot; label=&quot;结束日期&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;deviceCount&quot; label=&quot;关联设备数&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;enabled&quot; label=&quot;状态&quot; width=&quot;80&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-switch v-model=&quot;row.enabled&quot; @change=&quot;toggleStrategy(row)&quot; /&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;description&quot; label=&quot;描述&quot; min-width=&quot;200&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;200&quot; fixed=&quot;right&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;editStrategy(row)&quot;&gt; 修改 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;info&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;viewDetail(row)&quot;&gt; 详情 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;deleteStrategy(row)&quot;&gt; 删除 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;el-dialog v-model=&quot;dialogVisible&quot; :title=&quot;isEdit ? '修改策略' : '新增策略'&quot; width=&quot;700px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;form&quot; :rules=&quot;rules&quot; ref=&quot;formRef&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;策略名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入策略名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;策略类型&quot; prop=&quot;type&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;form.type&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择策略类型&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot; @change=&quot;onTypeChange&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;时间执行&quot; value=&quot;time&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;经纬度执行&quot; value=&quot;coordinate&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;计时执行&quot; value=&quot;timer&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;div v-if=&quot;form.type === 'time'&quot; class=&quot;type-form&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;执行动作&quot; prop=&quot;action&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio-group v-model=&quot;form.action&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;on&quot;&gt;开灯&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;off&quot;&gt;关灯&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;dim&quot;&gt;调光&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;/el-radio-group&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item v-if=&quot;form.action === 'dim'&quot; label=&quot;亮度值&quot; prop=&quot;brightness&quot;&gt; &lt;el-slider v-model=&quot;form.brightness&quot; :min=&quot;0&quot; :max=&quot;100&quot; show-input /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;执行时间&quot; prop=&quot;executeTime&quot;&gt; &lt;el-time-picker v-model=&quot;form.executeTime&quot; format=&quot;HH:mm&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择时间&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;重复日期&quot; prop=&quot;repeatDays&quot;&gt; &lt;el-checkbox-group v-model=&quot;form.repeatDays&quot;&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;1&quot;&gt;周一&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;2&quot;&gt;周二&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;3&quot;&gt;周三&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;4&quot;&gt;周四&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;5&quot;&gt;周五&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;6&quot;&gt;周六&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;0&quot;&gt;周日&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;/el-checkbox-group&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div v-if=&quot;form.type === 'coordinate'&quot; class=&quot;type-form&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;执行动作&quot; prop=&quot;action&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio-group v-model=&quot;form.action&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;on&quot;&gt;开灯&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;off&quot;&gt;关灯&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;dim&quot;&gt;调光&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;/el-radio-group&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item v-if=&quot;form.action === 'dim'&quot; label=&quot;亮度值&quot; prop=&quot;brightness&quot;&gt; &lt;el-slider v-model=&quot;form.brightness&quot; :min=&quot;0&quot; :max=&quot;100&quot; show-input /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;纬度&quot; prop=&quot;latitude&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input-number v-model=&quot;form.latitude&quot; :precision=&quot;6&quot; :step=&quot;0.000001&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;经度&quot; prop=&quot;longitude&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input-number v-model=&quot;form.longitude&quot; :precision=&quot;6&quot; :step=&quot;0.000001&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;日出/日落&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio-group v-model=&quot;form.sunEvent&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;sunrise&quot;&gt;日出执行&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;sunset&quot;&gt;日落执行&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;/el-radio-group&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;偏移时间&quot; prop=&quot;offset&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input-number v-model=&quot;form.offset&quot; :step=&quot;10&quot; style=&quot;width: 200px;&quot;&gt; &lt;template #append&gt;分钟&lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input-number&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div v-if=&quot;form.type === 'timer'&quot; class=&quot;type-form&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;执行动作&quot; prop=&quot;action&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio-group v-model=&quot;form.action&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;on&quot;&gt;开灯&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;off&quot;&gt;关灯&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;el-radio label=&quot;dim&quot;&gt;调光&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;/el-radio-group&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item v-if=&quot;form.action === 'dim'&quot; label=&quot;亮度值&quot; prop=&quot;brightness&quot;&gt; &lt;el-slider v-model=&quot;form.brightness&quot; :min=&quot;0&quot; :max=&quot;100&quot; show-input /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;间隔时长&quot; prop=&quot;interval&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input-number v-model=&quot;form.interval&quot; :min=&quot;1&quot; style=&quot;width: 200px;&quot;&gt; &lt;template #append&gt;分钟&lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input-number&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;开始时间&quot; prop=&quot;startTime&quot;&gt; &lt;el-time-picker v-model=&quot;form.startTime&quot; format=&quot;HH:mm&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择开始时间&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;结束时间&quot; prop=&quot;endTime&quot;&gt; &lt;el-time-picker v-model=&quot;form.endTime&quot; format=&quot;HH:mm&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择结束时间&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;开始日期&quot; prop=&quot;startDate&quot;&gt; &lt;el-date-picker v-model=&quot;form.startDate&quot; type=&quot;date&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择开始日期&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;结束日期&quot; prop=&quot;endDate&quot;&gt; &lt;el-date-picker v-model=&quot;form.endDate&quot; type=&quot;date&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择结束日期&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;关联设备&quot; prop=&quot;devices&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;form.devices&quot; multiple placeholder=&quot;请选择关联设备&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;中山路01号灯&quot; value=&quot;1&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;中山路02号灯&quot; value=&quot;2&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;人民路01号灯&quot; value=&quot;3&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;人民路02号灯&quot; value=&quot;4&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;解放路01号灯&quot; value=&quot;5&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;解放路02号灯&quot; value=&quot;6&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;描述&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.description&quot; type=&quot;textarea&quot; :rows=&quot;3&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入策略描述&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;dialogVisible = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;submitForm&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;el-dialog v-model=&quot;detailVisible&quot; title=&quot;策略详情&quot; width=&quot;600px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-descriptions v-if=&quot;currentStrategy&quot; :column=&quot;2&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;策略名称&quot;&gt;{{ currentStrategy.name }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;策略类型&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getTypeTag(currentStrategy.type)&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ getTypeText(currentStrategy.type) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;执行动作&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getActionTag(currentStrategy.action)&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ getActionText(currentStrategy.action) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;关联设备数&quot;&gt;{{ currentStrategy.deviceCount }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;开始日期&quot;&gt;{{ currentStrategy.startDate }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;结束日期&quot;&gt;{{ currentStrategy.endDate }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;currentStrategy.enabled ? 'success' : 'info'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ currentStrategy.enabled ? '已启用' : '已禁用' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;描述&quot; :span=&quot;2&quot;&gt;{{ currentStrategy.description }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;detailVisible = false&quot;&gt;关闭&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, reactive } from 'vue' import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus' const dialogVisible = ref(false) const detailVisible = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const formRef = ref(null) const currentStrategy = ref(null) const strategies = ref([ { id: 1, name: '夜间节能模式', type: 'time', action: 'dim', brightness: 60, executeTime: '18:00', repeatDays: ['1','2','3','4','5'], deviceCount: 50, enabled: true, startDate: '2024-01-01', endDate: '2024-12-31', description: '工作日夜间降低亮度至60%' }, { id: 2, name: '全夜亮灯模式', type: 'time', action: 'on', brightness: 100, executeTime: '18:00', repeatDays: ['0','6'], deviceCount: 30, enabled: true, startDate: '2024-01-01', endDate: '2024-12-31', description: '周末全天保持全亮' }, { id: 3, name: '日出日落策略', type: 'coordinate', action: 'dim', brightness: 80, latitude: 31.230416, longitude: 121.473701, sunEvent: 'sunset', offset: 0, deviceCount: 100, enabled: true, startDate: '2024-01-01', endDate: '2024-12-31', description: '根据经纬度自动开关灯' }, { id: 4, name: '深夜间隔调光', type: 'timer', action: 'dim', brightness: 40, interval: 30, startTime: '23:00', endTime: '05:00', deviceCount: 20, enabled: false, startDate: '2024-01-01', endDate: '2024-12-31', description: '深夜每30分钟调光一次' }, { id: 5, name: '节假日庆典', type: 'time', action: 'on', brightness: 100, executeTime: '18:00', repeatDays: ['0','6'], deviceCount: 80, enabled: true, startDate: '2024-02-01', endDate: '2024-02-29', description: '节假日期间全亮模式' }, { id: 6, name: '故障后恢复', type: 'coordinate', action: 'on', brightness: 100, latitude: 31.230416, longitude: 121.473701, sunEvent: 'sunrise', offset: 0, deviceCount: 50, enabled: true, startDate: '2024-01-01', endDate: '2024-12-31', description: '日出时自动恢复所有灯具' } ]) const form = reactive({ name: '', type: 'time', action: 'on', brightness: 100, executeTime: '', repeatDays: [], latitude: 31.230416, longitude: 121.473701, sunEvent: 'sunset', offset: 0, interval: 30, startTime: '', endTime: '', startDate: '', endDate: '', devices: [], description: '' }) const rules = { name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入策略名称', trigger: 'blur' }], type: [{ required: true, message: '请选择策略类型', trigger: 'change' }], action: [{ required: true, message: '请选择执行动作', trigger: 'change' }] } const getTypeText = (type) =&gt; { const map = { 'time': '时间执行', 'coordinate': '经纬度执行', 'timer': '计时执行' } return map[type] || type } const getTypeTag = (type) =&gt; { const map = { 'time': '', 'coordinate': 'success', 'timer': 'warning' } return map[type] || '' } const getActionText = (action) =&gt; { const map = { 'on': '开灯', 'off': '关灯', 'dim': '调光' } return map[action] || action } const getActionTag = (action) =&gt; { const map = { 'on': 'success', 'off': 'warning', 'dim': '' } return map[action] || '' } const onTypeChange = () =&gt; { form.action = 'on' form.brightness = 100 } const showAddDialog = () =&gt; { isEdit.value = false resetForm() dialogVisible.value = true } const editStrategy = (row) =&gt; { isEdit.value = true Object.assign(form, row) dialogVisible.value = true } const viewDetail = (row) =&gt; { currentStrategy.value = row detailVisible.value = true } const deleteStrategy = (row) =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要删除策略&quot;${row.name}&quot;吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' }).then(() =&gt; { const index = strategies.value.findIndex(s =&gt; s.id === row.id) if (index &gt; -1) { strategies.value.splice(index, 1) ElMessage.success('删除成功') } }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const toggleStrategy = (row) =&gt; { ElMessage.success(`策略&quot;${row.name}&quot;已${row.enabled ? '启用' : '禁用'}`) } const submitForm = () =&gt; { formRef.value.validate((valid) =&gt; { if (valid) { if (isEdit.value) { ElMessage.success('策略修改成功') } else { const newId = Math.max(...strategies.value.map(s =&gt; s.id)) + 1 strategies.value.push({ id: newId, ...form, deviceCount: form.devices.length, enabled: true }) ElMessage.success('策略创建成功') } dialogVisible.value = false } }) } const resetForm = () =&gt; { Object.assign(form, { name: '', type: 'time', action: 'on', brightness: 100, executeTime: '', repeatDays: [], latitude: 31.230416, longitude: 121.473701, sunEvent: 'sunset', offset: 0, interval: 30, startTime: '', endTime: '', startDate: '', endDate: '', devices: [], description: '' }) } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .action-toolbar { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .type-form { padding: 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 20px; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-26">src/views/lighting/TimingStrategy.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/lighting/TimingStrategy.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;时序策略&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;addStrategy&quot;&gt; &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.Plus&quot; /&gt; 新增策略 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;strategyList&quot; border class=&quot;data-table&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;id&quot; label=&quot;策略编号&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;策略名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;startTime&quot; label=&quot;开始时间&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;endTime&quot; label=&quot;结束时间&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;brightness&quot; label=&quot;亮度(%)&quot; width=&quot;100&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt; &lt;el-progress :percentage=&quot;scope.row.brightness&quot; :show-text=&quot;true&quot; width=&quot;80&quot; /&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;enabled&quot; label=&quot;状态&quot; width=&quot;100&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt; &lt;el-switch :value=&quot;scope.row.enabled&quot; @change=&quot;toggleEnable(scope.row)&quot; active-color=&quot;#13ce66&quot; inactive-color=&quot;#ff4949&quot; /&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;createTime&quot; label=&quot;创建时间&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;180&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;editStrategy(scope.row)&quot;&gt;编辑&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; type=&quot;danger&quot; @click=&quot;deleteStrategy(scope.row)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;el-dialog :title=&quot;editDialogTitle&quot; :visible.sync=&quot;dialogVisible&quot; width=&quot;500px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;策略名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入策略名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;开始时间&quot; prop=&quot;startTime&quot;&gt; &lt;el-time-picker v-model=&quot;formData.startTime&quot; format=&quot;HH:mm&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择开始时间&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;结束时间&quot; prop=&quot;endTime&quot;&gt; &lt;el-time-picker v-model=&quot;formData.endTime&quot; format=&quot;HH:mm&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择结束时间&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;亮度&quot; prop=&quot;brightness&quot;&gt; &lt;el-slider v-model=&quot;formData.brightness&quot; :min=&quot;0&quot; :max=&quot;100&quot; :step=&quot;1&quot; show-input /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;dialogVisible = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;saveStrategy&quot;&gt;保存&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Plus, Edit, Delete } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { timingStrategies } from '@/data/mockData' const icons = { Plus, Edit, Delete } const strategyList = ref([...timingStrategies]) const dialogVisible = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const formData = ref({ id: '', name: '', startTime: '', endTime: '', brightness: 80, enabled: true, createTime: '' }) const editDialogTitle = computed(() =&gt; isEdit.value ? '编辑策略' : '新增策略') const addStrategy = () =&gt; { isEdit.value = false formData.value = { id: '', name: '', startTime: '', endTime: '', brightness: 80, enabled: true, createTime: '' } dialogVisible.value = true } const editStrategy = (row) =&gt; { isEdit.value = true formData.value = { ...row } dialogVisible.value = true } const deleteStrategy = (row) =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( '确定要删除该策略吗？', '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&gt; { const index = strategyList.value.findIndex(s =&gt; s.id === row.id) if (index &gt; -1) { strategyList.value.splice(index, 1) } ElMessage.success('删除成功') }).catch(() =&gt; { ElMessage.info('已取消删除') }) } const toggleEnable = (row) =&gt; { row.enabled = !row.enabled } const saveStrategy = () =&gt; { if (!formData.value.name || !formData.value.startTime || !formData.value.endTime) { ElMessage.warning('请填写完整信息') return } if (isEdit.value) { const index = strategyList.value.findIndex(s =&gt; s.id === formData.value.id) if (index &gt; -1) { strategyList.value[index] = { ...formData.value } } ElMessage.success('修改成功') } else { const newId = 'T' + String(strategyList.value.length + 1).padStart(3, '0') strategyList.value.push({ ...formData.value, id: newId, createTime: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }) ElMessage.success('新增成功') } dialogVisible.value = false } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .data-table { width: 100%; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-27">src/views/power/CentralControl.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/power/CentralControl.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;span&gt;1&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span&gt;0.8&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span&gt;0.6&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span&gt;0.4&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span&gt;0.2&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span&gt;0&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-main&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-x-axis&quot;&gt; &lt;span&gt;04-21&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span&gt;04-22&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span&gt;04-23&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span&gt;04-24&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span&gt;04-25&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span&gt;04-26&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span&gt;04-27&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span&gt;日楼&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;告警信息&quot; name=&quot;alarm&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;alarm-info-panel&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;alarmList&quot; border size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;level&quot; label=&quot;告警级别&quot; width=&quot;100&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;alarm-level-dot&quot; :class=&quot;row.levelClass&quot;&gt;&lt;/div&gt; &lt;span&gt;{{ row.level }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;type&quot; label=&quot;告警类型&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;occurTime&quot; label=&quot;告警发生时间&quot; width=&quot;180&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;duration&quot; label=&quot;持续时间&quot; width=&quot;150&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;recoverTime&quot; label=&quot;告警恢复时间&quot; width=&quot;180&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;description&quot; label=&quot;告警描述&quot; min-width=&quot;250&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;status&quot; label=&quot;告警状态&quot; width=&quot;100&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;{{ row.status }}&lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;/el-tabs&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;el-dialog v-model=&quot;showAddDialog&quot; title=&quot;新增集控设备&quot; width=&quot;550px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;form&quot; :rules=&quot;rules&quot; ref=&quot;formRef&quot; label-width=&quot;120px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;设备名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入设备名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;设备编号&quot; prop=&quot;code&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.code&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入设备编号&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;MAC地址&quot; prop=&quot;mac&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.mac&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入MAC地址，如：00-14-97-38-DD-D2&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;IP地址&quot; prop=&quot;ip&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.ip&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入IP地址，如：10.80.91.139&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;所属配电柜&quot; prop=&quot;cabinetId&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;form.cabinetId&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择所属配电柜&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;先导路1号配电柜&quot; value=&quot;1&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;先导路2号配电柜&quot; value=&quot;2&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天1栋1号配电柜&quot; value=&quot;3&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天1栋2号配电柜&quot; value=&quot;4&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; label=&quot;EXC-GLA0605E-P20&quot; value=&quot;EXC-GLA0605E-P20&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;G420A路灯网关-Pro&quot; value=&quot;G420A&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;备注&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.remark&quot; type=&quot;textarea&quot; :rows=&quot;2&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入备注&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showAddDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; overflow: hidden; } .left-panel { width: 200px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; } .panel-header { padding: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .right-panel { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; } .device-list-panel { flex: 1; background: #fff; border-radius: padding: 15px 0; } .info-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .info-label { font-weight: 500; color: #333; min-width: 90px; } .info-value { color: #666; } .info-btn { margin-left: 8px; } .circuit-control-panel { padding: 10px 0; } .circuit-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; } .update-time { color: #666; font-size: .chart-tabs { display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 60px; } .chart-tab { padding: 5px 10px; cursor: pointer; color: #666; } .chart-tab.active { color: #409eff; border-bottom: 2px solid #409eff; } .chart-area { display: flex; height: 260px; } .chart-y-axis { width: 50px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; color: #999; font-size: 12px; } .chart-main { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end; } .chart-x-axis { display: flex; justify-content: space-around; color: #999; font-size: 12px; border-top: 1px solid #e8e8e8; padding-top: 10px; } .alarm-info-panel { padding: 10px 0; } .alarm-level-dot { display: inline-block; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #409eff; margin-right: prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;60&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;deviceName&quot; label=&quot;设备名称&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot; /&gt; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;controlCircuit(row, 'on')&quot;&gt;开&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;controlCircuit(row, 'off')&quot;&gt;关&lt;/el-button&gt; title=&quot;开关记录&quot; width=&quot;800px&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;log-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;log-header&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;log-title&quot;&gt;{{ currentCircuit?.deviceName }} - {{ currentCircuit?.circuitName }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;switchLogs&quot; border size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;序号&quot; width=&quot;60&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; '打开' : '关闭' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;operateTime&quot; label=&quot;操作时间&quot; width=&quot;180&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;result&quot; label=&quot;执行结果&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.result === 'success' ?
