total&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue' import { Search } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus' const deviceSearch = ref('') const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(15) const total = ref(0) const selectedRows = ref([]) const showLogDialog = ref(false) const currentCircuit = ref(null) const logPage = ref(1) const logPageSize = ref(10) const logTotal = ref(0) const defaultProps = { children: 'children', label: 'label' } const filters = reactive({ product: '', networkStatus: '', switchStatus: '', search: '' }) const deviceTreeData = ref([ { id: 'root', label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 'district', label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 'xiandao', label: '先导路', children: [ { id: 'device-1', label: '先导路集控1', deviceId: 1 }, { id: 'device-2', label: '先导路集控2', deviceId: 2 } ] }, { id: 'liwei', label: '力唯中天1栋', children: [ { id: 'device-3', label: '力唯中天集控1', deviceId: 3 }, { id: 'device-4', label: '力唯中天集控2', deviceId: 4 } ] } ] } ] } ]) const circuits = ref([ { id: 1, no: 1, deviceName: '先导路集控1', circuitName: '内置回路1', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:30:00' }, { id: 2, no: 2, deviceName: '先导路集控1', circuitName: '内置回路2', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:30:00' }, { id: 3, no: 3, deviceName: '先导路集控1', circuitName: '内置回路3', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: 'on', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:30:00' }, { id: 4, no: 4, deviceName: '先导路集控1', circuitName: '内置回路4', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:30:00' }, { id: 5, no: 5, deviceName: '先导路集控1', circuitName: '内置回路5', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:30:00' }, { id: 6, no: 6, deviceName: '先导路集控1', circuitName: '内置回路6', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:30:00' }, { id: 7, no: 7, deviceName: '先导路集控2', circuitName: '回路1', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'on', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:28:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:28:00' }, { id: 8, no: 8, deviceName: '先导路集控2', circuitName: '回路2', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'on', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:28:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:28:00' }, { id: 9, no: 9, deviceName: '先导路集控2', circuitName: '回路3', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:28:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:28:00' }, { id: 10, no: 10, deviceName: '力唯中天集控1', circuitName: '交流接触器01', moduleName: 'EXC_10_1', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 09:15:14', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 09:15:00' }, { id: 11, no: 11, deviceName: '力唯中天集控1', circuitName: '交流接触器02', moduleName: 'EXC_10_1', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 09:15:14', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 09:15:00' }, { id: 12, no: 12, deviceName: '力唯中天集控2', circuitName: '回路1', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'on', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:32:00' }, { id: 13, no: 13, deviceName: '力唯中天集控2', circuitName: '回路2', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:32:00' }, { id: 14, no: 14, deviceName: '力唯中天集控2', circuitName: '回路3', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'on', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:32:00' }, { id: 15, no: 15, deviceName: '力唯中天集控2', circuitName: '回路4', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:32:00' } ]) total.value = circuits.value.length const switchLogs = ref([ { no: 1, operator: 'admin', action: 'on', operateTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:00', result: 'success', remark: '定时任务执行' }, { no: 2, operator: 'operator', action: 'off', operateTime: '2026-05-14 06:00:00', result: 'success', remark: '定时任务执行' }, { no: 3, operator: 'admin', action: 'on', operateTime: '2026-05-13 18:00:00', result: 'success', remark: '定时任务执行' }, { no: 4, operator: 'operator', action: 'off', operateTime: '2026-05-13 06:00:00', result: 'success', remark: '定时任务执行' }, { no: 5, operator: 'admin', action: 'on', operateTime: '2026-05-12 18:00:00', result: 'success', remark: '手动操作' } ]) logTotal.value = switchLogs.value.length const filteredCircuits = computed(() =&gt; { let result = circuits.value if (filters.product) result = result.filter(c =&gt; c.deviceName.includes(filters.product)) if (filters.networkStatus) result = result.filter(c =&gt; c.networkStatus === filters.networkStatus) if (filters.switchStatus) result = result.filter(c =&gt; c.switchStatus === filters.switchStatus) if (filters.search) result = result.filter(c =&gt; c.circuitName.includes(filters.search) || c.moduleName.includes(filters.search)) return result }) const handleDeviceCheck = (data, checked) =&gt; { console.log('Device checked:', data, checked) } const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const searchCircuits = () =&gt; { currentPage.value = 1 ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const resetFilters = () =&gt; { Object.assign(filters, { product: '', networkStatus: '', switchStatus: '', search: '' }) currentPage.value = 1 } const controlCircuit = (row, action) =&gt; { if (row.networkStatus === 'offline') { ElMessage.warning('设备离线，无法操作') return } row.switchStatus = action const actionText = action === 'on' ? '打开' : '关闭' ElMessage.success(`${row.circuitName}已${actionText}`) } const batchControl = (action) =&gt; { if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请先选择要操作的回路') return } selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&gt; { if (row.networkStatus === 'online') { row.switchStatus = action } }) const actionText = action === 'on' ? '全开' : '全关' ElMessage.success(`已执行${actionText}`) } const viewSwitchLog = (row) =&gt; { currentCircuit.value = row showLogDialog.value = true } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .main-content { flex: 1; display: flex; gap: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .left-panel { width: 200px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0; } .panel-header { padding: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; background: #fafafa; } .panel-tabs { display: flex; gap: 15px; } .tab { cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px; color: #666; padding-bottom: 8px; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; } .tab.active { color: #1890ff; border-bottom-color: #1890ff; } .search-box { padding: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .search-input { width: 100%; } .device-tree { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 10px; } .right-panel { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0; } .header-left { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; padding: 15px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); margin-bottom: 15px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-select { width: 150px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .circuit-table { flex: 1; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); overflow: auto; min-width: 0; } :deep(.circuit-table .el-table) { min-width: 100%; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .log-content { padding: 10px 0; } .log-header { margin-bottom: 15px; } .log-title { font-weight: 600; color: #333; } .log-pagination { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } &lt;/style&gt;</div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-29">src/views/power/CircuitData.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/power/CircuitData.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;回路用电数据&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;selectedBox&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择配电箱&quot; class=&quot;box-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;全部&quot; value=&quot;&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option v-for=&quot;box in boxes&quot; :key=&quot;box.id&quot; :label=&quot;box.name&quot; :value=&quot;box.id&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;circuit-stats&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-icon&quot;&gt; &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.Electricity&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-info&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-value&quot;&gt;{{ totalPower.toFixed(1) }} kW&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-label&quot;&gt;总功率&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-icon&quot;&gt; &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.Battery&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-info&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-value&quot;&gt;{{ totalEnergy }} kWh&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-label&quot;&gt;总用电量&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-icon&quot;&gt; &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.Gauge&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;stat-info&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-value&quot;&gt;{{ avgPowerFactor.toFixed(2) }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;stat-label&quot;&gt;平均功率因数&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredCircuits&quot; border class=&quot;data-table&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;id&quot; label=&quot;回路编号&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;回路名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;boxId&quot; label=&quot;所属配电箱&quot; width=&quot;120&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt; {{ getBoxName(scope.row.boxId) }} &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;power&quot; label=&quot;功率(W)&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;energy&quot; label=&quot;用电量(kWh)&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;voltage&quot; label=&quot;电压(V)&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;current&quot; label=&quot;电流(A)&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;powerFactor&quot; label=&quot;功率因数&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;功率因数状态&quot; width=&quot;120&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getPowerFactorTag(scope.row.powerFactor)&quot;&gt; {{ getPowerFactorText(scope.row.powerFactor) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Lightning, Tools, Cpu } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { circuitData, distributionBoxes } from '@/data/mockData' const icons = { Electricity: Lightning, Battery: Tools, Gauge: Cpu } const selectedBox = ref('') const circuits = ref([...circuitData]) const boxes = ref([...distributionBoxes]) const filteredCircuits = computed(() =&gt; { if (!selectedBox.value) return circuits.value return circuits.value.filter(c =&gt; c.boxId === selectedBox.value) }) const totalPower = computed(() =&gt; { return filteredCircuits.value.reduce((sum, c) =&gt; sum + c.power, 0) / 1000 }) const totalEnergy = computed(() =&gt; { return filteredCircuits.value.reduce((sum, c) =&gt; sum + c.energy, 0) }) const avgPowerFactor = computed(() =&gt; { const count = filteredCircuits.value.length if (count === 0) return 0 return filteredCircuits.value.reduce((sum, c) =&gt; sum + c.powerFactor, 0) / count }) const getBoxName = (boxId) =&gt; { const box = boxes.value.find(b =&gt; b.id === boxId) return box ? box.name : boxId } const getPowerFactorTag = (pf) =&gt; { if (pf &gt;= 0.95) return 'success' if (pf &gt;= 0.9) return 'warning' return 'danger' } const getPowerFactorText = (pf) =&gt; { if (pf &gt;= 0.95) return '优秀' if (pf &gt;= 0.9) return '良好' return '需优化' } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .circuit-stats { display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .stat-card { flex: 1; background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; } .stat-icon { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #fff; font-size: 24px; } .stat-info { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .stat-value { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600; color: #333; } .stat-label { font-size: 14px; color: #666; } .box-select { width: 200px; } .data-table { width: 100%; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-30">src/views/power/CircuitGroup.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/power/CircuitGroup.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-right&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleAdd&quot;&gt;新增&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; :disabled=&quot;selectedRows.length === 0&quot; @click=&quot;handleBatchDelete&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;content-area&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;searchKeyword&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入分组名称查询&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot;&gt; &lt;template #prefix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Search /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSearch&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleReset&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredGroups&quot; border class=&quot;group-table&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleSelectionChange&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;60&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;groupName&quot; label=&quot;分组名称&quot; min-width=&quot;200&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;deviceCount&quot; label=&quot;关联设备数&quot; width=&quot;150&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;creator&quot; label=&quot;创建人&quot; width=&quot;150&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;remark&quot; label=&quot;备注&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;300&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; fixed=&quot;right&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleBatchOn(row)&quot;&gt;全开&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleBatchOff(row)&quot;&gt;全关&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;warning&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleEdit(row)&quot;&gt;修改&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDelete(row)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-wrapper&quot;&gt; &lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot; v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot; :total=&quot;total&quot; :page-sizes=&quot;[10, 15, 20, 50, 100]&quot; layout=&quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&gt;, sizes, total&quot; &gt;&lt;/el-pagination&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;!-- 新增/编辑分组对话框 --&gt; &lt;el-dialog :title=&quot;dialogTitle&quot; v-model=&quot;showDialog&quot; width=&quot;900px&quot; :close-on-click-modal=&quot;false&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;groupForm&quot; :rules=&quot;groupRules&quot; ref=&quot;groupFormRef&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;8&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;分组名称&quot; prop=&quot;groupName&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;groupForm.groupName&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入分组名称&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;8&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;所属层级&quot; prop=&quot;level&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;groupForm.level&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择所属层级&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;长沙&quot; value=&quot;1&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;岳麓区&quot; value=&quot;2&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;先导路&quot; value=&quot;3&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天1栋&quot; value=&quot;4&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天2栋&quot; value=&quot;5&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-option&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;8&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;分组备注&quot; prop=&quot;remark&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;groupForm.remark&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入分组备注&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;circuit-select&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;select-header&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;select-title&quot;&gt;可选回路&lt;/span&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;leftSearch&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入回路名称&quot; style=&quot;width: 180px; margin-right: 10px;&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleLeftSearch&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleLeftReset&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;leftCircuits&quot; border style=&quot;margin-top: 10px;&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleLeftSelection&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;circuitName&quot; label=&quot;回路名称&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;centralControl&quot; label=&quot;所属集控&quot; min-width=&quot;100&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-small&quot;&gt; &lt;el-pagination :current-page=&quot;leftPage&quot; :page-size=&quot;10&quot; :total=&quot;leftTotal&quot; layout=&quot;prev, pager, next&quot; @current-change=&quot;handleLeftPageChange&quot; &gt;&lt;/el-pagination&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;2&quot; class=&quot;transfer-buttons&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; icon=&quot;ArrowRight&quot; circle @click=&quot;handleMoveRight&quot; :disabled=&quot;leftSelected.length === 0&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; icon=&quot;ArrowLeft&quot; circle @click=&quot;handleMoveLeft&quot; :disabled=&quot;rightSelected.length === 0&quot; style=&quot;margin-top: 10px;&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;10&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;circuit-select&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;select-header&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;select-title&quot;&gt;已选回路&lt;/span&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;rightSearch&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入回路名称&quot; style=&quot;width: 180px; margin-right: 10px;&quot; disabled&gt;&lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;selectedCircuits&quot; border style=&quot;margin-top: 10px;&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleRightSelection&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;circuitName&quot; label=&quot;回路名称&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;centralControl&quot; label=&quot;所属集控&quot; min-width=&quot;100&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;empty-tip&quot; v-if=&quot;selectedCircuits.length === 0&quot;&gt; 暂无数据 &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleDialogClose&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSubmit&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Search, ArrowRight, ArrowLeft } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus' const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(15) const total = ref(2) const searchKeyword = ref('') const showDialog = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const leftPage = ref(1) const leftTotal = ref(40) const leftSearch = ref('') const rightSearch = ref('') const selectedRows = ref([]) const leftSelected = ref([]) const rightSelected = ref([]) const groupFormRef = ref(null) const groupForm = ref({ groupName: '', level: '', remark: '' }) const groupRules = { groupName: [{ required: true, message: '请输入分组名称', trigger: 'blur' }], level: [{ required: true, message: '请选择所属层级', trigger: 'change' }] } const dialogTitle = computed(() =&gt; isEdit.value ? '编辑' : '新增') const circuitGroups = ref([ { no: 1, groupName: '隔一亮一组', deviceCount: 8, creator: 'test08', remark: '', circuits: [ { no: 1, circuitName: '内置回路1', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 2, circuitName: '内置回路2', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 3, circuitName: '内置回路3', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 4, circuitName: '内置回路4', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 5, circuitName: '内置回路5', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 6, circuitName: '内置回路6', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 7, circuitName: '回路1', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 8, circuitName: '回路2', centralControl: '测试128M' } ] }, { no: 2, groupName: '隔一亮一B组', deviceCount: 0, creator: 'admin', remark: '不可更改', circuits: [] } ]) const selectedCircuits = ref([]) const allCircuits = ref([ { no: 1, circuitName: '内置回路1', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 2, circuitName: '内置回路2', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 3, circuitName: '内置回路3', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 4, circuitName: '内置回路4', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 5, circuitName: '内置回路5', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 6, circuitName: '内置回路6', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 7, circuitName: '回路1', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 8, circuitName: '回路2', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 9, circuitName: '回路3', centralControl: '先导路集控1' }, { no: 10, circuitName: '回路4', centralControl: '先导路集控1' }, { no: 11, circuitName: '回路5', centralControl: '先导路集控2' }, { no: 12, circuitName: '回路6', centralControl: '先导路集控2' } ]) const leftCircuits = computed(() =&gt; { const start = (leftPage.value - 1) * 10 const end = start + 10 let result = allCircuits.value.filter(c =&gt; !selectedCircuits.value.some(sc =&gt; sc.no === c.no) ) if (leftSearch.value) { result = result.filter(c =&gt; c.circuitName.includes(leftSearch.value) || c.centralControl.includes(leftSearch.value) ) } return result.slice(start, end) }) const filteredGroups = computed(() =&gt; { if (!searchKeyword.value) return circuitGroups.value return circuitGroups.value.filter(g =&gt; g.groupName.includes(searchKeyword.value)) }) const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const handleLeftSelection = (selection) =&gt; { leftSelected.value = selection } const handleRightSelection = (selection) =&gt; { rightSelected.value = selection } const handleSearch = () =&gt; { ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const handleReset = () =&gt; { searchKeyword.value = '' ElMessage.info('已重置') } const handleAdd = () =&gt; { isEdit.value = false selectedCircuits.value = [] groupForm.value = { groupName: '', level: '', remark: '' } showDialog.value = true } const handleEdit = (row) =&gt; { isEdit.value = true groupForm.value = { groupName: row.groupName, level: '1', remark: row.remark } selectedCircuits.value = [...row.circuits] showDialog.value = true } const handleDelete = (row) =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要删除分组【${row.groupName}】吗？`, '删除确认', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&gt; { circuitGroups.value = circuitGroups.value.filter(g =&gt; g.no !== row.no) total.value-- ElMessage.success('删除成功') }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const handleBatchDelete = () =&gt; { if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要删除的分组') return } ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要删除选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个分组吗？`, '批量删除确认', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&gt; { const ids = selectedRows.value.map(r =&gt; r.no) circuitGroups.value = circuitGroups.value.filter(g =&gt; !ids.includes(g.no)) total.value -= selectedRows.value.length selectedRows.value = [] ElMessage.success('批量删除成功') }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const handleBatchOn = (row) =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要对分组【${row.groupName}】内的所有回路执行&quot;全开&quot;操作吗？`, '批量控制', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&gt; { ElMessage.success(`分组【${row.groupName}】内的 ${row.deviceCount} 个回路已全部开启`) }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const handleBatchOff = (row) =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要对分组【${row.groupName}】内的所有回路执行&quot;全关&quot;操作吗？`, '批量控制', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&gt; { ElMessage.success(`分组【${row.groupName}】内的 ${row.deviceCount} 个回路已全部关闭`) }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const handleMoveRight = () =&gt; { if (leftSelected.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要添加的回路') return } leftSelected.value.forEach(circuit =&gt; { if (!selectedCircuits.value.some(c =&gt; c.no === circuit.no)) { selectedCircuits.value.push(circuit) } }) leftSelected.value = [] ElMessage.success('已添加选中的回路') } const handleMoveLeft = () =&gt; { if (rightSelected.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要移除的回路') return } const ids = rightSelected.value.map(c =&gt; c.no) selectedCircuits.value = selectedCircuits.value.filter(c =&gt; !ids.includes(c.no)) rightSelected.value = [] ElMessage.success('已移除选中的回路') } const handleLeftSearch = () =&gt; { leftPage.value = 1 ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const handleLeftReset = () =&gt; { leftSearch.value = '' leftPage.value = 1 ElMessage.info('已重置') } const handleLeftPageChange = (page) =&gt; { leftPage.value = page } const handleDialogClose = () =&gt; { showDialog.value = false groupFormRef.value?.resetFields() } const handleSubmit = () =&gt; { groupFormRef.value?.validate((valid) =&gt; { if (valid) { if (isEdit.value) { const index = circuitGroups.value.findIndex(g =&gt; g.no === groupForm.value.no) if (index !== -1) { circuitGroups.value[index].groupName = groupForm.value.groupName circuitGroups.value[index].remark = groupForm.value.remark circuitGroups.value[index].deviceCount = selectedCircuits.value.length circuitGroups.value[index].circuits = [...selectedCircuits.value] } ElMessage.success('修改成功') } else { const newNo = circuitGroups.value.length &gt; 0 ? Math.max(...circuitGroups.value.map(g =&gt; g.no)) + 1 : 1 circuitGroups.value.push({ no: newNo, groupName: groupForm.value.groupName, deviceCount: selectedCircuits.value.length, creator: '管理员', remark: groupForm.value.remark, circuits: [...selectedCircuits.value] }) total.value++ ElMessage.success('新增成功') } showDialog.value = false groupFormRef.value?.resetFields() } }) } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; } .header-right { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .content-area { flex: 1; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); padding: 15px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .group-table { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .circuit-select { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .select-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .select-title { font-weight: 500; color: #303133; min-width: 60px; } .transfer-buttons { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; } .pagination-small { margin-top: 10px; display: flex; justify-content: center; } .empty-tip { text-align: center; padding: 40px; color: #909399; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-31">src/views/power/DistributionBox.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/power/DistributionBox.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;main-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;left-sidebar&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;sidebar-header&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;searchText&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入层级名称&quot; class=&quot;sidebar-search&quot; &gt; &lt;template #prefix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Search /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-tree :data=&quot;treeData&quot; :props=&quot;defaultProps&quot; show-checkbox node-key=&quot;id&quot; :expand-on-click-node=&quot;false&quot; @check-change=&quot;handleCheckChange&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;right-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;配电柜&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;showAddDialog = true&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Plus /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 新增 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;refreshData&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Refresh /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 刷新 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; @click=&quot;batchDelete&quot; :disabled=&quot;selectedRows.length === 0&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Delete /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 删除 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;filters.search&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入配电柜名称或编号&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot; clearable &gt; &lt;template #prefix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Search /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filters.status&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择状态&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot; clearable&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;在线&quot; value=&quot;online&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;离线&quot; value=&quot;offline&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filters.health&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择健康状态&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot; clearable&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;正常&quot; value=&quot;normal&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;故障&quot; value=&quot;fault&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;searchBoxes&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;resetFilters&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredBoxes&quot; border style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleSelectionChange&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;45&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;序号&quot; width=&quot;60&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;code&quot; label=&quot;设备编号&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;设备名称&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;location&quot; label=&quot;位置&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;status&quot; label=&quot;在线状态&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.status === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.status === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;health&quot; label=&quot;健康状态&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.health === 'normal' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.health === 'normal' ? '正常' : '故障' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;temperature&quot; label=&quot;温度(℃)&quot; width=&quot;90&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;humidity&quot; label=&quot;湿度(%)&quot; width=&quot;90&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;280&quot; fixed=&quot;right&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;viewDetail(row)&quot;&gt;详情&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;warning&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;editBox(row)&quot;&gt;编辑&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;deleteBox(row)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-wrapper&quot;&gt; &lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot; v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot; :total=&quot;total&quot; :page-sizes=&quot;[10, 15, 20, 30]&quot; layout=&quot;total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-dialog v-model=&quot;showAddDialog&quot; :title=&quot;isEdit ? '编辑配电柜' : '新增配电柜'&quot; width=&quot;700px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;form&quot; :rules=&quot;rules&quot; ref=&quot;formRef&quot; label-width=&quot;120px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;配电柜编号&quot; prop=&quot;code&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.code&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入配电柜编号&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;配电柜名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入配电柜名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;配电柜位置&quot; prop=&quot;location&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.location&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入配电柜位置&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;配电柜经度&quot; prop=&quot;longitude&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.longitude&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入配电柜经度&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;配电柜纬度&quot; prop=&quot;latitude&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.latitude&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入配电柜纬度&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;所属层级&quot; prop=&quot;hierarchy&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;form.hierarchy&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择所属层级&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;长沙-岳麓区-先导路&quot; value=&quot;xiandao&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;长沙-岳麓区-力唯中天1栋&quot; value=&quot;liwei&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;容量(kVA)&quot; prop=&quot;capacity&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.capacity&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入配电柜容量&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;描述&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.description&quot; type=&quot;textarea&quot; :rows=&quot;3&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入描述&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showAddDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;submitForm&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;el-dialog v-model=&quot;showDetailDialog&quot; title=&quot;配电柜详情&quot; width=&quot;900px&quot;&gt; &lt;div v-if=&quot;currentBox&quot; class=&quot;detail-content&quot;&gt; &lt;el-descriptions :column=&quot;2&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;设备编号&quot;&gt;{{ currentBox.code }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;设备名称&quot;&gt;{{ currentBox.name }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;位置&quot;&gt;{{ currentBox.location }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;在线状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;currentBox.status === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ currentBox.status === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;健康状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;currentBox.health === 'normal' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ currentBox.health === 'normal' ? '正常' : '故障' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;温度&quot;&gt;{{ currentBox.temperature }}℃&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;湿度&quot;&gt;{{ currentBox.humidity }}%&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions&gt; &lt;el-tabs v-model=&quot;detailTab&quot; class=&quot;detail-tabs&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;供电参数&quot; name=&quot;power&quot;&gt; &lt;el-descriptions :column=&quot;3&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;A相电压&quot;&gt;220V&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;B相电压&quot;&gt;221V&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;C相电压&quot;&gt;219V&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;A相电流&quot;&gt;15.2A&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;B相电流&quot;&gt;14.8A&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;C相电流&quot;&gt;15.5A&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;有功功率&quot;&gt;10.2kW&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;无功功率&quot;&gt;2.1kVar&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;功率因数&quot;&gt;0.95&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions&gt; &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;关联线路&quot; name=&quot;circuits&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;relatedCircuits&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;序号&quot; width=&quot;60&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;线路名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;status&quot; label=&quot;状态&quot; width=&quot;80&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.status === 'on' ? 'success' : 'warning'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.status === 'on' ? '合闸' : '分闸' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;power&quot; label=&quot;功率(kW)&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;环境监测&quot; name=&quot;environment&quot;&gt; &lt;el-descriptions :column=&quot;2&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;门锁状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;currentBox.lockStatus === 'locked' ? 'success' : 'warning'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ currentBox.lockStatus === 'locked' ? '锁定' : '解锁' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;门磁状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;currentBox.magneticStatus === 'closed' ? 'success' : 'warning'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ currentBox.magneticStatus === 'closed' ? '关闭' : '打开' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;烟感状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;currentBox.smokeStatus === 'normal' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ currentBox.smokeStatus === 'normal' ? '正常' : '报警' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;水浸状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;currentBox.waterStatus === 'dry' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ currentBox.waterStatus === 'dry' ? '干燥' : '水浸' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions&gt; &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;/el-tabs&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showDetailDialog = false&quot;&gt;关闭&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue' import { Search, Plus, Refresh, Delete } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus' const searchText = ref('') const showAddDialog = ref(false) const showDetailDialog = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const formRef = ref(null) const detailTab = ref('power') const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(15) const total = ref(9) const selectedRows = ref([]) const currentBox = ref(null) const filters = reactive({ search: '', status: '', health: '' }) const form = reactive({ code: '', name: '', location: '', longitude: '', latitude: '', hierarchy: '', capacity: '', description: '' }) const rules = { code: [{ required: true, message: '请输入配电柜编号', trigger: 'blur' }], name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入配电柜名称', trigger: 'blur' }], location: [{ required: true, message: '请输入配电柜位置', trigger: 'blur' }] } const defaultProps = { children: 'children', label: 'label' } const treeData = ref([ { id: 1, label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 11, label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 111, label: '先导路' }, { id: 112, label: '力唯中天1栋' } ] } ] } ]) const boxes = ref([ { id: 1, no: 1, code: 'PDG-XDL-001', name: '先导路1号配电柜', location: '长沙-岳麓区-先导路与麓谷大道交汇处', status: 'online', health: 'normal', temperature: 28, humidity: 65, lockStatus: 'locked', magneticStatus: 'closed', smokeStatus: 'normal', waterStatus: 'dry' }, { id: 2, no: 2, code: 'PDG-XDL-002', name: '先导路2号配电柜', location: '长沙-岳麓区-先导路中段', status: 'online', health: 'normal', temperature: 30, humidity: 60, lockStatus: 'locked', magneticStatus: 'closed', smokeStatus: 'normal', waterStatus: 'dry' }, { id: 3, no: 3, code: 'PDG-LWZT-001', name: '力唯中天1栋1号配电柜', location: '长沙-岳麓区-力唯中天1栋地下车库', status: 'online', health: 'normal', temperature: 25, humidity: 70, lockStatus: 'locked', magneticStatus: 'closed', smokeStatus: 'normal', waterStatus: 'dry' }, { id: 4, no: 4, code: 'PDG-LWZT-002', name: '力唯中天1栋2号配电柜', location: '长沙-岳麓区-力唯中天1栋A座旁', status: 'offline', health: 'fault', temperature: '-', humidity: '-', lockStatus: 'locked', magneticStatus: 'closed', smokeStatus: 'normal', waterStatus: 'dry' } ]) const relatedCircuits = ref([ { no: 1, name: '主照明回路1', status: 'on', power: 3.5 }, { no: 2, name: '主照明回路2', status: 'on', power: 2.8 }, { no: 3, name: '景观照明回路', status: 'off', power: 0 }, { no: 4, name: '应急照明回路', status: 'on', power: 1.2 } ]) const filteredBoxes = computed(() =&gt; { let result = boxes.value if (filters.search) { result = result.filter(b =&gt; b.code.includes(filters.search) || b.name.includes(filters.search)) } if (filters.status) { result = result.filter(b =&gt; b.status === filters.status) } if (filters.health) { result = result.filter(b =&gt; b.health === filters.health) } return result }) const handleCheckChange = (data, checked) =&gt; { console.log('checked:', data, checked) } const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const searchBoxes = () =&gt; { currentPage.value = 1 ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const resetFilters = () =&gt; { Object.assign(filters, { search: '', status: '', health: '' }) currentPage.value = 1 } const refreshData = () =&gt; { ElMessage.success('数据已刷新') } const viewDetail = (row) =&gt; { currentBox.value = row detailTab.value = 'power' showDetailDialog.value = true } const editBox = (row) =&gt; { isEdit.value = true Object.assign(form, row) showAddDialog.value = true } const deleteBox = (row) =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要删除配电柜&quot;${row.name}&quot;吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' }).then(() =&gt; { const index = boxes.value.findIndex(b =&gt; b.id === row.id) if (index &gt; -1) { boxes.value.splice(index, 1) total.value-- ElMessage.success('删除成功') } }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const batchDelete = () =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要删除选中的${selectedRows.value.length}个配电柜吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' }).then(() =&gt; { const selectedIds = selectedRows.value.map(b =&gt; b.id) boxes.value = boxes.value.filter(b =&gt; !selectedIds.includes(b.id)) total.value = boxes.value.length selectedRows.value = [] ElMessage.success('批量删除成功') }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const submitForm = () =&gt; { formRef.value.validate((valid) =&gt; { if (valid) { if (isEdit.value) { ElMessage.success('配电柜修改成功') } else { const newId = Math.max(...boxes.value.map(b =&gt; b.id)) + 1 boxes.value.push({ id: newId, no: boxes.value.length + 1, ...form, status: 'online', health: 'normal', temperature: '-', humidity: '-', lockStatus: 'locked', magneticStatus: 'closed', smokeStatus: 'normal', waterStatus: 'dry' }) total.value++ ElMessage.success('配电柜添加成功') } showAddDialog.value = false } }) } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { padding: 20px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .main-content { display: flex; gap: 20px; } .left-sidebar { width: 200px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); padding: 15px; flex-shrink: 0; } .sidebar-header { margin-bottom: 15px; } .right-content { flex: 1; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .page-header .title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-input { width: 220px; } .filter-select { width: 150px; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 20px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .detail-content { padding: 10px 0; } .detail-tabs { margin-top: 20px; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-32">src/views/power/HistoryScene.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/power/HistoryScene.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;历史下发场景&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-right&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;refreshData&quot;&gt;刷新&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;content-area&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;historyScenes&quot; border class=&quot;scene-table&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;60&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;sceneName&quot; label=&quot;场景名称&quot; min-width=&quot;200&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;operator&quot; label=&quot;下发人员&quot; width=&quot;150&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;deployTime&quot; label=&quot;下发时间&quot; width=&quot;200&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;viewDetail(row)&quot;&gt;详情&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-wrapper&quot;&gt; &lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot; v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot; :total=&quot;total&quot; :page-sizes=&quot;[10, 15, 20, 50, 100]&quot; layout=&quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&gt;, sizes, total&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;bottom-buttons&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;隐藏&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;显示&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref } from 'vue' import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus' const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(15) const total = ref(42) const historyScenes = ref([ { no: 1, sceneName: '园区路灯照明', operator: 'tanrongfu', deployTime: '2026-01-09 13:59:26' }, { no: 2, sceneName: '定时', operator: 'admin', deployTime: '2026-01-05 11:33:52' }, { no: 3, sceneName: '开关', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-08 11:17:53' }, { no: 4, sceneName: '开关2', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-08 10:26:38' }, { no: 5, sceneName: '开关2', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-08 09:57:31' }, { no: 6, sceneName: '开关2', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-07 18:28:36' }, { no: 7, sceneName: '开关', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-07 17:41:50' }, { no: 8, sceneName: '开关', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-07 11:09:09' }, { no: 9, sceneName: '开关2', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-07 11:08:53' }, { no: 10, sceneName: '开关', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-07 10:43:24' }, { no: 11, sceneName: '开关2', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-06 18:19:53' }, { no: 12, sceneName: '开关2', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-06 16:09:25' }, { no: 13, sceneName: '开关', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-06 16:07:33' }, { no: 14, sceneName: '园区路灯照明', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-06 16:07:18' }, { no: 15, sceneName: '测试', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2024-11-19 15:02:00' } ]) const refreshData = () =&gt; { ElMessage.success('数据已刷新') } const viewDetail = (row) =&gt; { ElMessage.info('查看场景详情: ' + row.sceneName) } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; } .page-header .title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; } .header-right { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .content-area { flex: 1; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); padding: 15px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; } .scene-table { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .bottom-buttons { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-33">src/views/power/LampControlBind.vue</h2> width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;60&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; v-model=&quot;showDialog&quot; width=&quot;900px&quot; :close-on-click-modal=&quot;false&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; :rules=&quot;formRules&quot; ref=&quot;formRef&quot; class=&quot;table-select&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;select-header&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;leftSearch&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入IMEI号或名称&quot; style=&quot;width: 200px; margin-right: v-if=&quot;leftTableData.length === 0&quot;&gt;暂无数据&lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;2&quot; class=&quot;transfer-buttons&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; icon=&quot;ArrowLeft&quot; circle @click=&quot;handleMoveLeft&quot; :disabled=&quot;rightSelected.length === 0&quot; style=&quot;margin-top: 10px;&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-button&gt; ref({ centralControl: '' }) const formRules = { centralControl: [{ required: true, message: '请选择所属集控', trigger: 'change' }] } const dialogTitle = computed(() =&gt; isEdit.value ? '编辑灯控绑定' : '新增灯控绑定') const bindData = ref([ { no: 1, centralControlName: '展厅集控', centralControlNo: 'ZTJK', bindCount: 2, lampControls: [ { no: 1, imei: '867892010000001', lampControlName: '灯控1', lampPoleName: '灯杆001' }, { no: 2, imei: '867892010000002', lampControlName: '灯控2', lampPoleName: '灯杆002' } ] } ]) const selectedLampControls = ref([]) const allLampControls = ref([ { no: 1, imei: '867892010000001', lampControlName: '灯控1', lampPoleName: '灯杆001' }, { no: 2, imei: '867892010000002', lampControlName: '灯控2', lampPoleName: '灯杆002' }, { no: 3, imei: '867892010000003', lampControlName: '灯控3', lampPoleName: '灯杆003' }, { no: 4, imei: '867892010000004', lampControlName: '灯控4', lampPoleName: '灯杆004' }, { no: 5, imei: '867892010000005', lampControlName: '灯控5', lampPoleName: '灯杆005' }, { no: 6, imei: '867892010000006', lampControlName: '灯控6', lampPoleName: '灯杆006' } ]) const filteredData = computed(() =&gt; { if (!searchKeyword.value) return bindData.value return bindData.value.filter(item =&gt; item.centralControlName.includes(searchKeyword.value) || item.centralControlNo.includes(searchKeyword.value) ) }) const leftTableData = computed(() =&gt; { let result = allLampControls.value.filter(lc =&gt; !selectedLampControls.value.some(slc =&gt; slc.imei === lc.imei) ) if (leftSearch.value) { result = result.filter(lc =&gt; lc.imei.includes(leftSearch.value) || lc.lampControlName.includes(leftSearch.value) || lc.lampPoleName.includes(leftSearch.value) ) } return result }) const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const handleLeftSelection = (selection) =&gt; { leftSelected.value = selection } const handleRightSelection = (selection) =&gt; { rightSelected.value = selection } const handleSearch = () =&gt; { ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const handleReset = () =&gt; { searchKeyword.value = '' ElMessage.info('已重置') } const handleAdd = () =&gt; { isEdit.value = false selectedLampControls.value = [] formData.value = { centralControl: '' } showDialog.value = true } const handleEdit = (row) =&gt; { isEdit.value = true formData.value = { centralControl: row.centralControlNo } selectedLampControls.value = [...row.lampControls] showDialog.value = true } const handleUnbind = (row) =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要对集控【${row.centralControlName}】执行&quot;解绑&quot;操作吗？`, '解绑确认', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&gt; { const index = bindData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.no === row.no) if (index !== -1) { bindData.value[index].bindCount = 0 bindData.value[index].lampControls = [] } ElMessage.success('解绑成功') }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const handleBatchUnbind = () =&gt; { if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要解绑的集控') return } ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要对选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个集控执行&quot;解绑&quot;操作吗？`, '批量解绑确认', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&gt; { selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&gt; { const index = bindData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.no === row.no) if (index !== -1) { bindData.value[index].bindCount = 0 bindData.value[index].lampControls = [] } }) selectedRows.value = [] ElMessage.success('批量解绑成功') }).catch(() =&gt; {}) } const handleMoveRight = () =&gt; { if (leftSelected.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要添加的灯控') return } leftSelected.value.forEach(lc =&gt; { if (!selectedLampControls.value.some(slc =&gt; slc.imei === lc.imei)) { selectedLampControls.value.push(lc) } }) leftSelected.value = [] ElMessage.success('已添加选中的灯控') } const handleMoveLeft = () =&gt; { if (rightSelected.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要移除的灯控') return } const imeis = rightSelected.value.map(lc =&gt; lc.imei) selectedLampControls.value = selectedLampControls.value.filter(lc =&gt; !imeis.includes(lc.imei)) rightSelected.value = [] ElMessage.success('已移除选中的灯控') } const handleLeftSearch = () =&gt; { ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const handleLeftReset = () =&gt; { leftSearch.value = '' ElMessage.info('已重置') } const handleDialogClose = () =&gt; { showDialog.value = false formRef.value?.resetFields() } const handleSubmit = () =&gt; { formRef.value?.validate((valid) =&gt; { if (valid) { if (isEdit.value) { const index = bindData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.centralControlNo === formData.value.centralControl) if (index !== -1) { bindData.value[index].bindCount = selectedLampControls.value.length bindData.value[index].lampControls = [...selectedLampControls.value] } ElMessage.success('修改成功') } else { const centralControlMap = { 'ZTJK': '展厅集控', 'CS128M': '测试128M', 'XDLJK1': '先导路集控1', 'XDLJK2': '先导路集控2' } const newNo = bindData.value.length &gt; 0 ? Math.max(...bindData.value.map(item =&gt; item.no)) + 1 : 1 bindData.value.push({ no: newNo, centralControlName: centralControlMap[formData.value.centralControl] || formData.value.centralControl, centralControlNo: formData.value.centralControl, bindCount: selectedLampControls.value.length, lampControls: [...selectedLampControls.value] }) total.value++ ElMessage.success('新增成功') } showDialog.value = false formRef.value?.resetFields() } }) } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; } .header-right { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .content-area { flex: 1; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); padding: 15px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; } .main-tabs { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .main-tabs :deep(.el-tabs__content) { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .main-tabs :deep(.el-tab-pane) { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .data-table { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .table-select { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .select-header { display: flex; align-items: center; } .transfer-buttons { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; } .empty-tip { text-align: center; padding: 40px; color: #909399; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-34">src/views/power/LineInfo.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/power/LineInfo.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;线路信息&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;showAddDialog = true&quot;&gt;新增&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button&gt;批量导入&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;main-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;left-panel&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;panel-header&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;panel-title&quot;&gt;配电柜列表&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;search-box&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;cabinetSearch&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入&quot; class=&quot;search-input&quot; &gt; &lt;template #prefix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Search /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;cabinet-list&quot;&gt; &lt;div v-for=&quot;cabinet in filteredCabinets&quot; :key=&quot;cabinet.id&quot; class=&quot;cabinet-item&quot; :class=&quot;{ active: selectedCabinet?.id === cabinet.id }&quot; @click=&quot;selectCabinet(cabinet)&quot; &gt; &lt;div class=&quot;cabinet-name&quot;&gt;{{ cabinet.name }}&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;cabinet-code&quot;&gt;编号: {{ cabinet.code }}&lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;right-panel&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;panel-header&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;panel-title&quot;&gt;线路信息&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredLines&quot; border class=&quot;line-table&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;线路名称&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;code&quot; label=&quot;线路编号&quot; min-width=&quot;120&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;lampCount&quot; label=&quot;关联灯控数&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;80&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;editLine(row)&quot;&gt;修改&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-dialog v-model=&quot;showAddDialog&quot; :title=&quot;isEdit ? '修改' : '新增'&quot; width=&quot;650px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;form&quot; :rules=&quot;rules&quot; ref=&quot;formRef&quot; label-width=&quot;120px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*配电柜名称&quot; prop=&quot;cabinetId&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;form.cabinetId&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option v-for=&quot;cabinet in cabinets&quot; :key=&quot;cabinet.id&quot; :label=&quot;cabinet.name&quot; :value=&quot;cabinet.id&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*上级线路&quot; prop=&quot;parentLine&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;form.parentLine&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;无&quot; value=&quot;&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;主线1&quot; value=&quot;main1&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;主线2&quot; value=&quot;main2&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*控制类型&quot; prop=&quot;controlType&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;form.controlType&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;断路器&quot; value=&quot;breaker&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;接触器&quot; value=&quot;contactor&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;继电器&quot; value=&quot;relay&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*线路编号&quot; prop=&quot;code&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.code&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*线路名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*单三相&quot; prop=&quot;phaseType&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;form.phaseType&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%;&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;单相&quot; value=&quot;single&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;三相&quot; value=&quot;three&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;参考电流(A)&quot; prop=&quot;refCurrent&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.refCurrent&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入参考电流&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;额定功率&quot; prop=&quot;ratedPower&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.ratedPower&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入额定功率&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;20&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;电流上限值(A)&quot; prop=&quot;currentMax&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.currentMax&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入电流上限值&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;12&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;电流下限值(A)&quot; prop=&quot;currentMin&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.currentMin&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入电流下限值&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;备注&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;form.remark&quot; type=&quot;textarea&quot; :rows=&quot;2&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入备注&quot; maxlength=&quot;20&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showAddDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;submitForm&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue' import { Search } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus' const showAddDialog = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const formRef = ref(null) const cabinetSearch = ref('') const selectedCabinet = ref(null) const cabinets = ref([ { id: 1, name: '先导路1号配电柜', code: 'PDG-XDL-001' }, { id: 2, name: '先导路2号配电柜', code: 'PDG-XDL-002' }, { id: 3, name: '力唯中天1栋1号配电柜', code: 'PDG-LWZT-001' }, { id: 4, name: '力唯中天1栋2号配电柜', code: 'PDG-LWZT-002' } ]) const lines = ref([ { id: 1, cabinetId: 1, name: '断路器', code: 'AL10', lampCount: 0, parentLine: '', controlType: 'breaker', phaseType: 'single', refCurrent: '', ratedPower: '', currentMax: '', currentMin: '', remark: '' } ]) const form = reactive({ cabinetId: '', parentLine: '', controlType: '', code: '', name: '', phaseType: '', refCurrent: '', ratedPower: '', currentMax: '', currentMin: '', remark: '' }) const rules = { cabinetId: [{ required: true, message: '请选择配电柜名称', trigger: 'change' }], parentLine: [{ required: true, message: '请选择上级线路', trigger: 'change' }], controlType: [{ required: true, message: '请选择控制类型', trigger: 'change' }], code: [{ required: true, message: '请输入线路编号', trigger: 'blur' }], name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入线路名称', trigger: 'blur' }], phaseType: [{ required: true, message: '请选择单三相', trigger: 'change' }] } const filteredCabinets = computed(() =&gt; { if (!cabinetSearch.value) return cabinets.value return cabinets.value.filter(c =&gt; c.name.includes(cabinetSearch.value) || c.code.includes(cabinetSearch.value)) }) const filteredLines = computed(() =&gt; { if (!selectedCabinet.value) return lines.value return lines.value.filter(l =&gt; l.cabinetId === selectedCabinet.value.id) }) const selectCabinet = (cabinet) =&gt; { selectedCabinet.value = cabinet } const resetForm = () =&gt; { Object.assign(form, { cabinetId: '', parentLine: '', controlType: '', code: '', name: '', phaseType: '', refCurrent: '', ratedPower: '', currentMax: '', currentMin: '', remark: '' }) } const editLine = (row) =&gt; { isEdit.value = true Object.assign(form, row) showAddDialog.value = true } const submitForm = () =&gt; { formRef.value.validate((valid) =&gt; { if (valid) { if (isEdit.value) { const index = lines.value.findIndex(l =&gt; l.id === form.id) if (index &gt; -1) { lines.value[index] = { ...lines.value[index], ...form } } ElMessage.success('修改成功') } else { const newId = Math.max(...lines.value.map(l =&gt; l.id), 0) + 1 lines.value.push({ id: newId, ...form, lampCount: 0 }) ElMessage.success('新增成功') } showAddDialog.value = false isEdit.value = false resetForm() } }) } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { padding: 20px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .page-header .title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .main-content { display: flex; gap: 20px; overflow: hidden; } .left-panel { width: 200px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); flex-shrink: 0; overflow: hidden; } .panel-header { padding: 12px 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; background: #fafafa; } .panel-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #333; } .search-box { padding: 10px; } .search-input { width: 100%; } .cabinet-list { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 5px; } .cabinet-item { padding: 10px; margin-bottom: 5px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; border: 1px solid transparent; } .cabinet-item:hover { background: #f0f0f0; } .cabinet-item.active { background: #e6f7ff; border-color: #91d5ff; } .cabinet-name { font-size: 13px; color: #333; margin-bottom: 4px; } .cabinet-code { font-size: 11px; color: #999; } .right-panel { flex: 1; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); min-width: 0; } .line-table { flex: 1; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-35">src/views/power/LoadMonitor.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/power/LoadMonitor.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;电压电流负荷展示&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;timeRange&quot; placeholder=&quot;时间范围&quot; class=&quot;range-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;今日&quot; value=&quot;today&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;本周&quot; value=&quot;week&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;本月&quot; value=&quot;month&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;summary-cards&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;summary-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-title&quot;&gt;总功率&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-value&quot;&gt;{{ statistics.power.toLocaleString() }} W&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-trend positive&quot;&gt; &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.TrendingUp&quot; /&gt; &lt;span&gt;+12.5%&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;summary-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-title&quot;&gt;用电量&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-value&quot;&gt;{{ statistics.energy }} kWh&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-trend positive&quot;&gt; &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.TrendingUp&quot; /&gt; &lt;span&gt;+8.3%&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;summary-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-title&quot;&gt;峰值负荷&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-value&quot;&gt;{{ statistics.peakLoad.toFixed(1) }} A&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-trend negative&quot;&gt; &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.TrendingDown&quot; /&gt; &lt;span&gt;-5.2%&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-header&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;chart-title&quot;&gt;电压趋势&lt;/span&gt; &lt;el-tag type=&quot;info&quot;&gt;220V ± 5%&lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-container&quot;&gt; &lt;canvas ref=&quot;voltageChart&quot;&gt;&lt;/canvas&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-header&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;chart-title&quot;&gt;电流趋势&lt;/span&gt; &lt;el-tag type=&quot;warning&quot;&gt;峰值: {{ maxCurrent.toFixed(1) }}A&lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-container&quot;&gt; &lt;canvas ref=&quot;currentChart&quot;&gt;&lt;/canvas&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-card full-width&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-header&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;chart-title&quot;&gt;功率与负载率&lt;/span&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;legend&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;legend-item&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;legend-dot power&quot;&gt;&lt;/span&gt; 功率(kW)&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;legend-item&quot;&gt;&lt;span class=&quot;legend-dot load&quot;&gt;&lt;/span&gt; 负载率(%)&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;chart-container&quot;&gt; &lt;canvas ref=&quot;powerChart&quot;&gt;&lt;/canvas&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt;import { ref, computed, onMounted } from 'vue'; import { ArrowUp, ArrowDown } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'; import { loadHistoryData, energyStatistics } from '@/data/mockData'; const icons = { TrendingUp: ArrowUp, TrendingDown: ArrowDown }; const timeRange = ref('today'); const voltageChart = ref(null); const currentChart = ref(null); const powerChart = ref(null); const statistics = computed(() =&gt; { return energyStatistics[timeRange.value]; }); const maxCurrent = computed(() =&gt; { return Math.max(...loadHistoryData.current); }); const drawChart = (canvas, data, color, label, unit) =&gt; { const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); const width = canvas.width; const height = canvas.height; const padding = { top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 30, left: 45 }; const chartWidth = width - padding.left - padding.right; const chartHeight = height - padding.top - padding.bottom; const maxValue = Math.max(...data) * 1.1; const minValue = Math.min(...data) * 0.9; ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height); ctx.strokeStyle = '#e8e8e8'; ctx.lineWidth = 1; for (let i = 0; i &lt;= 5; i++) { const y = padding.top + (chartHeight / 5) * i; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(padding.left, y); ctx.lineTo(width - padding.right, y); ctx.stroke(); const value = maxValue - ((maxValue - minValue) / 5) * i; ctx.fillStyle = '#999'; ctx.font = '11px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'right'; ctx.fillText(value.toFixed(1), padding.left - 5, y + 4); } ctx.strokeStyle = '#e8e8e8'; for (let i = 0; i &lt; loadHistoryData.labels.length; i++) { const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (loadHistoryData.labels.length - 1)) * i; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x, padding.top); ctx.lineTo(x, height - padding.bottom); ctx.stroke(); ctx.fillStyle = '#999'; ctx.font = '11px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'center'; ctx.fillText(loadHistoryData.labels[i], x, height - 8); } ctx.beginPath(); ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.shadowColor = color; ctx.shadowBlur = 5; data.forEach((value, index) =&gt; { const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (data.length - 1)) * index; const y = padding.top + chartHeight - ((value - minValue) / (maxValue - minValue)) * chartHeight; if (index === 0) { ctx.moveTo(x, y); } else { ctx.lineTo(x, y); } }); ctx.stroke(); ctx.shadowBlur = 0; const lastX = padding.left + chartWidth; const lastY = padding.top + chartHeight - ((data[data.length - 1] - minValue) / (maxValue - minValue)) * chartHeight; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(lastX, lastY, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill(); ctx.fillStyle = '#333'; ctx.font = '12px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'left'; ctx.fillText(`${data[data.length - 1].toFixed(1)}${unit}`, lastX + 8, lastY + 4); }; const drawPowerChart = (canvas) =&gt; { const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); const width = canvas.width; const height = canvas.height; const padding = { top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 30, left: 55 }; const chartWidth = width - padding.left - padding.right; const chartHeight = height - padding.top - padding.bottom; const powerData = loadHistoryData.power.map(p =&gt; p / 1000); const loadData = loadHistoryData.loadPercent; const maxPower = Math.max(...powerData) * 1.1; const maxLoad = 100; ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height); ctx.strokeStyle = '#e8e8e8'; ctx.lineWidth = 1; for (let i = 0; i &lt;= 5; i++) { const y = padding.top + (chartHeight / 5) * i; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(padding.left, y); ctx.lineTo(width - padding.right, y); ctx.stroke(); const powerValue = maxPower - (maxPower / 5) * i; ctx.fillStyle = '#999'; ctx.font = '11px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'right'; ctx.fillText(powerValue.toFixed(1), padding.left - 5, y + 4); } ctx.fillStyle = '#999'; ctx.font = '11px sans-serif'; ctx.save(); ctx.translate(20, height / 2); ctx.rotate(-Math.PI / 2); ctx.textAlign = 'center'; ctx.fillText('功率(kW)', 0, 0); ctx.restore(); ctx.strokeStyle = '#e8e8e8'; for (let i = 0; i &lt; loadHistoryData.labels.length; i++) { const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (loadHistoryData.labels.length - 1)) * i; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x, padding.top); ctx.lineTo(x, height - padding.bottom); ctx.stroke(); ctx.fillStyle = '#999'; ctx.font = '11px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'center'; ctx.fillText(loadHistoryData.labels[i], x, height - 8); } ctx.beginPath(); ctx.strokeStyle = '#1890ff'; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.shadowColor = '#1890ff'; ctx.shadowBlur = 5; powerData.forEach((value, index) =&gt; { const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (powerData.length - 1)) * index; const y = padding.top + chartHeight - (value / maxPower) * chartHeight; if (index === 0) { ctx.moveTo(x, y); } else { ctx.lineTo(x, y); } }); ctx.stroke(); ctx.shadowBlur = 0; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.strokeStyle = '#52c41a'; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]); ctx.shadowColor = '#52c41a'; ctx.shadowBlur = 3; loadData.forEach((value, index) =&gt; { const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (loadData.length - 1)) * index; const y = padding.top + chartHeight - (value / maxLoad) * chartHeight; if (index === 0) { ctx.moveTo(x, y); } else { ctx.lineTo(x, y); } }); ctx.stroke(); ctx.setLineDash([]); ctx.shadowBlur = 0; }; const resizeCanvas = (canvas, width, height) =&gt; { const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1; canvas.width = width * dpr; canvas.height = height * dpr; canvas.style.width = width + 'px'; canvas.style.height = height + 'px'; canvas.getContext('2d').scale(dpr, dpr); }; onMounted(() =&gt; { setTimeout(() =&gt; { if (voltageChart.value) { resizeCanvas(voltageChart.value, 450, 200); drawChart(voltageChart.value, loadHistoryData.voltage, '#1890ff', '电压', 'V'); } if (currentChart.value) { resizeCanvas(currentChart.value, 450, 200); drawChart(currentChart.value, loadHistoryData.current, '#faad14', '电流', 'A'); } if (powerChart.value) { resizeCanvas(powerChart.value, 920, 250); drawPowerChart(powerChart.value); } }, 100); }); &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .summary-cards { display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .summary-card { flex: 1; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); padding: 25px; border-radius: 8px; color: #fff; } .card-title { font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.9; margin-bottom: 8px; } .card-value { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 10px; } .card-trend { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 12px; &amp;.positive { color: #95de64; } &amp;.negative { color: #ff7875; } } .chart-section { display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; &amp;:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; } } .chart-card { flex: 1; background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); &amp;.full-width { flex: 1 1 100%; } } .chart-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; } .chart-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #333; } .legend { display: flex; gap: 20px; } .legend-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 12px; color: #666; } .legend-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; &amp;.power { background: #1890ff; } &amp;.load { background: #52c41a; } } .chart-container { height: 200px;
