.full-width &amp; { height: 250px; } } .range-select { width: 120px; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-36">src/views/power/ModuleInfo.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/power/ModuleInfo.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;main-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;content-panel&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;panel-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-left&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;refreshData&quot;&gt;刷新&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;filters.deviceName&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入集控名称&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot; &gt; &lt;template #prefix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Search /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filters.status&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择模块状态&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;全部状态&quot; value=&quot;&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;在线&quot; value=&quot;online&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;离线&quot; value=&quot;offline&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;searchModules&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;resetFilters&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredModules&quot; border class=&quot;module-table&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;45&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;60&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;deviceName&quot; label=&quot;设备名称&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot; sortable /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;moduleType&quot; label=&quot;模块类型&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;moduleName&quot; label=&quot;模块名称&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;moduleAddress&quot; label=&quot;模块地址&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;model&quot; label=&quot;模块型号&quot; min-width=&quot;140&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;serialNumber&quot; label=&quot;序列号&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;networkStatus&quot; label=&quot;网络状态&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;updateTime&quot; label=&quot;数据更新时间&quot; width=&quot;180&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;150&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; fixed=&quot;right&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;viewCircuitData(row)&quot;&gt;回路数据&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-wrapper&quot;&gt; &lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot; v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot; :total=&quot;total&quot; :page-sizes=&quot;[10, 20, 50, 100]&quot; layout=&quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&gt;, sizes, total&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;!-- 回路数据弹窗 --&gt; &lt;el-dialog v-model=&quot;showCircuitDialog&quot; :title=&quot;`${currentModule?.moduleName} - 回路数据`&quot; width=&quot;90%&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;circuit-data-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;circuit-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;circuit-info&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;info-item&quot;&gt;&lt;strong&gt;所属设备：&lt;/strong&gt;{{ currentModule?.deviceName }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;info-item&quot;&gt;&lt;strong&gt;模块类型：&lt;/strong&gt;{{ currentModule?.moduleType }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;info-item&quot;&gt;&lt;strong&gt;模块型号：&lt;/strong&gt;{{ currentModule?.model }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;circuit-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;refreshCircuitData&quot;&gt;刷新数据&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;circuitData&quot; border class=&quot;circuit-data-table&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;60&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;circuitName&quot; label=&quot;回路名称&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;circuitNo&quot; label=&quot;回路编号&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;currentA&quot; label=&quot;A相电流(A)&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; align=&quot;right&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;span :style=&quot;{ color: row.currentA &gt; 10 ? '#e6a23c' : '#333' }&quot;&gt;{{ row.currentA }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;currentB&quot; label=&quot;B相电流(A)&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; align=&quot;right&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;span :style=&quot;{ color: row.currentB &gt; 10 ? '#e6a23c' : '#333' }&quot;&gt;{{ row.currentB }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;currentC&quot; label=&quot;C相电流(A)&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; align=&quot;right&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;span :style=&quot;{ color: row.currentC &gt; 10 ? '#e6a23c' : '#333' }&quot;&gt;{{ row.currentC }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;circuitStatus&quot; label=&quot;回路状态&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.circuitStatus === 'on' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.circuitStatus === 'on' ? '通电' : '断电' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;switchRecord&quot; label=&quot;开关记录&quot; width=&quot;180&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;display&quot; label=&quot;是否显示&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-switch v-model=&quot;row.display&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @change=&quot;toggleDisplay(row)&quot; /&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;viewCircuitDetail(row)&quot;&gt;详情&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;circuit-pagination&quot;&gt; &lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&quot;circuitPage&quot; v-model:page-size=&quot;circuitPageSize&quot; :total=&quot;circuitTotal&quot; layout=&quot;prev, pager, next, total&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue' import { Search } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus' const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(10) const total = ref(0) const showCircuitDialog = ref(false) const currentModule = ref(null) const circuitPage = ref(1) const circuitPageSize = ref(10) const circuitTotal = ref(0) const filters = reactive({ deviceName: '', status: '' }) const modules = ref([ { id: 1, no: 1, deviceName: '先导路集控1', moduleType: '6回路控制单元', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', moduleAddress: 66, model: 'EXC-G290C-B2', serialNumber: '152403120001', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:15' }, { id: 2, no: 2, deviceName: '先导路集控1', moduleType: '12回路电流检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_12_4', moduleAddress: 4, model: 'EXC-G290C-C3', serialNumber: '112230620003', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:15' }, { id: 3, no: 3, deviceName: '先导路集控1', moduleType: '8回路剩余电流检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_13_2', moduleAddress: 2, model: 'EXC-G290C-L4', serialNumber: '113230820001', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:15' }, { id: 4, no: 4, deviceName: '先导路集控2', moduleType: '6回路控制单元', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', moduleAddress: 3, model: 'EXC-G290C-B2', serialNumber: '110231123001', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:28:15' }, { id: 5, no: 5, deviceName: '先导路集控2', moduleType: '4回路供电控制单元', moduleName: 'EXC_14_6', moduleAddress: 6, model: 'EXC-G290C-P7', serialNumber: '114230210001', networkStatus: 'offline', updateTime: '2026-05-14 08:15:15' }, { id: 6, no: 6, deviceName: '力唯中天集控1', moduleType: '12回路输入状态检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_11_5', moduleAddress: 5, model: 'EXC-G290C-D5', serialNumber: '111230620000', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:15' }, { id: 7, no: 7, deviceName: '力唯中天集控1', moduleType: '8回路剩余电流检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_13_7', moduleAddress: 7, model: 'EXC-G290C-L4', serialNumber: '113230620006', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:15' }, { id: 8, no: 8, deviceName: '力唯中天集控2', moduleType: '6回路控制单元', moduleName: 'EXC_10_1', moduleAddress: 1, model: 'EXC-G290C-B2', serialNumber: '110231215560', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:15' }, { id: 9, no: 9, deviceName: '力唯中天集控2', moduleType: '12回路电流检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_12_2', moduleAddress: 2, model: 'EXC-G290C-C3', serialNumber: '112231215574', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:15' } ]) total.value = modules.value.length const circuitData = ref([ { id: 1, no: 1, circuitName: '内置回路1', circuitNo: 1, currentA: 3.2, currentB: 3.0, currentC: 3.1, circuitStatus: 'on', switchRecord: '2026-05-14 06:00:00 开', display: true }, { id: 2, no: 2, circuitName: '内置回路2', circuitNo: 2, currentA: 2.8, currentB: 2.9, currentC: 2.7, circuitStatus: 'on', switchRecord: '2026-05-14 06:00:00 开', display: true }, { id: 3, no: 3, circuitName: '内置回路3', circuitNo: 3, currentA: 0.0, currentB: 0.0, currentC: 0.0, circuitStatus: 'off', switchRecord: '2026-05-13 22:00:00 关', display: true }, { id: 4, no: 4, circuitName: '内置回路4', circuitNo: 4, currentA: 4.5, currentB: 4.6, currentC: 4.4, circuitStatus: 'on', switchRecord: '2026-05-14 06:00:00 开', display: true }, { id: 5, no: 5, circuitName: '内置回路5', circuitNo: 5, currentA: 1.2, currentB: 1.3, currentC: 1.1, circuitStatus: 'on', switchRecord: '2026-05-14 06:00:00 开', display: false }, { id: 6, no: 6, circuitName: '内置回路6', circuitNo: 6, currentA: 0.0, currentB: 0.0, currentC: 0.0, circuitStatus: 'off', switchRecord: '2026-05-13 22:00:00 关', display: true } ]) circuitTotal.value = circuitData.value.length const filteredModules = computed(() =&gt; { let result = modules.value if (filters.deviceName) result = result.filter(m =&gt; m.deviceName.includes(filters.deviceName)) if (filters.status) result = result.filter(m =&gt; m.networkStatus === filters.status) return result }) const searchModules = () =&gt; { currentPage.value = 1 ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const resetFilters = () =&gt; { Object.assign(filters, { deviceName: '', status: '' }) currentPage.value = 1 } const refreshData = () =&gt; { ElMessage.success('数据已刷新') } const viewCircuitData = (row) =&gt; { currentModule.value = row showCircuitDialog.value = true } const refreshCircuitData = () =&gt; { ElMessage.success('回路数据已刷新') } const toggleDisplay = (row) =&gt; { ElMessage.success(`${row.circuitName} 显示状态已${row.display ? '开启' : '关闭'}`) } const viewCircuitDetail = (row) =&gt; { ElMessage.info(`查看 ${row.circuitName} 的详细数据`) } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .main-content { flex: 1; display: flex; overflow: hidden; } .content-panel { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0; } .panel-header { padding: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .header-left { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; padding: 15px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); margin-bottom: 15px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-select { width: 150px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .module-table { flex: 1; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); overflow: auto; min-width: 0; } :deep(.module-table .el-table) { min-width: 100%; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .circuit-data-content { padding: 10px 0; } .circuit-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding: 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; } .circuit-info { display: flex; gap: 30px; } .info-item { font-size: 14px; color: #333; } .circuit-data-table { margin-bottom: 15px; } .circuit-pagination { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-37">src/views/power/StrongElectricScene.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/power/StrongElectricScene.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;toolbar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleAdd&quot;&gt;新增&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleLightSensor&quot;&gt;光感策略&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;success&quot; :disabled=&quot;selectedRows.length === 0&quot; @click=&quot;handleDeploy&quot;&gt;下发&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; :disabled=&quot;selectedRows.length === 0&quot; @click=&quot;handleDelete&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;filters.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入场景名称&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot; clearable&gt; &lt;template #prefix&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Search /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-input&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filters.type&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择场景类型&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot; clearable&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;定时场景&quot; value=&quot;timer&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;光感场景&quot; value=&quot;light&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;searchScenes&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;resetFilters&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredScenes&quot; border class=&quot;scene-table&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleSelectionChange&quot; &gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;70&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;场景名称&quot; min-width=&quot;180&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;type&quot; label=&quot;场景类型&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.type === 'timer' ? 'primary' : 'success'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.type === 'timer' ? '定时场景' : '光感场景' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;status&quot; label=&quot;状态&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.status === 'active' ? 'success' : 'info'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.status === 'active' ? '已启用' : '未启用' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;deployCount&quot; label=&quot;下发次数&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;creator&quot; label=&quot;创建人&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;createTime&quot; label=&quot;创建时间&quot; width=&quot;180&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;220&quot; align=&quot;center&quot; fixed=&quot;right&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleEdit(row)&quot;&gt;编辑&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;warning&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleView(row)&quot;&gt;详情&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDeleteOne(row)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-wrapper&quot;&gt; &lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot; v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot; :total=&quot;total&quot; :page-sizes=&quot;[10, 20, 50, 100]&quot; layout=&quot;total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;!-- 新增/编辑场景弹窗 --&gt; &lt;el-dialog :title=&quot;isEdit ? '编辑场景' : '新增场景'&quot; v-model=&quot;showSceneDialog&quot; width=&quot;700px&quot; :close-on-click-modal=&quot;false&quot; &gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;sceneForm&quot; :rules=&quot;sceneRules&quot; ref=&quot;sceneFormRef&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;场景名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;sceneForm.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入场景名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;场景类型&quot; prop=&quot;type&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio-group v-model=&quot;sceneForm.type&quot; @change=&quot;handleTypeChange&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio value=&quot;timer&quot;&gt;定时场景&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;el-radio value=&quot;light&quot;&gt;光感场景&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;/el-radio-group&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;!-- 定时场景配置 --&gt; &lt;template v-if=&quot;sceneForm.type === 'timer'&quot;&gt; &lt;el-divider content-position=&quot;left&quot;&gt;定时动作配置&lt;/el-divider&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;timer-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;div v-for=&quot;(action, index) in sceneForm.actions&quot; :key=&quot;index&quot; class=&quot;action-item&quot;&gt; &lt;el-row :gutter=&quot;10&quot;&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;5&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;action.type&quot; placeholder=&quot;动作类型&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;开灯&quot; value=&quot;on&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;关灯&quot; value=&quot;off&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;6&quot;&gt; &lt;el-time-picker v-model=&quot;action.time&quot; placeholder=&quot;执行时间&quot; format=&quot;HH:mm&quot; value-format=&quot;HH:mm&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;11&quot;&gt; &lt;el-checkbox-group v-model=&quot;action.weekDays&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;1&quot;&gt;周一&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;2&quot;&gt;周二&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;3&quot;&gt;周三&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;4&quot;&gt;周四&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;5&quot;&gt;周五&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;6&quot;&gt;周六&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;el-checkbox label=&quot;0&quot;&gt;周日&lt;/el-checkbox&gt; &lt;/el-checkbox-group&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;el-col :span=&quot;2&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; icon=&quot;Delete&quot; @click=&quot;removeAction(index)&quot; circle size=&quot;small&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-col&gt; &lt;/el-row&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; plain @click=&quot;addAction&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%&quot;&gt;+ 添加动作&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;!-- 光感场景配置 --&gt; &lt;template v-if=&quot;sceneForm.type === 'light'&quot;&gt; &lt;el-divider content-position=&quot;left&quot;&gt;光感策略配置&lt;/el-divider&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;光感阈值&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input-number v-model=&quot;sceneForm.lightThreshold&quot; :min=&quot;0&quot; :max=&quot;1000&quot; placeholder=&quot;光照阈值 (lux)&quot; /&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;unit&quot;&gt;lux&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;触发动作&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;sceneForm.lightAction&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择触发动作&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;开灯&quot; value=&quot;on&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;关灯&quot; value=&quot;off&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;生效时段&quot;&gt; &lt;el-time-picker v-model=&quot;sceneForm.lightTimeRange&quot; is-range placeholder=&quot;开始时间 - 结束时间&quot; format=&quot;HH:mm&quot; value-format=&quot;HH:mm&quot; range-separator=&quot;至&quot; start-placeholder=&quot;开始时间&quot; end-placeholder=&quot;结束时间&quot; style=&quot;width: 100%&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;el-divider content-position=&quot;left&quot;&gt;关联设备&lt;/el-divider&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;选择设备&quot;&gt; &lt;el-transfer v-model=&quot;sceneForm.devices&quot; :data=&quot;deviceOptions&quot; :titles=&quot;['可选设备', '已选设备']&quot; filterable filter-placeholder=&quot;搜索设备&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showSceneDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;submitScene&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;!-- 详情弹窗 --&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;场景详情&quot; v-model=&quot;showDetailDialog&quot; width=&quot;600px&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;detail-content&quot; v-if=&quot;currentScene&quot;&gt; &lt;el-descriptions :column=&quot;1&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;场景名称&quot;&gt;{{ currentScene.name }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;场景类型&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;currentScene.type === 'timer' ? 'primary' : 'success'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ currentScene.type === 'timer' ? '定时场景' : '光感场景' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;currentScene.status === 'active' ? 'success' : 'info'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ currentScene.status === 'active' ? '已启用' : '未启用' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;创建人&quot;&gt;{{ currentScene.creator }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;创建时间&quot;&gt;{{ currentScene.createTime }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions&gt; &lt;el-divider content-position=&quot;left&quot; style=&quot;margin-top: 20px&quot;&gt;策略配置&lt;/el-divider&gt; &lt;div v-if=&quot;currentScene.type === 'timer'&quot; class=&quot;timer-detail&quot;&gt; &lt;div v-for=&quot;(action, index) in currentScene.actions&quot; :key=&quot;index&quot; class=&quot;action-detail&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;action-no&quot;&gt;动作 {{ index + 1 }}：&lt;/span&gt; &lt;el-tag size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;{{ action.type === 'on' ? '开灯' : '关灯' }}&lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;span&gt;，执行时间：{{ action.time }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span&gt;，执行星期：{{ action.weekDaysText }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div v-else class=&quot;light-detail&quot;&gt; &lt;div&gt;光感阈值：{{ currentScene.lightThreshold }} lux&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div&gt;触发动作：{{ currentScene.lightAction === 'on' ? '开灯' : '关灯' }}&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div&gt;生效时段：{{ currentScene.lightTimeRange[0] }} 至 {{ currentScene.lightTimeRange[1] }}&lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue' import { Search, Plus, Delete, Clock, Sunrise, Download } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus' const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(10) const total = ref(0) const selectedRows = ref([]) const showSceneDialog = ref(false) const showDetailDialog = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const currentScene = ref(null) const sceneFormRef = ref(null) const filters = reactive({ name: '', type: '' }) const weekDayMap = { '0': '周日', '1': '周一', '2': '周二', '3': '周三', '4': '周四', '5': '周五', '6': '周六' } const scenes = ref([ { id: 1, no: 1, name: '夜间照明场景', type: 'timer', status: 'active', deployCount: 15, creator: '管理员', createTime: '2026-05-10 10:00:00', actions: [ { type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5'] }, { type: 'off', time: '06:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5'] } ] }, { id: 2, no: 2, name: '周末照明场景', type: 'timer', status: 'active', deployCount: 8, creator: '管理员', createTime: '2026-05-12 14:30:00', actions: [ { type: 'on', time: '19:00', weekDays: ['6', '0'] }, { type: 'off', time: '07:00', weekDays: ['6', '0'] } ] }, { id: 3, no: 3, name: '阴天自动照明', type: 'light', status: 'inactive', deployCount: 5, creator: '管理员', createTime: '2026-05-13 09:00:00', lightThreshold: 200, lightAction: 'on', lightTimeRange: ['06:00', '20:00'] }, { id: 4, no: 4, name: '强光自动关闭', type: 'light', status: 'active', deployCount: 3, creator: '管理员', createTime: '2026-05-14 16:00:00', lightThreshold: 800, lightAction: 'off', lightTimeRange: ['08:00', '18:00'] } ]) total.value = scenes.value.length const deviceOptions = ref([ { key: 1, label: '先导路集控1' }, { key: 2, label: '先导路集控2' }, { key: 3, label: '力唯中天集控1' }, { key: 4, label: '力唯中天集控2' } ]) const sceneForm = reactive({ name: '', type: 'timer', actions: [ { type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0'] } ], lightThreshold: 200, lightAction: 'on', lightTimeRange: ['06:00', '22:00'], devices: [] }) const sceneRules = { name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入场景名称', trigger: 'blur' }], type: [{ required: true, message: '请选择场景类型', trigger: 'change' }] } const filteredScenes = computed(() =&gt; { let result = scenes.value if (filters.name) { result = result.filter(s =&gt; s.name.includes(filters.name)) } if (filters.type) { result = result.filter(s =&gt; s.type === filters.type) } return result }) const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const searchScenes = () =&gt; { currentPage.value = 1 ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const resetFilters = () =&gt; { Object.assign(filters, { name: '', type: '' }) currentPage.value = 1 } const handleAdd = () =&gt; { isEdit.value = false resetSceneForm() showSceneDialog.value = true } const handleLightSensor = () =&gt; { isEdit.value = false resetSceneForm() sceneForm.type = 'light' showSceneDialog.value = true } const handleEdit = (row) =&gt; { isEdit.value = true Object.assign(sceneForm, { name: row.name, type: row.type, actions: row.type === 'timer' ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(row.actions)) : [], lightThreshold: row.lightThreshold || 200, lightAction: row.lightAction || 'on', lightTimeRange: row.lightTimeRange || ['06:00', '22:00'], devices: [] }) showSceneDialog.value = true } const handleView = (row) =&gt; { currentScene.value = { ...row, actions: row.actions ? row.actions.map(a =&gt; ({ ...a, weekDaysText: a.weekDays.map(d =&gt; weekDayMap[d]).join('、') })) : [] } showDetailDialog.value = true } const handleDeploy = () =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要下发选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个场景吗？`, '场景下发', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&gt; { ElMessage.success('场景下发成功') }) } const handleDelete = () =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要删除选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个场景吗？`, '删除确认', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&gt; { ElMessage.success('删除成功') }) } const handleDeleteOne = (row) =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要删除场景【${row.name}】吗？`, '删除确认', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&gt; { ElMessage.success('删除成功') }) } const submitScene = () =&gt; { sceneFormRef.value.validate((valid) =&gt; { if (valid) { if (sceneForm.type === 'timer' &amp;&amp; sceneForm.actions.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请至少添加一个定时动作') return } ElMessage.success(isEdit.value ? '编辑成功' : '创建成功') showSceneDialog.value = false } }) } const addAction = () =&gt; { sceneForm.actions.push({ type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0'] }) } const removeAction = (index) =&gt; { if (sceneForm.actions.length &gt; 1) { sceneForm.actions.splice(index, 1) } else { ElMessage.warning('至少保留一个动作') } } const handleTypeChange = () =&gt; { if (sceneForm.type === 'timer') { sceneForm.actions = [{ type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0'] }] } } const resetSceneForm = () =&gt; { Object.assign(sceneForm, { name: '', type: 'timer', actions: [ { type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0'] } ], lightThreshold: 200, lightAction: 'on', lightTimeRange: ['06:00', '22:00'], devices: [] }) } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { padding: 20px; background: #f0f2f5; min-height: 100%; } .toolbar { margin-bottom: 20px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; padding: 15px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); margin-bottom: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-select { width: 150px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .scene-table { background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 20px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .timer-actions { width: 100%; } .action-item { padding: 15px; background: #f5f7fa; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 10px; } .unit { margin-left: 10px; color: #606266; } .detail-content { padding: 10px 0; } .timer-detail, .light-detail { padding: 15px; background: #f5f7fa; border-radius: 4px; } .action-detail { margin-bottom: 10px; } .action-no { font-weight: 600; color: #303133; } .action-detail span { margin-right: 10px; } &lt;/style&gt;</div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-38">src/views/scene/LinkageManage.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/scene/LinkageManage.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;main-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;right-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-right&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSave&quot;&gt;保存&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleCancel&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; @click=&quot;handleTimeRange&quot;&gt;触发时间段&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-row&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-item&quot;&gt; &lt;label class=&quot;required&quot;&gt;规则名称&lt;/label&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入规则名称&quot; class=&quot;form-input&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-item&quot;&gt; &lt;label class=&quot;required&quot;&gt;优先级&lt;/label&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.priority&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;高&quot; value=&quot;high&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;低&quot; value=&quot;low&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-item&quot;&gt; &lt;label class=&quot;required&quot;&gt;执行日期&lt;/label&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;radio-group&quot;&gt; &lt;el-radio v-model=&quot;formData.executeType&quot; label=&quot;always&quot;&gt;一直执行&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;el-radio v-model=&quot;formData.executeType&quot; label=&quot;scheduled&quot;&gt;定时执行&lt;/el-radio&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;tabs-section&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tabs v-model=&quot;activeTab&quot; class=&quot;section-tabs&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;触发条件&quot; name=&quot;condition&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;condition-list&quot;&gt; &lt;div v-for=&quot;(condition, index) in formData.conditions&quot; :key=&quot;index&quot; class=&quot;condition-item&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;condition-index&quot;&gt;{{ index + 1 }}&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;condition-fields&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;condition.productType&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择产品类型&quot; class=&quot;condition-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;灯控制器&quot; value=&quot;灯控制器&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;传感器&quot; value=&quot;传感器&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;摄像头&quot; value=&quot;摄像头&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;condition.device&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择设备&quot; class=&quot;condition-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;展厅隧道灯&quot; value=&quot;展厅隧道灯&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;光亚展灯杆&quot; value=&quot;光亚展灯杆&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;condition.triggerType&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择触发类型&quot; class=&quot;condition-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;事件触发&quot; value=&quot;event&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;属性触发&quot; value=&quot;property&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;condition.triggerCondition&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择触发条件&quot; class=&quot;condition-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;检测有人&quot; value=&quot;有人&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;检测无人&quot; value=&quot;无人&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;光照度低于阈值&quot; value=&quot;光照度低&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;漏电&quot; value=&quot;漏电&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;condition-controls&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; @click=&quot;removeCondition(index)&quot;&gt;×&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;add-condition&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;addCondition&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Plus /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 添加触发条件 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;执行动作&quot; name=&quot;action&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;action-list&quot;&gt; &lt;div v-for=&quot;(action, index) in formData.actions&quot; :key=&quot;index&quot; class=&quot;action-item&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;action-index&quot;&gt;{{ index + 1 }}&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;action-fields&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;action.productType&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择产品类型&quot; class=&quot;action-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;灯控制器&quot; value=&quot;灯控制器&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;集控&quot; value=&quot;集控&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;传感器&quot; value=&quot;传感器&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;action.device&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择设备&quot; class=&quot;action-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;展厅隧道灯&quot; value=&quot;展厅隧道灯&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;光亚展灯杆&quot; value=&quot;光亚展灯杆&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;action.action&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择动作内容&quot; class=&quot;action-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;开灯&quot; value=&quot;开灯&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;关灯&quot; value=&quot;关灯&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;调光50%&quot; value=&quot;调光50%&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;断电&quot; value=&quot;断电&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;action-controls&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; @click=&quot;removeAction(index)&quot;&gt;×&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;add-action&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;addAction&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Plus /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; 添加执行动作 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;/el-tabs&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;触发时间段&quot; v-model=&quot;showTimeRangeDialog&quot; width=&quot;400px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;timeRangeData&quot; label-width=&quot;80px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;开始时间&quot;&gt; &lt;el-time-picker v-model=&quot;timeRangeData.startTime&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择开始时间&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;结束时间&quot;&gt; &lt;el-time-picker v-model=&quot;timeRangeData.endTime&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择结束时间&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showTimeRangeDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;confirmTimeRange&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref } from 'vue'; import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'; const activeTab = ref('condition'); const showTimeRangeDialog = ref(false); const formData = ref({ name: '', priority: 'high', executeType: 'always', conditions: [ { productType: '', device: '', triggerType: '', triggerCondition: '' } ], actions: [ { productType: '', device: '', action: '' } ] }); const timeRangeData = ref({ startTime: '', endTime: '' }); const addCondition = () =&gt; { formData.value.conditions.push({ productType: '', device: '', triggerType: '', triggerCondition: '' }); }; const removeCondition = (index) =&gt; { if (formData.value.conditions.length &gt; 1) { formData.value.conditions.splice(index, 1); } }; const addAction = () =&gt; { formData.value.actions.push({ productType: '', device: '', action: '' }); }; const removeAction = (index) =&gt; { if (formData.value.actions.length &gt; 1) { formData.value.actions.splice(index, 1); } }; const handleSave = () =&gt; { if (!formData.value.name) { alert('请输入规则名称'); return; } alert('规则保存成功'); }; const handleCancel = () =&gt; { formData.value = { name: '', priority: 'high', executeType: 'always', conditions: [ { productType: '', device: '', triggerType: '', triggerCondition: '' } ], actions: [ { productType: '', device: '', action: '' } ] }; }; const handleTimeRange = () =&gt; { showTimeRangeDialog.value = true; }; const confirmTimeRange = () =&gt; { showTimeRangeDialog.value = false; alert('触发时间段设置成功'); }; &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { display: flex; height: calc(100vh - 60px); } .main-content { flex: 1; display: flex; overflow: hidden; } .right-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; padding: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .form-section { margin-bottom: 20px; } .form-row { display: flex; gap: 30px; } .form-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; width: 280px; } .form-item label { color: #303133; font-size: 14px; } .required::after { content: '*'; color: #f56c6c; margin-left: 4px; } .form-input { width: 100%; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dcdfe6; } .form-select { width: 100%; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dcdfe6; } .radio-group { display: flex; gap: 20px; } .radio-group :deep(.el-radio) { color: #303133; } .tabs-section { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; } .section-tabs { --el-tabs-header-text-color: #606266; --el-tabs-active-text-color: #409eff; --el-tabs-border-color: #e8e8e8; --el-tabs-active-bar-color: #409eff; } .section-tabs :deep(.el-tabs__content) { padding: 15px 0; } .condition-list, .action-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; } .condition-item, .action-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e8e8e8; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; } .condition-index, .action-index { width: 30px; height: 30px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #f0f2f5; border-radius: 4px; color: #409eff; font-weight: 600; } .condition-fields, .action-fields { flex: 1; display: flex; gap: 15px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; } .condition-select, .action-select { width: 180px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dcdfe6; } .condition-controls, .action-controls { display: flex; } .condition-controls .el-button, .action-controls .el-button { padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 18px; color: #909399; } .add-condition, .add-action { padding: 10px; border: 1px dashed #dcdfe6; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; } &lt;/style&gt;</div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-39">src/views/scene/QuickOperation.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/scene/QuickOperation.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;main-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;right-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-left&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tabs v-model=&quot;activeTab&quot; class=&quot;header-tabs&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;场景控制&quot; name=&quot;control&quot;&gt;场景控制&lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;场景下发记录&quot; name=&quot;records&quot;&gt;场景下发记录&lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;/el-tabs&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-right&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleAdd&quot;&gt;新增&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div v-if=&quot;activeTab === 'control'&quot; class=&quot;control-panel&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;filterKeyword&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入场景名称查询&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSearch&quot;&gt;查询&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleReset&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;scene-cards&quot;&gt; &lt;el-card v-for=&quot;scene in filteredScenes&quot; :key=&quot;scene.id&quot; class=&quot;scene-card&quot; &gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-header&quot;&gt; &lt;label class=&quot;checkbox-label&quot;&gt; &lt;el-checkbox v-model=&quot;scene.selected&quot; /&gt; &lt;span&gt;{{ scene.name }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/label&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-controls&quot;&gt; &lt;el-switch v-model=&quot;scene.visible&quot; active-text=&quot;显示&quot; inactive-text=&quot;隐藏&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-body&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleExecute(scene)&quot;&gt;执行&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;info&quot; @click=&quot;handleResult(scene)&quot;&gt;执行结果&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; @click=&quot;handleMore(scene)&quot;&gt;...&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-card&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div v-else class=&quot;records-panel&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;recordsData&quot; border class=&quot;data-table&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;sceneName&quot; label=&quot;场景名称&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;executeTime&quot; label=&quot;下发时间&quot; min-width=&quot;160&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;status&quot; label=&quot;状态&quot; width=&quot;90&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.status === 'success' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.status === 'success' ? '成功' : '失败' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;detail&quot; label=&quot;详情&quot; min-width=&quot;200&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;新增场景&quot; v-model=&quot;showAddDialog&quot; width=&quot;500px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;场景名称&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入场景名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;显示状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.visible&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;显示&quot; :value=&quot;true&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;隐藏&quot; :value=&quot;false&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;排序序号&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input type=&quot;number&quot; v-model=&quot;formData.sortOrder&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入排序序号&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showAddDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleConfirmAdd&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;执行结果&quot; v-model=&quot;showResultDialog&quot; width=&quot;500px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-descriptions :column=&quot;2&quot; :data=&quot;resultData&quot; border&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;场景名称&quot;&gt;{{ resultData.name }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;执行时间&quot;&gt;{{ resultData.executeTime }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;resultData.status === 'success' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ resultData.status === 'success' ? '成功' : '失败' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;el-descriptions-item label=&quot;详情&quot;&gt;{{ resultData.detail }}&lt;/el-descriptions-item&gt; &lt;/el-descriptions&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue'; const activeTab = ref('control'); const filterKeyword = ref(''); const showAddDialog = ref(false); const showResultDialog = ref(false); const formData = ref({ name: '', visible: true, sortOrder: 1 }); const resultData = ref({}); const scenesData = ref([ { id: 1, name: '(0)应急开灯', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 2, name: '(0)某路段人工复查', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 3, name: '(1)线性灯-100', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 4, name: '(1)线性灯-10', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 5, name: '(1)线性灯-50', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 6, name: '(1)线性灯关', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 7, name: '(1)隧道灯具全关', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 8, name: '(2)高速灯-100', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 9, name: '(2)高速灯-50', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 10, name: '(2)高速灯-10', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 11, name: '(2)高速灯关', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 12, name: '(3)低位红光关闭', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 13, name: '(3)低位雾光关闭', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 14, name: '(3)低位雾光开', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 15, name: '(3)低位白光关闭', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 16, name: '(3)低位白光开', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 17, name: '(3)低位红光开', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 18, name: '(5)灯具展示100...', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 19, name: '(99)展厅一键全开', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 20, name: '(99)展厅全关', visible: true, selected: false } ]); const recordsData = ref([ { no: 1, sceneName: '应急开灯', executeTime: '2024-04-22 10:26:58', status: 'success', detail: '执行成功，共控制156盏灯具' }, { no: 2, sceneName: '隧道灯具全关', executeTime: '2024-04-22 09:15:30', status: 'success', detail: '执行成功，共控制89盏灯具' }, { no: 3, sceneName: '线性灯-50', executeTime: '2024-04-22 08:00:00', status: 'success', detail: '执行成功，共控制234盏灯具' }, { no: 4, sceneName: '高速灯-100', executeTime: '2024-04-21 22:30:00', status: 'danger', detail: '执行失败，部分设备离线' } ]); const filteredScenes = computed(() =&gt; { if (!filterKeyword.value) return scenesData.value; const keyword = filterKeyword.value.toLowerCase(); return scenesData.value.filter(item =&gt; item.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword)); }); const handleSearch = () =&gt; {}; const handleReset = () =&gt; { filterKeyword.value = ''; }; const handleAdd = () =&gt; { showAddDialog.value = true; formData.value = { name: '', visible: true, sortOrder: scenesData.value.length + 1 }; }; const handleConfirmAdd = () =&gt; { if (!formData.value.name) { alert('请输入场景名称'); return; } scenesData.value.push({ id: scenesData.value.length + 1, name: formData.value.name, visible: formData.value.visible, selected: false }); showAddDialog.value = false; }; const handleExecute = (scene) =&gt; { alert(`正在执行场景：${scene.name}`); }; const handleResult = (scene) =&gt; { showResultDialog.value = true; resultData.value = { name: scene.name, executeTime: new Date().toLocaleString(), status: 'success', detail: '执行成功，共控制156盏灯具' }; }; const handleMore = (scene) =&gt; { alert(`更多操作：${scene.name}`); }; &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { display: flex; height: calc(100vh - 60px); } .main-content { flex: 1; display: flex; overflow: hidden; } .right-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; padding: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .header-tabs { --el-tabs-header-text-color: #606266; --el-tabs-active-text-color: #409eff; --el-tabs-border-color: #e8e8e8; --el-tabs-active-bar-color: #409eff; } .filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; align-items: center; } .filter-input { width: 250px; } .scene-cards { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr); gap: 15px; overflow-y: auto; flex: 1; padding-right: 10px; } .scene-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e8e8e8; border-radius: 8px; } .card-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; margin-bottom: 10px; } .checkbox-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; color: #303133; font-size: 14px; } .card-body { display: flex; gap: 8px; } .card-body .el-button { flex: 1; padding: 6px; font-size: 12px; } .records-panel { flex: 1; overflow: auto; } .data-table { width: 100%; } .form-select { width: 100%; } &lt;/style&gt;</div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-40">src/views/scene/SceneLinkage.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/scene/SceneLinkage.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;main-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;right-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-left&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tabs v-model=&quot;viewMode&quot; class=&quot;header-tabs&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;卡片模式&quot; name=&quot;card&quot;&gt;卡片模式&lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;el-tab-pane label=&quot;列表模式&quot; name=&quot;list&quot;&gt;列表模式&lt;/el-tab-pane&gt; &lt;/el-tabs&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-right&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleAdd&quot;&gt;新增&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; :disabled=&quot;selectedRows.length === 0&quot; @click=&quot;handleBatchDelete&quot;&gt;批量删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;filterKeyword&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入规则名称查询&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filterStatus&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择启用状态&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;全部&quot; value=&quot;&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;启用&quot; value=&quot;true&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;禁用&quot; value=&quot;false&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filterPriority&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择优先级&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;全部&quot; value=&quot;&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;高&quot; value=&quot;high&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;低&quot; value=&quot;low&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSearch&quot;&gt;搜索&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleReset&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div v-if=&quot;viewMode === 'card'&quot; class=&quot;rule-cards&quot;&gt; &lt;el-card v-for=&quot;rule in filteredRules&quot; :key=&quot;rule.id&quot; class=&quot;rule-card&quot; &gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;priority-tag&quot; :class=&quot;rule.priority&quot;&gt; {{ rule.priority === 'high' ? '高' : '低' }} &lt;/div&gt; &lt;label class=&quot;checkbox-label&quot;&gt; &lt;el-checkbox v-model=&quot;rule.selected&quot; /&gt; &lt;span&gt;{{ rule.name }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/label&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-controls&quot;&gt; &lt;el-switch v-model=&quot;rule.enabled&quot; active-text=&quot;启用&quot; inactive-text=&quot;禁用&quot; @change=&quot;handleToggle(rule)&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-body&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;execute-info&quot;&gt; &lt;span&gt;执行日期:&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span&gt;{{ rule.executeDate }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; @click=&quot;handleMore(rule)&quot;&gt;...&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-card&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div v-else class=&quot;list-panel&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredRules&quot; border class=&quot;data-table&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleSelectionChange&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;规则名称&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;priority&quot; label=&quot;优先级&quot; width=&quot;80&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.priority === 'high' ? 'danger' : 'info'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.priority === 'high' ? '高' : '低' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;enabled&quot; label=&quot;状态&quot; width=&quot;90&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-switch v-model=&quot;row.enabled&quot; active-text=&quot;启用&quot; inactive-text=&quot;禁用&quot; /&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;executeDate&quot; label=&quot;执行日期&quot; min-width=&quot;180&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleEdit(row)&quot;&gt;编辑&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDelete(row)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot; v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot; :total=&quot;total&quot; layout=&quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&gt;, total&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;新增规则&quot; v-model=&quot;showAddDialog&quot; width=&quot;500px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;规则名称&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入规则名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;优先级&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.priority&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;高&quot; value=&quot;high&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;低&quot; value=&quot;low&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;执行日期&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.executeType&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;一直执行&quot; value=&quot;always&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;定时执行&quot; value=&quot;scheduled&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item v-if=&quot;formData.executeType === 'scheduled'&quot; label=&quot;执行时间&quot;&gt; &lt;el-date-picker v-model=&quot;formData.executeTime&quot; type=&quot;datetime&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择执行时间&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showAddDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleConfirmAdd&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue'; const viewMode = ref('card'); const filterKeyword = ref(''); const filterStatus = ref(''); const filterPriority = ref(''); const currentPage = ref(1); const pageSize = ref(10); const selectedRows = ref([]); const showAddDialog = ref(false); const formData = ref({ name: '', priority: 'high', executeType: 'always', executeTime: '' }); const rulesData = ref([ { id: 1, no: 1, name: '检测有人开', priority: 'high', enabled: true, executeDate: '2025.09.01-2028.10.31', selected: false }, { id: 2, no: 2, name: '漏电自动断电', priority: 'high', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false }, { id: 3, no: 3, name: '光照度亮灯', priority: 'high', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false }, { id: 4, no: 4, name: '关回路', priority: 'low', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false }, { id: 5, no: 5, name: '检测无人关', priority: 'low', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false } ]); const total = computed(() =&gt; rulesData.value.length); const filteredRules = computed(() =&gt; { let data = [...rulesData.value]; if (filterKeyword.value) { const keyword = filterKeyword.value.toLowerCase(); data = data.filter(item =&gt; item.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword)); } if (filterStatus.value !== '') { const status = filterStatus.value === 'true'; data = data.filter(item =&gt; item.enabled === status); } if (filterPriority.value) { data = data.filter(item =&gt; item.priority === filterPriority.value); } return data.slice((currentPage.value - 1) * pageSize.value, currentPage.value * pageSize.value); }); const handleSearch = () =&gt; { currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleReset = () =&gt; { filterKeyword.value = ''; filterStatus.value = ''; filterPriority.value = ''; currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&gt; { selectedRows.value = val; }; const handleAdd = () =&gt; { showAddDialog.value = true; formData.value = { name: '', priority: 'high', executeType: 'always', executeTime: '' }; }; const handleConfirmAdd = () =&gt; { if (!formData.value.name) { alert('请输入规则名称'); return; } rulesData.value.push({ id: rulesData.value.length + 1, no: rulesData.value.length + 1, name: formData.value.name, priority: formData.value.priority, enabled: true, executeDate: formData.value.executeType === 'always' ? '一直执行' : formData.value.executeTime, selected: false }); showAddDialog.value = false; }; const handleEdit = (row) =&gt; { alert(`编辑规则：${row.name}`); }; const handleDelete = (row) =&gt; { const index = rulesData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.id === row.id); if (index !== -1) { rulesData.value.splice(index, 1); } }; const handleBatchDelete = () =&gt; { selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&gt; { const index = rulesData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.id === row.id); if (index !== -1) { rulesData.value.splice(index, 1); } }); selectedRows.value = []; }; const handleToggle = (rule) =&gt; { alert(`${rule.name}已${rule.enabled ? '启用' : '禁用'}`); }; const handleMore = (rule) =&gt; { alert(`更多操作：${rule.name}`); }; &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { display: flex; height: calc(100vh - 60px); } .main-content { flex: 1; display: flex; overflow: hidden; } .right-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; padding: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .header-tabs { --el-tabs-header-text-color: #606266; --el-tabs-active-text-color: #409eff; --el-tabs-border-color: #e8e8e8; --el-tabs-active-bar-color: #409eff; } .filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .filter-select { width: 160px; } .rule-cards { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); gap: 15px; overflow-y: auto; flex: 1; padding-right: 10px; } .rule-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e8e8e8; border-radius: 8px; } .card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; margin-bottom: 10px; } .priority-tag { width: 30px; height: 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; } .priority-tag.high { background: #f56c6c; } .priority-tag.low { background: #67c23a; } .checkbox-label { flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; color: #303133; font-size: 14px; } .card-body { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .execute-info { display: flex; gap: 8px; color: #606266; font-size: 12px; } .list-panel { flex: 1; overflow: auto; } .data-table { width: 100%; } .pagination-bar { display: flex; justify-content: center; padding: 15px 0; } .form-select { width: 100%; } &lt;/style&gt;</div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-41">src/views/scene/SceneManage.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/scene/SceneManage.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;main-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;right-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-right&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSave&quot;&gt;保存&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleCancel&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-row&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-item&quot;&gt; &lt;label class=&quot;required&quot;&gt;场景名称&lt;/label&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入场景名称&quot; class=&quot;form-input&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-item&quot;&gt; &lt;label class=&quot;required&quot;&gt;显示状态&lt;/label&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.visible&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;显示&quot; :value=&quot;true&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;隐藏&quot; :value=&quot;false&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-item&quot;&gt; &lt;label class=&quot;required&quot;&gt;排序序号&lt;/label&gt; &lt;el-input type=&quot;number&quot; v-model=&quot;formData.sortOrder&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入排序序号&quot; class=&quot;form-input&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;action-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;section-header&quot;&gt; &lt;span&gt;动作配置&lt;/span&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;addAction&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon&gt;&lt;Plus /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;action-list&quot;&gt; &lt;div v-for=&quot;(action, index) in formData.actions&quot; :key=&quot;index&quot; class=&quot;action-item&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;action-index&quot;&gt;{{ index + 1 }}&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;action-fields&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;action.productType&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择产品类型&quot; class=&quot;action-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;灯控制器&quot; value=&quot;灯控制器&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;集控&quot; value=&quot;集控&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;传感器&quot; value=&quot;传感器&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;摄像头&quot; value=&quot;摄像头&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;智能主控&quot; value=&quot;智能主控&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;智能主控-站点&quot; value=&quot;智能主控-站点&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;action.device&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择设备&quot; class=&quot;action-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;展厅隧道灯&quot; value=&quot;展厅隧道灯&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;光亚展灯杆&quot; value=&quot;光亚展灯杆&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;delay-group&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input type=&quot;number&quot; v-model=&quot;action.delay&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入延时时长&quot; class=&quot;delay-input&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;action.delayUnit&quot; class=&quot;delay-unit&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;秒&quot; value=&quot;秒&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;分&quot; value=&quot;分&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;时&quot; value=&quot;时&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;action.action&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择动作内容&quot; class=&quot;action-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;开灯&quot; value=&quot;开灯&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;关灯&quot; value=&quot;关灯&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;调光50%&quot; value=&quot;调光50%&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;调光100%&quot; value=&quot;调光100%&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;action-controls&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button v-if=&quot;index &gt; 0&quot; type=&quot;text&quot; @click=&quot;moveUp(index)&quot;&gt;↑&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button v-if=&quot;index &lt; formData.actions.length - 1&quot; type=&quot;text&quot; @click=&quot;moveDown(index)&quot;&gt;↓&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; @click=&quot;removeAction(index)&quot;&gt;×&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref } from 'vue'; import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'; const formData = ref({ name: '', visible: true, sortOrder: 1, actions: [ { productType: '', device: '', delay: '', delayUnit: '秒', action: '' } ] }); const addAction = () =&gt; { formData.value.actions.push({ productType: '', device: '', delay: '', delayUnit: '秒', action: '' }); }; const removeAction = (index) =&gt; { if (formData.value.actions.length &gt; 1) { formData.value.actions.splice(index, 1); } }; const moveUp = (index) =&gt; { if (index &gt; 0) { const temp = formData.value.actions[index]; formData.value.actions[index] = formData.value.actions[index - 1]; formData.value.actions[index - 1] = temp; } }; const moveDown = (index) =&gt; { if (index &lt; formData.value.actions.length - 1) { const temp = formData.value.actions[index]; formData.value.actions[index] = formData.value.actions[index + 1]; formData.value.actions[index + 1] = temp; } }; const handleSave = () =&gt; { if (!formData.value.name) { alert('请输入场景名称'); return; } alert('场景保存成功'); }; const handleCancel = () =&gt; { formData.value = { name: '', visible: true, sortOrder: 1, actions: [ { productType: '', device: '', delay: '', delayUnit: '秒', action: '' } ] }; }; &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { display: flex; height: calc(100vh - 60px); } .main-content { flex: 1; display: flex; overflow: hidden; } .right-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; padding: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .form-section { margin-bottom: 20px; } .form-row { display: flex; gap: 20px; } .form-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; width: 250px; } .form-item label { color: #303133; font-size: 14px; } .required::after { content: '*'; color: #f56c6c; margin-left: 4px; } .form-input { width: 100%; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dcdfe6; } .form-select { width: 100%; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dcdfe6; } .action-section { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; } .section-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; color: #303133; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; } .action-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; } .action-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e8e8e8; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; } .action-index { width: 30px; height: 30px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #f0f2f5; border-radius: 4px; color: #409eff; font-weight: 600; } .action-fields { flex: 1; display: flex; gap: 15px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; } .action-select { width: 180px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dcdfe6; } .delay-group { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .delay-input { width: 120px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dcdfe6; } .delay-unit { width: 60px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dcdfe6; } .action-controls { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .action-controls .el-button { padding: 4px 8px; font-size: 12px; color: #909399; } &lt;/style&gt;</div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-42">src/views/scene/SceneSchedule.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/scene/SceneSchedule.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;定时场景管理&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;addSchedule&quot;&gt; &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.Plus&quot; /&gt; 新增定时 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;schedules&quot; border class=&quot;schedule-table&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;id&quot; label=&quot;定时编号&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;定时名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;templateName&quot; label=&quot;关联场景&quot; width=&quot;150&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;scheduleType&quot; label=&quot;执行类型&quot; width=&quot;120&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getTypeTagType(scope.row.scheduleType)&quot;&gt; {{ getTypeText(scope.row.scheduleType) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;time&quot; label=&quot;执行时间&quot; width=&quot;120&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;enabled&quot; label=&quot;状态&quot; width=&quot;100&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt; &lt;el-switch :value=&quot;scope.row.enabled&quot; @change=&quot;toggleEnable(scope.row)&quot; active-color=&quot;#13ce66&quot; inactive-color=&quot;#ff4949&quot; /&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;180&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;editSchedule(scope.row)&quot;&gt;编辑&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; type=&quot;danger&quot; @click=&quot;deleteSchedule(scope.row)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;el-dialog :title=&quot;editDialogTitle&quot; :visible.sync=&quot;dialogVisible&quot; width=&quot;500px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;定时名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入定时名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;关联场景&quot; prop=&quot;templateId&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.templateId&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择场景&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option v-for=&quot;template in enabledTemplates&quot; :key=&quot;template.id&quot; :label=&quot;template.name&quot; :value=&quot;template.id&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;执行类型&quot; prop=&quot;scheduleType&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.scheduleType&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;每天&quot; value=&quot;daily&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;周末&quot; value=&quot;weekend&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;节假日&quot; value=&quot;holiday&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;执行时间&quot; prop=&quot;time&quot;&gt; &lt;el-time-picker v-model=&quot;formData.time&quot; format=&quot;HH:mm&quot; placeholder=&quot;选择执行时间&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;dialogVisible = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;saveSchedule&quot;&gt;保存&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { scheduledScenes, sceneTemplates } from '@/data/mockData' const icons = { Plus } const schedules = ref([...scheduledScenes]) const templates = ref([...sceneTemplates]) const dialogVisible = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const formData = ref({ id: '', name: '', templateId: '', scheduleType: 'daily', time: '', enabled: true }) const editDialogTitle = computed(() =&gt; isEdit.value ? '编辑定时场景' : '新增定时场景') const enabledTemplates = computed(() =&gt; { return templates.value.filter(t =&gt; t.enabled) }) const schedulesWithTemplateName = computed(() =&gt; { return schedules.value.map(s =&gt; { const template = templates.value.find(t =&gt; t.id === s.templateId) return { ...s, templateName: template ? template.name : '未知场景' } }) }) const getTypeTagType = (type) =&gt; { switch (type) { case 'daily': return 'success' case 'weekend': return 'warning' case 'holiday': return 'info' default: return 'info' } } const getTypeText = (type) =&gt; { switch (type) { case 'daily': return '每天' case 'weekend': return '周末' case 'holiday': return '节假日' default: return type } } const addSchedule = () =&gt; { isEdit.value = false formData.value = { id: '', name: '', templateId: '', scheduleType: 'daily', time: '', enabled: true } dialogVisible.value = true } const editSchedule = (row) =&gt; { isEdit.value = true formData.value = { ...row } dialogVisible.value = true } const deleteSchedule = (row) =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( '确定要删除该定时任务吗？', '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&gt; { const index = schedules.value.findIndex(s =&gt; s.id === row.id) if (index &gt; -1) { schedules.value.splice(index, 1) } ElMessage.success('删除成功') }).catch(() =&gt; { ElMessage.info('已取消删除') }) } const toggleEnable = (row) =&gt; { row.enabled = !row.enabled } const saveSchedule = () =&gt; { if (!formData.value.name || !formData.value.templateId || !formData.value.time) { ElMessage.warning('请填写完整信息') return } if (isEdit.value) { const index = schedules.value.findIndex(s =&gt; s.id === formData.value.id) if (index &gt; -1) { schedules.value[index] = { ...formData.value } } ElMessage.success('修改成功') } else { const newId = 'SCH' + String(schedules.value.length + 1).padStart(3, '0') schedules.value.push({ ...formData.value, id: newId }) ElMessage.success('新增成功') } dialogVisible.value = false } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .schedule-table { width: 100%; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-43">src/views/scene/SceneTemplate.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/scene/SceneTemplate.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;场景模板配置&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;addTemplate&quot;&gt; &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.Plus&quot; /&gt; 新增模板 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;template-grid&quot;&gt; &lt;div v-for=&quot;template in templates&quot; :key=&quot;template.id&quot; :class=&quot;['template-card', { disabled: !template.enabled }]&quot; &gt; &lt;div class=&quot;template-header&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;template-name&quot;&gt;{{ template.name }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;el-switch :value=&quot;template.enabled&quot; @change=&quot;toggleEnable(template)&quot; active-color=&quot;#13ce66&quot; inactive-color=&quot;#ff4949&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;p class=&quot;template-desc&quot;&gt;{{ template.description }}&lt;/p&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;template-config&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;config-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;config-label&quot;&gt;亮度&lt;/span&gt; &lt;el-progress :percentage=&quot;template.brightness&quot; :show-text=&quot;true&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div v-if=&quot;template.duration&quot; class=&quot;config-item&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;config-label&quot;&gt;时段&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;config-value&quot;&gt;{{ template.duration }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;template-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;editTemplate(template)&quot;&gt;编辑&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button size=&quot;small&quot; type=&quot;danger&quot; @click=&quot;deleteTemplate(template)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-dialog :title=&quot;editDialogTitle&quot; :visible.sync=&quot;dialogVisible&quot; width=&quot;500px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;场景名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入场景名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;场景描述&quot; prop=&quot;description&quot;&gt; &lt;el-textarea v-model=&quot;formData.description&quot; rows=&quot;3&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入场景描述&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;亮度(%)&quot; prop=&quot;brightness&quot;&gt; &lt;el-slider v-model=&quot;formData.brightness&quot; :min=&quot;0&quot; :max=&quot;100&quot; :step=&quot;1&quot; show-input /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;定时时段&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.duration&quot; placeholder=&quot;如: 02:00-05:00，为空则全天生效&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;dialogVisible = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;saveTemplate&quot;&gt;保存&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { sceneTemplates } from '@/data/mockData' const icons = { Plus } const templates = ref([...sceneTemplates]) const dialogVisible = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const formData = ref({ id: '', name: '', description: '', brightness: 80, duration: '', enabled: true }) const editDialogTitle = computed(() =&gt; isEdit.value ? '编辑场景模板' : '新增场景模板') const addTemplate = () =&gt; { isEdit.value = false formData.value = { id: '', name: '', description: '', brightness: 80, duration: '', enabled: true } dialogVisible.value = true } const editTemplate = (template) =&gt; { isEdit.value = true formData.value = { ...template } dialogVisible.value = true } const deleteTemplate = (template) =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( '确定要删除该场景模板吗？', '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&gt; { const index = templates.value.findIndex(t =&gt; t.id === template.id) if (index &gt; -1) { templates.value.splice(index, 1) } ElMessage.success('删除成功') }).catch(() =&gt; { ElMessage.info('已取消删除') }) } const toggleEnable = (template) =&gt; { template.enabled = !template.enabled } const saveTemplate = () =&gt; { if (!formData.value.name) { ElMessage.warning('请填写场景名称') return } if (isEdit.value) { const index = templates.value.findIndex(t =&gt; t.id === formData.value.id) if (index &gt; -1) { templates.value[index] = { ...formData.value } } ElMessage.success('修改成功') } else { const newId = 'S' + String(templates.value.length + 1).padStart(3, '0') templates.value.push({ ...formData.value, id: newId }) ElMessage.success('新增成功') } dialogVisible.value = false } &lt;/script&gt;
