&lt;style scoped&gt; .template-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(320px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; } .template-card { background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); transition: all 0.3s; &amp;:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12); } &amp;.disabled { opacity: 0.6; background: #fafafa; } } .template-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 12px; } .template-name { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #333; } .template-desc { font-size: 14px; color: #666; margin-bottom: 15px; line-height: 1.5; } .template-config { margin-bottom: 15px; } .config-item { margin-bottom: 10px; &amp;:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; } } .config-label { font-size: 13px; color: #999; margin-right: 10px; } .config-value { font-size: 14px; color: #333; } .template-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; justify-content: flex-end; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-44">src/views/scene/SceneTrigger.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/scene/SceneTrigger.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;一键场景触发&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;refreshStatus&quot;&gt; &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.Refresh&quot; /&gt; 刷新状态 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;trigger-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;section-title&quot;&gt;快速触发&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;quick-triggers&quot;&gt; &lt;div v-for=&quot;template in enabledTemplates&quot; :key=&quot;template.id&quot; class=&quot;trigger-card&quot; @click=&quot;triggerScene(template)&quot; &gt; &lt;div class=&quot;trigger-icon&quot;&gt; &lt;component :is=&quot;icons.Lightbulb&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;trigger-info&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;trigger-name&quot;&gt;{{ template.name }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;trigger-brightness&quot;&gt;亮度: {{ template.brightness }}%&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt;触发&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;trigger-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;section-title&quot;&gt;当前场景状态&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;current-scene&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;scene-status&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;currentScene ? 'success' : 'info'&quot; size=&quot;large&quot;&gt; {{ currentScene ? '场景运行中: ' + currentScene.name : '无场景运行' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div v-if=&quot;currentScene&quot; class=&quot;scene-detail&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;detail-row&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;detail-label&quot;&gt;亮度设置&lt;/span&gt; &lt;el-progress :percentage=&quot;currentScene.brightness&quot; :show-text=&quot;true&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;detail-row&quot;&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;detail-label&quot;&gt;启动时间&lt;/span&gt; &lt;span class=&quot;detail-value&quot;&gt;{{ currentScene.startTime }}&lt;/span&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;detail-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;warning&quot; @click=&quot;stopScene&quot;&gt;停止场景&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;trigger-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;section-title&quot;&gt;触发历史记录&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;triggerHistory&quot; border class=&quot;history-table&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;time&quot; label=&quot;触发时间&quot; width=&quot;180&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;sceneName&quot; label=&quot;场景名称&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;brightness&quot; label=&quot;亮度(%)&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;operator&quot; label=&quot;操作人&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;status&quot; label=&quot;状态&quot; width=&quot;100&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;scope&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;scope.row.status === 'success' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot;&gt; {{ scope.row.status === 'success' ? '成功' : '失败' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;场景触发确认&quot; :visible.sync=&quot;confirmDialogVisible&quot; width=&quot;400px&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;confirm-content&quot;&gt; &lt;p&gt;确认触发场景:&lt;/p&gt; &lt;p class=&quot;scene-name&quot;&gt;{{ pendingScene?.name }}&lt;/p&gt; &lt;p class=&quot;scene-desc&quot;&gt;{{ pendingScene?.description }}&lt;/p&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;confirmDialogVisible = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;confirmTrigger&quot;&gt;确认触发&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Refresh, Sunrise } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { sceneTemplates } from '@/data/mockData' const icons = { Refresh, Lightbulb: Sunrise } const templates = ref([...sceneTemplates]) const confirmDialogVisible = ref(false) const pendingScene = ref(null) const currentScene = ref(null) const triggerHistory = ref([ { id: 1, time: '2024-01-15 14:30:22', sceneName: '节能模式', brightness: 50, operator: '管理员', status: 'success' }, { id: 2, time: '2024-01-15 10:15:33', sceneName: '节日庆典模式', brightness: 100, operator: '张三', status: 'success' }, { id: 3, time: '2024-01-14 22:00:00', sceneName: '深夜模式', brightness: 30, operator: '系统自动', status: 'success' }, { id: 4, time: '2024-01-14 18:30:00', sceneName: '日常照明策略', brightness: 100, operator: '系统自动', status: 'success' }, { id: 5, time: '2024-01-13 14:20:00', sceneName: '雾霾模式', brightness: 90, operator: '李四', status: 'success' } ]) const enabledTemplates = computed(() =&gt; { return templates.value.filter(t =&gt; t.enabled) }) const triggerScene = (template) =&gt; { pendingScene.value = template confirmDialogVisible.value = true } const confirmTrigger = () =&gt; { if (pendingScene.value) { currentScene.value = { ...pendingScene.value, startTime: new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN') } triggerHistory.value.unshift({ id: Date.now(), time: new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN'), sceneName: pendingScene.value.name, brightness: pendingScene.value.brightness, operator: '管理员', status: 'success' }) ElMessage.success('场景触发成功') } confirmDialogVisible.value = false } const stopScene = () =&gt; { currentScene.value = null ElMessage.info('场景已停止') } const refreshStatus = () =&gt; { ElMessage.success('状态已刷新') } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .trigger-section { margin-bottom: 25px; } .section-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 15px; color: #333; } .quick-triggers { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 15px; } .trigger-card { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; &amp;:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12); transform: translateY(-2px); } } .trigger-icon { width: 50px; height: 50px; border-radius: 12px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #fff; font-size: 24px; } .trigger-info { flex: 1; } .trigger-name { display: block; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #333; margin-bottom: 4px; } .trigger-brightness { font-size: 13px; color: #666; } .current-scene { background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); } .scene-status { margin-bottom: 20px; } .scene-detail { padding-top: 15px; border-top: 1px solid #f0f0f0; } .detail-row { display: flex; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; &amp;:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; } } .detail-label { width: 100px; font-size: 14px; color: #666; } .detail-value { font-size: 14px; color: #333; } .detail-actions { margin-top: 15px; } .history-table { width: 100%; } .confirm-content { padding: 10px 0; } .confirm-content p { margin-bottom: 8px; color: #666; } .scene-name { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #333 !important; } .scene-desc { color: #999 !important; font-size: 14px; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-45">src/views/workorder/AlarmDispatch.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/workorder/AlarmDispatch.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; :disabled=&quot;selectedRows.length === 0&quot; @click=&quot;handleBatchDelete&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filterDeviceType&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择设备类型&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;全部&quot; value=&quot;&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;集控&quot; value=&quot;集控&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;灯具&quot; value=&quot;灯具&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;单灯控制器&quot; value=&quot;单灯控制器&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;filterStatus&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择状态&quot; class=&quot;filter-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;全部&quot; value=&quot;&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;启用&quot; value=&quot;启用&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;关闭&quot; value=&quot;关闭&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSearch&quot;&gt;搜索&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleReset&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;table-wrapper&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredData&quot; border class=&quot;data-table&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleSelectionChange&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;levelName&quot; label=&quot;层级名称&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;deviceType&quot; label=&quot;设备类型&quot; width=&quot;100&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;alarmType&quot; label=&quot;告警类型&quot; min-width=&quot;200&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;workOrderType&quot; label=&quot;工单类型&quot; width=&quot;120&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;status&quot; label=&quot;状态&quot; width=&quot;80&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.status === '启用' ? 'success' : 'danger'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.status }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;220&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; :class=&quot;row.status === '启用' ? 'text-danger' : 'text-success'&quot; @click=&quot;handleToggleStatus(row)&quot; &gt; {{ row.status === '启用' ? '停用' : '启用' }} &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleEdit(row)&quot;&gt;修改&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDelete(row)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;pagination-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&quot;currentPage&quot; v-model:page-size=&quot;pageSize&quot; :total=&quot;total&quot; layout=&quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&gt;, total&quot; @size-change=&quot;handleSizeChange&quot; @current-change=&quot;handleCurrentChange&quot; /&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;新增规则&quot; v-model=&quot;showAddDialog&quot; width=&quot;550px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot; class=&quot;form-container&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*所属层级&quot; prop=&quot;levelName&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.levelName&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择所属层级&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;力唯中天产业园&quot; value=&quot;力唯中天产业园&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;园区地面&quot; value=&quot;园区地面&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;1栋地面&quot; value=&quot;1栋地面&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;1栋&quot; value=&quot;1栋&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;4栋&quot; value=&quot;4栋&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;园区道路&quot; value=&quot;园区道路&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;充电桩区域&quot; value=&quot;充电桩区域&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*设备类型&quot; prop=&quot;deviceType&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.deviceType&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择设备类型&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;集控&quot; value=&quot;集控&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;灯具&quot; value=&quot;灯具&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;单灯控制器&quot; value=&quot;单灯控制器&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*告警类型&quot; prop=&quot;alarmType&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.alarmType&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择告警类型&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot; multiple&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;设备掉电告警&quot; value=&quot;设备掉电告警&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;设备离线告警&quot; value=&quot;设备离线告警&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;灯具调光异常&quot; value=&quot;灯具调光异常&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;信号强度&quot; value=&quot;信号强度&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;离线告警&quot; value=&quot;离线告警&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;欠压告警&quot; value=&quot;欠压告警&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;非计划异常亮灯&quot; value=&quot;非计划异常亮灯&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*工单类型&quot; prop=&quot;workOrderType&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.workOrderType&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择工单类型&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;爱克园区巡检&quot; value=&quot;爱克园区巡检&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;灯具故障模板&quot; value=&quot;灯具故障模板&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;巡检模板&quot; value=&quot;巡检模板&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;-&quot; value=&quot;-&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;dialog-footer&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showAddDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleConfirm&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' const showAddDialog = ref(false) const filterDeviceType = ref('') const filterStatus = ref('') const selectedRows = ref([]) const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(15) const mockData = ref([ { no: 1, levelName: '力唯中天产业园', deviceType: '集控', alarmType: '设备掉电告警,设备离线告警', workOrderType: '灯具故障模板', status: '启用' }, { no: 2, levelName: '力唯中天产业园', deviceType: '集控', alarmType: '设备掉电告警,设备离线告警', workOrderType: '灯具故障模板', status: '启用' }, { no: 3, levelName: '园区道路', deviceType: '灯具', alarmType: '灯具调光异常', workOrderType: '巡检模板', status: '启用' }, { no: 4, levelName: '力唯中天产业园', deviceType: '集控', alarmType: '设备离线告警', workOrderType: '巡检模板', status: '关闭' }, { no: 5, levelName: '力唯中天产业园', deviceType: '单灯控制器', alarmType: '信号强度,离线告警,欠压告警', workOrderType: '巡检模板', status: '关闭' }, { no: 6, levelName: '力唯中天产业园', deviceType: '单灯控制器', alarmType: '信号强度,离线告警,欠压告警', workOrderType: '巡检模板', status: '关闭' }, { no: 7, levelName: '充电桩区域', deviceType: '灯具', alarmType: '非计划异常亮灯,灯具调光异常', workOrderType: '-', status: '关闭' } ]) const total = computed(() =&gt; mockData.value.length) const filteredData = computed(() =&gt; { let result = mockData.value if (filterDeviceType.value) { result = result.filter(i =&gt; i.deviceType === filterDeviceType.value) } if (filterStatus.value) { result = result.filter(i =&gt; i.status === filterStatus.value) } return result }) const formData = ref({ levelName: '', deviceType: '', alarmType: [], workOrderType: '' }) const handleAdd = () =&gt; { showAddDialog.value = true formData.value = { levelName: '', deviceType: '', alarmType: [], workOrderType: '' } } const handleSearch = () =&gt; { currentPage.value = 1 } const handleReset = () =&gt; { filterDeviceType.value = '' filterStatus.value = '' currentPage.value = 1 } const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&gt; { selectedRows.value = val } const handleToggleStatus = (row) =&gt; { row.status = row.status === '启用' ? '关闭' : '启用' } const handleEdit = (row) =&gt; { showAddDialog.value = true formData.value = { levelName: row.levelName, deviceType: row.deviceType, alarmType: row.alarmType.split(','), workOrderType: row.workOrderType } } const handleDelete = (row) =&gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.no === row.no) if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1) } } const handleBatchDelete = () =&gt; { selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.no === row.no) if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1) } }) selectedRows.value = [] } const handleConfirm = () =&gt; { if (!formData.value.levelName || !formData.value.deviceType || !formData.value.alarmType.length || !formData.value.workOrderType) { alert('请填写所有必填字段') return } const newRecord = { no: mockData.value.length + 1, levelName: formData.value.levelName, deviceType: formData.value.deviceType, alarmType: formData.value.alarmType.join(','), workOrderType: formData.value.workOrderType, status: '启用' } mockData.value.push(newRecord) showAddDialog.value = false } const handleSizeChange = (val) =&gt; { pageSize.value = val currentPage.value = 1 } const handleCurrentChange = (val) =&gt; { currentPage.value = val } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { height: 100%; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .header-right { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 15px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-select { width: 180px; } .table-wrapper { flex: 1; overflow: auto; min-height: 0; } .data-table { width: 100%; min-width: 1200px; } .pagination-bar { display: flex; justify-content: center; padding: 15px 0; } .form-container { padding: 10px 0; } .form-select { width: 100%; } .dialog-footer { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 15px; } &lt;/style&gt;</div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-46">src/views/workorder/WorkOrderCreate.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/workorder/WorkOrderCreate.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;新建工单&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;router-link to=&quot;/workorder/list&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button&gt;返回列表&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/router-link&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; label-width=&quot;120px&quot; class=&quot;workorder-form&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;section-title&quot;&gt;基本信息&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;工单类型&quot; prop=&quot;type&quot; required&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.type&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择工单类型&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;故障工单&quot; value=&quot;fault&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;维修工单&quot; value=&quot;maintenance&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;工单标题&quot; prop=&quot;title&quot; required&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.title&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入工单标题&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;详细描述&quot; prop=&quot;description&quot;&gt; &lt;el-textarea v-model=&quot;formData.description&quot; rows=&quot;4&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入详细描述&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;section-title&quot;&gt;位置信息&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;地点&quot; prop=&quot;location&quot; required&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.location&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入地点&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-section&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;section-title&quot;&gt;优先级&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;优先级&quot; prop=&quot;priority&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.priority&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;高&quot; value=&quot;high&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;中&quot; value=&quot;medium&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;低&quot; value=&quot;low&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;form-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;router-link to=&quot;/workorder/list&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/router-link&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;submitForm&quot;&gt;提交&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref } from 'vue' import { useRouter } from 'vue-router' const router = useRouter() const formData = ref({ type: '', title: '', description: '', location: '', priority: 'medium', status: 'pending', assignee: '', createTime: '', updateTime: '' }) const generateId = () =&gt; { const timestamp = Date.now().toString(36).toUpperCase() return 'WO' + timestamp.slice(-3) + String(Math.random()).slice(-3).toUpperCase() } const submitForm = () =&gt; { if (!formData.value.type || !formData.value.title || !formData.value.location) { ElMessage.warning('请填写必填项') return } const now = new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN') formData.value.id = generateId() formData.value.createTime = now formData.value.updateTime = now ElMessage.success('工单创建成功') router.push('/workorder/list') } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .workorder-form { max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; } .form-section { margin-bottom: 25px; padding: 20px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 8px; } .section-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; color: #333; } .form-actions { display: flex; gap: 15px; justify-content: center; padding-top: 20px; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-47">src/views/workorder/WorkOrderDetail.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/workorder/WorkOrderDetail.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;title&quot;&gt;工单详情&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;router-link to=&quot;/workorder/list&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button&gt;返回列表&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/router-link&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div v-if=&quot;order&quot; class=&quot;detail-content&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;detail-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;order-title&quot;&gt; &lt;h2&gt;{{ order.title }}&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;order-tags&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;order.type === 'fault' ? 'danger' : 'warning'&quot;&gt; {{ order.type === 'fault' ? '故障工单' : '维修工单' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getPriorityTagType(order.priority)&quot;&gt; {{ getPriorityText(order.priority) }}优先级 &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getStatusTagType(order.status)&quot;&gt; {{ getStatusText(order.status) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;order-id&quot;&gt;工单编号: {{ order.id }}&lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;detail-grid&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;detail-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-title&quot;&gt;基本信息&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-form label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;工单类型&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;order.type === 'fault' ? 'danger' : 'warning'&quot;&gt; {{ order.type === 'fault' ? '故障工单' : '维修工单' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;优先级&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getPriorityTagType(order.priority)&quot;&gt; {{ getPriorityText(order.priority) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;当前状态&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getStatusTagType(order.status)&quot;&gt; {{ getStatusText(order.status) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;处理人员&quot;&gt;{{ order.assignee || '未分配' }}&lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;detail-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-title&quot;&gt;位置信息&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-form label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;地点&quot;&gt;{{ order.location }}&lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;detail-card full-width&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-title&quot;&gt;详细描述&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;description-content&quot;&gt;{{ order.description }}&lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;detail-card&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;card-title&quot;&gt;时间信息&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-form label-width=&quot;100px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;创建时间&quot;&gt;{{ order.createTime }}&lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;更新时间&quot;&gt;{{ order.updateTime }}&lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;status-timeline&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;timeline-title&quot;&gt;工单流程&lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-timeline&gt; &lt;el-timeline-item timestamp=&quot;创建&quot;&gt;工单已创建，等待处理&lt;/el-timeline-item&gt; &lt;el-timeline-item v-if=&quot;order.status !== 'pending'&quot; timestamp=&quot;派发&quot;&gt;工单已派发给 {{ order.assignee }}&lt;/el-timeline-item&gt; &lt;el-timeline-item v-if=&quot;order.status === 'completed'&quot; timestamp=&quot;完成&quot;&gt;工单已完成&lt;/el-timeline-item&gt; &lt;/el-timeline&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;detail-actions&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button v-if=&quot;order.status === 'pending'&quot; type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleAssign&quot; &gt; 派发工单 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button v-if=&quot;order.status === 'processing'&quot; type=&quot;success&quot; @click=&quot;handleComplete&quot; &gt; 完成工单 &lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;router-link to=&quot;/workorder/create&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button&gt;创建类似工单&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/router-link&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;派发工单&quot; :visible.sync=&quot;assignDialogVisible&quot; width=&quot;450px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;assignForm&quot; label-width=&quot;80px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;处理人员&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;assignForm.assignee&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择处理人员&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;张三&quot; value=&quot;张三&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;李四&quot; value=&quot;李四&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;王五&quot; value=&quot;王五&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;赵六&quot; value=&quot;赵六&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;assignDialogVisible = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;confirmAssign&quot;&gt;确认派发&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, onMounted } from 'vue' import { useRoute, useRouter } from 'vue-router' import { workOrders } from '@/data/mockData' const route = useRoute() const router = useRouter() const order = ref(null) const assignDialogVisible = ref(false) const assignForm = ref({ assignee: '' }) onMounted(() =&gt; { const id = route.params.id order.value = workOrders.find(w =&gt; w.id === id) || workOrders[0] }) const getPriorityTagType = (priority) =&gt; { switch (priority) { case 'high': return 'danger' case 'medium': return 'warning' case 'low': return 'success' default: return 'info' } } const getPriorityText = (priority) =&gt; { switch (priority) { case 'high': return '高' case 'medium': return '中' case 'low': return '低' default: return priority } } const getStatusTagType = (status) =&gt; { switch (status) { case 'pending': return 'warning' case 'processing': return 'primary' case 'completed': return 'success' default: return 'info' } } const getStatusText = (status) =&gt; { switch (status) { case 'pending': return '待处理' case 'processing': return '处理中' case 'completed': return '已完成' default: return status } } const handleAssign = () =&gt; { assignForm.value = { assignee: '' } assignDialogVisible.value = true } const confirmAssign = () =&gt; { if (!assignForm.value.assignee) { ElMessage.warning('请选择处理人员') return } if (order.value) { order.value.assignee = assignForm.value.assignee order.value.status = 'processing' order.value.updateTime = new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN') } ElMessage.success('派发成功') assignDialogVisible.value = false } const handleComplete = () =&gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( '确定要完成此工单吗？', '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'success' } ).then(() =&gt; { if (order.value) { order.value.status = 'completed' order.value.updateTime = new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN') } ElMessage.success('工单已完成') }).catch(() =&gt; { ElMessage.info('已取消') }) } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .detail-header { margin-bottom: 25px; padding: 20px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); border-radius: 8px; color: #fff; } .order-title { margin-bottom: 10px; } .order-title h2 { margin: 0 0 10px 0; font-size: 24px; } .order-tags { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .order-id { font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.9; } .detail-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 25px; } .detail-card { background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); &amp;.full-width { grid-column: 1 / -1; } } .card-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0; color: #333; } .description-content { padding: 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; line-height: 1.6; color: #666; } .status-timeline { background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); margin-bottom: 25px; } .timeline-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 15px; color: #333; } .detail-actions { display: flex; gap: 15px; justify-content: center; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-48">src/views/workorder/WorkOrderList.vue</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: src/views/workorder/WorkOrderList.vue</div> <div class="code-block">&lt;template&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-container&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;page-header&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;header-right&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleAdd&quot;&gt;创建工单&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; :disabled=&quot;selectedRows.length === 0&quot; @click=&quot;handleBatchDelete&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-bar&quot;&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;status-tabs&quot;&gt; &lt;div v-for=&quot;tab in statusTabs&quot; :key=&quot;tab.value&quot; class=&quot;status-tab&quot; :class=&quot;{ active: currentStatus === tab.value }&quot; @click=&quot;currentStatus = tab.value&quot; &gt; {{ tab.label }}({{ tab.count }}) &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;filter-inputs&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;filterKeyword&quot; placeholder=&quot;请输入工单名称查询&quot; class=&quot;filter-input&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleSearch&quot;&gt;搜索&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;handleReset&quot;&gt;重置&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;table-wrapper&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table :data=&quot;filteredData&quot; border class=&quot;data-table&quot; @selection-change=&quot;handleSelectionChange&quot;&gt; &lt;el-table-column type=&quot;selection&quot; width=&quot;50&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;no&quot; label=&quot;No&quot; width=&quot;50&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;name&quot; label=&quot;工单名称&quot; min-width=&quot;150&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;type&quot; label=&quot;工单类型&quot; width=&quot;120&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;creator&quot; label=&quot;创建人&quot; width=&quot;100&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;isTimeout&quot; label=&quot;是否超时&quot; width=&quot;90&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;row.isTimeout ? 'danger' : 'success'&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ row.isTimeout ? '是' : '否' }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;status&quot; label=&quot;工单状态&quot; width=&quot;100&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-tag :type=&quot;getStatusTagType(row.status)&quot; size=&quot;small&quot;&gt; {{ getStatusText(row.status) }} &lt;/el-tag&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column prop=&quot;createTime&quot; label=&quot;工单发起时间&quot; width=&quot;160&quot;&gt;&lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;el-table-column label=&quot;操作&quot; width=&quot;200&quot; align=&quot;center&quot;&gt; &lt;template #default=&quot;{ row }&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDetail(row)&quot;&gt;详情&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;text&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleEdit(row)&quot;&gt;编辑&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;danger&quot; size=&quot;small&quot; @click=&quot;handleDelete(row)&quot;&gt;删除&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-table-column&gt; &lt;/el-table&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;el-dialog title=&quot;创建工单&quot; v-model=&quot;showAddDialog&quot; width=&quot;600px&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form :model=&quot;formData&quot; label-width=&quot;100px&quot; class=&quot;form-container&quot;&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*工单类型&quot; prop=&quot;type&quot;&gt; &lt;el-select v-model=&quot;formData.type&quot; placeholder=&quot;请选择工单类型&quot; class=&quot;form-select&quot;&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;爱克园区巡检&quot; value=&quot;爱克园区巡检&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;11月6号灯具故障模板&quot; value=&quot;11月6号灯具故障模板&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;灯具故障模板&quot; value=&quot;灯具故障模板&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;单灯故障自动派单&quot; value=&quot;单灯故障自动派单&quot; /&gt; &lt;el-option label=&quot;巡检模板&quot; value=&quot;巡检模板&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-select&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;*工单名称&quot; prop=&quot;name&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input v-model=&quot;formData.name&quot; placeholder=&quot;&quot; class=&quot;form-input&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;数字输入框&quot; prop=&quot;number&quot;&gt; &lt;el-input-number v-model=&quot;formData.number&quot; :min=&quot;0&quot; :max=&quot;9999&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;日期范围&quot; prop=&quot;dateRange&quot;&gt; &lt;el-date-picker v-model=&quot;formData.dateRange&quot; type=&quot;daterange&quot; range-separator=&quot;至&quot; start-placeholder=&quot;开始日期&quot; end-placeholder=&quot;结束日期&quot; class=&quot;form-date&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;时间范围&quot; prop=&quot;timeRange&quot;&gt; &lt;el-time-picker v-model=&quot;formData.timeRange&quot; is-range range-separator=&quot;至&quot; start-placeholder=&quot;开始时间&quot; end-placeholder=&quot;结束时间&quot; class=&quot;form-time&quot; /&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;el-form-item label=&quot;图片上传&quot; prop=&quot;images&quot;&gt; &lt;el-upload class=&quot;image-uploader&quot; action=&quot;#&quot; :show-file-list=&quot;false&quot; :auto-upload=&quot;false&quot; &gt; &lt;div class=&quot;upload-placeholder&quot;&gt; &lt;el-icon class=&quot;upload-icon&quot;&gt;&lt;Plus /&gt;&lt;/el-icon&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/el-upload&gt; &lt;/el-form-item&gt; &lt;/el-form&gt; &lt;template #footer&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;dialog-footer&quot;&gt; &lt;el-button @click=&quot;showAddDialog = false&quot;&gt;取消&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;el-button type=&quot;primary&quot; @click=&quot;handleConfirm&quot;&gt;确定&lt;/el-button&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;/el-dialog&gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;/template&gt; &lt;script setup&gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' const showAddDialog = ref(false) const currentStatus = ref('pending') const filterKeyword = ref('') const selectedRows = ref([]) const mockData = ref([ { no: 1, name: '园区路灯巡检', type: '爱克园区巡检', creator: '管理员', isTimeout: false, status: 'pending', createTime: '2024-05-15 09:30:00' }, { no: 2, name: '灯具故障维修', type: '灯具故障模板', creator: '张三', isTimeout: true, status: 'processing', createTime: '2024-05-14 14:20:00' } ]) const statusTabs = computed(() =&gt; [ { label: '待处理', value: 'pending', count: mockData.value.filter(i =&gt; i.status === 'pending').length }, { label: '我发起的', value: 'created', count: 2 }, { label: '已处理的', value: 'processed', count: 0 }, { label: '抄送我的', value: 'copied', count: 0 }, { label: '全部工单', value: 'all', count: mockData.value.length } ]) const filteredData = computed(() =&gt; { let result = mockData.value if (currentStatus.value !== 'all') { if (currentStatus.value === 'pending') { result = result.filter(i =&gt; i.status === 'pending') } else if (currentStatus.value === 'created') { result = result.filter(i =&gt; i.creator === '管理员') } else if (currentStatus.value === 'processed') { result = result.filter(i =&gt; i.status === 'completed') } } if (filterKeyword.value) { result = result.filter(i =&gt; i.name.includes(filterKeyword.value)) } return result }) const formData = ref({ type: '', name: '', number: 0, dateRange: [], timeRange: [], images: [] }) const getStatusTagType = (status) =&gt; { switch (status) { case 'pending': return 'warning' case 'processing': return 'primary' case 'completed': return 'success' default: return 'info' } } const getStatusText = (status) =&gt; { switch (status) { case 'pending': return '待处理' case 'processing': return '处理中' case 'completed': return '已完成' default: return status } } const handleAdd = () =&gt; { showAddDialog.value = true formData.value = { type: '', name: '', number: 0, dateRange: [], timeRange: [], images: [] } } const handleSearch = () =&gt; {} const handleReset = () =&gt; { filterKeyword.value = '' } const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&gt; { selectedRows.value = val } const handleDetail = (row) =&gt; {} const handleEdit = (row) =&gt; {} const handleDelete = (row) =&gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.no === row.no) if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1) } } const handleBatchDelete = () =&gt; { selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&gt; item.no === row.no) if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1) } }) selectedRows.value = [] } const handleConfirm = () =&gt; { if (!formData.value.type || !formData.value.name) { alert('请填写必填字段') return } const newRecord = { no: mockData.value.length + 1, name: formData.value.name, type: formData.value.type, creator: '管理员', isTimeout: false, status: 'pending', createTime: new Date().toLocaleString() } mockData.value.push(newRecord) showAddDialog.value = false } &lt;/script&gt; &lt;style scoped&gt; .page-container { height: 100%; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .header-right { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; } .status-tabs { display: flex; gap: 10px; padding: 10px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e8e8e8; border-radius: 4px; } .status-tab { padding: 8px 20px; color: #606266; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 4px; transition: all 0.3s; } .status-tab:hover { background: #f5f7fa; } .status-tab.active { background: #e6f7ff; color: #1890ff; border: 1px solid #91d5ff; } .filter-inputs { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; } .filter-input { width: 250px; } .table-wrapper { flex: 1; overflow: auto; min-height: 0; } .data-table { width: 100%; min-width: 1000px; } .form-container { padding: 10px 0; } .form-select, .form-input, .form-date, .form-time { width: 100%; } .image-uploader { width: 100px; height: 100px; border: 1px dashed #d9d9d9; border-radius: 4px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .upload-placeholder { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 100%; } .upload-icon { font-size: 24px; color: #999; } .dialog-footer { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 15px; } &lt;/style&gt; </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-49">update-hierarchy.js</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: update-hierarchy.js</div> <div class="code-block">import fs from 'fs/promises'; import path from 'path'; // 需要更新的文件列表 const files = [ './src/views/device/LampPostManage.vue', './src/views/power/CircuitGroup.vue', './src/views/power/LineInfo.vue', './src/views/power/CircuitControl.vue', './src/views/power/CentralControl.vue', './src/views/power/DistributionBox.vue', './src/views/lighting/LampManage.vue', './src/views/lighting/GroupManage.vue', './src/views/lighting/LightingStrategy.vue', './src/views/lighting/HistoryStrategy.vue' ]; // 替换规则 const replacements = [ { from: /爱克股份产业园/g, to: '长沙' }, { from: /园区地面/g, to: '岳麓区' }, { from: /1栋地面/g, to: '先导路' }, { from: /1栋/g, to: '力唯中天1栋' }, { from: /4栋/g, to: '力唯中天2栋' }, { from: /园区290/g, to: '岳麓区290号' }, { from: /展厅集控/g, to: '先导路集控' } ]; async function updateFiles() { for (const filePath of files) { const fullPath = path.join(process.cwd(), filePath); try { const content = await fs.readFile(fullPath, 'utf8'); // 应用所有替换规则 let newContent = content; replacements.forEach(replace =&gt; { newContent = newContent.replace(replace.from, replace.to); }); await fs.writeFile(fullPath, newContent, 'utf8'); console.log(`✅ 更新成功: ${filePath}`); } catch (error) { console.log(`❌ 文件不存在或读取失败: ${filePath}`); } } console.log('\n🎉 所有层级数据已更新完成！'); } updateFiles(); </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-50">vite.config.js</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: vite.config.js</div> <div class="code-block">import { defineConfig } from 'vite' import vue from '@vitejs/plugin-vue' import { resolve } from 'path' export default defineConfig({ plugins: [vue()], resolve: { alias: { '@': resolve(__dirname, 'src') } } }) </div> <hr class="section-divider"> <h2 id="file-51">项目源码.html</h2> <div class="file-info">文件路径: 项目源码.html</div> <div class="code-block"> &lt;!DOCTYPE html&gt; border-left: 4px solid #409eff; } .file-info { color: #666; margin-bottom: 10px; font-size: 14px; } .code-block { background-color: #f9fafc; border: 1px solid #e4e7ed; border-radius: 4px; padding: 15px; overflow-x: auto; font-family: 'Consolas', 'Monaco', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.5; white-space: pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word; } .toc { background-color: #f5f7fa; padding: 15px; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 30px; } .toc h3 { margin-top: 0; color: #333; } .toc ul { list-style-type: none; padding-left: 0; } .toc li { margin: 5px 0; } .toc a { &amp;lt;head&amp;gt; &amp;lt;meta charset=&amp;quot;UTF-8&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;meta name=&amp;quot;viewport&amp;quot; content=&amp;quot;width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;title&amp;gt;城市智慧照明系统&amp;lt;/title&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style&amp;gt; * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; } body { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-3&quot;&gt;package.json&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: package.json&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;{ &amp;quot;name&amp;quot;: &amp;quot;smart-lighting-system&amp;quot;, &amp;quot;version&amp;quot;: &amp;quot;1.0.0&amp;quot;, &amp;quot;description&amp;quot;: &amp;quot;城市智慧照明系统后台管理系统&amp;quot;, &amp;quot;type&amp;quot;: &amp;quot;module&amp;quot;, &amp;quot;scripts&amp;quot;: { &amp;quot;dev&amp;quot;: &amp;quot;vite&amp;quot;, &amp;quot;build&amp;quot;: &amp;quot;vite build&amp;quot;, &amp;quot;preview&amp;quot;: &amp;quot;vite preview&amp;quot; }, &amp;quot;dependencies&amp;quot;: { &amp;quot;vue&amp;quot;: &amp;quot;^3.4.21&amp;quot;, &amp;quot;vue-router&amp;quot;: &amp;quot;^4.3.0&amp;quot;, &amp;quot;element-plus&amp;quot;: &amp;quot;^2.6.0&amp;quot;, &amp;quot;@element-plus/icons-vue&amp;quot;: &amp;quot;^2.3.1&amp;quot; }, &amp;quot;devDependencies&amp;quot;: { &amp;quot;vite&amp;quot;: &amp;quot;^5.2.0&amp;quot;, &amp;quot;@vitejs/plugin-vue&amp;quot;: &amp;quot;^5.0.4&amp;quot;, &amp;quot;sass&amp;quot;: &amp;quot;^1.71.0&amp;quot; } } &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-4&quot;&gt;src/App.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/App.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;app-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;aside class=&amp;quot;sidebar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;sidebar-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;logo&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon :size=&amp;quot;32&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;logo-icon&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Sunrise /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;logo-text&amp;quot;&amp;gt;智慧照明系统&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-menu :default-active=&amp;quot;activeMenu&amp;quot; mode=&amp;quot;vertical&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;sidebar-menu&amp;quot; background-color=&amp;quot;#001529&amp;quot; text-color=&amp;quot;#fff&amp;quot; active-text-color=&amp;quot;#1890ff&amp;quot; :collapse=&amp;quot;isCollapse&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;template v-for=&amp;quot;menu in menuList&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;menu.path&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-sub-menu :index=&amp;quot;menu.path&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #title&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;menu.icon&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;{{ menu.name }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-menu-item v-for=&amp;quot;sub in menu.children&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;sub.path&amp;quot; :index=&amp;quot;sub.path&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleMenuClick(sub.path)&amp;quot; &amp;gt; {{ sub.name }} &amp;lt;/el-menu-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-sub-menu&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-menu&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;collapse-btn&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;isCollapse = !isCollapse&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;isCollapse ? icons.ArrowRight : icons.ArrowLeft&amp;quot; /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/aside&amp;gt; &amp;lt;main class=&amp;quot;main-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;header class=&amp;quot;header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-left&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;router-link to=&amp;quot;/&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;system-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;城市智慧照明系统后台管理&amp;lt;/router-link&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dropdown&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;user-info&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon class=&amp;quot;user-icon&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;UserFilled /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;管理员&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;ArrowDown /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #dropdown&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dropdown-menu&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dropdown-item&amp;gt;个人中心&amp;lt;/el-dropdown-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dropdown-item&amp;gt;退出登录&amp;lt;/el-dropdown-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dropdown-menu&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dropdown&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/header&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;content-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;router-view /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/main&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { useRoute, useRouter } from 'vue-router' import { Sunrise, Lightning, Cpu, Grid, List, ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, UserFilled, ArrowDown } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' const route = useRoute() const router = useRouter() const isCollapse = ref(false) const icons = { Lightbulb: Sunrise, Zap: Lightning, Server: Cpu, Layout: Grid, ClipboardList: List, ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, User: UserFilled, ChevronDown: ArrowDown } const menuList = [ { name: '智慧照明', path: '/lighting', icon: icons.Lightbulb, children: [ { name: '快捷首页', path: '/lighting/home' }, { name: 'GIS地图', path: '/lighting/map' }, { name: '照明策略', path: '/lighting/strategy' }, { name: '策略管理', path: '/lighting/manage' }, { name: '历史下发策略', path: '/lighting/history' }, { name: '灯具管理', path: '/lighting/lamp' }, { name: '分组管理', path: '/lighting/group' } ] }, { name: '供电管理', path: '/power', icon: icons.Zap, children: [ { name: '配电柜', path: '/power/distribution' }, { name: '线路信息', path: '/power/line' }, { name: '集控设备', path: '/power/central' }, { name: '回路控制', path: '/power/circuit' }, { name: '模块信息', path: '/power/module' }, { name: '强电场景', path: '/power/strong-electric' }, { name: '历史下发场景', path: '/power/history-scene' }, { name: '回路分组', path: '/power/circuit-group' }, { name: '灯控绑定', path: '/power/lamp-control-bind' }, { name: '负荷展示', path: '/power/load' } ] }, { name: '设备管理', path: '/device', icon: icons.Server, children: [ { name: '灯杆管理', path: '/device/lamp-post' }, { name: '灯控管理', path: '/device/lamp-control' }, { name: '灯具管理', path: '/lighting/lamp' }, { name: '录像机', path: '/device/video-recorder' }, { name: '摄像头', path: '/device/camera' }, { name: '传感器设备', path: '/device/environment-sensor', children: [ { name: '环境传感器', path: '/device/environment-sensor' }, { name: '光照度传感器', path: '/device/detail/4' }, { name: '水浸传感器', path: '/device/detail/5' }, { name: '烟雾传感器', path: '/device/detail/6' } ] } ] }, { name: '智能场景', path: '/scene', icon: icons.Layout, children: [ { name: '快捷操作', path: '/scene/quick-operation' }, { name: '场景管理', path: '/scene/manage' }, { name: '场景联动', path: '/scene/linkage' }, { name: '联动管理', path: '/scene/linkage-manage' }, { name: '场景模板', path: '/scene/template' }, { name: '一键触发', path: '/scene/trigger' }, { name: '定时场景', path: '/scene/schedule' } ] }, { name: '工单管理', path: '/workorder', icon: icons.ClipboardList, children: [ { name: '工单列表', path: '/workorder/list' }, { name: '工单类型配置', path: '/workorder/create' }, { name: '告警自动派单', path: '/workorder/alarm-dispatch' } ] } ] const activeMenu = computed(() =&amp;gt; { return route.path }) const handleMenuClick = (path) =&amp;gt; { router.push(path) } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .app-container { display: flex; height: 100vh; overflow: hidden; } .sidebar { width: 220px; background: #001529; color: #fff; display: flex; flex-direction: column; position: relative; transition: width 0.3s; &amp;amp;.collapsed { width: 64px; } } .sidebar-header { padding: 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid #002140; } .logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .logo-icon { color: #1890ff; } .logo-text { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; } .sidebar-menu { flex: 1; border-right: none; overflow-y: auto; } .sidebar-menu :deep(.el-menu-item) { padding: 0 20px !important; margin: 0 !important; height: 44px !important; line-height: 44px !important; } .sidebar-menu :deep(.el-sub-menu__title) { padding: 0 20px !important; margin: 0 !important; height: 44px !important; line-height: 44px !important; } .collapse-btn { position: absolute; right: -15px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 30px; height: 30px; background: #001529; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; color: #fff; z-index: 10; border: 1px solid #002140; } .main-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #f0f2f5; } .header { height: 64px; background: #fff; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 0 20px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); } .system-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; text-decoration: none; } .header-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; } .user-info { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer; color: #666; font-size: 14px; } .user-icon { width: 28px; height: 28px; line-height: 28px; background: #f0f0f0; border-radius: 50%; text-align: center; } .content-wrapper { flex: 1; padding: 20px; overflow-y: auto; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt;&lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-5&quot;&gt;src/data/mockData.js&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/data/mockData.js&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;export const lightStatusData = [ { id: 'L001', name: '中山路-001', status: 'on', brightness: 85, power: 45, lastUpdate: '2024-01-15 14:30:22', location: '中山路与人民路交叉口' }, { id: 'L002', name: '中山路-002', status: 'on', brightness: 70, power: 38, lastUpdate: '2024-01-15 14:30:18', location: '中山路中段' }, { id: 'L003', name: '人民路-001', status: 'off', brightness: 0, power: 0, lastUpdate: '2024-01-15 14:28:45', location: '人民路东段' }, { id: 'L004', name: '人民路-002', status: 'on', brightness: 90, power: 48, lastUpdate: '2024-01-15 14:30:20', location: '人民路西段' }, { id: 'L005', name: '解放路-001', status: 'on', brightness: 65, power: 35, lastUpdate: '2024-01-15 14:30:15', location: '解放路北段' }, { id: 'L006', name: '解放路-002', status: 'fault', brightness: 0, power: 0, lastUpdate: '2024-01-15 10:15:33', location: '解放路中段' }, { id: 'L007', name: '公园路-001', status: 'on', brightness: 80, power: 42, lastUpdate: '2024-01-15 14:30:21', location: '公园路入口' }, { id: 'L008', name: '公园路-002', status: 'on', brightness: 75, power: 40, lastUpdate: '2024-01-15 14:30:19', location: '公园路中段' }, { id: 'L009', name: '文化路-001', status: 'off', brightness: 0, power: 0, lastUpdate: '2024-01-15 06:30:00', location: '文化路东段' }, { id: 'L010', name: '文化路-002', status: 'on', brightness: 88, power: 46, lastUpdate: '2024-01-15 14:30:22', location: '文化路西段' } ] export const timingStrategies = [ { id: 'T001', name: '日常照明策略', startTime: '18:30', endTime: '06:00', brightness: 100, enabled: true, createTime: '2024-01-01' }, { id: 'T002', name: '节能模式策略', startTime: '22:00', endTime: '05:00', brightness: 50, enabled: true, createTime: '2024-01-05' }, { id: 'T003', name: '周末照明策略', startTime: '19:00', endTime: '07:00', brightness: 90, enabled: false, createTime: '2024-01-10' }, { id: 'T004', name: '节假日策略', startTime: '18:00', endTime: '08:00', brightness: 100, enabled: false, createTime: '2024-01-12' } ] export const distributionBoxes = [ { id: 'D001', name: '中山路配电箱', status: 'normal', voltage: 220.5, current: 45.2, power: 9911, load: 68, lastUpdate: '2024-01-15 14:30:22' }, { id: &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;import { createRouter, createWebHistory } from 'vue-router' const routes = [ { path: '/', redirect: '/lighting/home' }, { path: '/lighting', name: 'lighting', redirect: '/lighting/home', children: [ { path: 'home', name: 'lighting-home', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/lighting/LightingHome.vue') }, { path: 'map', name: 'lighting-map', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/lighting/GisMap.vue') }, { path: 'strategy', name: 'lighting-strategy', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/lighting/LightingStrategy.vue') }, { path: 'manage', name: 'lighting-manage', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/lighting/StrategyManage.vue') }, { path: 'history', name: 'lighting-history', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/lighting/HistoryStrategy.vue') }, { path: 'lamp', name: 'lighting-lamp', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/lighting/LampManage.vue') }, { path: 'group', name: 'lighting-group', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/lighting/GroupManage.vue') } ] }, { path: '/power', name: 'power', redirect: '/power/distribution', children: [ { path: 'distribution', name: 'power-distribution', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/power/DistributionBox.vue') }, { path: 'line', name: 'power-line', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/power/LineInfo.vue') }, { path: 'central', name: 'power-central', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/power/CentralControl.vue') }, { path: 'circuit', name: 'power-circuit', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/power/CircuitControl.vue') }, { path: 'load', name: 'power-load', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/power/LoadMonitor.vue') }, { path: 'module', name: 'power-module', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/power/ModuleInfo.vue') }, { path: 'strong-electric', name: 'power-strong-electric', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/power/StrongElectricScene.vue') }, { path: 'history-scene', name: 'power-history-scene', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/power/HistoryScene.vue') }, { path: 'circuit-group', name: 'power-circuit-group', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/power/CircuitGroup.vue') }, { path: 'lamp-control-bind', name: 'power-lamp-control-bind', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/power/LampControlBind.vue') } ] }, { path: '/device', name: 'device', redirect: '/device/list', children: [ { path: 'list', name: 'device-list', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/device/DeviceList.vue') }, { path: 'add', name: 'device-add', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/device/DeviceAdd.vue') }, { path: 'detail/:id', name: 'device-detail', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/device/DeviceDetail.vue') }, { path: 'lamp-post', name: 'device-lamp-post', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/device/LampPostManage.vue') }, { path: 'lamp-control', name: 'device-lamp-control', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/device/LampControlManage.vue') }, { path: 'video-recorder', name: 'device-video-recorder', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/device/VideoRecorderManage.vue') }, { path: 'camera', name: 'device-camera', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/device/CameraManage.vue') }, { path: 'environment-sensor', name: 'device-environment-sensor', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/device/EnvironmentSensorManage.vue') } ] }, { path: '/scene', name: 'scene', redirect: '/scene/quick-operation', children: [ { path: 'quick-operation', name: 'scene-quick-operation', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/scene/QuickOperation.vue') }, { path: 'manage', name: 'scene-manage', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/scene/SceneManage.vue') }, { path: 'linkage', name: 'scene-linkage', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/scene/SceneLinkage.vue') }, { path: 'linkage-manage', name: 'scene-linkage-manage', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/scene/LinkageManage.vue') }, { path: 'template', name: 'scene-template', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/scene/SceneTemplate.vue') }, { path: 'trigger', name: 'scene-trigger', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/scene/SceneTrigger.vue') }, { path: 'schedule', name: 'scene-schedule', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/scene/SceneSchedule.vue') } ] }, { path: '/workorder', name: 'workorder', redirect: '/workorder/list', children: [ { path: 'list', name: 'workorder-list', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/workorder/WorkOrderList.vue') }, { path: 'create', name: 'workorder-create', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/workorder/WorkOrderCreate.vue') }, { path: 'detail/:id', name: 'workorder-detail', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/workorder/WorkOrderDetail.vue') }, { path: 'alarm-dispatch', name: 'workorder-alarm-dispatch', component: () =&amp;gt; import('@/views/workorder/AlarmDispatch.vue') } ] } ] const router = createRouter({ history: createWebHistory(), routes }) export default router &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-8&quot;&gt;src/style/index.scss&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/style/index.scss&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;$primary-color: #1890ff; $success-color: #52c41a; $warning-color: #faad14; $danger-color: #f5222d; $info-color: #1890ff; $bg-color: #f0f2f5; $sidebar-bg: #001529; $header-bg: #ffffff; $text-primary: #1f1f1f; $text-secondary: #666666; $text-light: #999999; $border-color: #e8e8e8; $shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); @mixin flex-center { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } @mixin flex-between { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } @mixin ellipsis { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .page-container { padding: 20px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: $shadow; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid $border-color; .title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: $text-primary; } } .el-table { --el-table-row-hover-bg-color: #fafafa; } .el-button { --el-button-primary-bg-color: $primary-color; --el-button-primary-border-color: $primary-color; } &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-9&quot;&gt;src/views/device/CameraManage.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/device/CameraManage.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;main-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;left-sidebar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;sidebar-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;treeSearch&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入层级名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;sidebar-search&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tree :data=&amp;quot;treeData&amp;quot; :props=&amp;quot;defaultProps&amp;quot; show-checkbox node-key=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; :default-expand-all=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; :expand-on-click-node=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;right-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleAdd&amp;quot;&amp;gt;新增&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;selectedRows.length === 0&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleBatchDelete&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filterProduct&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择所属产品&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;海康枪机摄像头&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;海康枪机摄像头&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;海康球机摄像头&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;海康球机摄像头&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;filterKeyword&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入名称或编号查&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filterNetworkStatus&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择网络状态&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;在线&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;online&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;离线&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;offline&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSearch&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleReset&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;table-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredData&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;data-table&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleSelectionChange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;product&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;所属产品&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;deviceNo&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备编号&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; sortable&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; sortable&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;deviceType&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备类型&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;80&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lampPost&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;所属灯杆&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;networkStatus&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;网络状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;90&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lastOnline&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;最后在线时间&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;160&amp;quot; sortable&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleEdit(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;修改&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleDetail(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;详情&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleDelete(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&amp;gt;, total&amp;quot; @size-change=&amp;quot;handleSizeChange&amp;quot; @current-change=&amp;quot;handleCurrentChange&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;新增&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showAddDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;600px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*所属产品&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;product&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.product&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择所属产品&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;海康枪机摄像头&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;海康枪机摄像头&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;海康球机摄像头&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;海康球机摄像头&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*设备编号&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;deviceNo&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.deviceNo&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入设备编号&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*设备名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入设备名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备型号&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;model&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.model&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入设备型号&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*摄像头类型&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;cameraType&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.cameraType&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择摄像头类型&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;枪机&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;枪机&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;半球&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;半球&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*所属层级&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;level&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.level&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择所属层级&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;长沙&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;长沙&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;岳麓区&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;岳麓区&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;先导路&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;先导路&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;所属灯杆&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;lampPost&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.lampPost&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;展厅隧道灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;展厅隧道灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;光亚展灯杆&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;光亚展灯杆&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;1号楼-极简05&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;1号楼-极简05&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;2号楼-极简08&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;2号楼-极简08&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备经度&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;longitude&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.longitude&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #suffix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;MapLocation /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备纬度&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;latitude&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.latitude&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #suffix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;MapLocation /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;IP地址&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;ipAddress&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.ipAddress&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入IP地址&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;端口号&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;port&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.port&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入端口号&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleConfirm&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;详情&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showDetailDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;500px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions :column=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; :data=&amp;quot;detailData&amp;quot; border&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;所属产品&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.product }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;设备编号&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.deviceNo }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;设备名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.name }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;设备型号&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.model }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;摄像头类型&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.cameraType }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;所属层级&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.level }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;所属灯杆&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.lampPost }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;设备经度&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.longitude }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;设备纬度&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.latitude }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;IP地址&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.ipAddress }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;端口号&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.port }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;网络状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;detailData.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ detailData.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;最后在线时间&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.lastOnline }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue'; import { Search, MapLocation } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'; const treeSearch = ref(''); const filterProduct = ref(''); const filterKeyword = ref(''); const filterNetworkStatus = ref(''); const currentPage = ref(1); const pageSize = ref(15); const selectedRows = ref([]); const showAddDialog = ref(false); const showDetailDialog = ref(false); const formData = ref({ product: '', deviceNo: '', name: '', model: '', cameraType: '枪机', level: '', lampPost: '', longitude: '', latitude: '', ipAddress: '', port: '' }); const detailData = ref({}); const treeData = ref([ { id: 1, label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 2, label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 3, label: '先导路' }, { id: 4, label: '力唯中天1栋' } ] } ] } ]); const defaultProps = { children: 'children', label: 'label' }; const mockData = ref([ { no: 1, product: '海康枪机摄像头', deviceNo: 'd31c52e77ed045db87', name: '特种照明', deviceType: '枪机', lampPost: '展厅隧道灯', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-01-10 19:10:00' }, { no: 2, product: '海康枪机摄像头', deviceNo: '66c0443f92f94d0ebce', name: '展厅入口', deviceType: '枪机', lampPost: '展厅隧道灯', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-01-10 19:10:00' }, { no: 3, product: '海康枪机摄像头', deviceNo: 'df56e1193c464153bf1', name: '路灯全景', deviceType: '枪机', lampPost: '展厅隧道灯', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 17:50:00' }, { no: 4, product: '海康枪机摄像头', deviceNo: '5dfe7819888140f9b7d', name: '路灯大屏', deviceType: '枪机', lampPost: '展厅隧道灯', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 17:50:00' }, { no: 5, product: '海康枪机摄像头', deviceNo: '2572900662644fe7b0d', name: '隧道直筒摄像头', deviceType: '枪机', lampPost: '展厅隧道灯', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 17:50:00' }, { no: 6, product: '海康枪机摄像头', deviceNo: 'a41b5ab812454bc69f3', name: '思科来展厅', deviceType: '枪机', lampPost: '展厅隧道灯', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-04-28 17:50:00' }, { no: 7, product: '海康球机摄像头', deviceNo: 'f05921c29d02420b90d', name: '展会监控', deviceType: '半球', lampPost: '光亚展灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-07-11 10:40:00' }, { no: 8, product: '海康球机摄像头', deviceNo: '199b98f8b87d498ab03', name: '展厅入口', deviceType: '球机', lampPost: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-11-30 10:10:00' }, { no: 9, product: '海康球机摄像头', deviceNo: '199b98f8b87d498ab03', name: '路灯展厅操作区监控', deviceType: '球机', lampPost: '1号楼-极简05', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-11-30 10:10:00' }, { no: 10, product: '海康球机摄像头', deviceNo: '4606f32216694897a26', name: '路灯展厅灯杆区监控', deviceType: '球机', lampPost: '2号楼-极简08', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-11-30 10:10:00' }, { no: 11, product: '海康球机摄像头', deviceNo: '30faa1258de945c7acd', name: '路灯展厅隧道区监控', deviceType: '球机', lampPost: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-11-30 10:10:00' }, { no: 12, product: '海康球机摄像头', deviceNo: '1f7a35628d3a4c718f6', name: '路灯展厅模组区监控', deviceType: '球机', lampPost: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-11-30 10:10:00' } ]); const total = computed(() =&amp;gt; mockData.value.length); const filteredData = computed(() =&amp;gt; { let data = [...mockData.value]; if (filterProduct.value) { data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.product === filterProduct.value); } if (filterKeyword.value) { const keyword = filterKeyword.value.toLowerCase(); data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword) || item.deviceNo.toLowerCase().includes(keyword)); } if (filterNetworkStatus.value) { data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.networkStatus === filterNetworkStatus.value); } return data.slice((currentPage.value - 1) * pageSize.value, currentPage.value * pageSize.value); }); const handleSearch = () =&amp;gt; { currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleReset = () =&amp;gt; { filterProduct.value = ''; filterKeyword.value = ''; filterNetworkStatus.value = ''; currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&amp;gt; {
