selectedRows.value = val; }; const handleAdd = () =&amp;gt; { showAddDialog.value = true; formData.value = { product: '', deviceNo: '', name: '', model: '', cameraType: '枪机', level: '', lampPost: '', longitude: '', latitude: '', ipAddress: '', port: '' }; }; const handleEdit = (row) =&amp;gt; { showAddDialog.value = true; formData.value = { ...row }; }; const handleDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; { showDetailDialog.value = true; detailData.value = { ...row }; }; const handleDelete = (row) =&amp;gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.deviceNo === row.deviceNo); if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1); } }; const handleBatchDelete = () =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&amp;gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.deviceNo === row.deviceNo); if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1); } }); selectedRows.value = []; }; const handleConfirm = () =&amp;gt; { if (!formData.value.product || !formData.value.deviceNo || !formData.value.name || !formData.value.cameraType || !formData.value.level) { alert('请填写所有必填字段'); return; } const newRecord = { no: mockData.value.length + 1, product: formData.value.product, deviceNo: formData.value.deviceNo, name: formData.value.name, deviceType: formData.value.cameraType, lampPost: formData.value.lampPost || '-', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: new Date().toLocaleString() }; mockData.value.push(newRecord); showAddDialog.value = false; }; const handleSizeChange = (val) =&amp;gt; { pageSize.value = val; currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleCurrentChange = (val) =&amp;gt; { currentPage.value = val; }; &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { display: flex; height: calc(100vh - 60px); } .main-content { display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .left-sidebar { width: 200px; background: #fafafa; border-right: 1px solid #e8e8e8; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .sidebar-header { padding: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .sidebar-search { width: 100%; } .right-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; padding: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; } .filter-select { width: 180px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .table-wrapper { flex: 1; overflow-x: auto; overflow-y: auto; min-height: 0; } .data-table { width: 100%; min-width: 1200px; } .pagination-bar { display: flex; justify-content: center; padding: 15px 0; } .form-container { padding: 10px 0; } .form-select { width: 100%; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt;&lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-10&quot;&gt;src/views/device/DeviceAdd.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/device/DeviceAdd.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;新增设备&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;router-link to=&amp;quot;/device/list&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button&amp;gt;返回列表&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/router-link&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;120px&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;device-form&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;基本信息&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备编号&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.id&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;自动生成&amp;quot; disabled /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; required&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入设备名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备型号&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;model&amp;quot; required&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.model&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入设备型号&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备类型&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot; required&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.type&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择设备类型&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;LED路灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;LED路灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;高压钠灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;高压钠灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;金卤灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;金卤灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;其他&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;其他&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;安装信息&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;安装位置&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;location&amp;quot; required&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.location&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入安装位置&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;安装日期&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;installDate&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-date-picker v-model=&amp;quot;formData.installDate&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;date&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择安装日期&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;设备参数&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;额定电压(V)&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;voltage&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.voltage&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;number&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入额定电压&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;额定功率(W)&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;power&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.power&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;number&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入额定功率&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;亮度(%)&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;brightness&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-slider v-model=&amp;quot;formData.brightness&amp;quot; :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; :max=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; :step=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot; show-input /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;维护信息&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;上次维护日期&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;lastMaintenance&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-date-picker v-model=&amp;quot;formData.lastMaintenance&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;date&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择维护日期&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;备注信息&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;remark&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-textarea v-model=&amp;quot;formData.remark&amp;quot; rows=&amp;quot;3&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入备注信息&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;router-link to=&amp;quot;/device/list&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/router-link&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;submitForm&amp;quot;&amp;gt;提交&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref } from 'vue' import { useRouter } from 'vue-router' const router = useRouter() const formData = ref({ id: '', name: '', model: '', type: '', location: '', installDate: '', voltage: 220, power: 150, brightness: 80, lastMaintenance: '', remark: '', status: 'offline' }) const generateId = () =&amp;gt; { const timestamp = Date.now().toString(36).toUpperCase() return 'DVC' + timestamp.slice(-3) + String(Math.random()).slice(-3).toUpperCase() } const submitForm = () =&amp;gt; { if (!formData.value.name || !formData.value.model || !formData.value.type || !formData.value.location) { ElMessage.warning('请填写必填项') return } formData.value.id = generateId() ElMessage.success('设备添加成功') router.push('/device/list') } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .device-form { max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; } .form-section { margin-bottom: 25px; padding: 20px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 8px; } .section-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; color: #333; } .form-actions { display: flex; gap: 15px; justify-content: center; padding-top: 20px; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-11&quot;&gt;src/views/device/DeviceDetail.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/device/DeviceDetail.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;设备详情&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;router-link to=&amp;quot;/device/list&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button&amp;gt;返回列表&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/router-link&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;device&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;detail-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;device-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;h2&amp;gt;{{ device.name }}&amp;lt;/h2&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(device.status)&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;status-tag&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getStatusText(device.status) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;device-id&amp;quot;&amp;gt;设备编号: {{ device.id }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-grid&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;基本信息&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备型号&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ device.model }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备类型&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ device.type }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;安装位置&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ device.location }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;安装日期&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ device.installDate }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;设备参数&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;额定电压&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ device.voltage }}V&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;额定功率&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ device.power }}W&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;当前亮度&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-progress :percentage=&amp;quot;device.brightness&amp;quot; :show-text=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item v-if=&amp;quot;device.faultReason&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;故障原因&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ device.faultReason }}&amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;维护信息&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;上次维护&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ device.lastMaintenance }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;下次维护&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag type=&amp;quot;info&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ getNextMaintenance(device.lastMaintenance) }}&amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;router-link :to=&amp;quot;'/device/add'&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot;&amp;gt;复制新增&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/router-link&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;goBack&amp;quot;&amp;gt;返回列表&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, onMounted } from 'vue' import { useRoute, useRouter } from 'vue-router' import { deviceList } from '@/data/mockData' const route = useRoute() const router = useRouter() const device = ref(null) onMounted(() =&amp;gt; { const id = route.params.id device.value = deviceList.find(d =&amp;gt; d.id === id) || deviceList[0] }) const getStatusTagType = (status) =&amp;gt; { switch (status) { case 'online': return 'success' case 'offline': return 'info' case 'fault': return 'danger' default: return 'info' } } const getStatusText = (status) =&amp;gt; { switch (status) { case 'online': return '在线' case 'offline': return '离线' case 'fault': return '故障' default: return status } } const getNextMaintenance = (lastDate) =&amp;gt; { if (!lastDate) return '未维护' const date = new Date(lastDate) date.setMonth(date.getMonth() + 3) return date.toISOString().split('T')[0] } const goBack = () =&amp;gt; { router.push('/device/list') } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .detail-header { margin-bottom: 25px; padding: 20px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); border-radius: 8px; color: #fff; } .device-title { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 10px; } .device-title h2 { margin: 0; font-size: 24px; } .status-tag { font-size: 12px; } .device-id { font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.9; } .detail-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 25px; } .detail-card { background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); } .card-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0; color: #333; } .detail-actions { display: flex; gap: 15px; justify-content: center; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-12&quot;&gt;src/views/device/DeviceList.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/device/DeviceList.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;设备台账&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;router-link to=&amp;quot;/device/add&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;add-btn&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Plus&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; 新增设备 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/router-link&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stats-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-item online&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ onlineCount }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;在线&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-item offline&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ offlineCount }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;离线&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-item fault&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ faultCount }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;故障&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-item total&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ totalCount }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;总计&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;statusFilter&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;状态筛选&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;全部&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;在线&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;online&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;离线&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;offline&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;故障&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;fault&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;searchKeyword&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;搜索设备名称或编号&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredData&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;data-table&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备编号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;model&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备型号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备类型&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;status&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(scope.row.status)&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getStatusText(scope.row.status) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;location&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;安装位置&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;installDate&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;安装日期&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lastMaintenance&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;维护日期&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;router-link :to=&amp;quot;'/device/detail/' + scope.row.id&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;详情&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/router-link&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;warning&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;editDevice(scope.row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;编辑&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;deleteDevice(scope.row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;编辑设备&amp;quot; :visible.sync=&amp;quot;editDialogVisible&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;550px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入设备名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备型号&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;model&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.model&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入设备型号&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备类型&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.type&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;LED路灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;LED路灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;高压钠灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;高压钠灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;金卤灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;金卤灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;其他&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;其他&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;安装位置&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;location&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.location&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入安装位置&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;额定电压&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;voltage&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.voltage&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入额定电压&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;额定功率&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;power&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.power&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入额定功率&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;editDialogVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;saveEdit&amp;quot;&amp;gt;保存&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { deviceList } from '@/data/mockData' const icons = { Plus } const statusFilter = ref('') const searchKeyword = ref('') const editDialogVisible = ref(false) const formData = ref({}) const tableData = ref([...deviceList]) const totalCount = computed(() =&amp;gt; tableData.value.length) const onlineCount = computed(() =&amp;gt; tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.status === 'online').length) const offlineCount = computed(() =&amp;gt; tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.status === 'offline').length) const faultCount = computed(() =&amp;gt; tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.status === 'fault').length) const filteredData = computed(() =&amp;gt; { return tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; { const statusMatch = !statusFilter.value || item.status === statusFilter.value const keywordMatch = !searchKeyword.value || item.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchKeyword.value.toLowerCase()) || item.id.toLowerCase().includes(searchKeyword.value.toLowerCase()) return statusMatch &amp;amp;&amp;amp; keywordMatch }) }) const getStatusTagType = (status) =&amp;gt; { switch (status) { case 'online': return 'success' case 'offline': return 'info' case 'fault': return 'danger' default: return 'info' } } const getStatusText = (status) =&amp;gt; { switch (status) { case 'online': return '在线' case 'offline': return '离线' case 'fault': return '故障' default: return status } } const editDevice = (row) =&amp;gt; { formData.value = { ...row } editDialogVisible.value = true } const deleteDevice = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( '确定要删除该设备吗？', '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&amp;gt; { const index = tableData.value.findIndex(d =&amp;gt; d.id === row.id) if (index &amp;gt; -1) { tableData.value.splice(index, 1) } ElMessage.success('删除成功') }).catch(() =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.info('已取消删除') }) } const saveEdit = () =&amp;gt; { const index = tableData.value.findIndex(d =&amp;gt; d.id === formData.value.id) if (index &amp;gt; -1) { tableData.value[index] = { ...formData.value } } ElMessage.success('修改成功') editDialogVisible.value = false } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .stats-card { display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .stat-item { flex: 1; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; &amp;amp;.online { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #11998e 0%, #38ef7d 100%); } &amp;amp;.offline { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4facfe 0%, #00f2fe 100%); } &amp;amp;.fault { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff6b6b 0%, #ee5a24 100%); } &amp;amp;.total { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); } } .stat-value { display: block; font-size: 32px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 5px; color: #fff; } .stat-label { font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.9; color: #fff; } .filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; justify-content: flex-end; } .filter-select { width: 150px; } .filter-input { width: 250px; } .data-table { width: 100%; } .add-btn { text-decoration: none; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-13&quot;&gt;src/views/device/EnvironmentSensorManage.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/device/EnvironmentSensorManage.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;main-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;left-sidebar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;sidebar-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;treeSearch&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入层级名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;sidebar-search&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tree :data=&amp;quot;treeData&amp;quot; :props=&amp;quot;defaultProps&amp;quot; show-checkbox node-key=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; :default-expand-all=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; :expand-on-click-node=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;right-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleAdd&amp;quot;&amp;gt;新增&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;selectedRows.length === 0&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleBatchDelete&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filterProduct&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择所属产品&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;环境传感器&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;环境传感器&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;filterKeyword&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入设备名称查询&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filterConnection&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择连接方式&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;网关透传&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;网关透传&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filterNetworkStatus&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择网络状态&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;在线&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;online&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;离线&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;offline&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSearch&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleReset&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;table-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredData&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;data-table&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleSelectionChange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;product&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;所属产品&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;connection&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;连接方式&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;deviceNo&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备编号&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; sortable&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; sortable&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lampPost&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;所属灯杆&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;networkStatus&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;网络状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;90&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lastOnline&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;最后在线时间&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;160&amp;quot; sortable&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;200&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleHistory(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;历史数据&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleEdit(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;修改&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleDetail(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;详情&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleDelete(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&amp;gt;, total&amp;quot; @size-change=&amp;quot;handleSizeChange&amp;quot; @current-change=&amp;quot;handleCurrentChange&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;新增&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showAddDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;600px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tabs v-model=&amp;quot;activeTab&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;基本信息&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;basic&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*所属产品&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;product&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.product&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;环境传感器&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;环境传感器&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*所属层级&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;level&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.level&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择所属层级&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;长沙&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;长沙&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;岳麓区&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;岳麓区&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;先导路&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;先导路&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*连接方式&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;connection&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.connection&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;网关透传&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;网关透传&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*设备名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入设备名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*设备编号&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;deviceNo&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.deviceNo&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入设备编号&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*RS485地址&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;rs485Address&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.rs485Address&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入RS485地址&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;所属灯杆&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;lampPost&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.lampPost&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;-&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;-&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;展厅隧道灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;展厅隧道灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;光亚展灯杆&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;光亚展灯杆&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;备注说明&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;remark&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.remark&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;textarea&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入&amp;quot; :maxlength=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;资产信息&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;asset&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;assetData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;资产编号&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;assetNo&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;assetData.assetNo&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入资产编号&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;安装位置&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;installLocation&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;assetData.installLocation&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入安装位置&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;安装日期&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;installDate&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-date-picker v-model=&amp;quot;assetData.installDate&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;date&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择安装日期&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;维护日期&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;maintainDate&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-date-picker v-model=&amp;quot;assetData.maintainDate&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;date&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择维护日期&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;供应商&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;supplier&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;assetData.supplier&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入供应商&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;备注&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;remark&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;assetData.remark&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;textarea&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入备注&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tabs&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleConfirm&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;详情&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showDetailDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;500px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions :column=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; :data=&amp;quot;detailData&amp;quot; border&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;所属产品&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.product }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;连接方式&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.connection }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;设备编号&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.deviceNo }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;设备名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.name }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;RS485地址&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.rs485Address }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;所属层级&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.level }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;所属灯杆&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.lampPost }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;备注说明&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.remark }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;网络状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;detailData.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ detailData.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;最后在线时间&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.lastOnline }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;历史数据&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showHistoryDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;600px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;historyData&amp;quot; border&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;time&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;时间&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;160&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;temperature&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;温度(°C)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;humidity&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;湿度(%)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showHistoryDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;关闭&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue'; import { Search } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'; const treeSearch = ref(''); const filterProduct = ref(''); const filterKeyword = ref(''); const filterConnection = ref(''); const filterNetworkStatus = ref(''); const currentPage = ref(1); const pageSize = ref(15); const selectedRows = ref([]); const showAddDialog = ref(false); const showDetailDialog = ref(false); const showHistoryDialog = ref(false); const activeTab = ref('basic'); const formData = ref({ product: '', connection: '', deviceNo: '', name: '', rs485Address: '', level: '', lampPost: '-', remark: '' }); const assetData = ref({ assetNo: '', installLocation: '', installDate: '', maintainDate: '', supplier: '', remark: '' }); const detailData = ref({}); const historyData = ref([]); const treeData = ref([ { id: 1, label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 2, label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 3, label: '先导路' }, { id: 4, label: '力唯中天1栋' } ] } ] } ]); const defaultProps = { children: 'children', label: 'label' }; const mockData = ref([ { no: 1, product: '环境传感器', connection: '网关透传', deviceNo: '00-14-97-4B-A1-46', name: '温湿度', lampPost: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2024-04-22 10:26:58' } ]); const total = computed(() =&amp;gt; mockData.value.length); const filteredData = computed(() =&amp;gt; { let data = [...mockData.value]; if (filterProduct.value) { data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.product === filterProduct.value); } if (filterKeyword.value) { const keyword = filterKeyword.value.toLowerCase(); data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword)); } if (filterConnection.value) { data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.connection === filterConnection.value); } if (filterNetworkStatus.value) { data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.networkStatus === filterNetworkStatus.value); } return data.slice((currentPage.value - 1) * pageSize.value, currentPage.value * pageSize.value); }); const handleSearch = () =&amp;gt; { currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleReset = () =&amp;gt; { filterProduct.value = ''; filterKeyword.value = ''; filterConnection.value = ''; filterNetworkStatus.value = ''; currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value = val; }; const handleAdd = () =&amp;gt; { showAddDialog.value = true; formData.value = { product: '', connection: '', deviceNo: '', name: '', rs485Address: '', level: '', lampPost: '-', remark: '' }; assetData.value = { assetNo: '', installLocation: '', installDate: '', maintainDate: '', supplier: '', remark: '' }; activeTab.value = 'basic'; }; const handleEdit = (row) =&amp;gt; { showAddDialog.value = true; formData.value = { ...row }; activeTab.value = 'basic'; }; const handleDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; { showDetailDialog.value = true; detailData.value = { ...row }; }; const handleHistory = (row) =&amp;gt; { showHistoryDialog.value = true; historyData.value = [ { time: '2024-04-22 10:26:58', temperature: '25.3', humidity: '65' }, { time: '2024-04-22 10:25:00', temperature: '25.1', humidity: '64' }, { time: '2024-04-22 10:24:00', temperature: '25.0', humidity: '63' }, { time: '2024-04-22 10:23:00', temperature: '24.9', humidity: '62' }, { time: '2024-04-22 10:22:00', temperature: '24.8', humidity: '61' } ]; }; const handleDelete = (row) =&amp;gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.deviceNo === row.deviceNo); if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1); } }; const handleBatchDelete = () =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&amp;gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.deviceNo === row.deviceNo); if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1); } }); selectedRows.value = []; }; const handleConfirm = () =&amp;gt; { if (!formData.value.product || !formData.value.connection || !formData.value.deviceNo || !formData.value.name || !formData.value.rs485Address || !formData.value.level) { alert('请填写所有必填字段'); return; } const newRecord = { no: mockData.value.length + 1, product: formData.value.product, connection: formData.value.connection, deviceNo: formData.value.deviceNo, name: formData.value.name, lampPost: formData.value.lampPost || '-', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: new Date().toLocaleString() }; mockData.value.push(newRecord); showAddDialog.value = false; }; const handleSizeChange = (val) =&amp;gt; { pageSize.value = val; currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleCurrentChange = (val) =&amp;gt; { currentPage.value = val; }; &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { display: flex; height: calc(100vh - 60px); } .main-content { display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .left-sidebar { width: 200px; background: #fafafa; border-right: 1px solid #e8e8e8; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .sidebar-header { padding: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .sidebar-search { width: 100%; } .right-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; padding: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; } .filter-select { width: 180px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .table-wrapper { flex: 1; overflow-x: auto; overflow-y: auto; min-height: 0; } .data-table { width: 100%; min-width: 1200px; } .pagination-bar { display: flex; justify-content: center; padding: 15px 0; } .form-container { padding: 10px 0; } .form-select { width: 100%; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt;&lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-14&quot;&gt;src/views/device/LampControlManage.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/device/LampControlManage.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;main-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;left-sidebar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;sidebar-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;treeSearch&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入层级名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;sidebar-search&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tree :data=&amp;quot;treeData&amp;quot; :props=&amp;quot;defaultProps&amp;quot; show-checkbox node-key=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; :default-expand-all=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; :expand-on-click-node=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;right-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;灯控管理&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleAdd&amp;quot;&amp;gt;新增&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button&amp;gt;批量导入&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button&amp;gt;批量导出&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;selectedRows.length === 0&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleBatchDelete&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dropdown&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button&amp;gt;更多操作&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #dropdown&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dropdown-menu&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dropdown-item&amp;gt;设置&amp;lt;/el-dropdown-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dropdown-item&amp;gt;调试&amp;lt;/el-dropdown-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dropdown-item&amp;gt;转移&amp;lt;/el-dropdown-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dropdown-item&amp;gt;同步经纬度&amp;lt;/el-dropdown-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dropdown-item&amp;gt;数据转发&amp;lt;/el-dropdown-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dropdown-menu&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dropdown&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filterProduct&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择所属产品&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;全部&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;EXC-CAT1&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;EXC-CAT1&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;电信CAT1&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;电信CAT1&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filterStatus&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择网络状态&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;全部&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;在线&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;online&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;离线&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;offline&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;searchKeyword&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入IMEI号或名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSearch&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleReset&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredData&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;data-table&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleSelectionChange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;60&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;product&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;所属产品&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;imei&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;IMEI号&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; sortable&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;灯控名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; sortable&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;circuitCount&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;回路数量&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;poleName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;灯杆名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; sortable&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;networkStatus&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;网络状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lastOnline&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;最后在线时间&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;160&amp;quot; sortable&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;200&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleEdit(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;修改&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;info&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleDetail(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;详情&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleDelete(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot; :page-sizes=&amp;quot;[10, 15, 20, 50, 100]&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&amp;gt;, sizes, total&amp;quot; &amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-pagination&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;!-- 新增/编辑灯控对话框 --&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog :title=&amp;quot;isEdit ? '修改灯控' : '新增灯控'&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;700px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tabs v-model=&amp;quot;activeTab&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;基本信息&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;basic&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; :rules=&amp;quot;formRules&amp;quot; ref=&amp;quot;formRef&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*所属产品&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;product&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.product&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择所属产品&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;EXC-CAT1&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;EXC-CAT1&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;电信CAT1&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;电信CAT1&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*IMEI号&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;imei&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.imei&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入灯控IMEI&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*灯控名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入灯控名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;绑定线路&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.circuit&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋1号配电柜-主照明回路&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;circuit1&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋1号配电柜-景观照明回路&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;circuit2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*所属灯杆&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;poleName&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.poleName&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择所属灯杆&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋1号灯杆&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋1号灯杆&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋2号灯杆&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋2号灯杆&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋3号灯杆&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋3号灯杆&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋4号灯杆&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋4号灯杆&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*回路数&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;circuitCount&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.circuitCount&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择回路数&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot; :value=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; :value=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;3&amp;quot; :value=&amp;quot;3&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;4&amp;quot; :value=&amp;quot;4&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;调光类型&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio-group v-model=&amp;quot;formData.dimmingType&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;正向&amp;quot;&amp;gt;正向&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;逆向&amp;quot;&amp;gt;逆向&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-radio-group&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;资产信息&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;asset&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;asset-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;p&amp;gt;资产信息模块开发中...&amp;lt;/p&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tabs&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSubmit&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;!-- 详情对话框 --&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;灯控详情&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showDetailDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;800px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;selectedItem&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;detail-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions :column=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; border&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;所属产品&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedItem.product }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;IMEI号&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedItem.imei }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;灯控名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedItem.name }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;灯杆名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedItem.poleName }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;回路数量&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedItem.circuitCount }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;网络状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;selectedItem.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ selectedItem.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;最后在线&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedItem.lastOnline }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus' import { Search } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(15) const total = ref(61) const searchKeyword = ref('') const filterProduct = ref('') const filterStatus = ref('') const showDialog = ref(false) const showDetailDialog = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const activeTab = ref('basic') const selectedRows = ref([]) const selectedItem = ref(null) const treeSearch = ref('') const formRef = ref(null) const defaultProps = { label: 'label', children: 'children' } const treeData = ref([ { id: 1, label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 2, label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 3, label: '先导路' }, { id: 4, label: '力唯中天1栋' } ] } ] } ]) const lampControlData = ref([ { no: 1, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066803780', name: '展示0303Z08', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋1号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-06-07 18:19:15' }, { no: 2, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066830981', name: '展示0401Z10', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋2号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-10-15 05:05:40' }, { no: 3, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066389699', name: '展示0504Z02', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋3号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-06-07 16:26:54' }, { no: 4, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066368727', name: '展示0503Z02', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋4号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-09-28 15:16:56' }, { no: 5, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066365889', name: '展示0502Z01', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋1号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-09-28 15:16:59' }, { no: 6, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066389038', name: '展示0501Z01', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋2号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-11-22 18:55:35' }, { no: 7, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066361359', name: '展示0204Z05', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋3号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-29 21:19:55' }, { no: 8, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066801586', name: '展示0203Z05', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋4号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-01-12 15:02:40' }, { no: 9, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066368735', name: '展示0202Z05', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋1号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-03-20 10:47:38' }, { no: 10, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066392321', name: '展示0201Z05', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋2号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-02-26 15:24:25' }, { no: 11, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066785755', name: '展示0304Z08', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋3号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-06-07 18:19:58' }, { no: 12, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066817368', name: '展示0302Z08', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋4号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-06-16 11:34:39' }, { no: 13, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066841392', name: '展示0301Z08', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋1号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-03-24 10:54:54' }, { no: 14, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066392024', name: '展示0404Z10', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋2号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-11-26 15:16:32' }, { no: 15, product: 'EXC-CAT1', imei: '864900066793361', name: '展示0403Z10', circuitCount: 1, poleName: '力唯中天1栋3号灯杆', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-01-30 18:48:58' } ]) const formData = ref({ product: '', imei: '', name: '', circuit: '', poleName: '', circuitCount: '', dimmingType: '正向' }) const formRules = { product: [{ required: true, message: '请选择所属产品', trigger: 'change' }], imei: [{ required: true, message: '请输入IMEI号', trigger: 'blur' }], name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入灯控名称', trigger: 'blur' }], poleName: [{ required: true, message: '请选择所属灯杆', trigger: 'change' }], circuitCount: [{ required: true, message: '请选择回路数', trigger: 'change' }] } const filteredData = computed(() =&amp;gt; { let result = lampControlData.value if (filterProduct.value) { result = result.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.product === filterProduct.value) } if (filterStatus.value) { result = result.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.networkStatus === filterStatus.value) } if (searchKeyword.value) { result = result.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.imei.includes(searchKeyword.value) || item.name.includes(searchKeyword.value) ) } return result }) const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const handleSearch = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const handleReset = () =&amp;gt; { searchKeyword.value = '' filterProduct.value = '' filterStatus.value = '' } const handleAdd = () =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = false formData.value = { product: '', imei: '', name: '', circuit: '', poleName: '', circuitCount: '', dimmingType: '正向' } showDialog.value = true } const handleEdit = (row) =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = true formData.value = { product: row.product, imei: row.imei, name: row.name, circuit: '', poleName: row.poleName, circuitCount: row.circuitCount, dimmingType: '正向' } showDialog.value = true } const handleDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; { selectedItem.value = row showDetailDialog.value = true } const handleDelete = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要删除灯控【${row.name}】吗？`, '删除确认', { type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&amp;gt; { const index = lampControlData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.imei === row.imei) if (index !== -1) { lampControlData.value.splice(index, 1) } ElMessage.success('删除成功') }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const handleBatchDelete = () =&amp;gt; { if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要删除的灯控') return } ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要删除选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个灯控吗？`, '批量删除确认', { type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&amp;gt; { const imeis = selectedRows.value.map(row =&amp;gt; row.imei) lampControlData.value = lampControlData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; !imeis.includes(item.imei)) selectedRows.value = [] ElMessage.success('批量删除成功') }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const handleSubmit = () =&amp;gt; { formRef.value?.validate((valid) =&amp;gt; { if (valid) { if (isEdit.value) { const index = lampControlData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.imei === formData.value.imei) if (index !== -1) { lampControlData.value[index].name = formData.value.name lampControlData.value[index].poleName = formData.value.poleName lampControlData.value[index].circuitCount = formData.value.circuitCount } ElMessage.success('修改成功') } else { const newNo = lampControlData.value.length &amp;gt; 0 ? Math.max(...lampControlData.value.map(item =&amp;gt; item.no)) + 1 : 1 lampControlData.value.push({ no: newNo, product: formData.value.product, imei: formData.value.imei, name: formData.value.name, circuitCount: formData.value.circuitCount, poleName: formData.value.poleName, networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN') }) ElMessage.success('新增成功') } showDialog.value = false } }) } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #fff; padding: 20px; } .main-content { display: flex; gap: 20px; height: 100%; } .left-sidebar { width: 200px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e8e8e8; padding: 15px; flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .sidebar-header { margin-bottom: 15px; } .sidebar-search :deep(.el-input__wrapper) { background: #fff; } .left-sidebar :deep(.el-tree) { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; } .right-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .page-header .title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; padding: 12px 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 8px; } .filter-select { width: 150px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .data-table { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .detail-content { padding: 10px 0; } .asset-content { padding: 40px; text-align: center; color: #6b7a8f; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-15&quot;&gt;src/views/device/LampPostManage.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/device/LampPostManage.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleAdd&amp;quot;&amp;gt;新增&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button&amp;gt;批量导入&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button&amp;gt;批量导出&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;selectedRows.length === 0&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleBatchDelete&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button class=&amp;quot;map-btn&amp;quot;&amp;gt;地图&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;content-area&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;left-panel&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;treeSearch&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入层级名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;tree-search&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;treeSearch2&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入层级名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;tree-search&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tree :data=&amp;quot;treeData&amp;quot; :props=&amp;quot;treeProps&amp;quot; :default-expand-all=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; show-checkbox node-key=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;tree-component&amp;quot; &amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-tree&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;right-panel&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;searchKeyword&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入名称进行查询&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSearch&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleReset&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;lampPostData&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;data-table&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleSelectionChange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;60&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lampPostName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;灯杆名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lampPostNo&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;灯杆编号&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;specification&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;规格(米)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;mountedCount&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;挂载设备数&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; fixed=&amp;quot;right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleEdit(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;修改&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleDelete(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot; :page-sizes=&amp;quot;[10, 15, 20, 50, 100]&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&amp;gt;, sizes, total&amp;quot; &amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-pagination&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog :title=&amp;quot;dialogTitle&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;900px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;120px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;灯杆名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.lampPostName&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;灯杆编号&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.lampPostNo&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;灯杆规格&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.specification&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span style=&amp;quot;margin-left: 5px;&amp;quot;&amp;gt;米&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;所属层级&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.level&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;长沙&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;岳麓区&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;先导路&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;3&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;4&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;力唯中天2栋&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;5&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;灯杆经度&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.longitude&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;灯杆纬度&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.latitude&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSubmit&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref } from 'vue' import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus' const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(15) const total = ref(50) const searchKeyword = ref('') const showDialog = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const selectedRows = ref([]) const treeSearch = ref('') const treeSearch2 = ref('') const dialogTitle = ref('新增') const treeProps = { label: 'label', children: 'children' } const treeData = ref([ { id: 1, label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 2, label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 3, label: '先导路', children: [ { id: 4, label: '力唯中天1栋' }, { id: 5, label: '力唯中天2栋' } ] } ] } ] } ]) const lampPostData = ref([ { no: 1, lampPostName: '美人广场新1', lampPostNo: '美人广场新1', specification: 11, mountedCount: 0 }, { no: 2, lampPostName: '灯具展示06', lampPostNo: 'ZS06', specification: 3, mountedCount: 3 }, { no: 3, lampPostName: '灯具展示05', lampPostNo: 'ZS05', specification: 3, mountedCount: 4 }, { no: 4, lampPostName: '灯具展示04', lampPostNo: 'ZS04', specification: 3, mountedCount: 4 }, { no: 5, lampPostName: '灯具展示03', lampPostNo: 'ZS03', specification: 3, mountedCount: 4 }, { no: 6, lampPostName: '灯具展示02', lampPostNo: 'ZS02', specification: 3, mountedCount: 4 }, { no: 7, lampPostName: '灯具展示01', lampPostNo: 'ZS01', specification: 3, mountedCount: 4 }, { no: 8, lampPostName: '彩云街路灯', lampPostNo: 'X001', specification: 0, mountedCount: 0 }, { no: 9, lampPostName: '太阳能测试', lampPostNo: 'T001', specification: 0, mountedCount: 1 }, { no: 10, lampPostName: '光亚展灯杆', lampPostNo: 'GYZ0036', specification: 10, mountedCount: 3 }, { no: 11, lampPostName: 'Z08灯杆(左)', lampPostNo: 'ZT-Z08', specification: 3, mountedCount: 1 }, { no: 12, lampPostName: 'Z05灯杆(中)', lampPostNo: 'ZT-Z05', specification: 3, mountedCount: 1 }, { no: 13, lampPostName: 'Z10灯杆(右)', lampPostNo: 'ZT-Z10', specification: 3, mountedCount: 1 }, { no: 14, lampPostName: '1号楼-极简05', lampPostNo: 'L05', specification: 6, mountedCount: 2 }, { no: 15, lampPostName: '1号楼-极简06', lampPostNo: 'L06', specification: 6, mountedCount: 2 } ]) const formData = ref({ lampPostName: '', lampPostNo: '', specification: '', level: '', longitude: '', latitude: '' }) const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const handleSearch = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const handleReset = () =&amp;gt; { searchKeyword.value = '' } const handleAdd = () =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = false dialogTitle.value = '新增' formData.value = { lampPostName: '', lampPostNo: '', specification: '', level: '', longitude: '', latitude: '' } showDialog.value = true } const handleEdit = (row) =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = true dialogTitle.value = '编辑灯杆' formData.value = { lampPostName: row.lampPostName, lampPostNo: row.lampPostNo,
