specification: row.specification, level: '1', longitude: '', latitude: '' } showDialog.value = true } const handleDelete = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要删除灯杆【${row.lampPostName}】吗？`, '删除确认', { type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&amp;gt; { const index = lampPostData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.no === row.no) if (index !== -1) { lampPostData.value.splice(index, 1) } ElMessage.success('删除成功') }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const handleBatchDelete = () =&amp;gt; { if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要删除的灯杆') return } ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要删除选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个灯杆吗？`, '批量删除确认', { type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&amp;gt; { const nos = selectedRows.value.map(row =&amp;gt; row.no) lampPostData.value = lampPostData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; !nos.includes(item.no)) selectedRows.value = [] ElMessage.success('批量删除成功') }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const handleSubmit = () =&amp;gt; { if (isEdit.value) { const index = lampPostData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.lampPostNo === formData.value.lampPostNo) if (index !== -1) { lampPostData.value[index].lampPostName = formData.value.lampPostName } ElMessage.success('修改成功') } else { const newNo = lampPostData.value.length &amp;gt; 0 ? Math.max(...lampPostData.value.map(item =&amp;gt; item.no)) + 1 : 1 lampPostData.value.push({ no: newNo, lampPostName: formData.value.lampPostName, lampPostNo: formData.value.lampPostNo, specification: formData.value.specification, mountedCount: 0 }) ElMessage.success('新增成功') } showDialog.value = false } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; } .header-right { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .content-area { flex: 1; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); padding: 15px; display: flex; gap: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .left-panel { width: 220px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; padding: 15px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .tree-search { margin-bottom: 10px; } .tree-component { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; } .right-panel { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .data-table { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-16&quot;&gt;src/views/device/VideoRecorderManage.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/device/VideoRecorderManage.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;main-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;left-sidebar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;sidebar-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;treeSearch&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入层级名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;sidebar-search&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tree :data=&amp;quot;treeData&amp;quot; :props=&amp;quot;defaultProps&amp;quot; show-checkbox node-key=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; :default-expand-all=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; :expand-on-click-node=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;right-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleAdd&amp;quot;&amp;gt;新增&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;selectedRows.length === 0&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleBatchDelete&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filterProduct&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择所属产品&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;EXC-CAT1&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;EXC-CAT1&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;电信CAT1&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;电信CAT1&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;filterKeyword&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入名称或编号查&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filterNetworkStatus&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择网络状态&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;在线&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;online&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;离线&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;offline&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSearch&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleReset&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;table-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredData&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;data-table&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleSelectionChange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;product&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;所属产品&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;deviceNo&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备编号&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; sortable&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; sortable&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lampPost&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;所属灯杆&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;networkStatus&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;网络状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;90&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lastOnline&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;最后在线时间&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;160&amp;quot; sortable&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleDetail(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;详情&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleEdit(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;修改&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleDelete(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&amp;gt;, total&amp;quot; @size-change=&amp;quot;handleSizeChange&amp;quot; @current-change=&amp;quot;handleCurrentChange&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;新增&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showAddDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;600px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tabs v-model=&amp;quot;activeTab&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;基本信息&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;basic&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*所属产品&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;product&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.product&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择所属产品&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;EXC-CAT1&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;EXC-CAT1&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;电信CAT1&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;电信CAT1&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*设备编号&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;deviceNo&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.deviceNo&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入设备编号&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*设备名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入设备名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备型号&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;model&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.model&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入设备型号&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*IP地址&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;ipAddress&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.ipAddress&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入IP地址&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*端口号&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;port&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.port&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入端口号&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*所属层级&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;level&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.level&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择所属层级&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;长沙&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;长沙&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;岳麓区&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;岳麓区&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;先导路&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;先导路&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;所属灯杆&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;lampPost&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.lampPost&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;灯具展示01&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;灯具展示01&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;灯具展示02&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;灯具展示02&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;灯具展示03&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;灯具展示03&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备经度&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;longitude&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.longitude&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #suffix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;MapLocation /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备纬度&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;latitude&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.latitude&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #suffix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;MapLocation /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*通道数&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;channels&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.channels&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择通道数&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;4&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;4&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;8&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;8&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*用户名&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;username&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.username&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入用户名&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*密码&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;password&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.password&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;password&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入密码&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;资产信息&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;asset&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;assetData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;资产编号&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;assetNo&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;assetData.assetNo&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入资产编号&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;安装位置&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;installLocation&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;assetData.installLocation&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入安装位置&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;安装日期&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;installDate&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-date-picker v-model=&amp;quot;assetData.installDate&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;date&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择安装日期&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;维护日期&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;maintainDate&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-date-picker v-model=&amp;quot;assetData.maintainDate&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;date&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择维护日期&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;供应商&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;supplier&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;assetData.supplier&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入供应商&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;备注&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;remark&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;assetData.remark&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;textarea&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入备注&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tabs&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleConfirm&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;详情&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showDetailDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;500px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions :column=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; :data=&amp;quot;detailData&amp;quot; border&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;所属产品&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.product }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;设备编号&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.deviceNo }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;设备名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.name }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;设备型号&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.model }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;IP地址&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.ipAddress }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;端口号&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.port }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;所属层级&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.level }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;所属灯杆&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.lampPost }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;设备经度&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.longitude }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;设备纬度&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.latitude }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;通道数&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.channels }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;网络状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;detailData.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ detailData.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;最后在线时间&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ detailData.lastOnline }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;import { ref, computed } from 'vue'; import { Search, MapLocation } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'; const treeSearch = ref(''); const filterProduct = ref(''); const filterKeyword = ref(''); const filterNetworkStatus = ref(''); const currentPage = ref(1); const pageSize = ref(15); const selectedRows = ref([]); const showAddDialog = ref(false); const showDetailDialog = ref(false); const activeTab = ref('basic'); const formData = ref({ product: '', deviceNo: '', name: '', model: '', ipAddress: '', port: '', level: '', lampPost: '', longitude: '', latitude: '', channels: '', username: '', password: '' }); const assetData = ref({ assetNo: '', installLocation: '', installDate: '', maintainDate: '', supplier: '', remark: '' }); const detailData = ref({}); const treeData = ref([ { id: 1, label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 2, label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 3, label: '先导路' }, { id: 4, label: '力唯中天1栋' } ] } ] } ]); const defaultProps = { children: 'children', label: 'label' }; const mockData = ref([ { no: 1, product: 'EXC-CAT1', deviceNo: 'DVRC001', name: '主入口摄像机', lampPost: '灯具展示01', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2025-06-15 09:30:00' }, { no: 2, product: '电信CAT1', deviceNo: 'DVRC002', name: '停车场摄像机', lampPost: '灯具展示02', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2025-06-15 09:28:00' }, { no: 3, product: 'EXC-CAT1', deviceNo: 'DVRC003', name: '办公楼摄像机', lampPost: '灯具展示03', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-06-14 18:00:00' }, { no: 4, product: '电信CAT1', deviceNo: 'DVRC004', name: '园区摄像机', lampPost: '灯具展示01', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2025-06-15 09:25:00' }, { no: 5, product: 'EXC-CAT1', deviceNo: 'DVRC005', name: '仓库摄像机', lampPost: '灯具展示02', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2025-06-13 10:00:00' } ]); const total = computed(() =&amp;gt; mockData.value.length); const filteredData = computed(() =&amp;gt; { let data = [...mockData.value]; if (filterProduct.value) { data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.product === filterProduct.value); } if (filterKeyword.value) { const keyword = filterKeyword.value.toLowerCase(); data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword) || item.deviceNo.toLowerCase().includes(keyword)); } if (filterNetworkStatus.value) { data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.networkStatus === filterNetworkStatus.value); } return data.slice((currentPage.value - 1) * pageSize.value, currentPage.value * pageSize.value); }); const handleSearch = () =&amp;gt; { currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleReset = () =&amp;gt; { filterProduct.value = ''; filterKeyword.value = ''; filterNetworkStatus.value = ''; currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value = val; }; const handleAdd = () =&amp;gt; { showAddDialog.value = true; formData.value = { product: '', deviceNo: '', name: '', model: '', ipAddress: '', port: '', level: '', lampPost: '', longitude: '', latitude: '', channels: '', username: '', password: '' }; assetData.value = { assetNo: '', installLocation: '', installDate: '', maintainDate: '', supplier: '', remark: '' }; activeTab.value = 'basic'; }; const handleEdit = (row) =&amp;gt; { showAddDialog.value = true; formData.value = { ...row }; activeTab.value = 'basic'; }; const handleDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; { showDetailDialog.value = true; detailData.value = { ...row }; }; const handleDelete = (row) =&amp;gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.deviceNo === row.deviceNo); if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1); } }; const handleBatchDelete = () =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&amp;gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.deviceNo === row.deviceNo); if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1); } }); selectedRows.value = []; }; const handleConfirm = () =&amp;gt; { if (!formData.value.product || !formData.value.deviceNo || !formData.value.name || !formData.value.ipAddress || !formData.value.port || !formData.value.level || !formData.value.channels || !formData.value.username || !formData.value.password) { alert('请填写所有必填字段'); return; } const newRecord = { no: mockData.value.length + 1, product: formData.value.product, deviceNo: formData.value.deviceNo, name: formData.value.name, lampPost: formData.value.lampPost || '-', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: new Date().toLocaleString() }; mockData.value.push(newRecord); showAddDialog.value = false; }; const handleSizeChange = (val) =&amp;gt; { pageSize.value = val; currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleCurrentChange = (val) =&amp;gt; { currentPage.value = val; }; &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { display: flex; height: calc(100vh - 60px); } .main-content { display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .left-sidebar { width: 200px; background: #fafafa; border-right: 1px solid #e8e8e8; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .sidebar-header { padding: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .sidebar-search { width: 100%; } .right-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; padding: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; } .filter-select { width: 180px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .table-wrapper { flex: 1; overflow-x: auto; overflow-y: auto; min-height: 0; } .data-table { width: 100%; min-width: 1000px; } .pagination-bar { display: flex; justify-content: center; padding: 15px 0; } .form-container { padding: 10px 0; } .form-select { width: 100%; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt;&lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-17&quot;&gt;src/views/lighting/GisMap.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/lighting/GisMap.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;GIS地图&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;searchText&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;按IMEI号或名称搜索&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 200px; margin-right: 10px;&amp;quot; clearable &amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;refreshMap&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Refresh /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 刷新 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;map-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;map-toolbar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;toolbar-left&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio-group v-model=&amp;quot;statusFilter&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;default&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio-button label=&amp;quot;all&amp;quot;&amp;gt;全部&amp;lt;/el-radio-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio-button label=&amp;quot;on&amp;quot;&amp;gt;开灯&amp;lt;/el-radio-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio-button label=&amp;quot;off&amp;quot;&amp;gt;关灯&amp;lt;/el-radio-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio-button label=&amp;quot;alert&amp;quot;&amp;gt;告警&amp;lt;/el-radio-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio-button label=&amp;quot;offline&amp;quot;&amp;gt;离线&amp;lt;/el-radio-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-radio-group&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;toolbar-right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio-group v-model=&amp;quot;mapMode&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio-button label=&amp;quot;satellite&amp;quot;&amp;gt;卫星&amp;lt;/el-radio-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio-button label=&amp;quot;2d&amp;quot;&amp;gt;2D&amp;lt;/el-radio-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio-button label=&amp;quot;3d&amp;quot;&amp;gt;3D&amp;lt;/el-radio-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-radio-group&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;map-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;map-area&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;map-placeholder&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;map-grid&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-for=&amp;quot;(light, index) in filteredLights&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;light.id&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;map-light&amp;quot; :class=&amp;quot;getLightClass(light.status)&amp;quot; :style=&amp;quot;getLightPosition(index)&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;showLightDetail(light)&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;light-icon&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Sunrise /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;light-info&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;light-name&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ light.name }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;light-status&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ getStatusText(light.status) }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;map-legend&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;legend-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;图例&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;legend-items&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;legend-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;legend-dot online&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;在线开灯&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;legend-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;legend-dot offline-off&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;在线关灯&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;legend-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;legend-dot alert&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;告警&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;legend-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;legend-dot offline&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;离线&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;map-sidebar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;sidebar-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;设备统计&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-list&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-dot online&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;在线&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ stats.online }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-dot offline&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;离线&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ stats.offline }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-dot alert&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;告警&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ stats.alert }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;sidebar-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;快捷操作&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;quick-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;batchControl('on')&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Sunrise /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 批量开灯 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;batchControl('off')&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Moon /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 批量关灯 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;showTimedControl = true&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Timer /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 定时控制 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;sidebar-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;选中设备信息&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;selectedLight&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;device-info&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;info-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;info-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;设备名称&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;info-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedLight.name }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;info-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;info-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;IMEI号&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;info-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedLight.imei }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;info-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;info-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;状态&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;info-value&amp;quot; :class=&amp;quot;'status-' + selectedLight.status&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getStatusText(selectedLight.status) }} &amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;info-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;info-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;亮度&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;info-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedLight.brightness }}%&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;info-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;info-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;电压&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;info-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedLight.voltage }}V&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;info-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;info-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;电流&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;info-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedLight.current }}A&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;info-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;info-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;功率&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;info-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedLight.power }}W&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;action-buttons&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;controlLight(selectedLight, 'on')&amp;quot;&amp;gt; 开灯 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;controlLight(selectedLight, 'off')&amp;quot;&amp;gt; 关灯 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;showBrightnessDialog(selectedLight)&amp;quot;&amp;gt; 调光 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-else class=&amp;quot;no-selection&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;点击地图上的路灯查看详情&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog v-model=&amp;quot;showTimedControl&amp;quot; title=&amp;quot;定时控制&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;500px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;timedForm&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;控制类型&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio-group v-model=&amp;quot;timedForm.type&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;on&amp;quot;&amp;gt;开灯&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;off&amp;quot;&amp;gt;关灯&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;dim&amp;quot;&amp;gt;调光&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-radio-group&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;执行时间&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-time-picker v-model=&amp;quot;timedForm.time&amp;quot; format=&amp;quot;HH:mm&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择时间&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item v-if=&amp;quot;timedForm.type === 'dim'&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;亮度值&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-slider v-model=&amp;quot;timedForm.brightness&amp;quot; :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; :max=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; show-input /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;重复&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox-group v-model=&amp;quot;timedForm.days&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周一&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周二&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;3&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周三&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;4&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周四&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;5&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周五&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;6&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周六&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周日&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-checkbox-group&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showTimedControl = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;submitTimedControl&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog v-model=&amp;quot;showBrightness&amp;quot; title=&amp;quot;亮度调节&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;400px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;brightness-control&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-slider v-model=&amp;quot;brightnessValue&amp;quot; :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; :max=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; show-input /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showBrightness = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;submitBrightness&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed, reactive } from 'vue' import { Search, Refresh, Sunrise, Moon, Timer } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' const searchText = ref('') const statusFilter = ref('all') const mapMode = ref('2d') const selectedLight = ref(null) const showTimedControl = ref(false) const showBrightness = ref(false) const brightnessValue = ref(80) const timedForm = reactive({ type: 'on', time: '', brightness: 80, days: [] }) const lights = ref([ { id: 1, name: '中山路01号灯', imei: '861234567890001', status: 'online-on', brightness: 100, voltage: 220, current: 2.5, power: 550, x: 10, y: 15 }, { id: 2, name: '中山路02号灯', imei: '861234567890002', status: 'online-on', brightness: 80, voltage: 218, current: 2.0, power: 440, x: 25, y: 15 }, { id: 3, name: '人民路01号灯', imei: '861234567890003', status: 'online-off', brightness: 0, voltage: 220, current: 0, power: 0, x: 40, y: 30 }, { id: 4, name: '人民路02号灯', imei: '861234567890004', status: 'alert', brightness: 60, voltage: 180, current: 1.5, power: 330, x: 55, y: 30 }, { id: 5, name: '解放路01号灯', imei: '861234567890005', status: 'offline', brightness: 0, voltage: 0, current: 0, power: 0, x: 70, y: 45 }, { id: 6, name: '解放路02号灯', imei: '861234567890006', status: 'online-on', brightness: 90, voltage: 219, current: 2.2, power: 484, x: 85, y: 45 }, { id: 7, name: '公园路01号灯', imei: '861234567890007', status: 'online-on', brightness: 70, voltage: 221, current: 1.8, power: 396, x: 15, y: 60 }, { id: 8, name: '公园路02号灯', imei: '861234567890008', status: 'online-off', brightness: 0, voltage: 220, current: 0, power: 0, x: 30, y: 60 }, { id: 9, name: '文化路01号灯', imei: '861234567890009', status: 'alert', brightness: 50, voltage: 160, current: 1.2, power: 264, x: 45, y: 75 }, { id: 10, name: '文化路02号灯', imei: '861234567890010', status: 'online-on', brightness: 100, voltage: 220, current: 2.5, power: 550, x: 60, y: 75 } ]) const stats = computed(() =&amp;gt; { const result = { online: 0, offline: 0, alert: 0 } lights.value.forEach(light =&amp;gt; { if (light.status === 'offline') result.offline++ else if (light.status === 'alert') result.alert++ else result.online++ }) return result }) const filteredLights = computed(() =&amp;gt; { if (!searchText.value) { if (statusFilter.value === 'all') return lights.value return lights.value.filter(l =&amp;gt; l.status.startsWith(statusFilter.value)) } return lights.value.filter(l =&amp;gt; l.name.includes(searchText.value) || l.imei.includes(searchText.value) ) }) const getLightClass = (status) =&amp;gt; { const classMap = { 'online-on': 'light-on', 'online-off': 'light-off', 'alert': 'light-alert', 'offline': 'light-offline' } return classMap[status] || '' } const getLightPosition = (index) =&amp;gt; { const light = filteredLights.value[index] if (light) { return { left: light.x + '%', top: light.y + '%' } } return {} } const getStatusText = (status) =&amp;gt; { const textMap = { 'online-on': '在线-开灯', 'online-off': '在线-关灯', 'alert': '告警', 'offline': '离线' } return textMap[status] || status } const showLightDetail = (light) =&amp;gt; { selectedLight.value = light } const controlLight = (light, action) =&amp;gt; { if (action === 'on') { light.status = 'online-on' } else { light.status = 'online-off' } } const showBrightnessDialog = (light) =&amp;gt; { brightnessValue.value = light.brightness showBrightness.value = true } const submitBrightness = () =&amp;gt; { if (selectedLight.value) { selectedLight.value.brightness = brightnessValue.value if (brightnessValue.value &amp;gt; 0) { selectedLight.value.status = 'online-on' } else { selectedLight.value.status = 'online-off' } } showBrightness.value = false } const batchControl = (action) =&amp;gt; { lights.value.forEach(light =&amp;gt; { if (light.status !== 'offline') { if (action === 'on') { light.status = 'online-on' } else { light.status = 'online-off' } } }) } const submitTimedControl = () =&amp;gt; { console.log('定时控制配置:', timedForm) showTimedControl.value = false ElMessage.success('定时控制已设置') } const refreshMap = () =&amp;gt; { console.log('刷新地图') } import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus' &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .map-container { background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .map-toolbar { padding: 15px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .map-content { display: flex; height: calc(100vh - 300px); } .map-area { flex: 1; position: relative; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f5f7fa 0%, #e4e8eb 100%); } .map-placeholder { width: 100%; height: 100%; position: relative; } .map-grid { width: 100%; height: 100%; position: relative; } .map-light { position: absolute; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s; } .map-light:hover { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.1); } .light-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 5px; } .light-on .light-icon { background: #52c41a; color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(82, 196, 26, 0.5); } .light-off .light-icon { background: #d9d9d9; color: #666; } .light-alert .light-icon { background: #f5222d; color: #fff; animation: blink 1s infinite; } .light-offline .light-icon { background: #8c8c8c; color: #fff; } @keyframes blink { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.5; } } .light-info { text-align: center; font-size: 12px; } .light-name { display: block; color: #333; font-weight: 500; } .light-status { color: #666; } .map-legend { position: absolute; bottom: 20px; left: 20px; background: #fff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .legend-title { font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #333; } .legend-items { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .legend-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 13px; } .legend-dot { width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 50%; } .legend-dot.online { background: #52c41a; } .legend-dot.offline-off { background: #d9d9d9; } .legend-dot.alert { background: #f5222d; } .legend-dot.offline { background: #8c8c8c; } .map-sidebar { width: 300px; background: #fafafa; border-left: 1px solid #e8e8e8; padding: 15px; overflow-y: auto; } .sidebar-section { margin-bottom: 20px; } .section-title { font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; color: #333; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .stat-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; } .stat-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; } .stat-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; } .stat-dot.online { background: #52c41a; } .stat-dot.offline { background: #8c8c8c; } .stat-dot.alert { background: #f5222d; } .stat-label { flex: 1; color: #666; } .stat-value { font-weight: 600; color: #333; } .quick-actions { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; } .quick-actions .el-button { width: 100%; justify-content: center; } .device-info { background: #fff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 4px; } .info-item { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0; } .info-item:last-of-type { border-bottom: none; } .info-label { color: #666; } .info-value { font-weight: 500; color: #333; } .status-online-on { color: #52c41a; } .status-online-off { color: #999; } .status-alert { color: #f5222d; } .status-offline { color: #8c8c8c; } .action-buttons { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-top: 15px; justify-content: center; } .no-selection { text-align: center; color: #999; padding: 30px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; } .brightness-control { padding: 20px; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-18&quot;&gt;src/views/lighting/GroupManage.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/lighting/GroupManage.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;main-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;left-sidebar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;sidebar-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;searchTreeText&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入层级名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;sidebar-search&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tree :data=&amp;quot;treeData&amp;quot; :props=&amp;quot;defaultProps&amp;quot; show-checkbox node-key=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; :expand-on-click-node=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot; @check-change=&amp;quot;handleCheckChange&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;right-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;分组管理&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = true&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Plus /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 新增 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;refreshData&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Refresh /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 刷新 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;success&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleExport&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Download /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 导出 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;batchDelete&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;selectedRows.length === 0&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Delete /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 删除 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;filters.search&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入分组名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filters.type&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择分组类型&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;全部类型&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;路段分组&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;road&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;功能分组&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;function&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;自定义分组&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;custom&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filters.hierarchy&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择所属区域&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;全部区域&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;长沙-岳麓区-先导路&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;xiandao&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;长沙-岳麓区-力唯中天1栋&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;liwei&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;searchGroups&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;resetFilters&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredGroups&amp;quot; border @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleSelectionChange&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;序号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;60&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;分组名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;分组类型&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getTypeTagType(row.type)&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ getTypeText(row.type) }}&amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;hierarchy&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;所属区域&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getHierarchyText(row.hierarchy) }} &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lampCount&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;关联灯具数&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;110&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;lamp-count&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;showLampDialog(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.lampCount }} &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;View /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;createTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;创建时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;160&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;300&amp;quot; fixed=&amp;quot;right&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;viewLamps(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查看关联&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;success&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;editGroup(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;编辑&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;warning&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;batchControl(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;批量控制&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;deleteGroup(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot; :page-sizes=&amp;quot;[10, 20, 30, 50]&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog v-model=&amp;quot;showAddDialog&amp;quot; :title=&amp;quot;isEdit ? '编辑分组' : '新增分组'&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;900px&amp;quot; @close=&amp;quot;resetForm&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form ref=&amp;quot;formRef&amp;quot; :model=&amp;quot;form&amp;quot; :rules=&amp;quot;rules&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;110px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;分组名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入分组名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;分组类型&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;form.type&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择分组类型&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;路段分组&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;road&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;功能分组&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;function&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;自定义分组&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;custom&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;所属区域&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;hierarchy&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;form.hierarchy&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择所属区域&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;长沙-岳麓区-先导路&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;xiandao&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;长沙-岳麓区-力唯中天1栋&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;liwei&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;备注信息&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.remark&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入备注信息&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;选择灯具&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;lamp-selector&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;selector-left&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;selector-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;leftSearch&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入灯具名称或编号&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;search-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;searchLeftLamps&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;resetLeftSearch&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;availableLamps&amp;quot; border size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; height=&amp;quot;280&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleLeftSelection&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;40&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;序号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;code&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;灯具编号&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;灯具名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;poleName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;所属灯杆&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;selector-buttons&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;addSelectedLamps&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;ArrowRight /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;removeSelectedLamps&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;ArrowLeft /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;selector-right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;selector-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;rightSearch&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入灯具名称或编号&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;search-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;searchRightLamps&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;resetRightSearch&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;selected-count&amp;quot;&amp;gt;已选灯具：{{ selectedLampIds.length }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;selectedLamps&amp;quot; border size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; height=&amp;quot;240&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleRightSelection&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;40&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;序号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;code&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;灯具编号&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;灯具名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;poleName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;所属灯杆&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;submitForm&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog v-model=&amp;quot;showLampListDialog&amp;quot; title=&amp;quot;关联灯具列表&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;800px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;currentGroupLamps&amp;quot; border&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;序号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;60&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;code&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;灯具编号&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;灯具名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;poleName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;所属灯杆&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;status&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;灯具状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;90&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.status === 'on' ? 'success' : 'info'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.status === 'on' ? '开灯' : '关灯' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;networkStatus&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;网络状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;90&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showLampListDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;关闭&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog v-model=&amp;quot;showControlDialog&amp;quot; title=&amp;quot;分组批量控制&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;500px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;control-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;control-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;control-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;操作类型：&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio-group v-model=&amp;quot;controlType&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;on&amp;quot;&amp;gt;开灯&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;off&amp;quot;&amp;gt;关灯&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;dim&amp;quot;&amp;gt;调光&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-radio-group&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;control-item&amp;quot; v-if=&amp;quot;controlType === 'dim'&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;control-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;亮度值：&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-slider v-model=&amp;quot;brightnessValue&amp;quot; :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; :max=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; show-input /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showControlDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;submitControl&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue' import { Plus, Refresh, Download, Delete, Search, ArrowRight, ArrowLeft, View } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus' const searchTreeText = ref('') const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(20) const total = ref(5) const showAddDialog = ref(false) const showLampListDialog = ref(false) const showControlDialog = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const formRef = ref(null) const selectedRows = ref([]) const leftSearch = ref('') const rightSearch = ref('') const controlType = ref('on') const brightnessValue = ref(80) const defaultProps = { children: 'children', label: 'label' } const treeData = ref([ { id: 1, label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 11, label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 111, label: '先导路' }, { id: 112, label: '力唯中天1栋' } ] } ] } ]) const filters = reactive({ search: '', type: '', hierarchy: '' }) const form = reactive({ name: '', type: 'road', hierarchy: '', remark: '' }) const rules = { name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入分组名称', trigger: 'blur' }], type: [{ required: true, message: '请选择分组类型', trigger: 'change' }], hierarchy: [{ required: true, message: '请选择所属区域', trigger: 'change' }] } const allLamps = ref([ { id: 1, no: 1, code: '862715067560391', name: '光亚展灯具', poleName: '光亚展灯杆', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'online' }, { id: 2, no: 2, code: '863123069184162', name: '1号楼-极简07', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'online' }, { id: 3, no: 3, code: '863123069133946', name: '宿舍楼02', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'offline' }, { id: 4, no: 4, code: '863123069031165', name: '3号楼-极简13', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'offline' }, { id: 5, no: 5, code: '863123069267413', name: '食堂-极简18辅路', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'offline' }, { id: 6, no: 6, code: '863123069265714', name: '食堂-极简18', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'offline' }, { id: 7, no: 7, code: '863123069201446', name: '食堂-极简17', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'offline' }, { id: 8, no: 8, code: '864900066365673', name: '0104Z11', poleName: '-', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'offline' }, { id: 9, no: 9, code: '862715067560392', name: '先导路路灯1', poleName: '先导路1号灯杆', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'online' }, { id: 10, no: 10, code: '862715067560393', name: '先导路路灯2', poleName: '先导路2号灯杆', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'online' }, { id: 11, no: 11, code: '862715067560394', name: '力唯中天1栋路灯1', poleName: '力唯中天1栋1号灯杆', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'online' }, { id: 12, no: 12, code: '862715067560395', name: '力唯中天1栋路灯2', poleName: '力唯中天1栋2号灯杆', status: 'off', networkStatus: 'online' } ]) const groups = ref([ { id: 1, no: 1, name: '先导路主干道路灯分组', type: 'road', hierarchy: 'xiandao', lampCount: 5, createTime: '2024-01-15 10:30:00', remark: '', lampIds: [1, 9, 10] }, { id: 2, no: 2, name: '先导路景观灯分组', type: 'function', hierarchy: 'xiandao', lampCount: 3, createTime: '2024-01-20 14:20:00', remark: '', lampIds: [2, 3, 4] }, { id: 3, no: 3, name: '力唯中天1栋照明分组', type: 'road', hierarchy: 'liwei', lampCount: 4, createTime: '2024-02-01 09:00:00', remark: '', lampIds: [11, 12, 5, 6] }, { id: 4, no: 4, name: '园区节假日专用', type: 'custom', hierarchy: 'xiandao', lampCount: 2, createTime: '2024-02-10 16:45:00', remark: '', lampIds: [7, 8] }, { id: 5, no: 5, name: '展厅演示分组', type: 'function', hierarchy: 'liwei', lampCount: 3, createTime: '2024-03-01 11:00:00', remark: '', lampIds: [1, 2, 3] } ]) const selectedLampIds = ref([]) const tempLeftSelection = ref([]) const tempRightSelection = ref([]) const currentGroupLamps = ref([]) const availableLamps = computed(() =&amp;gt; { let result = allLamps.value.filter(l =&amp;gt; !selectedLampIds.value.includes(l.id)) if (leftSearch.value) { result = result.filter(l =&amp;gt; l.name.includes(leftSearch.value) || l.code.includes(leftSearch.value)) } return result }) const selectedLamps = computed(() =&amp;gt; { let result = allLamps.value.filter(l =&amp;gt; selectedLampIds.value.includes(l.id)) if (rightSearch.value) { result = result.filter(l =&amp;gt; l.name.includes(rightSearch.value) || l.code.includes(rightSearch.value)) } return result }) const filteredGroups = computed(() =&amp;gt; { let result = groups.value if (filters.search) { result = result.filter(g =&amp;gt; g.name.includes(filters.search)) } if (filters.type) { result = result.filter(g =&amp;gt; g.type === filters.type) } if (filters.hierarchy) { result = result.filter(g =&amp;gt; g.hierarchy === filters.hierarchy) } return result }) const getTypeText = (type) =&amp;gt; { const map = { road: '路段分组', function: '功能分组', custom: '自定义分组' } return map[type] || type } const getTypeTagType = (type) =&amp;gt; { const map = { road: 'primary', function: 'success', custom: 'warning' } return map[type] || '' } const getHierarchyText = (hierarchy) =&amp;gt; { const map = { xiandao: '长沙-岳麓区-先导路', liwei: '长沙-岳麓区-力唯中天1栋' } return map[hierarchy] || hierarchy } const handleCheckChange = () =&amp;gt; {} const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const searchGroups = () =&amp;gt; { currentPage.value = 1 ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const resetFilters = () =&amp;gt; { Object.assign(filters, { search: '', type: '', hierarchy: '' }) currentPage.value = 1 } const refreshData = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success('数据已刷新') } const handleExport = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success('导出成功') } const batchDelete = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要删除选中的${selectedRows.value.length}个分组吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' }).then(() =&amp;gt; { const selectedIds = selectedRows.value.map(g =&amp;gt; g.id) groups.value = groups.value.filter(g =&amp;gt; !selectedIds.includes(g.id)) total.value = groups.value.length selectedRows.value = [] ElMessage.success('批量删除成功') }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const handleLeftSelection = (selection) =&amp;gt; { tempLeftSelection.value = selection } const handleRightSelection = (selection) =&amp;gt; { tempRightSelection.value = selection } const addSelectedLamps = () =&amp;gt; { tempLeftSelection.value.forEach(item =&amp;gt; { if (!selectedLampIds.value.includes(item.id)) { selectedLampIds.value.push(item.id) } }) tempLeftSelection.value = [] } const removeSelectedLamps = () =&amp;gt; { tempRightSelection.value.forEach(item =&amp;gt; { const index = selectedLampIds.value.indexOf(item.id) if (index &amp;gt; -1) { selectedLampIds.value.splice(index, 1) } }) tempRightSelection.value = [] } const searchLeftLamps = () =&amp;gt; {} const resetLeftSearch = () =&amp;gt; { leftSearch.value = '' } const searchRightLamps = () =&amp;gt; {} const resetRightSearch = () =&amp;gt; { rightSearch.value = '' } const resetForm = () =&amp;gt; { Object.assign(form, { name: '', type: 'road', hierarchy: '', remark: '' }) selectedLampIds.value = [] tempLeftSelection.value = [] tempRightSelection.value = [] } const editGroup = (row) =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = true Object.assign(form, { name: row.name, type: row.type, hierarchy: row.hierarchy, remark: row.remark }) selectedLampIds.value = [...(row.lampIds || [])] showAddDialog.value = true } const deleteGroup = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要删除分组&amp;quot;${row.name}&amp;quot;吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' }).then(() =&amp;gt; { const index = groups.value.findIndex(g =&amp;gt; g.id === row.id) if (index &amp;gt; -1) { groups.value.splice(index, 1) total.value-- ElMessage.success('删除成功') } }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const submitForm = () =&amp;gt; { formRef.value.validate((valid) =&amp;gt; { if (valid) { if (isEdit.value) { const index = groups.value.findIndex(g =&amp;gt; g.id === form.id) if (index &amp;gt; -1) { groups.value[index] = { ...groups.value[index], ...form, lampCount: selectedLampIds.value.length, lampIds: [...selectedLampIds.value] } } ElMessage.success('分组修改成功') } else { const newId = Math.max(...groups.value.map(g =&amp;gt; g.id)) + 1 groups.value.push({ id: newId, no: groups.value.length + 1, ...form, lampCount: selectedLampIds.value.length, lampIds: [...selectedLampIds.value], createTime: new Date().toLocaleString() }) total.value++ ElMessage.success('分组添加成功') } showAddDialog.value = false isEdit.value = false resetForm() } }) } const viewLamps = (row) =&amp;gt; { currentGroupLamps.value = allLamps.value.filter(l =&amp;gt; row.lampIds?.includes(l.id)) showLampListDialog.value = true } const showLampDialog = (row) =&amp;gt; { viewLamps(row) } const batchControl = (row) =&amp;gt; { showControlDialog.value = true } const submitControl = () =&amp;gt; { const action = controlType.value === 'on' ? '开灯' : controlType.value === 'off' ? '关灯' : `调光至${brightnessValue.value}%` ElMessage.success(`批量${action}成功`) showControlDialog.value = false } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { padding: 20px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .main-content { display: flex; gap: 20px; } .left-sidebar { width: 200px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); padding: 15px; flex-shrink: 0; } .sidebar-header { margin-bottom: 15px; } .right-content { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .page-header .title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-select { width: 160px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 20px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .lamp-count { color: #409eff; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .lamp-count:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .lamp-selector { display: flex; gap: 15px; height: 350px; } .selector-left, .selector-right { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .selector-header { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; } .search-input { flex: 1; } .selected-count { color: #409eff; font-size: 13px; margin-bottom: 5px; } .selector-buttons { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; } .control-content { padding: 20px; } .control-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .control-label { width: 80px; font-weight: 500; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-19&quot;&gt;src/views/lighting/HistoryStrategy.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/lighting/HistoryStrategy.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;历史下发策略&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;success&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleExport&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;selectedRows.length === 0&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Download /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 导出记录 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;refreshData&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Refresh /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 刷新 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;filters.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入策略名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot; clearable &amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filters.status&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择执行状态&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot; clearable&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;成功&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;success&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;部分成功&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;partial&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;失败&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;fail&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-date-picker v-model=&amp;quot;filters.dateRange&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;daterange&amp;quot; range-separator=&amp;quot;至&amp;quot; start-placeholder=&amp;quot;开始时间&amp;quot; end-placeholder=&amp;quot;结束时间&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-date&amp;quot; value-format=&amp;quot;YYYY-MM-DD&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;searchRecords&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;resetFilters&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredRecords&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;record-table&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleSelectionChange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;55&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;序号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;80&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;strategyName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;策略名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;200&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-link type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;viewDetail(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ row.strategyName }}&amp;lt;/el-link&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;sendTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;下发时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;operator&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;下发人员&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;deviceCount&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;关联设备数&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;successCount&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;成功数&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span style=&amp;quot;color: #52c41a; font-weight: 500;&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ row.successCount }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;failCount&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;失败数&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span style=&amp;quot;color: #f5222d; font-weight: 500;&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ row.failCount }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;status&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;执行结果&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(row.status)&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getStatusText(row.status) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;260&amp;quot; fixed=&amp;quot;right&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleCopy(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;复制&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;info&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleExportSingle(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;导出&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;default&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;viewDetail(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查看详情&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot; :page-sizes=&amp;quot;[10, 20, 50, 100]&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper&amp;quot; @size-change=&amp;quot;handleSizeChange&amp;quot; @current-change=&amp;quot;handleCurrentChange&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog v-model=&amp;quot;detailVisible&amp;quot; title=&amp;quot;策略执行详情&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;900px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;currentRecord&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;detail-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions :column=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; border&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;策略名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentRecord.strategyName }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;下发时间&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentRecord.sendTime }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;下发人员&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentRecord.operator }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;执行结果&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(currentRecord.status)&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getStatusText(currentRecord.status) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;关联设备数&amp;quot; :span=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentRecord.deviceCount }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tabs v-model=&amp;quot;activeTab&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;detail-tabs&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;策略配置&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;config&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
