'展示0204Z05', power: 232, voltage: 237.9, current: 999, lampStatus: 'off', brightness: '-', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-04-09 21:19:55', currentStrategy: '-', switchRecord: '查看', enabled: true } ]) const filteredData = computed(() =&amp;gt; { let result = lampData.value if (filterProduct.value) { result = result.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.product === filterProduct.value) } if (filterLampStatus.value) { result = result.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.lampStatus === filterLampStatus.value) } if (filterNetworkStatus.value) { result = result.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.networkStatus === filterNetworkStatus.value) } if (filterEnabled.value) { result = result.filter(item =&amp;gt; filterEnabled.value === 'enabled' ? item.enabled : !item.enabled) } if (searchKeyword.value) { result = result.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.imei.includes(searchKeyword.value) || item.name.includes(searchKeyword.value) ) } return result }) const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const handleSearch = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const handleReset = () =&amp;gt; { searchKeyword.value = '' filterProduct.value = '' filterLampStatus.value = '' filterNetworkStatus.value = '' filterEnabled.value = '' } const handleTurnOn = () =&amp;gt; { if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要控制的灯具') return } ElMessage.success(`已开启 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个灯具`) } const handleTurnOff = () =&amp;gt; { if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要控制的灯具') return } ElMessage.success(`已关闭 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个灯具`) } const handleDimming = () =&amp;gt; { if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要调光的灯具') return } ElMessage.success(`已将 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个灯具亮度设置为 ${brightnessValue.value}%`) showDimmingDialog.value = false } const handleDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; { selectedItem.value = row showDetailDialog.value = true } const handleMore = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.info(`更多操作: ${row.name}`) } const handleViewSwitchRecord = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.info(`查看 ${row.name} 的开关灯记录`) } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #fff; padding: 20px; } .main-content { display: flex; gap: 20px; height: 100%; } .left-sidebar { width: 200px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e8e8e8; padding: 15px; flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .sidebar-header { margin-bottom: 15px; } .sidebar-search :deep(.el-input__wrapper) { background: #fff; } .left-sidebar :deep(.el-tree) { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; } .right-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; overflow: visible; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end; } .control-btn { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1890ff 0%, #096dd9 100%); border: none; color: #fff; white-space: nowrap; } .control-btn:hover { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #40a9ff 0%, #1890ff 100%); } .default-btn { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #d9d9d9; color: #666; white-space: nowrap; } .default-btn:hover { color: #1890ff; border-color: #1890ff; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; padding: 12px 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-select { width: 140px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .table-wrapper { flex: 1; overflow-x: auto; overflow-y: auto; min-height: 0; } .data-table { width: 100%; min-width: 1400px; } .data-table :deep(.text-muted) { color: #999; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .detail-content { padding: 10px 0; } .dimming-content { padding: 20px; } .dimming-label { text-align: center; font-size: 16px; color: #333; margin-bottom: 20px; } .quick-actions { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 15px; margin-top: 20px; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-21&quot;&gt;src/views/lighting/LightControl.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/lighting/LightControl.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;远程控制&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;batchControl&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Batch&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; 批量控制 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;control-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;区域选择&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;area-selector&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-for=&amp;quot;area in areas&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;area.id&amp;quot; :class=&amp;quot;['area-card', { active: selectedArea === area.id }]&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;selectArea(area.id)&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;area.icon&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;area-icon&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;area-name&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ area.name }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;area-count&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ getAreaCount(area.id) }}盏&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;control-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;控制操作&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;control-panel&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;control-row&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;control-btn-group&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;large&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;controlAll('on')&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Power&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; 全部开启 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;large&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;controlAll('off')&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.PowerOff&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; 全部关闭 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;control-row&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;brightness-control&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;control-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;亮度调节&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;brightness-slider&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-slider v-model=&amp;quot;brightnessValue&amp;quot; :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; :max=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; :step=&amp;quot;5&amp;quot; @change=&amp;quot;onBrightnessChange&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;brightness-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ brightnessValue }}%&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;quick-buttons&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button v-for=&amp;quot;level in brightnessLevels&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;level&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;setBrightness(level)&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ level }}% &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;control-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;路灯列表&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredLights&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;data-table&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;55&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备编号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;路灯名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;location&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;安装位置&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;status&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(scope.row.status)&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getStatusText(scope.row.status) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;brightness&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;亮度(%)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;power&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;功率(W)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; :type=&amp;quot;scope.row.status === 'on' ? 'default' : 'primary'&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;toggleLight(scope.row)&amp;quot; &amp;gt; {{ scope.row.status === 'on' ? '关闭' : '开启' }} &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;adjustBrightness(scope.row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;调亮度&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;亮度调节&amp;quot; :visible.sync=&amp;quot;brightnessDialogVisible&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;400px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;currentLight&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;brightness-dialog&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;light-info&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentLight.name }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-slider v-model=&amp;quot;currentBrightness&amp;quot; :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; :max=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; :step=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot; show-input /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;brightnessDialogVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;confirmBrightness&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确认&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { VideoPlay, VideoPause, Grid, MapLocation } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { lightStatusData } from '@/data/mockData' const icons = { Power: VideoPlay, PowerOff: VideoPause, Batch: Grid, MapPin: MapLocation } const selectedArea = ref('all') const brightnessValue = ref(80) const brightnessDialogVisible = ref(false) const currentLight = ref(null) const currentBrightness = ref(80) const selectedLights = ref([]) const areas = [ { id: 'all', name: '全部区域', icon: MapLocation }, { id: 'zhongshan', name: '中山路', icon: MapLocation }, { id: 'renmin', name: '人民路', icon: MapLocation }, { id: 'jiefang', name: '解放路', icon: MapLocation }, { id: 'gongyuan', name: '公园路', icon: MapLocation }, { id: 'wenhua', name: '文化路', icon: MapLocation } ] const brightnessLevels = [30, 50, 70, 85, 100] const tableData = ref([...lightStatusData]) const filteredLights = computed(() =&amp;gt; { if (selectedArea.value === 'all') return tableData.value const areaMap = { zhongshan: '中山路', renmin: '人民路', jiefang: '解放路', gongyuan: '公园路', wenhua: '文化路' } return tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.location.includes(areaMap[selectedArea.value])) }) const getAreaCount = (areaId) =&amp;gt; { if (areaId === 'all') return tableData.value.length const areaMap = { zhongshan: '中山路', renmin: '人民路', jiefang: '解放路', gongyuan: '公园路', wenhua: '文化路' } return tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.location.includes(areaMap[areaId])).length } const getStatusTagType = (status) =&amp;gt; { switch (status) { case 'on': return 'success' case 'off': return 'info' case 'fault': return 'danger' default: return 'info' } } const getStatusText = (status) =&amp;gt; { switch (status) { case 'on': return '开启' case 'off': return '关闭' case 'fault': return '故障' default: return status } } const selectArea = (areaId) =&amp;gt; { selectedArea.value = areaId } const controlAll = (action) =&amp;gt; { filteredLights.value.forEach(light =&amp;gt; { if (light.status !== 'fault') { light.status = action light.brightness = action === 'on' ? brightnessValue.value : 0 } }) } const toggleLight = (row) =&amp;gt; { if (row.status === 'fault') return row.status = row.status === 'on' ? 'off' : 'on' row.brightness = row.status === 'on' ? brightnessValue.value : 0 } const onBrightnessChange = (val) =&amp;gt; { filteredLights.value.forEach(light =&amp;gt; { if (light.status === 'on') { light.brightness = val } }) } const setBrightness = (level) =&amp;gt; { brightnessValue.value = level onBrightnessChange(level) } const adjustBrightness = (row) =&amp;gt; { if (row.status === 'fault') return currentLight.value = row currentBrightness.value = row.brightness brightnessDialogVisible.value = true } const confirmBrightness = () =&amp;gt; { if (currentLight.value &amp;amp;&amp;amp; currentLight.value.status !== 'fault') { currentLight.value.brightness = currentBrightness.value if (currentLight.value.status === 'off') { currentLight.value.status = 'on' } } brightnessDialogVisible.value = false } const batchControl = () =&amp;gt; { selectedLights.value.forEach(id =&amp;gt; { const light = tableData.value.find(l =&amp;gt; l.id === id) if (light &amp;amp;&amp;amp; light.status !== 'fault') { light.status = 'on' light.brightness = brightnessValue.value } }) } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .control-section { margin-bottom: 25px; } .section-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 15px; color: #333; } .area-selector { display: flex; gap: 15px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .area-card { flex: 0 0 calc(16.666% - 12px); min-width: 120px; padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #e8e8e8; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; text-align: center; &amp;amp;:hover { border-color: #1890ff; background: #f0f7ff; } &amp;amp;.active { border-color: #1890ff; background: #e6f7ff; } } .area-icon { font-size: 24px; color: #1890ff; margin-bottom: 8px; } .area-name { display: block; font-size: 14px; color: #333; } .area-count { display: block; font-size: 12px; color: #999; margin-top: 4px; } .control-panel { background: #fafafa; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; } .control-row { margin-bottom: 20px; &amp;amp;:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; } } .control-btn-group { display: flex; gap: 15px; } .brightness-control { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px; } .control-label { font-weight: 500; color: #666; } .brightness-slider { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; } .brightness-value { font-weight: 600; color: #1890ff; min-width: 60px; } .quick-buttons { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .data-table { width: 100%; } .brightness-dialog { padding: 20px 0; } .light-info { font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #333; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-22&quot;&gt;src/views/lighting/LightStatus.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/lighting/LightStatus.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;路灯实时状态&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;refreshData&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Refresh&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; 刷新数据 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stats-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-value online&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ onlineCount }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;在线&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-value offline&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ offlineCount }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;离线&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-value fault&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ faultCount }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;故障&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-value total&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ totalCount }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;总数&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;statusFilter&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;状态筛选&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;全部&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;开启&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;on&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;关闭&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;off&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;故障&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;fault&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;searchKeyword&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;搜索路灯名称或位置&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredData&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;data-table&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备编号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;路灯名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;location&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;安装位置&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;status&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(scope.row.status)&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getStatusText(scope.row.status) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;brightness&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;亮度(%)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-progress :percentage=&amp;quot;scope.row.brightness&amp;quot; :show-text=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;80&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;progress-text&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ scope.row.brightness }}%&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;power&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;功率(W)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lastUpdate&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;更新时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;viewDetail(scope.row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;详情&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;路灯详情&amp;quot; :visible.sync=&amp;quot;detailDialogVisible&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;500px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;selectedLight&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;detail-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备编号&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedLight.id }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;路灯名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedLight.name }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;安装位置&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedLight.location }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;当前状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(selectedLight.status)&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getStatusText(selectedLight.status) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;亮度&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-progress :percentage=&amp;quot;selectedLight.brightness&amp;quot; :show-text=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;功率&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedLight.power }}W&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;最后更新&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ selectedLight.lastUpdate }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Refresh } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { lightStatusData } from '@/data/mockData' const icons = { Refresh } const statusFilter = ref('') const searchKeyword = ref('') const detailDialogVisible = ref(false) const selectedLight = ref(null) const tableData = ref([...lightStatusData]) const totalCount = computed(() =&amp;gt; tableData.value.length) const onlineCount = computed(() =&amp;gt; tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.status === 'on').length) const offlineCount = computed(() =&amp;gt; tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.status === 'off').length) const faultCount = computed(() =&amp;gt; tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.status === 'fault').length) const filteredData = computed(() =&amp;gt; { return tableData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; { const statusMatch = !statusFilter.value || item.status === statusFilter.value const keywordMatch = !searchKeyword.value || item.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchKeyword.value.toLowerCase()) || item.location.toLowerCase().includes(searchKeyword.value.toLowerCase()) return statusMatch &amp;amp;&amp;amp; keywordMatch }) }) const getStatusTagType = (status) =&amp;gt; { switch (status) { case 'on': return 'success' case 'off': return 'info' case 'fault': return 'danger' default: return 'info' } } const getStatusText = (status) =&amp;gt; { switch (status) { case 'on': return '开启' case 'off': return '关闭' case 'fault': return '故障' default: return status } } const refreshData = () =&amp;gt; { tableData.value = [...lightStatusData] } const viewDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; { selectedLight.value = row detailDialogVisible.value = true } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .stats-card { display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .stat-item { flex: 1; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; color: #fff; } .stat-value { display: block; font-size: 32px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 5px; } .stat-label { font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.9; } .filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; justify-content: flex-end; } .filter-select { width: 150px; } .filter-input { width: 250px; } .data-table { width: 100%; } .progress-text { margin-left: 10px; font-size: 12px; color: #666; } .detail-content { padding: 10px 0; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-23&quot;&gt;src/views/lighting/LightingHome.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/lighting/LightingHome.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;快捷首页&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-date-picker v-model=&amp;quot;dateRange&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;daterange&amp;quot; range-separator=&amp;quot;至&amp;quot; start-placeholder=&amp;quot;开始日期&amp;quot; end-placeholder=&amp;quot;结束日期&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;margin-right: 10px;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;refreshData&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Refresh /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 刷新数据 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;statistics-row&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;6&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-icon blue&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Postcard /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-info&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ statistics.poleCount }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;灯杆总数&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;6&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-icon green&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Cpu /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-info&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ statistics.controllerCount }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;控制器数量&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;6&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-icon orange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Sunrise /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-info&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ statistics.lampCount }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;灯具总数&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;6&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-icon purple&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Timer /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-info&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ statistics.onlineRate }}%&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;在线率&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;statistics-row&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;能耗统计&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;energy-grid&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;energy-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;energy-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;昨日能耗&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;energy-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ energy.yesterday }} kWh&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;energy-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;energy-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;本周能耗&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;energy-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ energy.thisWeek }} kWh&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;energy-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;energy-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;本月能耗&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;energy-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ energy.thisMonth }} kWh&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;energy-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;energy-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;年度能耗&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;energy-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ energy.thisYear }} kWh&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;6&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;开关灯时间&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;time-info&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;time-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;time-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;开灯时间&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;time-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ switchTime.on }} &amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;time-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;time-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;关灯时间&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;time-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ switchTime.off }} &amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;6&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;亮灯率&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;rate-display&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-progress type=&amp;quot;dashboard&amp;quot; :percentage=&amp;quot;lightingRate&amp;quot; :width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; :stroke-width=&amp;quot;10&amp;quot; color=&amp;quot;#52c41a&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;rate-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ lightingRate }}%&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-progress&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;statistics-row&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;告警统计&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;8&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;alert-stat&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;alert-value today&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ alerts.today }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;alert-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;今日告警&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;8&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;alert-stat&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;alert-value recovered&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ alerts.recovered }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;alert-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;已恢复&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;8&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;alert-stat&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;alert-value continuing&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ alerts.continuing }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;alert-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;持续中&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;故障分析&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;fault-chart&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;fault-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;fault-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;通讯故障&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;bar-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;bar-fill comm&amp;quot; :style=&amp;quot;{ width: faultAnalysis.comm + '%' }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;fault-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ faultAnalysis.comm }}%&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;fault-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;fault-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;灯具故障&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;bar-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;bar-fill lamp&amp;quot; :style=&amp;quot;{ width: faultAnalysis.lamp + '%' }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;fault-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ faultAnalysis.lamp }}%&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;fault-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;fault-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;电源故障&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;bar-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;bar-fill power&amp;quot; :style=&amp;quot;{ width: faultAnalysis.power + '%' }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;fault-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ faultAnalysis.power }}%&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;fault-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;fault-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;其他故障&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;bar-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;bar-fill other&amp;quot; :style=&amp;quot;{ width: faultAnalysis.other + '%' }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;fault-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ faultAnalysis.other }}%&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, reactive } from 'vue' import { Refresh, Postcard, Cpu, Sunrise, Timer } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' const dateRange = ref([]) const lightingRate = ref(98.5) const statistics = reactive({ poleCount: 1256, controllerCount: 1256, lampCount: 2512, onlineRate: 99.2 }) const energy = reactive({ yesterday: 4521.8, thisWeek: 31652.6, thisMonth: 135862.4, thisYear: 1623458.8 }) const switchTime = reactive({ on: '18:30', off: '06:15' }) const alerts = reactive({ today: 12, recovered: 8, continuing: 4 }) const faultAnalysis = reactive({ comm: 35, lamp: 28, power: 22, other: 15 }) const refreshData = () =&amp;gt; { console.log('刷新数据') } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .statistics-row { margin-bottom: 20px; } .stat-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; } .stat-icon { width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 28px; } .stat-icon.blue { background: #e6f7ff; color: #1890ff; } .stat-icon.green { background: #f6ffed; color: #52c41a; } .stat-icon.orange { background: #fff7e6; color: #fa8c16; } .stat-icon.purple { background: #f9f0ff; color: #722ed1; } .stat-info { flex: 1; } .stat-value { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; line-height: 1.2; } .stat-label { font-size: 14px; color: #666; margin-top: 4px; } .chart-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); height: 200px; } .chart-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .energy-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 15px; } .energy-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 10px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; } .energy-label { font-size: 12px; color: #666; margin-bottom: 4px; } .energy-value { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1890ff; } .time-info { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px; padding-top: 10px; } .time-item { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 10px 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; } .time-label { font-size: 14px; color: #666; } .time-value { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #1890ff; } .rate-display { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 140px; } .rate-value { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600; color: #52c41a; } .alert-stat { text-align: center; padding: 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; } .alert-value { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 5px; } .alert-value.today { color: #fa8c16; } .alert-value.recovered { color: #52c41a; } .alert-value.continuing { color: #f5222d; } .alert-label { font-size: 14px; color: #666; } .fault-chart { padding-top: 10px; } .fault-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .fault-label { width: 70px; font-size: 13px; color: #666; } .bar-container { flex: 1; height: 20px; background: #f0f0f0; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; } .bar-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 4px; transition: width 0.3s; } .bar-fill.comm { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1890ff, #69c0ff); } .bar-fill.lamp { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #fa8c16, #ffbb40); } .bar-fill.power { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f5222d, #ff7875); } .bar-fill.other { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #722ed1, #b37feb); } .fault-value { width: 40px; text-align: right; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-24&quot;&gt;src/views/lighting/LightingStrategy.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/lighting/LightingStrategy.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;照明策略&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleBatchIssue&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;selectedRows.length === 0&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Promotion /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 批量下发 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;warning&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleBatchPause&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;selectedRows.length === 0&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;VideoPause /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 批量暂停 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;refreshData&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Refresh /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 刷新 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;main-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;left-sidebar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;sidebar-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;searchTreeText&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入层级名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;sidebar-search&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tree :data=&amp;quot;treeData&amp;quot; :props=&amp;quot;defaultProps&amp;quot; show-checkbox node-key=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; :expand-on-click-node=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot; @check-change=&amp;quot;handleCheckChange&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;right-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;filters.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入策略名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot; clearable &amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filters.type&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择策略类型&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot; clearable&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;定时策略&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;time&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;光感策略&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;light&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;手动策略&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;manual&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filters.status&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择执行状态&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot; clearable&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;未下发&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;not_issued&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;已下发&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;issued&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;暂停&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;paused&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;过期&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;expired&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;searchStrategies&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;resetFilters&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredStrategies&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;strategy-table&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleSelectionChange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;55&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;序号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;80&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;策略名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;策略类型&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getTypeTagType(row.type)&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getTypeText(row.type) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;executeTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;执行时间&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;status&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;执行状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(row.status)&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getStatusText(row.status) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;220&amp;quot; fixed=&amp;quot;right&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;success&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleIssue(row)&amp;quot; v-if=&amp;quot;row.status === 'not_issued'&amp;quot;&amp;gt;下发&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;warning&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handlePause(row)&amp;quot; v-if=&amp;quot;row.status === 'issued'&amp;quot;&amp;gt;暂停&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;info&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;viewDetail(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;详情&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot; :page-sizes=&amp;quot;[10, 20, 50, 100]&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper&amp;quot; @size-change=&amp;quot;handleSizeChange&amp;quot; @current-change=&amp;quot;handleCurrentChange&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog v-model=&amp;quot;detailVisible&amp;quot; title=&amp;quot;策略详情&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;600px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions v-if=&amp;quot;currentStrategy&amp;quot; :column=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; border&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;策略名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentStrategy.name }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;策略类型&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getTypeTagType(currentStrategy.type)&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getTypeText(currentStrategy.type) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;执行时间&amp;quot; :span=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentStrategy.executeTime }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;执行状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(currentStrategy.status)&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getStatusText(currentStrategy.status) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;描述&amp;quot; :span=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentStrategy.description }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;detailVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;关闭&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue' import { Refresh, Search, Promotion, VideoPause } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus' const searchTreeText = ref('') const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(10) const total = ref(0) const selectedRows = ref([]) const detailVisible = ref(false) const currentStrategy = ref(null) const filters = reactive({ name: '', type: '', status: '' }) const defaultProps = { children: 'children', label: 'label' } const treeData = ref([ { id: 1, label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 11, label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 111, label: '先导路' }, { id: 112, label: '力唯中天1栋' } ] } ] } ]) const strategies = ref([ { id: 1, no: 1, name: '城市主干道夜间照明', type: 'time', executeTime: '每日18:00-次日06:00', status: 'issued', description: '城市主干道夜间照明策略，亮度调节为70%' }, { id: 2, no: 2, name: '园区展厅照明', type: 'time', executeTime: '工作日08:00-22:00', status: 'issued', description: '园区展厅照明策略，营业时间全亮' }, { id: 3, no: 3, name: '园区照明光感控制', type: 'light', executeTime: '根据光线自动调节', status: 'paused', description: '根据光线强度自动开关灯，自动调节亮度' }, { id: 4, no: 4, name: '特殊活动照明', type: 'manual', executeTime: '手动控制', status: 'not_issued', description: '特殊活动时使用的照明策略' }, { id: 5, no: 5, name: '节假日照明', type: 'time', executeTime: '节假日全天', status: 'expired', description: '节假日照明策略' }, { id: 6, no: 6, name: '景观灯照明', type: 'time', executeTime: '每晚19:00-23:00', status: 'issued', description: '景观灯照明策略' }, { id: 7, no: 7, name: '地下车库照明', type: 'light', executeTime: '根据光线自动调节', status: 'issued', description: '地下车库照明策略' } ]) total.value = strategies.value.length const filteredStrategies = computed(() =&amp;gt; { let result = strategies.value if (filters.name) { result = result.filter(s =&amp;gt; s.name.includes(filters.name)) } if (filters.type) { result = result.filter(s =&amp;gt; s.type === filters.type) } if (filters.status) { result = result.filter(s =&amp;gt; s.status === filters.status) } return result }) const getTypeText = (type) =&amp;gt; { const map = { time: '定时策略', light: '光感策略', manual: '手动策略' } return map[type] || type } const getTypeTagType = (type) =&amp;gt; { const map = { time: 'primary', light: 'success', manual: 'warning' } return map[type] || '' } const getStatusText = (status) =&amp;gt; { const map = { not_issued: '未下发', issued: '已下发', paused: '暂停', expired: '过期' } return map[status] || status } const getStatusTagType = (status) =&amp;gt; { const map = { not_issued: 'info', issued: 'success', paused: 'warning', expired: 'danger' } return map[status] || '' } const handleCheckChange = (data, checked) =&amp;gt; { console.log('selected hierarchy:', data, checked) } const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const searchStrategies = () =&amp;gt; { currentPage.value = 1 ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const resetFilters = () =&amp;gt; { Object.assign(filters, { name: '', type: '', status: '' }) currentPage.value = 1 } const refreshData = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success('数据已刷新') } const viewDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; { currentStrategy.value = row detailVisible.value = true } const handleIssue = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要下发策略「${row.name}」吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'primary' }).then(() =&amp;gt; { row.status = 'issued' ElMessage.success(`策略「${row.name}」下发成功`) }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const handlePause = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要暂停策略「${row.name}」吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' }).then(() =&amp;gt; { row.status = 'paused' ElMessage.success(`策略「${row.name}」已暂停`) }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const handleBatchIssue = () =&amp;gt; { const notIssuedCount = selectedRows.value.filter(r =&amp;gt; r.status === 'not_issued').length if (notIssuedCount === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择未下发的策略') return } ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要批量下发选中的 ${notIssuedCount} 个策略吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'primary' }).then(() =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&amp;gt; { if (row.status === 'not_issued') { row.status = 'issued' } }) ElMessage.success(`已成功下发 ${notIssuedCount} 个策略`) }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const handleBatchPause = () =&amp;gt; { const issuedCount = selectedRows.value.filter(r =&amp;gt; r.status === 'issued').length if (issuedCount === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择已下发的策略') return } ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要批量暂停选中的 ${issuedCount} 个策略吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' }).then(() =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&amp;gt; { if (row.status === 'issued') { row.status = 'paused' } }) ElMessage.success(`已成功暂停 ${issuedCount} 个策略`) }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const handleSizeChange = (val) =&amp;gt; { pageSize.value = val } const handleCurrentChange = (val) =&amp;gt; { currentPage.value = val } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { padding: 20px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .page-header .title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; } .main-content { display: flex; gap: 20px; } .left-sidebar { width: 200px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); padding: 15px; flex-shrink: 0; } .sidebar-header { margin-bottom: 15px; } .right-content { flex: 1; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .filter-select { width: 150px; } .strategy-table { margin-bottom: 20px; } .pagination-wrapper { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-25&quot;&gt;src/views/lighting/StrategyManage.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/lighting/StrategyManage.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;策略管理&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Plus /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 新增策略 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;strategies&amp;quot; border style=&amp;quot;width: 100%; margin-top: 20px;&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;策略名称&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;策略类型&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getTypeTag(row.type)&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getTypeText(row.type) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;action&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;执行动作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getActionTag(row.action)&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getActionText(row.action) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;startDate&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;开始日期&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;endDate&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;结束日期&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;deviceCount&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;关联设备数&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;enabled&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;80&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-switch v-model=&amp;quot;row.enabled&amp;quot; @change=&amp;quot;toggleStrategy(row)&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;description&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;描述&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;200&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;200&amp;quot; fixed=&amp;quot;right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;editStrategy(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt; 修改 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;info&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;viewDetail(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt; 详情 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;deleteStrategy(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt; 删除 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog v-model=&amp;quot;dialogVisible&amp;quot; :title=&amp;quot;isEdit ? '修改策略' : '新增策略'&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;700px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;form&amp;quot; :rules=&amp;quot;rules&amp;quot; ref=&amp;quot;formRef&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;策略名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入策略名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;策略类型&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;form.type&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择策略类型&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot; @change=&amp;quot;onTypeChange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;时间执行&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;time&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;经纬度执行&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;coordinate&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;计时执行&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;timer&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;form.type === 'time'&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;type-form&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;执行动作&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;action&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio-group v-model=&amp;quot;form.action&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;on&amp;quot;&amp;gt;开灯&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;off&amp;quot;&amp;gt;关灯&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;dim&amp;quot;&amp;gt;调光&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-radio-group&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item v-if=&amp;quot;form.action === 'dim'&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;亮度值&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;brightness&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-slider v-model=&amp;quot;form.brightness&amp;quot; :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; :max=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; show-input /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;执行时间&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;executeTime&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-time-picker v-model=&amp;quot;form.executeTime&amp;quot; format=&amp;quot;HH:mm&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择时间&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;重复日期&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;repeatDays&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox-group v-model=&amp;quot;form.repeatDays&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周一&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周二&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;3&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周三&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;4&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周四&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;5&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周五&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;6&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周六&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周日&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-checkbox-group&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;form.type === 'coordinate'&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;type-form&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;执行动作&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;action&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio-group v-model=&amp;quot;form.action&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;on&amp;quot;&amp;gt;开灯&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;off&amp;quot;&amp;gt;关灯&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;dim&amp;quot;&amp;gt;调光&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-radio-group&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item v-if=&amp;quot;form.action === 'dim'&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;亮度值&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;brightness&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-slider v-model=&amp;quot;form.brightness&amp;quot; :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; :max=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; show-input /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;纬度&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;latitude&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input-number v-model=&amp;quot;form.latitude&amp;quot; :precision=&amp;quot;6&amp;quot; :step=&amp;quot;0.000001&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;经度&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;longitude&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input-number v-model=&amp;quot;form.longitude&amp;quot; :precision=&amp;quot;6&amp;quot; :step=&amp;quot;0.000001&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;日出/日落&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio-group v-model=&amp;quot;form.sunEvent&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;sunrise&amp;quot;&amp;gt;日出执行&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;sunset&amp;quot;&amp;gt;日落执行&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-radio-group&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;偏移时间&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;offset&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input-number v-model=&amp;quot;form.offset&amp;quot; :step=&amp;quot;10&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 200px;&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #append&amp;gt;分钟&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input-number&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;form.type === 'timer'&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;type-form&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;执行动作&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;action&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio-group v-model=&amp;quot;form.action&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;on&amp;quot;&amp;gt;开灯&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;off&amp;quot;&amp;gt;关灯&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio label=&amp;quot;dim&amp;quot;&amp;gt;调光&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-radio-group&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item v-if=&amp;quot;form.action === 'dim'&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;亮度值&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;brightness&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-slider v-model=&amp;quot;form.brightness&amp;quot; :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; :max=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; show-input /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;间隔时长&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;interval&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input-number v-model=&amp;quot;form.interval&amp;quot; :min=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 200px;&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #append&amp;gt;分钟&amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input-number&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;开始时间&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;startTime&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-time-picker v-model=&amp;quot;form.startTime&amp;quot; format=&amp;quot;HH:mm&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择开始时间&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;结束时间&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;endTime&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-time-picker v-model=&amp;quot;form.endTime&amp;quot; format=&amp;quot;HH:mm&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择结束时间&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;开始日期&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;startDate&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-date-picker v-model=&amp;quot;form.startDate&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;date&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择开始日期&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;结束日期&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;endDate&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-date-picker v-model=&amp;quot;form.endDate&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;date&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择结束日期&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;关联设备&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;devices&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;form.devices&amp;quot; multiple placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择关联设备&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;中山路01号灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;中山路02号灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;人民路01号灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;3&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;人民路02号灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;4&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;解放路01号灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;5&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;解放路02号灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;6&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;描述&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.description&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;textarea&amp;quot; :rows=&amp;quot;3&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入策略描述&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;dialogVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;submitForm&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog v-model=&amp;quot;detailVisible&amp;quot; title=&amp;quot;策略详情&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;600px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions v-if=&amp;quot;currentStrategy&amp;quot; :column=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; border&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;策略名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentStrategy.name }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;策略类型&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getTypeTag(currentStrategy.type)&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getTypeText(currentStrategy.type) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;执行动作&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getActionTag(currentStrategy.action)&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getActionText(currentStrategy.action) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;关联设备数&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentStrategy.deviceCount }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;开始日期&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentStrategy.startDate }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;结束日期&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentStrategy.endDate }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;currentStrategy.enabled ? 'success' : 'info'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ currentStrategy.enabled ? '已启用' : '已禁用' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;描述&amp;quot; :span=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentStrategy.description }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;detailVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;关闭&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, reactive } from 'vue' import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus' const dialogVisible = ref(false) const detailVisible = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const formRef = ref(null) const currentStrategy = ref(null) const strategies = ref([ { id: 1, name: '夜间节能模式', type: 'time', action: 'dim', brightness: 60, executeTime: '18:00', repeatDays: ['1','2','3','4','5'], deviceCount: 50, enabled: true, startDate: '2024-01-01', endDate: '2024-12-31', description: '工作日夜间降低亮度至60%' }, { id: 2, name: '全夜亮灯模式', type: 'time', action: 'on', brightness: 100, executeTime: '18:00', repeatDays: ['0','6'], deviceCount: 30, enabled: true, startDate: '2024-01-01', endDate: '2024-12-31', description: '周末全天保持全亮' }, { id: 3, name: '日出日落策略', type: 'coordinate', action: 'dim', brightness: 80, latitude: 31.230416, longitude: 121.473701, sunEvent: 'sunset', offset: 0, deviceCount: 100, enabled: true, startDate: '2024-01-01', endDate: '2024-12-31', description: '根据经纬度自动开关灯' }, { id: 4, name: '深夜间隔调光', type: 'timer', action: 'dim', brightness: 40, interval: 30, startTime: '23:00', endTime: '05:00', deviceCount: 20, enabled: false, startDate: '2024-01-01', endDate: '2024-12-31', description: '深夜每30分钟调光一次' }, { id: 5, name: '节假日庆典', type: 'time', action: 'on', brightness: 100, executeTime: '18:00', repeatDays: ['0','6'], deviceCount: 80, enabled: true, startDate: '2024-02-01', endDate: '2024-02-29', description: '节假日期间全亮模式' }, { id: 6, name: '故障后恢复', type: 'coordinate', action: 'on', brightness: 100, latitude: 31.230416, longitude: 121.473701, sunEvent: 'sunrise', offset: 0, deviceCount: 50, enabled: true, startDate: '2024-01-01', endDate: '2024-12-31', description: '日出时自动恢复所有灯具' } ]) const form = reactive({ name: '', type: 'time', action: 'on', brightness: 100, executeTime: '', repeatDays: [], latitude: 31.230416, longitude: 121.473701, sunEvent: 'sunset', offset: 0, interval: 30, startTime: '', endTime: '', startDate: '', endDate: '', devices: [], description: '' }) const rules = { name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入策略名称', trigger: 'blur' }], type: [{ required: true, message: '请选择策略类型', trigger: 'change' }], action: [{ required: true, message: '请选择执行动作', trigger: 'change' }] } const getTypeText = (type) =&amp;gt; { const map = { 'time': '时间执行', 'coordinate': '经纬度执行', 'timer': '计时执行' } return map[type] || type } const getTypeTag = (type) =&amp;gt; { const map = { 'time': '', 'coordinate': 'success', 'timer': 'warning' } return map[type] || '' } const getActionText = (action) =&amp;gt; { const map = { 'on': '开灯', 'off': '关灯', 'dim': '调光' } return map[action] || action } const getActionTag = (action) =&amp;gt; { const map = { 'on': 'success', 'off': 'warning', 'dim': '' } return map[action] || '' } const onTypeChange = () =&amp;gt; { form.action = 'on' form.brightness = 100 } const showAddDialog = () =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = false resetForm() dialogVisible.value = true } const editStrategy = (row) =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = true Object.assign(form, row) dialogVisible.value = true } const viewDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; { currentStrategy.value = row detailVisible.value = true } const deleteStrategy = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要删除策略&amp;quot;${row.name}&amp;quot;吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' }).then(() =&amp;gt; { const index = strategies.value.findIndex(s =&amp;gt; s.id === row.id) if (index &amp;gt; -1) { strategies.value.splice(index, 1) ElMessage.success('删除成功') } }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const toggleStrategy = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success(`策略&amp;quot;${row.name}&amp;quot;已${row.enabled ? '启用' : '禁用'}`) } const submitForm = () =&amp;gt; { formRef.value.validate((valid) =&amp;gt; { if (valid) { if (isEdit.value) { ElMessage.success('策略修改成功') } else { const newId = Math.max(...strategies.value.map(s =&amp;gt; s.id)) + 1 strategies.value.push({ id: newId, ...form, deviceCount: form.devices.length, enabled: true }) ElMessage.success('策略创建成功') } dialogVisible.value = false } }) } const resetForm = () =&amp;gt; { Object.assign(form, { name: '', type: 'time', action: 'on', brightness: 100, executeTime: '', repeatDays: [], latitude: 31.230416, longitude: 121.473701, sunEvent: 'sunset', offset: 0, interval: 30, startTime: '', endTime: '', startDate: '', endDate: '', devices: [], description: '' }) } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .action-toolbar { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .type-form { padding: 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 20px; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-26&quot;&gt;src/views/lighting/TimingStrategy.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/lighting/TimingStrategy.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;时序策略&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;addStrategy&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Plus&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; 新增策略 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;strategyList&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;data-table&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;策略编号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;策略名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;startTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;开始时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;endTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;结束时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;brightness&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;亮度(%)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-progress :percentage=&amp;quot;scope.row.brightness&amp;quot; :show-text=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;80&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;enabled&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-switch :value=&amp;quot;scope.row.enabled&amp;quot; @change=&amp;quot;toggleEnable(scope.row)&amp;quot; active-color=&amp;quot;#13ce66&amp;quot; inactive-color=&amp;quot;#ff4949&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;createTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;创建时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;editStrategy(scope.row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;编辑&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;deleteStrategy(scope.row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog :title=&amp;quot;editDialogTitle&amp;quot; :visible.sync=&amp;quot;dialogVisible&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;500px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;策略名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入策略名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;开始时间&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;startTime&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-time-picker v-model=&amp;quot;formData.startTime&amp;quot; format=&amp;quot;HH:mm&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择开始时间&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;结束时间&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;endTime&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-time-picker v-model=&amp;quot;formData.endTime&amp;quot; format=&amp;quot;HH:mm&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择结束时间&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;亮度&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;brightness&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-slider v-model=&amp;quot;formData.brightness&amp;quot; :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; :max=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; :step=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot; show-input /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;dialogVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;saveStrategy&amp;quot;&amp;gt;保存&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Plus, Edit, Delete } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { timingStrategies } from '@/data/mockData' const icons = { Plus, Edit, Delete } const strategyList = ref([...timingStrategies]) const dialogVisible = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const formData = ref({ id: '', name: '', startTime: '', endTime: '', brightness: 80, enabled: true, createTime: '' }) const editDialogTitle = computed(() =&amp;gt; isEdit.value ? '编辑策略' : '新增策略') const addStrategy = () =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = false formData.value = { id: '', name: '', startTime: '', endTime: '', brightness: 80, enabled: true, createTime: '' } dialogVisible.value = true } const editStrategy = (row) =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = true formData.value = { ...row } dialogVisible.value = true } const deleteStrategy = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( '确定要删除该策略吗？', '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&amp;gt; { const index = strategyList.value.findIndex(s =&amp;gt; s.id === row.id) if (index &amp;gt; -1) { strategyList.value.splice(index, 1) } ElMessage.success('删除成功') }).catch(() =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.info('已取消删除') }) } const toggleEnable = (row) =&amp;gt; { row.enabled = !row.enabled } const saveStrategy = () =&amp;gt; { if (!formData.value.name || !formData.value.startTime || !formData.value.endTime) { ElMessage.warning('请填写完整信息') return } if (isEdit.value) { const index = strategyList.value.findIndex(s =&amp;gt; s.id === formData.value.id) if (index &amp;gt; -1) { strategyList.value[index] = { ...formData.value } } ElMessage.success('修改成功') } else { const newId = 'T' + String(strategyList.value.length + 1).padStart(3, '0') strategyList.value.push({ ...formData.value, id: newId, createTime: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }) ElMessage.success('新增成功') } dialogVisible.value = false } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .data-table { width: 100%; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-27&quot;&gt;src/views/power/CentralControl.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/power/CentralControl.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = true&amp;quot;&amp;gt;新增&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button&amp;gt;更多操作&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;main-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt;
