:class=&amp;quot;row.levelClass&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;{{ row.level }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;告警类型&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;occurTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;告警发生时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;duration&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;持续时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;recoverTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;告警恢复时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;description&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;告警描述&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;250&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;status&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;告警状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ row.status }}&amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tabs&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog v-model=&amp;quot;showAddDialog&amp;quot; title=&amp;quot;新增集控设备&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;550px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;form&amp;quot; :rules=&amp;quot;rules&amp;quot; ref=&amp;quot;formRef&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;120px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入设备名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备编号&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;code&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.code&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入设备编号&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;MAC地址&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;mac&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.mac&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入MAC地址，如：00-14-97-38-DD-D2&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;IP地址&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;ip&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.ip&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入IP地址，如：10.80.91.139&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;所属配电柜&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;cabinetId&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;form.cabinetId&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择所属配电柜&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;先导路1号配电柜&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;先导路2号配电柜&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋1号配电柜&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;3&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋2号配电柜&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;4&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;设备型号&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;model&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;form.model&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择设备型号&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;EXC-GLA0605E-P20&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;EXC-GLA0605E-P20&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;G420A路灯网关-Pro&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;G420A&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;备注&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.remark&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;textarea&amp;quot; :rows=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入备注&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;submitForm&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, reactive } from 'vue' import { Search, Plus, Refresh, Delete, DataLine, TrendCharts, Grid } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { =&amp;gt; { showDetailDialog.value = true } const submitForm = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success('新增成功') showAddDialog.value = false } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; } .page-header .title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; } .header-right { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .main-content { flex: 1; display: flex; gap: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .left-panel { width: 200px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; } .panel-header { padding: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .right-panel { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; } .device-list-panel { flex: 1; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); padding: 15px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; } .filter-bar { margin-bottom: 15px; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .detail-content { padding: 10px 0; } .detail-tabs { margin-top: 10px; } .basic-info-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 15px; padding: 15px 0; } .info-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .info-label { font-weight: 500; color: #333; min-width: 90px; } .info-value { color: #666; } .info-btn { margin-left: 8px; } .circuit-control-panel { padding: 10px 0; } .circuit-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; } .update-time { color: #666; font-size: 13px; } .circuit-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; } .module-info-panel { padding: 10px 0; } .energy-stat-panel { padding: 10px 0; } .energy-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; } .chart-type-btns { display: flex; gap: 5px; } .energy-chart-placeholder { border: 1px solid #e8e8e8; border-radius: 4px; padding: 20px; height: 350px; } .chart-tabs { display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-left: 60px; } .chart-tab { padding: 5px 10px; cursor: pointer; color: #666; } .chart-tab.active { color: #409eff; border-bottom: 2px solid #409eff; } .chart-area { display: flex; height: 260px; } .chart-y-axis { width: 50px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; color: #999; font-size: 12px; } .chart-main { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-end; } .chart-x-axis { display: flex; justify-content: space-around; color: #999; font-size: 12px; border-top: 1px solid #e8e8e8; padding-top: 10px; } .alarm-info-panel { padding: 10px 0; } .alarm-level-dot { display: inline-block; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #409eff; margin-right: 6px; } .alarm-level-dot.info { background: #409eff; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-28&quot;&gt;src/views/power/CircuitControl.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/power/CircuitControl.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;main-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;left-panel&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;panel-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;panel-tabs&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;tab active&amp;quot;&amp;gt;设备&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;tab&amp;quot;&amp;gt;分组&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;search-box&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;deviceSearch&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入设备名称查询&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;search-input&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;device-tree&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tree :data=&amp;quot;deviceTreeData&amp;quot; :props=&amp;quot;defaultProps&amp;quot; show-checkbox node-key=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; :expand-on-click-node=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot; @check-change=&amp;quot;handleDeviceCheck&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;right-panel&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;panel-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-left&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;batchControl('on')&amp;quot;&amp;gt;全开&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;batchControl('off')&amp;quot;&amp;gt;全关&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filters.product&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择所属产品&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;全部产品&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;电信CAT1&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;cat1&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;EXC-CAT1&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;exc&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filters.networkStatus&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择网络状态&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;全部状态&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;在线&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;online&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;离线&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;offline&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filters.switchStatus&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择开关状态&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;全部状态&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;开&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;on&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;关&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;off&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;filters.search&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入回路/模块名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;searchCircuits&amp;quot;&amp;gt;搜索&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;resetFilters&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredCircuits&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;circuit-table&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleSelectionChange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;45&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;60&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;deviceName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;circuitName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;回路名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;moduleName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;模块名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;switchStatus&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;开关状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.switchStatus === 'on' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.switchStatus === 'on' ? '开' : '关' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;reportTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;上报时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;networkStatus&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;网络状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lastOnline&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;最后在线时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;开关记录&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;viewSwitchLog(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查看&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;success&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;controlCircuit(row, 'on')&amp;quot;&amp;gt;开&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;controlCircuit(row, 'off')&amp;quot;&amp;gt;关&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot; :page-sizes=&amp;quot;[15, 30, 50, 100]&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&amp;gt;, sizes, total&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog v-model=&amp;quot;showLogDialog&amp;quot; title=&amp;quot;开关记录&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;800px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;log-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;log-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;log-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentCircuit?.deviceName }} - {{ currentCircuit?.circuitName }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;switchLogs&amp;quot; border size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;序号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;60&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;operator&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;操作人&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;action&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;操作类型&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.action === 'on' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.action === 'on' ? '打开' : '关闭' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;operateTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;操作时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;result&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;执行结果&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.result === 'success' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.result === 'success' ? '成功' : '失败' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;remark&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;备注&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;log-pagination&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;logPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;logPageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;logTotal&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;prev, pager, next, total&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue' import { Search } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus' const deviceSearch = ref('') const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(15) const total = ref(0) const selectedRows = ref([]) const showLogDialog = ref(false) const currentCircuit = ref(null) const logPage = ref(1) const logPageSize = ref(10) const logTotal = ref(0) const defaultProps = { children: 'children', label: 'label' } const filters = reactive({ product: '', networkStatus: '', switchStatus: '', search: '' }) const deviceTreeData = ref([ { id: 'root', label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 'district', label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 'xiandao', label: '先导路', children: [ { id: 'device-1', label: '先导路集控1', deviceId: 1 }, { id: 'device-2', label: '先导路集控2', deviceId: 2 } ] }, { id: 'liwei', label: '力唯中天1栋', children: [ { id: 'device-3', label: '力唯中天集控1', deviceId: 3 }, { id: 'device-4', label: '力唯中天集控2', deviceId: 4 } ] } ] } ] } ]) const circuits = ref([ { id: 1, no: 1, deviceName: '先导路集控1', circuitName: '内置回路1', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:30:00' }, { id: 2, no: 2, deviceName: '先导路集控1', circuitName: '内置回路2', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:30:00' }, { id: 3, no: 3, deviceName: '先导路集控1', circuitName: '内置回路3', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: 'on', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:30:00' }, { id: 4, no: 4, deviceName: '先导路集控1', circuitName: '内置回路4', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:30:00' }, { id: 5, no: 5, deviceName: '先导路集控1', circuitName: '内置回路5', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:30:00' }, { id: 6, no: 6, deviceName: '先导路集控1', circuitName: '内置回路6', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:30:00' }, { id: 7, no: 7, deviceName: '先导路集控2', circuitName: '回路1', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'on', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:28:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:28:00' }, { id: 8, no: 8, deviceName: '先导路集控2', circuitName: '回路2', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'on', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:28:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:28:00' }, { id: 9, no: 9, deviceName: '先导路集控2', circuitName: '回路3', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:28:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:28:00' }, { id: 10, no: 10, deviceName: '力唯中天集控1', circuitName: '交流接触器01', moduleName: 'EXC_10_1', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 09:15:14', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 09:15:00' }, { id: 11, no: 11, deviceName: '力唯中天集控1', circuitName: '交流接触器02', moduleName: 'EXC_10_1', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 09:15:14', networkStatus: 'offline', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 09:15:00' }, { id: 12, no: 12, deviceName: '力唯中天集控2', circuitName: '回路1', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'on', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:32:00' }, { id: 13, no: 13, deviceName: '力唯中天集控2', circuitName: '回路2', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:32:00' }, { id: 14, no: 14, deviceName: '力唯中天集控2', circuitName: '回路3', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'on', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:32:00' }, { id: 15, no: 15, deviceName: '力唯中天集控2', circuitName: '回路4', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', switchStatus: 'off', reportTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:14', networkStatus: 'online', lastOnline: '2026-05-14 10:32:00' } ]) total.value = circuits.value.length const switchLogs = ref([ { no: 1, operator: 'admin', action: 'on', operateTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:00', result: 'success', remark: '定时任务执行' }, { no: 2, operator: 'operator', action: 'off', operateTime: '2026-05-14 06:00:00', result: 'success', remark: '定时任务执行' }, { no: 3, operator: 'admin', action: 'on', operateTime: '2026-05-13 18:00:00', result: 'success', remark: '定时任务执行' }, { no: 4, operator: 'operator', action: 'off', operateTime: '2026-05-13 06:00:00', result: 'success', remark: '定时任务执行' }, { no: 5, operator: 'admin', action: 'on', operateTime: '2026-05-12 18:00:00', result: 'success', remark: '手动操作' } ]) logTotal.value = switchLogs.value.length const filteredCircuits = computed(() =&amp;gt; { let result = circuits.value if (filters.product) result = result.filter(c =&amp;gt; c.deviceName.includes(filters.product)) if (filters.networkStatus) result = result.filter(c =&amp;gt; c.networkStatus === filters.networkStatus) if (filters.switchStatus) result = result.filter(c =&amp;gt; c.switchStatus === filters.switchStatus) if (filters.search) result = result.filter(c =&amp;gt; c.circuitName.includes(filters.search) || c.moduleName.includes(filters.search)) return result }) const handleDeviceCheck = (data, checked) =&amp;gt; { console.log('Device checked:', data, checked) } const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const searchCircuits = () =&amp;gt; { currentPage.value = 1 ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const resetFilters = () =&amp;gt; { Object.assign(filters, { product: '', networkStatus: '', switchStatus: '', search: '' }) currentPage.value = 1 } const controlCircuit = (row, action) =&amp;gt; { if (row.networkStatus === 'offline') { ElMessage.warning('设备离线，无法操作') return } row.switchStatus = action const actionText = action === 'on' ? '打开' : '关闭' ElMessage.success(`${row.circuitName}已${actionText}`) } const batchControl = (action) =&amp;gt; { if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请先选择要操作的回路') return } selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&amp;gt; { if (row.networkStatus === 'online') { row.switchStatus = action } }) const actionText = action === 'on' ? '全开' : '全关' ElMessage.success(`已执行${actionText}`) } const viewSwitchLog = (row) =&amp;gt; { currentCircuit.value = row showLogDialog.value = true } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .main-content { flex: 1; display: flex; gap: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .left-panel { width: 200px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0; } .panel-header { padding: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; background: #fafafa; } .panel-tabs { display: flex; gap: 15px; } .tab { cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px; color: #666; padding-bottom: 8px; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; } .tab.active { color: #1890ff; border-bottom-color: #1890ff; } .search-box { padding: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .search-input { width: 100%; } .device-tree { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 10px; } .right-panel { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0; } .header-left { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; padding: 15px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); margin-bottom: 15px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-select { width: 150px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .circuit-table { flex: 1; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); overflow: auto; min-width: 0; } :deep(.circuit-table .el-table) { min-width: 100%; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .log-content { padding: 10px 0; } .log-header { margin-bottom: 15px; } .log-title { font-weight: 600; color: #333; } .log-pagination { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt;&lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-29&quot;&gt;src/views/power/CircuitData.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/power/CircuitData.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;回路用电数据&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;selectedBox&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择配电箱&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;box-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;全部&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option v-for=&amp;quot;box in boxes&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;box.id&amp;quot; :label=&amp;quot;box.name&amp;quot; :value=&amp;quot;box.id&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;circuit-stats&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-icon&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Electricity&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-info&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ totalPower.toFixed(1) }} kW&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;总功率&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-icon&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Battery&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-info&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ totalEnergy }} kWh&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;总用电量&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-icon&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Gauge&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;stat-info&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ avgPowerFactor.toFixed(2) }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;stat-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;平均功率因数&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredCircuits&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;data-table&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;回路编号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;回路名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;boxId&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;所属配电箱&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getBoxName(scope.row.boxId) }} &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;power&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;功率(W)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;energy&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;用电量(kWh)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;voltage&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;电压(V)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;current&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;电流(A)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;powerFactor&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;功率因数&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;功率因数状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getPowerFactorTag(scope.row.powerFactor)&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getPowerFactorText(scope.row.powerFactor) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Lightning, Tools, Cpu } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { circuitData, distributionBoxes } from '@/data/mockData' const icons = { Electricity: Lightning, Battery: Tools, Gauge: Cpu } const selectedBox = ref('') const circuits = ref([...circuitData]) const boxes = ref([...distributionBoxes]) const filteredCircuits = computed(() =&amp;gt; { if (!selectedBox.value) return circuits.value return circuits.value.filter(c =&amp;gt; c.boxId === selectedBox.value) }) const totalPower = computed(() =&amp;gt; { return filteredCircuits.value.reduce((sum, c) =&amp;gt; sum + c.power, 0) / 1000 }) const totalEnergy = computed(() =&amp;gt; { return filteredCircuits.value.reduce((sum, c) =&amp;gt; sum + c.energy, 0) }) const avgPowerFactor = computed(() =&amp;gt; { const count = filteredCircuits.value.length if (count === 0) return 0 return filteredCircuits.value.reduce((sum, c) =&amp;gt; sum + c.powerFactor, 0) / count }) const getBoxName = (boxId) =&amp;gt; { const box = boxes.value.find(b =&amp;gt; b.id === boxId) return box ? box.name : boxId } const getPowerFactorTag = (pf) =&amp;gt; { if (pf &amp;gt;= 0.95) return 'success' if (pf &amp;gt;= 0.9) return 'warning' return 'danger' } const getPowerFactorText = (pf) =&amp;gt; { if (pf &amp;gt;= 0.95) return '优秀' if (pf &amp;gt;= 0.9) return '良好' return '需优化' } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .circuit-stats { display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .stat-card { flex: 1; background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; } .stat-icon { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #fff; font-size: 24px; } .stat-info { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .stat-value { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600; color: #333; } .stat-label { font-size: 14px; color: #666; } .box-select { width: 200px; } .data-table { width: 100%; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-30&quot;&gt;src/views/power/CircuitGroup.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/power/CircuitGroup.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleAdd&amp;quot;&amp;gt;新增&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;selectedRows.length === 0&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleBatchDelete&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;content-area&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;searchKeyword&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入分组名称查询&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSearch&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleReset&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredGroups&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;group-table&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleSelectionChange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;60&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;groupName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;分组名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;200&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;deviceCount&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;关联设备数&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;creator&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;创建人&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;remark&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;备注&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;300&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; fixed=&amp;quot;right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleBatchOn(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;全开&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleBatchOff(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;全关&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;warning&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleEdit(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;修改&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleDelete(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot; :page-sizes=&amp;quot;[10, 15, 20, 50, 100]&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&amp;gt;, sizes, total&amp;quot; &amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-pagination&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;!-- 新增/编辑分组对话框 --&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog :title=&amp;quot;dialogTitle&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;900px&amp;quot; :close-on-click-modal=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;groupForm&amp;quot; :rules=&amp;quot;groupRules&amp;quot; ref=&amp;quot;groupFormRef&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;8&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;分组名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;groupName&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;groupForm.groupName&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入分组名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;8&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;所属层级&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;level&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;groupForm.level&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择所属层级&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;长沙&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;岳麓区&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;先导路&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;3&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;力唯中天1栋&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;4&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;力唯中天2栋&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;5&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;8&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;分组备注&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;remark&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;groupForm.remark&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入分组备注&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;circuit-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;select-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;select-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;可选回路&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;leftSearch&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入回路名称&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 180px; margin-right: 10px;&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleLeftSearch&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleLeftReset&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;leftCircuits&amp;quot; border style=&amp;quot;margin-top: 10px;&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleLeftSelection&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;circuitName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;回路名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;centralControl&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;所属集控&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination :current-page=&amp;quot;leftPage&amp;quot; :page-size=&amp;quot;10&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;leftTotal&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;prev, pager, next&amp;quot; @current-change=&amp;quot;handleLeftPageChange&amp;quot; &amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-pagination&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;transfer-buttons&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; icon=&amp;quot;ArrowRight&amp;quot; circle @click=&amp;quot;handleMoveRight&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;leftSelected.length === 0&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; icon=&amp;quot;ArrowLeft&amp;quot; circle @click=&amp;quot;handleMoveLeft&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;rightSelected.length === 0&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;margin-top: 10px;&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;10&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;circuit-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;select-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;select-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;已选回路&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;rightSearch&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入回路名称&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 180px; margin-right: 10px;&amp;quot; disabled&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;selectedCircuits&amp;quot; border style=&amp;quot;margin-top: 10px;&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleRightSelection&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;circuitName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;回路名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;centralControl&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;所属集控&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;empty-tip&amp;quot; v-if=&amp;quot;selectedCircuits.length === 0&amp;quot;&amp;gt; 暂无数据 &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleDialogClose&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSubmit&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Search, ArrowRight, ArrowLeft } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus' const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(15) const total = ref(2) const searchKeyword = ref('') const showDialog = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const leftPage = ref(1) const leftTotal = ref(40) const leftSearch = ref('') const rightSearch = ref('') const selectedRows = ref([]) const leftSelected = ref([]) const rightSelected = ref([]) const groupFormRef = ref(null) const groupForm = ref({ groupName: '', level: '', remark: '' }) const groupRules = { groupName: [{ required: true, message: '请输入分组名称', trigger: 'blur' }], level: [{ required: true, message: '请选择所属层级', trigger: 'change' }] } const dialogTitle = computed(() =&amp;gt; isEdit.value ? '编辑' : '新增') const circuitGroups = ref([ { no: 1, groupName: '隔一亮一组', deviceCount: 8, creator: 'test08', remark: '', circuits: [ { no: 1, circuitName: '内置回路1', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 2, circuitName: '内置回路2', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 3, circuitName: '内置回路3', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 4, circuitName: '内置回路4', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 5, circuitName: '内置回路5', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 6, circuitName: '内置回路6', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 7, circuitName: '回路1', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 8, circuitName: '回路2', centralControl: '测试128M' } ] }, { no: 2, groupName: '隔一亮一B组', deviceCount: 0, creator: 'admin', remark: '不可更改', circuits: [] } ]) const selectedCircuits = ref([]) const allCircuits = ref([ { no: 1, circuitName: '内置回路1', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 2, circuitName: '内置回路2', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 3, circuitName: '内置回路3', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 4, circuitName: '内置回路4', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 5, circuitName: '内置回路5', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 6, circuitName: '内置回路6', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 7, circuitName: '回路1', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 8, circuitName: '回路2', centralControl: '测试128M' }, { no: 9, circuitName: '回路3', centralControl: '先导路集控1' }, { no: 10, circuitName: '回路4', centralControl: '先导路集控1' }, { no: 11, circuitName: '回路5', centralControl: '先导路集控2' }, { no: 12, circuitName: '回路6', centralControl: '先导路集控2' } ]) const leftCircuits = computed(() =&amp;gt; { const start = (leftPage.value - 1) * 10 const end = start + 10 let result = allCircuits.value.filter(c =&amp;gt; !selectedCircuits.value.some(sc =&amp;gt; sc.no === c.no) ) if (leftSearch.value) { result = result.filter(c =&amp;gt; c.circuitName.includes(leftSearch.value) || c.centralControl.includes(leftSearch.value) ) } return result.slice(start, end) }) const filteredGroups = computed(() =&amp;gt; { if (!searchKeyword.value) return circuitGroups.value return circuitGroups.value.filter(g =&amp;gt; g.groupName.includes(searchKeyword.value)) }) const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const handleLeftSelection = (selection) =&amp;gt; { leftSelected.value = selection } const handleRightSelection = (selection) =&amp;gt; { rightSelected.value = selection } const handleSearch = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const handleReset = () =&amp;gt; { searchKeyword.value = '' ElMessage.info('已重置') } const handleAdd = () =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = false selectedCircuits.value = [] groupForm.value = { groupName: '', level: '', remark: '' } showDialog.value = true } const handleEdit = (row) =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = true groupForm.value = { groupName: row.groupName, level: '1', remark: row.remark } selectedCircuits.value = [...row.circuits] showDialog.value = true } const handleDelete = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要删除分组【${row.groupName}】吗？`, '删除确认', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&amp;gt; { circuitGroups.value = circuitGroups.value.filter(g =&amp;gt; g.no !== row.no) total.value-- ElMessage.success('删除成功') }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const handleBatchDelete = () =&amp;gt; { if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要删除的分组') return } ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要删除选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个分组吗？`, '批量删除确认', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&amp;gt; { const ids = selectedRows.value.map(r =&amp;gt; r.no) circuitGroups.value = circuitGroups.value.filter(g =&amp;gt; !ids.includes(g.no)) total.value -= selectedRows.value.length selectedRows.value = [] ElMessage.success('批量删除成功') }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const handleBatchOn = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要对分组【${row.groupName}】内的所有回路执行&amp;quot;全开&amp;quot;操作吗？`, '批量控制', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success(`分组【${row.groupName}】内的 ${row.deviceCount} 个回路已全部开启`) }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const handleBatchOff = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要对分组【${row.groupName}】内的所有回路执行&amp;quot;全关&amp;quot;操作吗？`, '批量控制', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success(`分组【${row.groupName}】内的 ${row.deviceCount} 个回路已全部关闭`) }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const handleMoveRight = () =&amp;gt; { if (leftSelected.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要添加的回路') return } leftSelected.value.forEach(circuit =&amp;gt; { if (!selectedCircuits.value.some(c =&amp;gt; c.no === circuit.no)) { selectedCircuits.value.push(circuit) } }) leftSelected.value = [] ElMessage.success('已添加选中的回路') } const handleMoveLeft = () =&amp;gt; { if (rightSelected.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要移除的回路') return } const ids = rightSelected.value.map(c =&amp;gt; c.no) selectedCircuits.value = selectedCircuits.value.filter(c =&amp;gt; !ids.includes(c.no)) rightSelected.value = [] ElMessage.success('已移除选中的回路') } const handleLeftSearch = () =&amp;gt; { leftPage.value = 1 ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const handleLeftReset = () =&amp;gt; { leftSearch.value = '' leftPage.value = 1 ElMessage.info('已重置') } const handleLeftPageChange = (page) =&amp;gt; { leftPage.value = page } const handleDialogClose = () =&amp;gt; { showDialog.value = false groupFormRef.value?.resetFields() } const handleSubmit = () =&amp;gt; { groupFormRef.value?.validate((valid) =&amp;gt; { if (valid) { if (isEdit.value) { const index = circuitGroups.value.findIndex(g =&amp;gt; g.no === groupForm.value.no) if (index !== -1) { circuitGroups.value[index].groupName = groupForm.value.groupName circuitGroups.value[index].remark = groupForm.value.remark circuitGroups.value[index].deviceCount = selectedCircuits.value.length circuitGroups.value[index].circuits = [...selectedCircuits.value] } ElMessage.success('修改成功') } else { const newNo = circuitGroups.value.length &amp;gt; 0 ? Math.max(...circuitGroups.value.map(g =&amp;gt; g.no)) + 1 : 1 circuitGroups.value.push({ no: newNo, groupName: groupForm.value.groupName, deviceCount: selectedCircuits.value.length, creator: '管理员', remark: groupForm.value.remark, circuits: [...selectedCircuits.value] }) total.value++ ElMessage.success('新增成功') } showDialog.value = false groupFormRef.value?.resetFields() } }) } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; } .header-right { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .content-area { flex: 1; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); padding: 15px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .group-table { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .circuit-select { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .select-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .select-title { font-weight: 500; color: #303133; min-width: 60px; } .transfer-buttons { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; } .pagination-small { margin-top: 10px; display: flex; justify-content: center; } .empty-tip { text-align: center; padding: 40px; color: #909399; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-31&quot;&gt;src/views/power/DistributionBox.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/power/DistributionBox.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;main-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;left-sidebar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;sidebar-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;searchText&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入层级名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;sidebar-search&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tree :data=&amp;quot;treeData&amp;quot; :props=&amp;quot;defaultProps&amp;quot; show-checkbox node-key=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; :expand-on-click-node=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot; @check-change=&amp;quot;handleCheckChange&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;right-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;配电柜&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = true&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Plus /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 新增 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;refreshData&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Refresh /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 刷新 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;batchDelete&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;selectedRows.length === 0&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Delete /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 删除 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;filters.search&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入配电柜名称或编号&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot; clearable &amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filters.status&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择状态&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot; clearable&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;在线&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;online&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;离线&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;offline&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filters.health&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择健康状态&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot; clearable&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;正常&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;normal&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;故障&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;fault&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;searchBoxes&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;resetFilters&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredBoxes&amp;quot; border style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleSelectionChange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;45&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;序号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;60&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;code&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备编号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;location&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;位置&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;status&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;在线状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.status === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.status === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;health&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;健康状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.health === 'normal' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.health === 'normal' ? '正常' : '故障' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;temperature&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;温度(℃)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;90&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;humidity&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;湿度(%)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;90&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;280&amp;quot; fixed=&amp;quot;right&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;viewDetail(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;详情&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;warning&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;editBox(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;编辑&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;deleteBox(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot; :page-sizes=&amp;quot;[10, 15, 20, 30]&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog v-model=&amp;quot;showAddDialog&amp;quot; :title=&amp;quot;isEdit ? '编辑配电柜' : '新增配电柜'&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;700px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;form&amp;quot; :rules=&amp;quot;rules&amp;quot; ref=&amp;quot;formRef&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;120px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;配电柜编号&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;code&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.code&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入配电柜编号&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;配电柜名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入配电柜名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;配电柜位置&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;location&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.location&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入配电柜位置&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;配电柜经度&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;longitude&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.longitude&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入配电柜经度&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;配电柜纬度&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;latitude&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.latitude&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入配电柜纬度&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;所属层级&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;hierarchy&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;form.hierarchy&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择所属层级&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;长沙-岳麓区-先导路&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;xiandao&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;长沙-岳麓区-力唯中天1栋&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;liwei&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;容量(kVA)&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;capacity&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.capacity&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入配电柜容量&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;描述&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.description&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;textarea&amp;quot; :rows=&amp;quot;3&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入描述&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;submitForm&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog v-model=&amp;quot;showDetailDialog&amp;quot; title=&amp;quot;配电柜详情&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;900px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;currentBox&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;detail-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions :column=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; border&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;设备编号&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentBox.code }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;设备名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentBox.name }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;位置&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentBox.location }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;在线状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;currentBox.status === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ currentBox.status === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;健康状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;currentBox.health === 'normal' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ currentBox.health === 'normal' ? '正常' : '故障' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;温度&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentBox.temperature }}℃&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;湿度&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentBox.humidity }}%&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tabs v-model=&amp;quot;detailTab&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;detail-tabs&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;供电参数&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;power&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions :column=&amp;quot;3&amp;quot; border&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;A相电压&amp;quot;&amp;gt;220V&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;B相电压&amp;quot;&amp;gt;221V&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;C相电压&amp;quot;&amp;gt;219V&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;A相电流&amp;quot;&amp;gt;15.2A&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;B相电流&amp;quot;&amp;gt;14.8A&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;C相电流&amp;quot;&amp;gt;15.5A&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;有功功率&amp;quot;&amp;gt;10.2kW&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;无功功率&amp;quot;&amp;gt;2.1kVar&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;功率因数&amp;quot;&amp;gt;0.95&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;关联线路&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;circuits&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;relatedCircuits&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; border&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;序号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;60&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;线路名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;status&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;80&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.status === 'on' ? 'success' : 'warning'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.status === 'on' ? '合闸' : '分闸' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;power&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;功率(kW)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;环境监测&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;environment&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions :column=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; border&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;门锁状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;currentBox.lockStatus === 'locked' ? 'success' : 'warning'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ currentBox.lockStatus === 'locked' ? '锁定' : '解锁' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;门磁状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;currentBox.magneticStatus === 'closed' ? 'success' : 'warning'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ currentBox.magneticStatus === 'closed' ? '关闭' : '打开' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;烟感状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;currentBox.smokeStatus === 'normal' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ currentBox.smokeStatus === 'normal' ? '正常' : '报警' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;水浸状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;currentBox.waterStatus === 'dry' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ currentBox.waterStatus === 'dry' ? '干燥' : '水浸' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tabs&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showDetailDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;关闭&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue' import { Search, Plus, Refresh, Delete } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus' const searchText = ref('') const showAddDialog = ref(false) const showDetailDialog = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const formRef = ref(null) const detailTab = ref('power') const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(15) const total = ref(9) const selectedRows = ref([]) const currentBox = ref(null) const filters = reactive({ search: '', status: '', health: '' }) const form = reactive({ code: '', name: '', location: '', longitude: '', latitude: '', hierarchy: '', capacity: '', description: '' }) const rules = { code: [{ required: true, message: '请输入配电柜编号', trigger: 'blur' }], name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入配电柜名称', trigger: 'blur' }], location: [{ required: true, message: '请输入配电柜位置', trigger: 'blur' }] } const defaultProps = { children: 'children', label: 'label' } const treeData = ref([ { id: 1, label: '长沙', children: [ { id: 11, label: '岳麓区', children: [ { id: 111, label: '先导路' }, { id: 112, label: '力唯中天1栋' } ] } ] } ]) const boxes = ref([ { id: 1, no: 1, code: 'PDG-XDL-001', name: '先导路1号配电柜', location: '长沙-岳麓区-先导路与麓谷大道交汇处', status: 'online', health: 'normal', temperature: 28, humidity: 65, lockStatus: 'locked', magneticStatus: 'closed', smokeStatus: 'normal', waterStatus: 'dry' }, { id: 2, no: 2, code: 'PDG-XDL-002', name: '先导路2号配电柜', location: '长沙-岳麓区-先导路中段', status: 'online', health: 'normal', temperature: 30, humidity: 60, lockStatus: 'locked', magneticStatus: 'closed', smokeStatus: 'normal', waterStatus: 'dry' }, { id: 3, no: 3, code: 'PDG-LWZT-001', name: '力唯中天1栋1号配电柜', location: '长沙-岳麓区-力唯中天1栋地下车库', status: 'online', health: 'normal', temperature: 25, humidity: 70, lockStatus: 'locked', magneticStatus: 'closed', smokeStatus: 'normal', waterStatus: 'dry' }, { id: 4, no: 4, code: 'PDG-LWZT-002', name: '力唯中天1栋2号配电柜', location: '长沙-岳麓区-力唯中天1栋A座旁', status: 'offline', health: 'fault', temperature: '-', humidity: '-', lockStatus: 'locked', magneticStatus: 'closed', smokeStatus: 'normal', waterStatus: 'dry' } ]) const relatedCircuits = ref([ { no: 1, name: '主照明回路1', status: 'on', power: 3.5 }, { no: 2, name: '主照明回路2', status: 'on', power: 2.8 }, { no: 3, name: '景观照明回路', status: 'off', power: 0 }, { no: 4, name: '应急照明回路', status: 'on', power: 1.2 } ]) const filteredBoxes = computed(() =&amp;gt; { let result = boxes.value if (filters.search) { result = result.filter(b =&amp;gt; b.code.includes(filters.search) || b.name.includes(filters.search)) } if (filters.status) { result = result.filter(b =&amp;gt; b.status === filters.status) } if (filters.health) { result = result.filter(b =&amp;gt; b.health === filters.health) } return result }) const handleCheckChange = (data, checked) =&amp;gt; { console.log('checked:', data, checked) } const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const searchBoxes = () =&amp;gt; { currentPage.value = 1 ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const resetFilters = () =&amp;gt; { Object.assign(filters, { search: '', status: '', health: '' }) currentPage.value = 1 } const refreshData = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success('数据已刷新') } const viewDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; { currentBox.value = row detailTab.value = 'power' showDetailDialog.value = true } const editBox = (row) =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = true Object.assign(form, row) showAddDialog.value = true } const deleteBox = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要删除配电柜&amp;quot;${row.name}&amp;quot;吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' }).then(() =&amp;gt; { const index = boxes.value.findIndex(b =&amp;gt; b.id === row.id) if (index &amp;gt; -1) { boxes.value.splice(index, 1) total.value-- ElMessage.success('删除成功') } }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const batchDelete = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm(`确定要删除选中的${selectedRows.value.length}个配电柜吗？`, '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' }).then(() =&amp;gt; { const selectedIds = selectedRows.value.map(b =&amp;gt; b.id) boxes.value = boxes.value.filter(b =&amp;gt; !selectedIds.includes(b.id)) total.value = boxes.value.length selectedRows.value = [] ElMessage.success('批量删除成功') }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const submitForm = () =&amp;gt; { formRef.value.validate((valid) =&amp;gt; { if (valid) { if (isEdit.value) { ElMessage.success('配电柜修改成功') } else { const newId = Math.max(...boxes.value.map(b =&amp;gt; b.id)) + 1 boxes.value.push({ id: newId, no: boxes.value.length + 1, ...form, status: 'online', health: 'normal', temperature: '-', humidity: '-', lockStatus: 'locked', magneticStatus: 'closed', smokeStatus: 'normal', waterStatus: 'dry' }) total.value++ ElMessage.success('配电柜添加成功') } showAddDialog.value = false } }) } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { padding: 20px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .main-content { display: flex; gap: 20px; } .left-sidebar { width: 200px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); padding: 15px; flex-shrink: 0; } .sidebar-header { margin-bottom: 15px; } .right-content { flex: 1; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .page-header .title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-input { width: 220px; } .filter-select { width: 150px; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 20px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .detail-content { padding: 10px 0; } .detail-tabs { margin-top: 20px; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-32&quot;&gt;src/views/power/HistoryScene.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/power/HistoryScene.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;历史下发场景&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;refreshData&amp;quot;&amp;gt;刷新&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;content-area&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;historyScenes&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;scene-table&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;60&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;sceneName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;场景名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;200&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;operator&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;下发人员&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;deployTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;下发时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;200&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;viewDetail(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;详情&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot; :page-sizes=&amp;quot;[10, 15, 20, 50, 100]&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&amp;gt;, sizes, total&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;bottom-buttons&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;隐藏&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;显示&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref } from 'vue' import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus' const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(15) const total = ref(42) const historyScenes = ref([ { no: 1, sceneName: '园区路灯照明', operator: 'tanrongfu', deployTime: '2026-01-09 13:59:26' }, { no: 2, sceneName: '定时', operator: 'admin', deployTime: '2026-01-05 11:33:52' }, { no: 3, sceneName: '开关', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-08 11:17:53' }, { no: 4, sceneName: '开关2', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-08 10:26:38' }, { no: 5, sceneName: '开关2', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-08 09:57:31' }, { no: 6, sceneName: '开关2', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-07 18:28:36' }, { no: 7, sceneName: '开关', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-07 17:41:50' }, { no: 8, sceneName: '开关', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-07 11:09:09' }, { no: 9, sceneName: '开关2', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-07 11:08:53' }, { no: 10, sceneName: '开关', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-07 10:43:24' }, { no: 11, sceneName: '开关2', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-06 18:19:53' }, { no: 12, sceneName: '开关2', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-06 16:09:25' }, { no: 13, sceneName: '开关', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-06 16:07:33' }, { no: 14, sceneName: '园区路灯照明', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2025-05-06 16:07:18' }, { no: 15, sceneName: '测试', operator: 'test08', deployTime: '2024-11-19 15:02:00' } ]) const refreshData = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success('数据已刷新') } const viewDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.info('查看场景详情: ' + row.sceneName) } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; } .page-header .title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; } .header-right { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .content-area { flex: 1; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); padding: 15px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; } .scene-table { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .bottom-buttons { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-33&quot;&gt;src/views/power/LampControlBind.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/power/LampControlBind.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleAdd&amp;quot;&amp;gt;新增&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;selectedRows.length === 0&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleBatchUnbind&amp;quot;&amp;gt;解绑&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;content-area&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tabs v-model=&amp;quot;activeTab&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;main-tabs&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;灯控绑定&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;lamp&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;searchKeyword&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入名称或编号查询&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSearch&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleReset&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredData&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;data-table&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleSelectionChange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;60&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;centralControlName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;集控名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;200&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;centralControlNo&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;集控编号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;200&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;bindCount&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;关联灯控数&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column
