label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;200&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; fixed=&amp;quot;right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleEdit(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;修改&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleUnbind(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;解绑&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot; :page-sizes=&amp;quot;[10, 15, 20, 50, 100]&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&amp;gt;, sizes, total&amp;quot; &amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-pagination&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;组播分组&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;multicast&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;empty-tip&amp;quot;&amp;gt;功能开发中...&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tabs&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;!-- 新增/编辑灯控绑定对话框 --&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog :title=&amp;quot;dialogTitle&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;900px&amp;quot; :close-on-click-modal=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; :rules=&amp;quot;formRules&amp;quot; ref=&amp;quot;formRef&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;所属集控&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;centralControl&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.centralControl&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;展厅集控&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;ZTJK&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;测试128M&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;CS128M&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;先导路集控1&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;XDLJK1&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;先导路集控2&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;XDLJK2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-option&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;11&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;table-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;select-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;leftSearch&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入IMEI号或名称&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 200px; margin-right: 10px;&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleLeftSearch&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleLeftReset&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;leftTableData&amp;quot; border style=&amp;quot;margin-top: 10px;&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleLeftSelection&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;imei&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;IMEI号&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lampControlName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;灯控名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lampPoleName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;灯杆名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;empty-tip&amp;quot; v-if=&amp;quot;leftTableData.length === 0&amp;quot;&amp;gt;暂无数据&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;transfer-buttons&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; icon=&amp;quot;ArrowRight&amp;quot; circle @click=&amp;quot;handleMoveRight&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;leftSelected.length === 0&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; icon=&amp;quot;ArrowLeft&amp;quot; circle @click=&amp;quot;handleMoveLeft&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;rightSelected.length === 0&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;margin-top: 10px;&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;11&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;table-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;select-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;rightSearch&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入IMEI号或名称&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 200px; margin-right: 10px;&amp;quot; disabled&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; disabled&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; disabled&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;selectedLampControls&amp;quot; border style=&amp;quot;margin-top: 10px;&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleRightSelection&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;imei&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;IMEI号&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lampControlName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;灯控名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lampPoleName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;灯杆名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;empty-tip&amp;quot; v-if=&amp;quot;selectedLampControls.length === 0&amp;quot;&amp;gt;暂无数据&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleDialogClose&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSubmit&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Search, ArrowRight, ArrowLeft } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus' const activeTab = ref('lamp') const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(15) const total = ref(1) const searchKeyword = ref('') const showDialog = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const leftSearch = ref('') const rightSearch = ref('') const selectedRows = ref([]) const leftSelected = ref([]) const rightSelected = ref([]) const formRef = ref(null) const formData = ref({ centralControl: '' }) const formRules = { centralControl: [{ required: true, message: '请选择所属集控', trigger: 'change' }] } const dialogTitle = computed(() =&amp;gt; isEdit.value ? '编辑灯控绑定' : '新增灯控绑定') const bindData = ref([ { no: 1, centralControlName: '展厅集控', centralControlNo: 'ZTJK', bindCount: 2, lampControls: [ { no: 1, imei: '867892010000001', lampControlName: '灯控1', lampPoleName: '灯杆001' }, { no: 2, imei: '867892010000002', lampControlName: '灯控2', lampPoleName: '灯杆002' } ] } ]) const selectedLampControls = ref([]) const allLampControls = ref([ { no: 1, imei: '867892010000001', lampControlName: '灯控1', lampPoleName: '灯杆001' }, { no: 2, imei: '867892010000002', lampControlName: '灯控2', lampPoleName: '灯杆002' }, { no: 3, imei: '867892010000003', lampControlName: '灯控3', lampPoleName: '灯杆003' }, { no: 4, imei: '867892010000004', lampControlName: '灯控4', lampPoleName: '灯杆004' }, { no: 5, imei: '867892010000005', lampControlName: '灯控5', lampPoleName: '灯杆005' }, { no: 6, imei: '867892010000006', lampControlName: '灯控6', lampPoleName: '灯杆006' } ]) const filteredData = computed(() =&amp;gt; { if (!searchKeyword.value) return bindData.value return bindData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.centralControlName.includes(searchKeyword.value) || item.centralControlNo.includes(searchKeyword.value) ) }) const leftTableData = computed(() =&amp;gt; { let result = allLampControls.value.filter(lc =&amp;gt; !selectedLampControls.value.some(slc =&amp;gt; slc.imei === lc.imei) ) if (leftSearch.value) { result = result.filter(lc =&amp;gt; lc.imei.includes(leftSearch.value) || lc.lampControlName.includes(leftSearch.value) || lc.lampPoleName.includes(leftSearch.value) ) } return result }) const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const handleLeftSelection = (selection) =&amp;gt; { leftSelected.value = selection } const handleRightSelection = (selection) =&amp;gt; { rightSelected.value = selection } const handleSearch = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const handleReset = () =&amp;gt; { searchKeyword.value = '' ElMessage.info('已重置') } const handleAdd = () =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = false selectedLampControls.value = [] formData.value = { centralControl: '' } showDialog.value = true } const handleEdit = (row) =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = true formData.value = { centralControl: row.centralControlNo } selectedLampControls.value = [...row.lampControls] showDialog.value = true } const handleUnbind = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要对集控【${row.centralControlName}】执行&amp;quot;解绑&amp;quot;操作吗？`, '解绑确认', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&amp;gt; { const index = bindData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.no === row.no) if (index !== -1) { bindData.value[index].bindCount = 0 bindData.value[index].lampControls = [] } ElMessage.success('解绑成功') }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const handleBatchUnbind = () =&amp;gt; { if (selectedRows.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要解绑的集控') return } ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要对选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个集控执行&amp;quot;解绑&amp;quot;操作吗？`, '批量解绑确认', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&amp;gt; { const index = bindData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.no === row.no) if (index !== -1) { bindData.value[index].bindCount = 0 bindData.value[index].lampControls = [] } }) selectedRows.value = [] ElMessage.success('批量解绑成功') }).catch(() =&amp;gt; {}) } const handleMoveRight = () =&amp;gt; { if (leftSelected.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要添加的灯控') return } leftSelected.value.forEach(lc =&amp;gt; { if (!selectedLampControls.value.some(slc =&amp;gt; slc.imei === lc.imei)) { selectedLampControls.value.push(lc) } }) leftSelected.value = [] ElMessage.success('已添加选中的灯控') } const handleMoveLeft = () =&amp;gt; { if (rightSelected.value.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请选择要移除的灯控') return } const imeis = rightSelected.value.map(lc =&amp;gt; lc.imei) selectedLampControls.value = selectedLampControls.value.filter(lc =&amp;gt; !imeis.includes(lc.imei)) rightSelected.value = [] ElMessage.success('已移除选中的灯控') } const handleLeftSearch = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const handleLeftReset = () =&amp;gt; { leftSearch.value = '' ElMessage.info('已重置') } const handleDialogClose = () =&amp;gt; { showDialog.value = false formRef.value?.resetFields() } const handleSubmit = () =&amp;gt; { formRef.value?.validate((valid) =&amp;gt; { if (valid) { if (isEdit.value) { const index = bindData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.centralControlNo === formData.value.centralControl) if (index !== -1) { bindData.value[index].bindCount = selectedLampControls.value.length bindData.value[index].lampControls = [...selectedLampControls.value] } ElMessage.success('修改成功') } else { const centralControlMap = { 'ZTJK': '展厅集控', 'CS128M': '测试128M', 'XDLJK1': '先导路集控1', 'XDLJK2': '先导路集控2' } const newNo = bindData.value.length &amp;gt; 0 ? Math.max(...bindData.value.map(item =&amp;gt; item.no)) + 1 : 1 bindData.value.push({ no: newNo, centralControlName: centralControlMap[formData.value.centralControl] || formData.value.centralControl, centralControlNo: formData.value.centralControl, bindCount: selectedLampControls.value.length, lampControls: [...selectedLampControls.value] }) total.value++ ElMessage.success('新增成功') } showDialog.value = false formRef.value?.resetFields() } }) } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; } .header-right { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .content-area { flex: 1; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); padding: 15px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; } .main-tabs { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .main-tabs :deep(.el-tabs__content) { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .main-tabs :deep(.el-tab-pane) { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .data-table { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .table-select { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .select-header { display: flex; align-items: center; } .transfer-buttons { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; } .empty-tip { text-align: center; padding: 40px; color: #909399; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-34&quot;&gt;src/views/power/LineInfo.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/power/LineInfo.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;线路信息&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = true&amp;quot;&amp;gt;新增&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button&amp;gt;批量导入&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;main-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;left-panel&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;panel-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;panel-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;配电柜列表&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;search-box&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;cabinetSearch&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;search-input&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;cabinet-list&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-for=&amp;quot;cabinet in filteredCabinets&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;cabinet.id&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;cabinet-item&amp;quot; :class=&amp;quot;{ active: selectedCabinet?.id === cabinet.id }&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;selectCabinet(cabinet)&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;cabinet-name&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ cabinet.name }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;cabinet-code&amp;quot;&amp;gt;编号: {{ cabinet.code }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;right-panel&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;panel-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;panel-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;线路信息&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredLines&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;line-table&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;线路名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;code&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;线路编号&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;lampCount&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;关联灯控数&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;80&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;editLine(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;修改&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog v-model=&amp;quot;showAddDialog&amp;quot; :title=&amp;quot;isEdit ? '修改' : '新增'&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;650px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;form&amp;quot; :rules=&amp;quot;rules&amp;quot; ref=&amp;quot;formRef&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;120px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*配电柜名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;cabinetId&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;form.cabinetId&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option v-for=&amp;quot;cabinet in cabinets&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;cabinet.id&amp;quot; :label=&amp;quot;cabinet.name&amp;quot; :value=&amp;quot;cabinet.id&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*上级线路&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;parentLine&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;form.parentLine&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;无&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;主线1&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;main1&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;主线2&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;main2&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*控制类型&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;controlType&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;form.controlType&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;断路器&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;breaker&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;接触器&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;contactor&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;继电器&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;relay&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*线路编号&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;code&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.code&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*线路名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*单三相&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;phaseType&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;form.phaseType&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%;&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;单相&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;single&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;三相&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;three&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;参考电流(A)&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;refCurrent&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.refCurrent&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入参考电流&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;额定功率&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;ratedPower&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.ratedPower&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入额定功率&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;电流上限值(A)&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;currentMax&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.currentMax&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入电流上限值&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;12&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;电流下限值(A)&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;currentMin&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.currentMin&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入电流下限值&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;备注&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;form.remark&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;textarea&amp;quot; :rows=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入备注&amp;quot; maxlength=&amp;quot;20&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;submitForm&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue' import { Search } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus' const showAddDialog = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const formRef = ref(null) const cabinetSearch = ref('') const selectedCabinet = ref(null) const cabinets = ref([ { id: 1, name: '先导路1号配电柜', code: 'PDG-XDL-001' }, { id: 2, name: '先导路2号配电柜', code: 'PDG-XDL-002' }, { id: 3, name: '力唯中天1栋1号配电柜', code: 'PDG-LWZT-001' }, { id: 4, name: '力唯中天1栋2号配电柜', code: 'PDG-LWZT-002' } ]) const lines = ref([ { id: 1, cabinetId: 1, name: '断路器', code: 'AL10', lampCount: 0, parentLine: '', controlType: 'breaker', phaseType: 'single', refCurrent: '', ratedPower: '', currentMax: '', currentMin: '', remark: '' } ]) const form = reactive({ cabinetId: '', parentLine: '', controlType: '', code: '', name: '', phaseType: '', refCurrent: '', ratedPower: '', currentMax: '', currentMin: '', remark: '' }) const rules = { cabinetId: [{ required: true, message: '请选择配电柜名称', trigger: 'change' }], parentLine: [{ required: true, message: '请选择上级线路', trigger: 'change' }], controlType: [{ required: true, message: '请选择控制类型', trigger: 'change' }], code: [{ required: true, message: '请输入线路编号', trigger: 'blur' }], name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入线路名称', trigger: 'blur' }], phaseType: [{ required: true, message: '请选择单三相', trigger: 'change' }] } const filteredCabinets = computed(() =&amp;gt; { if (!cabinetSearch.value) return cabinets.value return cabinets.value.filter(c =&amp;gt; c.name.includes(cabinetSearch.value) || c.code.includes(cabinetSearch.value)) }) const filteredLines = computed(() =&amp;gt; { if (!selectedCabinet.value) return lines.value return lines.value.filter(l =&amp;gt; l.cabinetId === selectedCabinet.value.id) }) const selectCabinet = (cabinet) =&amp;gt; { selectedCabinet.value = cabinet } const resetForm = () =&amp;gt; { Object.assign(form, { cabinetId: '', parentLine: '', controlType: '', code: '', name: '', phaseType: '', refCurrent: '', ratedPower: '', currentMax: '', currentMin: '', remark: '' }) } const editLine = (row) =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = true Object.assign(form, row) showAddDialog.value = true } const submitForm = () =&amp;gt; { formRef.value.validate((valid) =&amp;gt; { if (valid) { if (isEdit.value) { const index = lines.value.findIndex(l =&amp;gt; l.id === form.id) if (index &amp;gt; -1) { lines.value[index] = { ...lines.value[index], ...form } } ElMessage.success('修改成功') } else { const newId = Math.max(...lines.value.map(l =&amp;gt; l.id), 0) + 1 lines.value.push({ id: newId, ...form, lampCount: 0 }) ElMessage.success('新增成功') } showAddDialog.value = false isEdit.value = false resetForm() } }) } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { padding: 20px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .page-header .title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f1f1f; } .header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .main-content { display: flex; gap: 20px; overflow: hidden; } .left-panel { width: 200px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); flex-shrink: 0; overflow: hidden; } .panel-header { padding: 12px 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; background: #fafafa; } .panel-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #333; } .search-box { padding: 10px; } .search-input { width: 100%; } .cabinet-list { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 5px; } .cabinet-item { padding: 10px; margin-bottom: 5px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; border: 1px solid transparent; } .cabinet-item:hover { background: #f0f0f0; } .cabinet-item.active { background: #e6f7ff; border-color: #91d5ff; } .cabinet-name { font-size: 13px; color: #333; margin-bottom: 4px; } .cabinet-code { font-size: 11px; color: #999; } .right-panel { flex: 1; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); min-width: 0; } .line-table { flex: 1; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-35&quot;&gt;src/views/power/LoadMonitor.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/power/LoadMonitor.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;电压电流负荷展示&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;timeRange&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;时间范围&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;range-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;今日&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;today&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;本周&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;week&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;本月&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;month&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;summary-cards&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;summary-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;总功率&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ statistics.power.toLocaleString() }} W&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-trend positive&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.TrendingUp&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;+12.5%&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;summary-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;用电量&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ statistics.energy }} kWh&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-trend positive&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.TrendingUp&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;+8.3%&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;summary-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;峰值负荷&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ statistics.peakLoad.toFixed(1) }} A&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-trend negative&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.TrendingDown&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;-5.2%&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;chart-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;电压趋势&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag type=&amp;quot;info&amp;quot;&amp;gt;220V ± 5%&amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;canvas ref=&amp;quot;voltageChart&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/canvas&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;chart-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;电流趋势&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag type=&amp;quot;warning&amp;quot;&amp;gt;峰值: {{ maxCurrent.toFixed(1) }}A&amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;canvas ref=&amp;quot;currentChart&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/canvas&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-card full-width&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;chart-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;功率与负载率&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;legend&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;legend-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;legend-dot power&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; 功率(kW)&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;legend-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;legend-dot load&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; 负载率(%)&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;chart-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;canvas ref=&amp;quot;powerChart&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/canvas&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt;import { ref, computed, onMounted } from 'vue'; import { ArrowUp, ArrowDown } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'; import { loadHistoryData, energyStatistics } from '@/data/mockData'; const icons = { TrendingUp: ArrowUp, TrendingDown: ArrowDown }; const timeRange = ref('today'); const voltageChart = ref(null); const currentChart = ref(null); const powerChart = ref(null); const statistics = computed(() =&amp;gt; { return energyStatistics[timeRange.value]; }); const maxCurrent = computed(() =&amp;gt; { return Math.max(...loadHistoryData.current); }); const drawChart = (canvas, data, color, label, unit) =&amp;gt; { const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); const width = canvas.width; const height = canvas.height; const padding = { top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 30, left: 45 }; const chartWidth = width - padding.left - padding.right; const chartHeight = height - padding.top - padding.bottom; const maxValue = Math.max(...data) * 1.1; const minValue = Math.min(...data) * 0.9; ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height); ctx.strokeStyle = '#e8e8e8'; ctx.lineWidth = 1; for (let i = 0; i &amp;lt;= 5; i++) { const y = padding.top + (chartHeight / 5) * i; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(padding.left, y); ctx.lineTo(width - padding.right, y); ctx.stroke(); const value = maxValue - ((maxValue - minValue) / 5) * i; ctx.fillStyle = '#999'; ctx.font = '11px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'right'; ctx.fillText(value.toFixed(1), padding.left - 5, y + 4); } ctx.strokeStyle = '#e8e8e8'; for (let i = 0; i &amp;lt; loadHistoryData.labels.length; i++) { const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (loadHistoryData.labels.length - 1)) * i; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x, padding.top); ctx.lineTo(x, height - padding.bottom); ctx.stroke(); ctx.fillStyle = '#999'; ctx.font = '11px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'center'; ctx.fillText(loadHistoryData.labels[i], x, height - 8); } ctx.beginPath(); ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.shadowColor = color; ctx.shadowBlur = 5; data.forEach((value, index) =&amp;gt; { const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (data.length - 1)) * index; const y = padding.top + chartHeight - ((value - minValue) / (maxValue - minValue)) * chartHeight; if (index === 0) { ctx.moveTo(x, y); } else { ctx.lineTo(x, y); } }); ctx.stroke(); ctx.shadowBlur = 0; const lastX = padding.left + chartWidth; const lastY = padding.top + chartHeight - ((data[data.length - 1] - minValue) / (maxValue - minValue)) * chartHeight; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(lastX, lastY, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill(); ctx.fillStyle = '#333'; ctx.font = '12px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'left'; ctx.fillText(`${data[data.length - 1].toFixed(1)}${unit}`, lastX + 8, lastY + 4); }; const drawPowerChart = (canvas) =&amp;gt; { const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); const width = canvas.width; const height = canvas.height; const padding = { top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 30, left: 55 }; const chartWidth = width - padding.left - padding.right; const chartHeight = height - padding.top - padding.bottom; const powerData = loadHistoryData.power.map(p =&amp;gt; p / 1000); const loadData = loadHistoryData.loadPercent; const maxPower = Math.max(...powerData) * 1.1; const maxLoad = 100; ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height); ctx.strokeStyle = '#e8e8e8'; ctx.lineWidth = 1; for (let i = 0; i &amp;lt;= 5; i++) { const y = padding.top + (chartHeight / 5) * i; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(padding.left, y); ctx.lineTo(width - padding.right, y); ctx.stroke(); const powerValue = maxPower - (maxPower / 5) * i; ctx.fillStyle = '#999'; ctx.font = '11px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'right'; ctx.fillText(powerValue.toFixed(1), padding.left - 5, y + 4); } ctx.fillStyle = '#999'; ctx.font = '11px sans-serif'; ctx.save(); ctx.translate(20, height / 2); ctx.rotate(-Math.PI / 2); ctx.textAlign = 'center'; ctx.fillText('功率(kW)', 0, 0); ctx.restore(); ctx.strokeStyle = '#e8e8e8'; for (let i = 0; i &amp;lt; loadHistoryData.labels.length; i++) { const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (loadHistoryData.labels.length - 1)) * i; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x, padding.top); ctx.lineTo(x, height - padding.bottom); ctx.stroke(); ctx.fillStyle = '#999'; ctx.font = '11px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'center'; ctx.fillText(loadHistoryData.labels[i], x, height - 8); } ctx.beginPath(); ctx.strokeStyle = '#1890ff'; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.shadowColor = '#1890ff'; ctx.shadowBlur = 5; powerData.forEach((value, index) =&amp;gt; { const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (powerData.length - 1)) * index; const y = padding.top + chartHeight - (value / maxPower) * chartHeight; if (index === 0) { ctx.moveTo(x, y); } else { ctx.lineTo(x, y); } }); ctx.stroke(); ctx.shadowBlur = 0; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.strokeStyle = '#52c41a'; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]); ctx.shadowColor = '#52c41a'; ctx.shadowBlur = 3; loadData.forEach((value, index) =&amp;gt; { const x = padding.left + (chartWidth / (loadData.length - 1)) * index; const y = padding.top + chartHeight - (value / maxLoad) * chartHeight; if (index === 0) { ctx.moveTo(x, y); } else { ctx.lineTo(x, y); } }); ctx.stroke(); ctx.setLineDash([]); ctx.shadowBlur = 0; }; const resizeCanvas = (canvas, width, height) =&amp;gt; { const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1; canvas.width = width * dpr; canvas.height = height * dpr; canvas.style.width = width + 'px'; canvas.style.height = height + 'px'; canvas.getContext('2d').scale(dpr, dpr); }; onMounted(() =&amp;gt; { setTimeout(() =&amp;gt; { if (voltageChart.value) { resizeCanvas(voltageChart.value, 450, 200); drawChart(voltageChart.value, loadHistoryData.voltage, '#1890ff', '电压', 'V'); } if (currentChart.value) { resizeCanvas(currentChart.value, 450, 200); drawChart(currentChart.value, loadHistoryData.current, '#faad14', '电流', 'A'); } if (powerChart.value) { resizeCanvas(powerChart.value, 920, 250); drawPowerChart(powerChart.value); } }, 100); }); &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .summary-cards { display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .summary-card { flex: 1; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); padding: 25px; border-radius: 8px; color: #fff; } .card-title { font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.9; margin-bottom: 8px; } .card-value { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 10px; } .card-trend { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 12px; &amp;amp;.positive { color: #95de64; } &amp;amp;.negative { color: #ff7875; } } .chart-section { display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; &amp;amp;:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; } } .chart-card { flex: 1; background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); &amp;amp;.full-width { flex: 1 1 100%; } } .chart-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; } .chart-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #333; } .legend { display: flex; gap: 20px; } .legend-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 12px; color: #666; } .legend-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; &amp;amp;.power { background: #1890ff; } &amp;amp;.load { background: #52c41a; } } .chart-container { height: 200px; .full-width &amp;amp; { height: 250px; } } .range-select { width: 120px; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-36&quot;&gt;src/views/power/ModuleInfo.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/power/ModuleInfo.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;main-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;content-panel&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;panel-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-left&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;refreshData&amp;quot;&amp;gt;刷新&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;filters.deviceName&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入集控名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filters.status&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择模块状态&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;全部状态&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;在线&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;online&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;离线&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;offline&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;searchModules&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;resetFilters&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredModules&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;module-table&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;45&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;60&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;deviceName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; sortable /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;moduleType&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;模块类型&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;moduleName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;模块名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;moduleAddress&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;模块地址&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;model&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;模块型号&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;140&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;serialNumber&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;序列号&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;networkStatus&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;网络状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.networkStatus === 'online' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.networkStatus === 'online' ? '在线' : '离线' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;updateTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;数据更新时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; fixed=&amp;quot;right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;viewCircuitData(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;回路数据&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot; :page-sizes=&amp;quot;[10, 20, 50, 100]&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&amp;gt;, sizes, total&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;!-- 回路数据弹窗 --&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog v-model=&amp;quot;showCircuitDialog&amp;quot; :title=&amp;quot;`${currentModule?.moduleName} - 回路数据`&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;90%&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;circuit-data-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;circuit-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;circuit-info&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;info-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;strong&amp;gt;所属设备：&amp;lt;/strong&amp;gt;{{ currentModule?.deviceName }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;info-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;strong&amp;gt;模块类型：&amp;lt;/strong&amp;gt;{{ currentModule?.moduleType }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;info-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;strong&amp;gt;模块型号：&amp;lt;/strong&amp;gt;{{ currentModule?.model }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;circuit-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;refreshCircuitData&amp;quot;&amp;gt;刷新数据&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;circuitData&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;circuit-data-table&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;60&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;circuitName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;回路名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;circuitNo&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;回路编号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;currentA&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;A相电流(A)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span :style=&amp;quot;{ color: row.currentA &amp;gt; 10 ? '#e6a23c' : '#333' }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ row.currentA }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;currentB&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;B相电流(A)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span :style=&amp;quot;{ color: row.currentB &amp;gt; 10 ? '#e6a23c' : '#333' }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ row.currentB }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;currentC&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;C相电流(A)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span :style=&amp;quot;{ color: row.currentC &amp;gt; 10 ? '#e6a23c' : '#333' }&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ row.currentC }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;circuitStatus&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;回路状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.circuitStatus === 'on' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.circuitStatus === 'on' ? '通电' : '断电' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;switchRecord&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;开关记录&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;display&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;是否显示&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-switch v-model=&amp;quot;row.display&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @change=&amp;quot;toggleDisplay(row)&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;viewCircuitDetail(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;详情&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;circuit-pagination&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;circuitPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;circuitPageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;circuitTotal&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;prev, pager, next, total&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue' import { Search } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus' const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(10) const total = ref(0) const showCircuitDialog = ref(false) const currentModule = ref(null) const circuitPage = ref(1) const circuitPageSize = ref(10) const circuitTotal = ref(0) const filters = reactive({ deviceName: '', status: '' }) const modules = ref([ { id: 1, no: 1, deviceName: '先导路集控1', moduleType: '6回路控制单元', moduleName: '内置6回路模块', moduleAddress: 66, model: 'EXC-G290C-B2', serialNumber: '152403120001', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:15' }, { id: 2, no: 2, deviceName: '先导路集控1', moduleType: '12回路电流检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_12_4', moduleAddress: 4, model: 'EXC-G290C-C3', serialNumber: '112230620003', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:15' }, { id: 3, no: 3, deviceName: '先导路集控1', moduleType: '8回路剩余电流检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_13_2', moduleAddress: 2, model: 'EXC-G290C-L4', serialNumber: '113230820001', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:30:15' }, { id: 4, no: 4, deviceName: '先导路集控2', moduleType: '6回路控制单元', moduleName: 'EXC_10_3', moduleAddress: 3, model: 'EXC-G290C-B2', serialNumber: '110231123001', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:28:15' }, { id: 5, no: 5, deviceName: '先导路集控2', moduleType: '4回路供电控制单元', moduleName: 'EXC_14_6', moduleAddress: 6, model: 'EXC-G290C-P7', serialNumber: '114230210001', networkStatus: 'offline', updateTime: '2026-05-14 08:15:15' }, { id: 6, no: 6, deviceName: '力唯中天集控1', moduleType: '12回路输入状态检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_11_5', moduleAddress: 5, model: 'EXC-G290C-D5', serialNumber: '111230620000', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:15' }, { id: 7, no: 7, deviceName: '力唯中天集控1', moduleType: '8回路剩余电流检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_13_7', moduleAddress: 7, model: 'EXC-G290C-L4', serialNumber: '113230620006', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:15' }, { id: 8, no: 8, deviceName: '力唯中天集控2', moduleType: '6回路控制单元', moduleName: 'EXC_10_1', moduleAddress: 1, model: 'EXC-G290C-B2', serialNumber: '110231215560', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:15' }, { id: 9, no: 9, deviceName: '力唯中天集控2', moduleType: '12回路电流检测单元', moduleName: 'EXC_12_2', moduleAddress: 2, model: 'EXC-G290C-C3', serialNumber: '112231215574', networkStatus: 'online', updateTime: '2026-05-14 10:32:15' } ]) total.value = modules.value.length const circuitData = ref([ { id: 1, no: 1, circuitName: '内置回路1', circuitNo: 1, currentA: 3.2, currentB: 3.0, currentC: 3.1, circuitStatus: 'on', switchRecord: '2026-05-14 06:00:00 开', display: true }, { id: 2, no: 2, circuitName: '内置回路2', circuitNo: 2, currentA: 2.8, currentB: 2.9, currentC: 2.7, circuitStatus: 'on', switchRecord: '2026-05-14 06:00:00 开', display: true }, { id: 3, no: 3, circuitName: '内置回路3', circuitNo: 3, currentA: 0.0, currentB: 0.0, currentC: 0.0, circuitStatus: 'off', switchRecord: '2026-05-13 22:00:00 关', display: true }, { id: 4, no: 4, circuitName: '内置回路4', circuitNo: 4, currentA: 4.5, currentB: 4.6, currentC: 4.4, circuitStatus: 'on', switchRecord: '2026-05-14 06:00:00 开', display: true }, { id: 5, no: 5, circuitName: '内置回路5', circuitNo: 5, currentA: 1.2, currentB: 1.3, currentC: 1.1, circuitStatus: 'on', switchRecord: '2026-05-14 06:00:00 开', display: false }, { id: 6, no: 6, circuitName: '内置回路6', circuitNo: 6, currentA: 0.0, currentB: 0.0, currentC: 0.0, circuitStatus: 'off', switchRecord: '2026-05-13 22:00:00 关', display: true } ]) circuitTotal.value = circuitData.value.length const filteredModules = computed(() =&amp;gt; { let result = modules.value if (filters.deviceName) result = result.filter(m =&amp;gt; m.deviceName.includes(filters.deviceName)) if (filters.status) result = result.filter(m =&amp;gt; m.networkStatus === filters.status) return result }) const searchModules = () =&amp;gt; { currentPage.value = 1 ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const resetFilters = () =&amp;gt; { Object.assign(filters, { deviceName: '', status: '' }) currentPage.value = 1 } const refreshData = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success('数据已刷新') } const viewCircuitData = (row) =&amp;gt; { currentModule.value = row showCircuitDialog.value = true } const refreshCircuitData = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success('回路数据已刷新') } const toggleDisplay = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success(`${row.circuitName} 显示状态已${row.display ? '开启' : '关闭'}`) } const viewCircuitDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.info(`查看 ${row.circuitName} 的详细数据`) } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .main-content { flex: 1; display: flex; overflow: hidden; } .content-panel { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0; } .panel-header { padding: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .header-left { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; padding: 15px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); margin-bottom: 15px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-select { width: 150px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .module-table { flex: 1; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); overflow: auto; min-width: 0; } :deep(.module-table .el-table) { min-width: 100%; } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 15px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .circuit-data-content { padding: 10px 0; } .circuit-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding: 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; } .circuit-info { display: flex; gap: 30px; } .info-item { font-size: 14px; color: #333; } .circuit-data-table { margin-bottom: 15px; } .circuit-pagination { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-37&quot;&gt;src/views/power/StrongElectricScene.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/power/StrongElectricScene.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;toolbar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleAdd&amp;quot;&amp;gt;新增&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleLightSensor&amp;quot;&amp;gt;光感策略&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;success&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;selectedRows.length === 0&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleDeploy&amp;quot;&amp;gt;下发&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;selectedRows.length === 0&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleDelete&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;filters.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入场景名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot; clearable&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #prefix&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Search /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-input&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filters.type&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择场景类型&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot; clearable&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;定时场景&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;timer&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;光感场景&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;light&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;searchScenes&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;resetFilters&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredScenes&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;scene-table&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleSelectionChange&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;70&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;场景名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;场景类型&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.type === 'timer' ? 'primary' : 'success'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.type === 'timer' ? '定时场景' : '光感场景' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;status&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.status === 'active' ? 'success' : 'info'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.status === 'active' ? '已启用' : '未启用' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;deployCount&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;下发次数&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;creator&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;创建人&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;createTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;创建时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;220&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot; fixed=&amp;quot;right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleEdit(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;编辑&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;warning&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleView(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;详情&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleDeleteOne(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot; :page-sizes=&amp;quot;[10, 20, 50, 100]&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;total, sizes, prev, pager, next, jumper&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;!-- 新增/编辑场景弹窗 --&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog :title=&amp;quot;isEdit ? '编辑场景' : '新增场景'&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showSceneDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;700px&amp;quot; :close-on-click-modal=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;sceneForm&amp;quot; :rules=&amp;quot;sceneRules&amp;quot; ref=&amp;quot;sceneFormRef&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;场景名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;sceneForm.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入场景名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;场景类型&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio-group v-model=&amp;quot;sceneForm.type&amp;quot; @change=&amp;quot;handleTypeChange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio value=&amp;quot;timer&amp;quot;&amp;gt;定时场景&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio value=&amp;quot;light&amp;quot;&amp;gt;光感场景&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-radio-group&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;!-- 定时场景配置 --&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template v-if=&amp;quot;sceneForm.type === 'timer'&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-divider content-position=&amp;quot;left&amp;quot;&amp;gt;定时动作配置&amp;lt;/el-divider&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;timer-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-for=&amp;quot;(action, index) in sceneForm.actions&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;index&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;action-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-row :gutter=&amp;quot;10&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;5&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;action.type&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;动作类型&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;开灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;on&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;关灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;off&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;6&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-time-picker v-model=&amp;quot;action.time&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;执行时间&amp;quot; format=&amp;quot;HH:mm&amp;quot; value-format=&amp;quot;HH:mm&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;11&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox-group v-model=&amp;quot;action.weekDays&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周一&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周二&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;3&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周三&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;4&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周四&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;5&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周五&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;6&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周六&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox label=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot;&amp;gt;周日&amp;lt;/el-checkbox&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-checkbox-group&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-col :span=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; icon=&amp;quot;Delete&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;removeAction(index)&amp;quot; circle size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-col&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-row&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; plain @click=&amp;quot;addAction&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%&amp;quot;&amp;gt;+ 添加动作&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;!-- 光感场景配置 --&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template v-if=&amp;quot;sceneForm.type === 'light'&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-divider content-position=&amp;quot;left&amp;quot;&amp;gt;光感策略配置&amp;lt;/el-divider&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;光感阈值&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input-number v-model=&amp;quot;sceneForm.lightThreshold&amp;quot; :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; :max=&amp;quot;1000&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;光照阈值 (lux)&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;unit&amp;quot;&amp;gt;lux&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;触发动作&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;sceneForm.lightAction&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择触发动作&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;开灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;on&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;关灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;off&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;生效时段&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-time-picker v-model=&amp;quot;sceneForm.lightTimeRange&amp;quot; is-range placeholder=&amp;quot;开始时间 - 结束时间&amp;quot; format=&amp;quot;HH:mm&amp;quot; value-format=&amp;quot;HH:mm&amp;quot; range-separator=&amp;quot;至&amp;quot; start-placeholder=&amp;quot;开始时间&amp;quot; end-placeholder=&amp;quot;结束时间&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;width: 100%&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-divider content-position=&amp;quot;left&amp;quot;&amp;gt;关联设备&amp;lt;/el-divider&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;选择设备&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-transfer v-model=&amp;quot;sceneForm.devices&amp;quot; :data=&amp;quot;deviceOptions&amp;quot; :titles=&amp;quot;['可选设备', '已选设备']&amp;quot; filterable filter-placeholder=&amp;quot;搜索设备&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showSceneDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;submitScene&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;!-- 详情弹窗 --&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;场景详情&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showDetailDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;600px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-content&amp;quot; v-if=&amp;quot;currentScene&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions :column=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot; border&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;场景名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentScene.name }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;场景类型&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;currentScene.type === 'timer' ? 'primary' : 'success'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ currentScene.type === 'timer' ? '定时场景' : '光感场景' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;currentScene.status === 'active' ? 'success' : 'info'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ currentScene.status === 'active' ? '已启用' : '未启用' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;创建人&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentScene.creator }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;创建时间&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentScene.createTime }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-divider content-position=&amp;quot;left&amp;quot; style=&amp;quot;margin-top: 20px&amp;quot;&amp;gt;策略配置&amp;lt;/el-divider&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;currentScene.type === 'timer'&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;timer-detail&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-for=&amp;quot;(action, index) in currentScene.actions&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;index&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;action-detail&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;action-no&amp;quot;&amp;gt;动作 {{ index + 1 }}：&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ action.type === 'on' ? '开灯' : '关灯' }}&amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;，执行时间：{{ action.time }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;，执行星期：{{ action.weekDaysText }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-else class=&amp;quot;light-detail&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div&amp;gt;光感阈值：{{ currentScene.lightThreshold }} lux&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div&amp;gt;触发动作：{{ currentScene.lightAction === 'on' ? '开灯' : '关灯' }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div&amp;gt;生效时段：{{ currentScene.lightTimeRange[0] }} 至 {{ currentScene.lightTimeRange[1] }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, reactive, computed } from 'vue' import { Search, Plus, Delete, Clock, Sunrise, Download } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { ElMessage, ElMessageBox } from 'element-plus' const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(10) const total = ref(0) const selectedRows = ref([]) const showSceneDialog = ref(false) const showDetailDialog = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const currentScene = ref(null) const sceneFormRef = ref(null) const filters = reactive({ name: '', type: '' }) const weekDayMap = { '0': '周日', '1': '周一', '2': '周二', '3': '周三', '4': '周四', '5': '周五', '6': '周六' } const scenes = ref([ { id: 1, no: 1, name: '夜间照明场景', type: 'timer', status: 'active', deployCount: 15, creator: '管理员', createTime: '2026-05-10 10:00:00', actions: [ { type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5'] }, { type: 'off', time: '06:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5'] } ] }, { id: 2, no: 2, name: '周末照明场景', type: 'timer', status: 'active', deployCount: 8, creator: '管理员', createTime: '2026-05-12 14:30:00', actions: [ { type: 'on', time: '19:00', weekDays: ['6', '0'] }, { type: 'off', time: '07:00', weekDays: ['6', '0'] } ] }, { id: 3, no: 3, name: '阴天自动照明', type: 'light', status: 'inactive', deployCount: 5, creator: '管理员', createTime: '2026-05-13 09:00:00', lightThreshold: 200, lightAction: 'on', lightTimeRange: ['06:00', '20:00'] }, { id: 4, no: 4, name: '强光自动关闭', type: 'light', status: 'active', deployCount: 3, creator: '管理员', createTime: '2026-05-14 16:00:00', lightThreshold: 800, lightAction: 'off', lightTimeRange: ['08:00', '18:00'] } ]) total.value = scenes.value.length const deviceOptions = ref([ { key: 1, label: '先导路集控1' }, { key: 2, label: '先导路集控2' }, { key: 3, label: '力唯中天集控1' }, { key: 4, label: '力唯中天集控2' } ]) const sceneForm = reactive({ name: '', type: 'timer', actions: [ { type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0'] } ], lightThreshold: 200, lightAction: 'on', lightTimeRange: ['06:00', '22:00'], devices: [] }) const sceneRules = { name: [{ required: true, message: '请输入场景名称', trigger: 'blur' }], type: [{ required: true, message: '请选择场景类型', trigger: 'change' }] } const filteredScenes = computed(() =&amp;gt; { let result = scenes.value if (filters.name) { result = result.filter(s =&amp;gt; s.name.includes(filters.name)) } if (filters.type) { result = result.filter(s =&amp;gt; s.type === filters.type) } return result }) const handleSelectionChange = (selection) =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value = selection } const searchScenes = () =&amp;gt; { currentPage.value = 1 ElMessage.success('查询成功') } const resetFilters = () =&amp;gt; { Object.assign(filters, { name: '', type: '' }) currentPage.value = 1 } const handleAdd = () =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = false resetSceneForm() showSceneDialog.value = true } const handleLightSensor = () =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = false resetSceneForm() sceneForm.type = 'light' showSceneDialog.value = true } const handleEdit = (row) =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = true Object.assign(sceneForm, { name: row.name, type: row.type, actions: row.type === 'timer' ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(row.actions)) : [], lightThreshold: row.lightThreshold || 200, lightAction: row.lightAction || 'on', lightTimeRange: row.lightTimeRange || ['06:00', '22:00'], devices: [] }) showSceneDialog.value = true } const handleView = (row) =&amp;gt; { currentScene.value = { ...row, actions: row.actions ? row.actions.map(a =&amp;gt; ({ ...a, weekDaysText: a.weekDays.map(d =&amp;gt; weekDayMap[d]).join('、') })) : [] } showDetailDialog.value = true } const handleDeploy = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要下发选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个场景吗？`, '场景下发', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success('场景下发成功') }) } const handleDelete = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要删除选中的 ${selectedRows.value.length} 个场景吗？`, '删除确认', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success('删除成功') }) } const handleDeleteOne = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( `确定要删除场景【${row.name}】吗？`, '删除确认', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success('删除成功') }) } const submitScene = () =&amp;gt; { sceneFormRef.value.validate((valid) =&amp;gt; { if (valid) { if (sceneForm.type === 'timer' &amp;amp;&amp;amp; sceneForm.actions.length === 0) { ElMessage.warning('请至少添加一个定时动作') return } ElMessage.success(isEdit.value ? '编辑成功' : '创建成功') showSceneDialog.value = false } }) } const addAction = () =&amp;gt; { sceneForm.actions.push({ type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0'] }) } const removeAction = (index) =&amp;gt; { if (sceneForm.actions.length &amp;gt; 1) { sceneForm.actions.splice(index, 1) } else { ElMessage.warning('至少保留一个动作') } } const handleTypeChange = () =&amp;gt; { if (sceneForm.type === 'timer') { sceneForm.actions = [{ type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0'] }] } } const resetSceneForm = () =&amp;gt; { Object.assign(sceneForm, { name: '', type: 'timer', actions: [ { type: 'on', time: '18:00', weekDays: ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '0'] } ], lightThreshold: 200, lightAction: 'on', lightTimeRange: ['06:00', '22:00'], devices: [] }) } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { padding: 20px; background: #f0f2f5; min-height: 100%; } .toolbar { margin-bottom: 20px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; padding: 15px; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); margin-bottom: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-select { width: 150px; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .scene-table { background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); } .pagination-wrapper { margin-top: 20px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; } .timer-actions { width: 100%; } .action-item { padding: 15px; background: #f5f7fa; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 10px; } .unit { margin-left: 10px; color: #606266; } .detail-content { padding: 10px 0; } .timer-detail, .light-detail { padding: 15px; background: #f5f7fa; border-radius: 4px; } .action-detail { margin-bottom: 10px; } .action-no { font-weight: 600; color: #303133; } .action-detail span { margin-right: 10px; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt;&lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-38&quot;&gt;src/views/scene/LinkageManage.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/scene/LinkageManage.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;main-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;right-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSave&amp;quot;&amp;gt;保存&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleCancel&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleTimeRange&amp;quot;&amp;gt;触发时间段&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-row&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;label class=&amp;quot;required&amp;quot;&amp;gt;规则名称&amp;lt;/label&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入规则名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;label class=&amp;quot;required&amp;quot;&amp;gt;优先级&amp;lt;/label&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.priority&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;高&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;high&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;低&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;low&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;label class=&amp;quot;required&amp;quot;&amp;gt;执行日期&amp;lt;/label&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;radio-group&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio v-model=&amp;quot;formData.executeType&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;always&amp;quot;&amp;gt;一直执行&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-radio v-model=&amp;quot;formData.executeType&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;scheduled&amp;quot;&amp;gt;定时执行&amp;lt;/el-radio&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;tabs-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tabs v-model=&amp;quot;activeTab&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;section-tabs&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;触发条件&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;condition&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;condition-list&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-for=&amp;quot;(condition, index) in formData.conditions&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;index&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;condition-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;condition-index&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ index + 1 }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;condition-fields&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;condition.productType&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择产品类型&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;condition-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;灯控制器&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;灯控制器&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;传感器&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;传感器&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;摄像头&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;摄像头&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;condition.device&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择设备&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;condition-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;展厅隧道灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;展厅隧道灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;光亚展灯杆&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;光亚展灯杆&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;condition.triggerType&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择触发类型&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;condition-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;事件触发&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;event&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;属性触发&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;property&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;condition.triggerCondition&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择触发条件&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;condition-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;检测有人&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;有人&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;检测无人&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;无人&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;光照度低于阈值&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;光照度低&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;漏电&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;漏电&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;condition-controls&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;removeCondition(index)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;×&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt;
