&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;add-condition&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;addCondition&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Plus /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 添加触发条件 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;执行动作&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;action&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;action-list&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-for=&amp;quot;(action, index) in formData.actions&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;index&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;action-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;action-index&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ index + 1 }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;action-fields&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;action.productType&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择产品类型&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;action-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;灯控制器&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;灯控制器&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;集控&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;集控&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;传感器&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;传感器&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;action.device&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择设备&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;action-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;展厅隧道灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;展厅隧道灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;光亚展灯杆&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;光亚展灯杆&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;action.action&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择动作内容&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;action-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;开灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;开灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;关灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;关灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;调光50%&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;调光50%&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;断电&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;断电&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;action-controls&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;removeAction(index)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;×&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;add-action&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;addAction&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Plus /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; 添加执行动作 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tabs&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;触发时间段&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showTimeRangeDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;400px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;timeRangeData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;80px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;开始时间&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-time-picker v-model=&amp;quot;timeRangeData.startTime&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择开始时间&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;结束时间&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-time-picker v-model=&amp;quot;timeRangeData.endTime&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择结束时间&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showTimeRangeDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;confirmTimeRange&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref } from 'vue'; import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'; const activeTab = ref('condition'); const showTimeRangeDialog = ref(false); const formData = ref({ name: '', priority: 'high', executeType: 'always', conditions: [ { productType: '', device: '', triggerType: '', triggerCondition: '' } ], actions: [ { productType: '', device: '', action: '' } ] }); const timeRangeData = ref({ startTime: '', endTime: '' }); const addCondition = () =&amp;gt; { formData.value.conditions.push({ productType: '', device: '', triggerType: '', triggerCondition: '' }); }; const removeCondition = (index) =&amp;gt; { if (formData.value.conditions.length &amp;gt; 1) { formData.value.conditions.splice(index, 1); } }; const addAction = () =&amp;gt; { formData.value.actions.push({ productType: '', device: '', action: '' }); }; const removeAction = (index) =&amp;gt; { if (formData.value.actions.length &amp;gt; 1) { formData.value.actions.splice(index, 1); } }; const handleSave = () =&amp;gt; { if (!formData.value.name) { alert('请输入规则名称'); return; } alert('规则保存成功'); }; const handleCancel = () =&amp;gt; { formData.value = { name: '', priority: 'high', executeType: 'always', conditions: [ { productType: '', device: '', triggerType: '', triggerCondition: '' } ], actions: [ { productType: '', device: '', action: '' } ] }; }; const handleTimeRange = () =&amp;gt; { showTimeRangeDialog.value = true; }; const confirmTimeRange = () =&amp;gt; { showTimeRangeDialog.value = false; alert('触发时间段设置成功'); }; &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { display: flex; height: calc(100vh - 60px); } .main-content { flex: 1; display: flex; overflow: hidden; } .right-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; padding: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .form-section { margin-bottom: 20px; } .form-row { display: flex; gap: 30px; } .form-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; width: 280px; } .form-item label { color: #303133; font-size: 14px; } .required::after { content: '*'; color: #f56c6c; margin-left: 4px; } .form-input { width: 100%; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dcdfe6; } .form-select { width: 100%; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dcdfe6; } .radio-group { display: flex; gap: 20px; } .radio-group :deep(.el-radio) { color: #303133; } .tabs-section { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; } .section-tabs { --el-tabs-header-text-color: #606266; --el-tabs-active-text-color: #409eff; --el-tabs-border-color: #e8e8e8; --el-tabs-active-bar-color: #409eff; } .section-tabs :deep(.el-tabs__content) { padding: 15px 0; } .condition-list, .action-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; } .condition-item, .action-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e8e8e8; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; } .condition-index, .action-index { width: 30px; height: 30px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #f0f2f5; border-radius: 4px; color: #409eff; font-weight: 600; } .condition-fields, .action-fields { flex: 1; display: flex; gap: 15px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; } .condition-select, .action-select { width: 180px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dcdfe6; } .condition-controls, .action-controls { display: flex; } .condition-controls .el-button, .action-controls .el-button { padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 18px; color: #909399; } .add-condition, .add-action { padding: 10px; border: 1px dashed #dcdfe6; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt;&lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-39&quot;&gt;src/views/scene/QuickOperation.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/scene/QuickOperation.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;main-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;right-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-left&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tabs v-model=&amp;quot;activeTab&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;header-tabs&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;场景控制&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;control&amp;quot;&amp;gt;场景控制&amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;场景下发记录&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;records&amp;quot;&amp;gt;场景下发记录&amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tabs&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleAdd&amp;quot;&amp;gt;新增&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;activeTab === 'control'&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;control-panel&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;filterKeyword&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入场景名称查询&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSearch&amp;quot;&amp;gt;查询&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleReset&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;scene-cards&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-card v-for=&amp;quot;scene in filteredScenes&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;scene.id&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;scene-card&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;label class=&amp;quot;checkbox-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox v-model=&amp;quot;scene.selected&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;{{ scene.name }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/label&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-controls&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-switch v-model=&amp;quot;scene.visible&amp;quot; active-text=&amp;quot;显示&amp;quot; inactive-text=&amp;quot;隐藏&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-body&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleExecute(scene)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;执行&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;info&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleResult(scene)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;执行结果&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleMore(scene)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;...&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-card&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-else class=&amp;quot;records-panel&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;recordsData&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;data-table&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;sceneName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;场景名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;executeTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;下发时间&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;160&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;status&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;90&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.status === 'success' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.status === 'success' ? '成功' : '失败' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;detail&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;详情&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;200&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;新增场景&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showAddDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;500px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;场景名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入场景名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;显示状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.visible&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;显示&amp;quot; :value=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;隐藏&amp;quot; :value=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;排序序号&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input type=&amp;quot;number&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;formData.sortOrder&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入排序序号&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleConfirmAdd&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;执行结果&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showResultDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;500px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions :column=&amp;quot;2&amp;quot; :data=&amp;quot;resultData&amp;quot; border&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;场景名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ resultData.name }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;执行时间&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ resultData.executeTime }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;resultData.status === 'success' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ resultData.status === 'success' ? '成功' : '失败' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-descriptions-item label=&amp;quot;详情&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ resultData.detail }}&amp;lt;/el-descriptions-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-descriptions&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue'; const activeTab = ref('control'); const filterKeyword = ref(''); const showAddDialog = ref(false); const showResultDialog = ref(false); const formData = ref({ name: '', visible: true, sortOrder: 1 }); const resultData = ref({}); const scenesData = ref([ { id: 1, name: '(0)应急开灯', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 2, name: '(0)某路段人工复查', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 3, name: '(1)线性灯-100', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 4, name: '(1)线性灯-10', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 5, name: '(1)线性灯-50', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 6, name: '(1)线性灯关', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 7, name: '(1)隧道灯具全关', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 8, name: '(2)高速灯-100', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 9, name: '(2)高速灯-50', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 10, name: '(2)高速灯-10', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 11, name: '(2)高速灯关', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 12, name: '(3)低位红光关闭', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 13, name: '(3)低位雾光关闭', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 14, name: '(3)低位雾光开', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 15, name: '(3)低位白光关闭', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 16, name: '(3)低位白光开', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 17, name: '(3)低位红光开', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 18, name: '(5)灯具展示100...', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 19, name: '(99)展厅一键全开', visible: true, selected: false }, { id: 20, name: '(99)展厅全关', visible: true, selected: false } ]); const recordsData = ref([ { no: 1, sceneName: '应急开灯', executeTime: '2024-04-22 10:26:58', status: 'success', detail: '执行成功，共控制156盏灯具' }, { no: 2, sceneName: '隧道灯具全关', executeTime: '2024-04-22 09:15:30', status: 'success', detail: '执行成功，共控制89盏灯具' }, { no: 3, sceneName: '线性灯-50', executeTime: '2024-04-22 08:00:00', status: 'success', detail: '执行成功，共控制234盏灯具' }, { no: 4, sceneName: '高速灯-100', executeTime: '2024-04-21 22:30:00', status: 'danger', detail: '执行失败，部分设备离线' } ]); const filteredScenes = computed(() =&amp;gt; { if (!filterKeyword.value) return scenesData.value; const keyword = filterKeyword.value.toLowerCase(); return scenesData.value.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword)); }); const handleSearch = () =&amp;gt; {}; const handleReset = () =&amp;gt; { filterKeyword.value = ''; }; const handleAdd = () =&amp;gt; { showAddDialog.value = true; formData.value = { name: '', visible: true, sortOrder: scenesData.value.length + 1 }; }; const handleConfirmAdd = () =&amp;gt; { if (!formData.value.name) { alert('请输入场景名称'); return; } scenesData.value.push({ id: scenesData.value.length + 1, name: formData.value.name, visible: formData.value.visible, selected: false }); showAddDialog.value = false; }; const handleExecute = (scene) =&amp;gt; { alert(`正在执行场景：${scene.name}`); }; const handleResult = (scene) =&amp;gt; { showResultDialog.value = true; resultData.value = { name: scene.name, executeTime: new Date().toLocaleString(), status: 'success', detail: '执行成功，共控制156盏灯具' }; }; const handleMore = (scene) =&amp;gt; { alert(`更多操作：${scene.name}`); }; &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { display: flex; height: calc(100vh - 60px); } .main-content { flex: 1; display: flex; overflow: hidden; } .right-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; padding: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .header-tabs { --el-tabs-header-text-color: #606266; --el-tabs-active-text-color: #409eff; --el-tabs-border-color: #e8e8e8; --el-tabs-active-bar-color: #409eff; } .filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; align-items: center; } .filter-input { width: 250px; } .scene-cards { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr); gap: 15px; overflow-y: auto; flex: 1; padding-right: 10px; } .scene-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e8e8e8; border-radius: 8px; } .card-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; margin-bottom: 10px; } .checkbox-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; color: #303133; font-size: 14px; } .card-body { display: flex; gap: 8px; } .card-body .el-button { flex: 1; padding: 6px; font-size: 12px; } .records-panel { flex: 1; overflow: auto; } .data-table { width: 100%; } .form-select { width: 100%; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt;&lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-40&quot;&gt;src/views/scene/SceneLinkage.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/scene/SceneLinkage.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;main-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;right-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-left&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tabs v-model=&amp;quot;viewMode&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;header-tabs&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;卡片模式&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;card&amp;quot;&amp;gt;卡片模式&amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tab-pane label=&amp;quot;列表模式&amp;quot; name=&amp;quot;list&amp;quot;&amp;gt;列表模式&amp;lt;/el-tab-pane&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-tabs&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleAdd&amp;quot;&amp;gt;新增&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;selectedRows.length === 0&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleBatchDelete&amp;quot;&amp;gt;批量删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;filterKeyword&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入规则名称查询&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filterStatus&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择启用状态&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;全部&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;启用&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;禁用&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filterPriority&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择优先级&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;全部&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;高&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;high&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;低&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;low&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSearch&amp;quot;&amp;gt;搜索&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleReset&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;viewMode === 'card'&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;rule-cards&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-card v-for=&amp;quot;rule in filteredRules&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;rule.id&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;rule-card&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;priority-tag&amp;quot; :class=&amp;quot;rule.priority&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ rule.priority === 'high' ? '高' : '低' }} &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;label class=&amp;quot;checkbox-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-checkbox v-model=&amp;quot;rule.selected&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;{{ rule.name }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/label&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-controls&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-switch v-model=&amp;quot;rule.enabled&amp;quot; active-text=&amp;quot;启用&amp;quot; inactive-text=&amp;quot;禁用&amp;quot; @change=&amp;quot;handleToggle(rule)&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-body&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;execute-info&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;执行日期:&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;{{ rule.executeDate }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleMore(rule)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;...&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-card&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-else class=&amp;quot;list-panel&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredRules&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;data-table&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleSelectionChange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;规则名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;priority&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;优先级&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;80&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.priority === 'high' ? 'danger' : 'info'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.priority === 'high' ? '高' : '低' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;enabled&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;90&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-switch v-model=&amp;quot;row.enabled&amp;quot; active-text=&amp;quot;启用&amp;quot; inactive-text=&amp;quot;禁用&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;executeDate&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;执行日期&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleEdit(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;编辑&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleDelete(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&amp;gt;, total&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;新增规则&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showAddDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;500px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;规则名称&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入规则名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;优先级&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.priority&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;高&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;high&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;低&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;low&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;执行日期&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.executeType&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;一直执行&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;always&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;定时执行&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;scheduled&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item v-if=&amp;quot;formData.executeType === 'scheduled'&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;执行时间&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-date-picker v-model=&amp;quot;formData.executeTime&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;datetime&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择执行时间&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleConfirmAdd&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue'; const viewMode = ref('card'); const filterKeyword = ref(''); const filterStatus = ref(''); const filterPriority = ref(''); const currentPage = ref(1); const pageSize = ref(10); const selectedRows = ref([]); const showAddDialog = ref(false); const formData = ref({ name: '', priority: 'high', executeType: 'always', executeTime: '' }); const rulesData = ref([ { id: 1, no: 1, name: '检测有人开', priority: 'high', enabled: true, executeDate: '2025.09.01-2028.10.31', selected: false }, { id: 2, no: 2, name: '漏电自动断电', priority: 'high', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false }, { id: 3, no: 3, name: '光照度亮灯', priority: 'high', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false }, { id: 4, no: 4, name: '关回路', priority: 'low', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false }, { id: 5, no: 5, name: '检测无人关', priority: 'low', enabled: true, executeDate: '一直执行', selected: false } ]); const total = computed(() =&amp;gt; rulesData.value.length); const filteredRules = computed(() =&amp;gt; { let data = [...rulesData.value]; if (filterKeyword.value) { const keyword = filterKeyword.value.toLowerCase(); data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.name.toLowerCase().includes(keyword)); } if (filterStatus.value !== '') { const status = filterStatus.value === 'true'; data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.enabled === status); } if (filterPriority.value) { data = data.filter(item =&amp;gt; item.priority === filterPriority.value); } return data.slice((currentPage.value - 1) * pageSize.value, currentPage.value * pageSize.value); }); const handleSearch = () =&amp;gt; { currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleReset = () =&amp;gt; { filterKeyword.value = ''; filterStatus.value = ''; filterPriority.value = ''; currentPage.value = 1; }; const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value = val; }; const handleAdd = () =&amp;gt; { showAddDialog.value = true; formData.value = { name: '', priority: 'high', executeType: 'always', executeTime: '' }; }; const handleConfirmAdd = () =&amp;gt; { if (!formData.value.name) { alert('请输入规则名称'); return; } rulesData.value.push({ id: rulesData.value.length + 1, no: rulesData.value.length + 1, name: formData.value.name, priority: formData.value.priority, enabled: true, executeDate: formData.value.executeType === 'always' ? '一直执行' : formData.value.executeTime, selected: false }); showAddDialog.value = false; }; const handleEdit = (row) =&amp;gt; { alert(`编辑规则：${row.name}`); }; const handleDelete = (row) =&amp;gt; { const index = rulesData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.id === row.id); if (index !== -1) { rulesData.value.splice(index, 1); } }; const handleBatchDelete = () =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&amp;gt; { const index = rulesData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.id === row.id); if (index !== -1) { rulesData.value.splice(index, 1); } }); selectedRows.value = []; }; const handleToggle = (rule) =&amp;gt; { alert(`${rule.name}已${rule.enabled ? '启用' : '禁用'}`); }; const handleMore = (rule) =&amp;gt; { alert(`更多操作：${rule.name}`); }; &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { display: flex; height: calc(100vh - 60px); } .main-content { flex: 1; display: flex; overflow: hidden; } .right-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; padding: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .header-tabs { --el-tabs-header-text-color: #606266; --el-tabs-active-text-color: #409eff; --el-tabs-border-color: #e8e8e8; --el-tabs-active-bar-color: #409eff; } .filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-input { width: 200px; } .filter-select { width: 160px; } .rule-cards { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); gap: 15px; overflow-y: auto; flex: 1; padding-right: 10px; } .rule-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e8e8e8; border-radius: 8px; } .card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; margin-bottom: 10px; } .priority-tag { width: 30px; height: 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; } .priority-tag.high { background: #f56c6c; } .priority-tag.low { background: #67c23a; } .checkbox-label { flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; color: #303133; font-size: 14px; } .card-body { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; } .execute-info { display: flex; gap: 8px; color: #606266; font-size: 12px; } .list-panel { flex: 1; overflow: auto; } .data-table { width: 100%; } .pagination-bar { display: flex; justify-content: center; padding: 15px 0; } .form-select { width: 100%; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt;&lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-41&quot;&gt;src/views/scene/SceneManage.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/scene/SceneManage.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;main-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;right-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSave&amp;quot;&amp;gt;保存&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleCancel&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-row&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;label class=&amp;quot;required&amp;quot;&amp;gt;场景名称&amp;lt;/label&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入场景名称&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;label class=&amp;quot;required&amp;quot;&amp;gt;显示状态&amp;lt;/label&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.visible&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;显示&amp;quot; :value=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;隐藏&amp;quot; :value=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;label class=&amp;quot;required&amp;quot;&amp;gt;排序序号&amp;lt;/label&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input type=&amp;quot;number&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;formData.sortOrder&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入排序序号&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;action-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span&amp;gt;动作配置&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;addAction&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Plus /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;action-list&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-for=&amp;quot;(action, index) in formData.actions&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;index&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;action-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;action-index&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ index + 1 }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;action-fields&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;action.productType&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择产品类型&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;action-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;灯控制器&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;灯控制器&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;集控&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;集控&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;传感器&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;传感器&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;摄像头&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;摄像头&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;智能主控&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;智能主控&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;智能主控-站点&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;智能主控-站点&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;action.device&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择设备&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;action-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;展厅隧道灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;展厅隧道灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;光亚展灯杆&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;光亚展灯杆&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;delay-group&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input type=&amp;quot;number&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;action.delay&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入延时时长&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;delay-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;action.delayUnit&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;delay-unit&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;秒&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;秒&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;分&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;分&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;时&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;时&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;action.action&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择动作内容&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;action-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;开灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;开灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;关灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;关灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;调光50%&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;调光50%&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;调光100%&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;调光100%&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;action-controls&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button v-if=&amp;quot;index &amp;gt; 0&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;moveUp(index)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;↑&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button v-if=&amp;quot;index &amp;lt; formData.actions.length - 1&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;moveDown(index)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;↓&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;removeAction(index)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;×&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref } from 'vue'; import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue'; const formData = ref({ name: '', visible: true, sortOrder: 1, actions: [ { productType: '', device: '', delay: '', delayUnit: '秒', action: '' } ] }); const addAction = () =&amp;gt; { formData.value.actions.push({ productType: '', device: '', delay: '', delayUnit: '秒', action: '' }); }; const removeAction = (index) =&amp;gt; { if (formData.value.actions.length &amp;gt; 1) { formData.value.actions.splice(index, 1); } }; const moveUp = (index) =&amp;gt; { if (index &amp;gt; 0) { const temp = formData.value.actions[index]; formData.value.actions[index] = formData.value.actions[index - 1]; formData.value.actions[index - 1] = temp; } }; const moveDown = (index) =&amp;gt; { if (index &amp;lt; formData.value.actions.length - 1) { const temp = formData.value.actions[index]; formData.value.actions[index] = formData.value.actions[index + 1]; formData.value.actions[index + 1] = temp; } }; const handleSave = () =&amp;gt; { if (!formData.value.name) { alert('请输入场景名称'); return; } alert('场景保存成功'); }; const handleCancel = () =&amp;gt; { formData.value = { name: '', visible: true, sortOrder: 1, actions: [ { productType: '', device: '', delay: '', delayUnit: '秒', action: '' } ] }; }; &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { display: flex; height: calc(100vh - 60px); } .main-content { flex: 1; display: flex; overflow: hidden; } .right-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; padding: 15px; overflow: hidden; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .form-section { margin-bottom: 20px; } .form-row { display: flex; gap: 20px; } .form-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; width: 250px; } .form-item label { color: #303133; font-size: 14px; } .required::after { content: '*'; color: #f56c6c; margin-left: 4px; } .form-input { width: 100%; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dcdfe6; } .form-select { width: 100%; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dcdfe6; } .action-section { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; } .section-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; color: #303133; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; } .action-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; } .action-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e8e8e8; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px; } .action-index { width: 30px; height: 30px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #f0f2f5; border-radius: 4px; color: #409eff; font-weight: 600; } .action-fields { flex: 1; display: flex; gap: 15px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; } .action-select { width: 180px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dcdfe6; } .delay-group { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .delay-input { width: 120px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dcdfe6; } .delay-unit { width: 60px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #dcdfe6; } .action-controls { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .action-controls .el-button { padding: 4px 8px; font-size: 12px; color: #909399; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt;&lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-42&quot;&gt;src/views/scene/SceneSchedule.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/scene/SceneSchedule.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;定时场景管理&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;addSchedule&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Plus&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; 新增定时 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;schedules&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;schedule-table&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;id&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;定时编号&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;定时名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;templateName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;关联场景&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;scheduleType&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;执行类型&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getTypeTagType(scope.row.scheduleType)&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getTypeText(scope.row.scheduleType) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;time&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;执行时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;enabled&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-switch :value=&amp;quot;scope.row.enabled&amp;quot; @change=&amp;quot;toggleEnable(scope.row)&amp;quot; active-color=&amp;quot;#13ce66&amp;quot; inactive-color=&amp;quot;#ff4949&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;editSchedule(scope.row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;编辑&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;deleteSchedule(scope.row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog :title=&amp;quot;editDialogTitle&amp;quot; :visible.sync=&amp;quot;dialogVisible&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;500px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;定时名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入定时名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;关联场景&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;templateId&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.templateId&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择场景&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option v-for=&amp;quot;template in enabledTemplates&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;template.id&amp;quot; :label=&amp;quot;template.name&amp;quot; :value=&amp;quot;template.id&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;执行类型&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;scheduleType&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.scheduleType&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;每天&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;daily&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;周末&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;weekend&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;节假日&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;holiday&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;执行时间&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;time&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-time-picker v-model=&amp;quot;formData.time&amp;quot; format=&amp;quot;HH:mm&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;选择执行时间&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;dialogVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;saveSchedule&amp;quot;&amp;gt;保存&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { scheduledScenes, sceneTemplates } from '@/data/mockData' const icons = { Plus } const schedules = ref([...scheduledScenes]) const templates = ref([...sceneTemplates]) const dialogVisible = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const formData = ref({ id: '', name: '', templateId: '', scheduleType: 'daily', time: '', enabled: true }) const editDialogTitle = computed(() =&amp;gt; isEdit.value ? '编辑定时场景' : '新增定时场景') const enabledTemplates = computed(() =&amp;gt; { return templates.value.filter(t =&amp;gt; t.enabled) }) const schedulesWithTemplateName = computed(() =&amp;gt; { return schedules.value.map(s =&amp;gt; { const template = templates.value.find(t =&amp;gt; t.id === s.templateId) return { ...s, templateName: template ? template.name : '未知场景' } }) }) const getTypeTagType = (type) =&amp;gt; { switch (type) { case 'daily': return 'success' case 'weekend': return 'warning' case 'holiday': return 'info' default: return 'info' } } const getTypeText = (type) =&amp;gt; { switch (type) { case 'daily': return '每天' case 'weekend': return '周末' case 'holiday': return '节假日' default: return type } } const addSchedule = () =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = false formData.value = { id: '', name: '', templateId: '', scheduleType: 'daily', time: '', enabled: true } dialogVisible.value = true } const editSchedule = (row) =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = true formData.value = { ...row } dialogVisible.value = true } const deleteSchedule = (row) =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( '确定要删除该定时任务吗？', '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&amp;gt; { const index = schedules.value.findIndex(s =&amp;gt; s.id === row.id) if (index &amp;gt; -1) { schedules.value.splice(index, 1) } ElMessage.success('删除成功') }).catch(() =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.info('已取消删除') }) } const toggleEnable = (row) =&amp;gt; { row.enabled = !row.enabled } const saveSchedule = () =&amp;gt; { if (!formData.value.name || !formData.value.templateId || !formData.value.time) { ElMessage.warning('请填写完整信息') return } if (isEdit.value) { const index = schedules.value.findIndex(s =&amp;gt; s.id === formData.value.id) if (index &amp;gt; -1) { schedules.value[index] = { ...formData.value } } ElMessage.success('修改成功') } else { const newId = 'SCH' + String(schedules.value.length + 1).padStart(3, '0') schedules.value.push({ ...formData.value, id: newId }) ElMessage.success('新增成功') } dialogVisible.value = false } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .schedule-table { width: 100%; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-43&quot;&gt;src/views/scene/SceneTemplate.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/scene/SceneTemplate.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;场景模板配置&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;addTemplate&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Plus&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; 新增模板 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;template-grid&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-for=&amp;quot;template in templates&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;template.id&amp;quot; :class=&amp;quot;['template-card', { disabled: !template.enabled }]&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;template-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;template-name&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ template.name }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-switch :value=&amp;quot;template.enabled&amp;quot; @change=&amp;quot;toggleEnable(template)&amp;quot; active-color=&amp;quot;#13ce66&amp;quot; inactive-color=&amp;quot;#ff4949&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;p class=&amp;quot;template-desc&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ template.description }}&amp;lt;/p&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;template-config&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;config-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;config-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;亮度&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-progress :percentage=&amp;quot;template.brightness&amp;quot; :show-text=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;template.duration&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;config-item&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;config-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;时段&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;config-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ template.duration }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;template-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;editTemplate(template)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;编辑&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;deleteTemplate(template)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog :title=&amp;quot;editDialogTitle&amp;quot; :visible.sync=&amp;quot;dialogVisible&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;500px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;场景名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入场景名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;场景描述&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;description&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-textarea v-model=&amp;quot;formData.description&amp;quot; rows=&amp;quot;3&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入场景描述&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;亮度(%)&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;brightness&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-slider v-model=&amp;quot;formData.brightness&amp;quot; :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; :max=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; :step=&amp;quot;1&amp;quot; show-input /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;定时时段&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.duration&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;如: 02:00-05:00，为空则全天生效&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;dialogVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;saveTemplate&amp;quot;&amp;gt;保存&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { sceneTemplates } from '@/data/mockData' const icons = { Plus } const templates = ref([...sceneTemplates]) const dialogVisible = ref(false) const isEdit = ref(false) const formData = ref({ id: '', name: '', description: '', brightness: 80, duration: '', enabled: true }) const editDialogTitle = computed(() =&amp;gt; isEdit.value ? '编辑场景模板' : '新增场景模板') const addTemplate = () =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = false formData.value = { id: '', name: '', description: '', brightness: 80, duration: '', enabled: true } dialogVisible.value = true } const editTemplate = (template) =&amp;gt; { isEdit.value = true formData.value = { ...template } dialogVisible.value = true } const deleteTemplate = (template) =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( '确定要删除该场景模板吗？', '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'warning' } ).then(() =&amp;gt; { const index = templates.value.findIndex(t =&amp;gt; t.id === template.id) if (index &amp;gt; -1) { templates.value.splice(index, 1) } ElMessage.success('删除成功') }).catch(() =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.info('已取消删除') }) } const toggleEnable = (template) =&amp;gt; { template.enabled = !template.enabled } const saveTemplate = () =&amp;gt; { if (!formData.value.name) { ElMessage.warning('请填写场景名称') return } if (isEdit.value) { const index = templates.value.findIndex(t =&amp;gt; t.id === formData.value.id) if (index &amp;gt; -1) { templates.value[index] = { ...formData.value } } ElMessage.success('修改成功') } else { const newId = 'S' + String(templates.value.length + 1).padStart(3, '0') templates.value.push({ ...formData.value, id: newId }) ElMessage.success('新增成功') } dialogVisible.value = false } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .template-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(320px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; } .template-card { background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); transition: all 0.3s; &amp;amp;:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12); } &amp;amp;.disabled { opacity: 0.6; background: #fafafa; } } .template-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 12px; } .template-name { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #333; } .template-desc { font-size: 14px; color: #666; margin-bottom: 15px; line-height: 1.5; } .template-config { margin-bottom: 15px; } .config-item { margin-bottom: 10px; &amp;amp;:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; } } .config-label { font-size: 13px; color: #999; margin-right: 10px; } .config-value { font-size: 14px; color: #333; } .template-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; justify-content: flex-end; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-44&quot;&gt;src/views/scene/SceneTrigger.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/scene/SceneTrigger.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;一键场景触发&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;refreshStatus&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Refresh&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; 刷新状态 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;trigger-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;快速触发&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;quick-triggers&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-for=&amp;quot;template in enabledTemplates&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;template.id&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;trigger-card&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;triggerScene(template)&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;trigger-icon&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;component :is=&amp;quot;icons.Lightbulb&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;trigger-info&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;trigger-name&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ template.name }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;trigger-brightness&amp;quot;&amp;gt;亮度: {{ template.brightness }}%&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt;触发&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;trigger-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;当前场景状态&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;current-scene&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;scene-status&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;currentScene ? 'success' : 'info'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;large&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ currentScene ? '场景运行中: ' + currentScene.name : '无场景运行' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;currentScene&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;scene-detail&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-row&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;detail-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;亮度设置&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-progress :percentage=&amp;quot;currentScene.brightness&amp;quot; :show-text=&amp;quot;true&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-row&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;detail-label&amp;quot;&amp;gt;启动时间&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;span class=&amp;quot;detail-value&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ currentScene.startTime }}&amp;lt;/span&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;warning&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;stopScene&amp;quot;&amp;gt;停止场景&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;trigger-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;触发历史记录&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;triggerHistory&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;history-table&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;time&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;触发时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;180&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;sceneName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;场景名称&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;brightness&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;亮度(%)&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;operator&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;操作人&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;status&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;scope&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;scope.row.status === 'success' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ scope.row.status === 'success' ? '成功' : '失败' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;场景触发确认&amp;quot; :visible.sync=&amp;quot;confirmDialogVisible&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;400px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;confirm-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;p&amp;gt;确认触发场景:&amp;lt;/p&amp;gt; &amp;lt;p class=&amp;quot;scene-name&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ pendingScene?.name }}&amp;lt;/p&amp;gt; &amp;lt;p class=&amp;quot;scene-desc&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ pendingScene?.description }}&amp;lt;/p&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;confirmDialogVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;confirmTrigger&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确认触发&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Refresh, Sunrise } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' import { sceneTemplates } from '@/data/mockData' const icons = { Refresh, Lightbulb: Sunrise } const templates = ref([...sceneTemplates]) const confirmDialogVisible = ref(false) const pendingScene = ref(null) const currentScene = ref(null) const triggerHistory = ref([ { id: 1, time: '2024-01-15 14:30:22', sceneName: '节能模式', brightness: 50, operator: '管理员', status: 'success' }, { id: 2, time: '2024-01-15 10:15:33', sceneName: '节日庆典模式', brightness: 100, operator: '张三', status: 'success' }, { id: 3, time: '2024-01-14 22:00:00', sceneName: '深夜模式', brightness: 30, operator: '系统自动', status: 'success' }, { id: 4, time: '2024-01-14 18:30:00', sceneName: '日常照明策略', brightness: 100, operator: '系统自动', status: 'success' }, { id: 5, time: '2024-01-13 14:20:00', sceneName: '雾霾模式', brightness: 90, operator: '李四', status: 'success' } ]) const enabledTemplates = computed(() =&amp;gt; { return templates.value.filter(t =&amp;gt; t.enabled) }) const triggerScene = (template) =&amp;gt; { pendingScene.value = template confirmDialogVisible.value = true } const confirmTrigger = () =&amp;gt; { if (pendingScene.value) { currentScene.value = { ...pendingScene.value, startTime: new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN') } triggerHistory.value.unshift({ id: Date.now(), time: new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN'), sceneName: pendingScene.value.name, brightness: pendingScene.value.brightness, operator: '管理员', status: 'success' }) ElMessage.success('场景触发成功') } confirmDialogVisible.value = false } const stopScene = () =&amp;gt; { currentScene.value = null ElMessage.info('场景已停止') } const refreshStatus = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.success('状态已刷新') } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .trigger-section { margin-bottom: 25px; } .section-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 15px; color: #333; } .quick-triggers { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 15px; } .trigger-card { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 15px; background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; &amp;amp;:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12); transform: translateY(-2px); } } .trigger-icon { width: 50px; height: 50px; border-radius: 12px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #fff; font-size: 24px; } .trigger-info { flex: 1; } .trigger-name { display: block; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #333; margin-bottom: 4px; } .trigger-brightness { font-size: 13px; color: #666; } .current-scene { background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); } .scene-status { margin-bottom: 20px; } .scene-detail { padding-top: 15px; border-top: 1px solid #f0f0f0; } .detail-row { display: flex; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 15px; &amp;amp;:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; } } .detail-label { width: 100px; font-size: 14px; color: #666; } .detail-value { font-size: 14px; color: #333; } .detail-actions { margin-top: 15px; } .history-table { width: 100%; } .confirm-content { padding: 10px 0; } .confirm-content p { margin-bottom: 8px; color: #666; } .scene-name { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #333 !important; } .scene-desc { color: #999 !important; font-size: 14px; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-45&quot;&gt;src/views/workorder/AlarmDispatch.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/workorder/AlarmDispatch.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleAdd&amp;quot;&amp;gt;新增&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;selectedRows.length === 0&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleBatchDelete&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filterDeviceType&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择设备类型&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;全部&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;集控&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;集控&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;灯具&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;灯具&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;单灯控制器&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;单灯控制器&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;filterStatus&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择状态&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;全部&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;启用&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;启用&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;关闭&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;关闭&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSearch&amp;quot;&amp;gt;搜索&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleReset&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;table-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredData&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;data-table&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleSelectionChange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;levelName&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;层级名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;deviceType&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;设备类型&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;alarmType&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;告警类型&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;200&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;workOrderType&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;工单类型&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;status&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;80&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.status === '启用' ? 'success' : 'danger'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.status }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;220&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; :class=&amp;quot;row.status === '启用' ? 'text-danger' : 'text-success'&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleToggleStatus(row)&amp;quot; &amp;gt; {{ row.status === '启用' ? '停用' : '启用' }} &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleEdit(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;修改&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleDelete(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;pagination-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-pagination v-model:current-page=&amp;quot;currentPage&amp;quot; v-model:page-size=&amp;quot;pageSize&amp;quot; :total=&amp;quot;total&amp;quot; layout=&amp;quot;prev, pager, next, jumper, -&amp;gt;, total&amp;quot; @size-change=&amp;quot;handleSizeChange&amp;quot; @current-change=&amp;quot;handleCurrentChange&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;新增规则&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showAddDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;550px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*所属层级&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;levelName&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.levelName&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择所属层级&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;力唯中天产业园&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;力唯中天产业园&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;园区地面&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;园区地面&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;1栋地面&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;1栋地面&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;1栋&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;1栋&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;4栋&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;4栋&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;园区道路&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;园区道路&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;充电桩区域&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;充电桩区域&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*设备类型&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;deviceType&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.deviceType&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择设备类型&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;集控&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;集控&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;灯具&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;灯具&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;单灯控制器&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;单灯控制器&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*告警类型&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;alarmType&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.alarmType&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择告警类型&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot; multiple&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;设备掉电告警&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;设备掉电告警&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;设备离线告警&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;设备离线告警&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;灯具调光异常&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;灯具调光异常&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;信号强度&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;信号强度&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;离线告警&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;离线告警&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;欠压告警&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;欠压告警&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;非计划异常亮灯&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;非计划异常亮灯&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*工单类型&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;workOrderType&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.workOrderType&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择工单类型&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;爱克园区巡检&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;爱克园区巡检&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;灯具故障模板&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;灯具故障模板&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;巡检模板&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;巡检模板&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;-&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;-&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;dialog-footer&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleConfirm&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' const showAddDialog = ref(false) const filterDeviceType = ref('') const filterStatus = ref('') const selectedRows = ref([]) const currentPage = ref(1) const pageSize = ref(15) const mockData = ref([ { no: 1, levelName: '力唯中天产业园', deviceType: '集控', alarmType: '设备掉电告警,设备离线告警', workOrderType: '灯具故障模板', status: '启用' }, { no: 2, levelName: '力唯中天产业园', deviceType: '集控', alarmType: '设备掉电告警,设备离线告警', workOrderType: '灯具故障模板', status: '启用' }, { no: 3, levelName: '园区道路', deviceType: '灯具', alarmType: '灯具调光异常', workOrderType: '巡检模板', status: '启用' }, { no: 4, levelName: '力唯中天产业园', deviceType: '集控', alarmType: '设备离线告警', workOrderType: '巡检模板', status: '关闭' }, { no: 5, levelName: '力唯中天产业园', deviceType: '单灯控制器', alarmType: '信号强度,离线告警,欠压告警', workOrderType: '巡检模板', status: '关闭' }, { no: 6, levelName: '力唯中天产业园', deviceType: '单灯控制器', alarmType: '信号强度,离线告警,欠压告警', workOrderType: '巡检模板', status: '关闭' }, { no: 7, levelName: '充电桩区域', deviceType: '灯具', alarmType: '非计划异常亮灯,灯具调光异常', workOrderType: '-', status: '关闭' } ]) const total = computed(() =&amp;gt; mockData.value.length) const filteredData = computed(() =&amp;gt; { let result = mockData.value if (filterDeviceType.value) { result = result.filter(i =&amp;gt; i.deviceType === filterDeviceType.value) } if (filterStatus.value) { result = result.filter(i =&amp;gt; i.status === filterStatus.value) } return result }) const formData = ref({ levelName: '', deviceType: '', alarmType: [], workOrderType: '' }) const handleAdd = () =&amp;gt; { showAddDialog.value = true formData.value = { levelName: '', deviceType: '', alarmType: [], workOrderType: '' } } const handleSearch = () =&amp;gt; { currentPage.value = 1 } const handleReset = () =&amp;gt; { filterDeviceType.value = '' filterStatus.value = '' currentPage.value = 1 } const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value = val } const handleToggleStatus = (row) =&amp;gt; { row.status = row.status === '启用' ? '关闭' : '启用' } const handleEdit = (row) =&amp;gt; { showAddDialog.value = true formData.value = { levelName: row.levelName, deviceType: row.deviceType, alarmType: row.alarmType.split(','), workOrderType: row.workOrderType } } const handleDelete = (row) =&amp;gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.no === row.no) if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1) } } const handleBatchDelete = () =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&amp;gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.no === row.no) if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1) } }) selectedRows.value = [] } const handleConfirm = () =&amp;gt; { if (!formData.value.levelName || !formData.value.deviceType || !formData.value.alarmType.length || !formData.value.workOrderType) { alert('请填写所有必填字段') return } const newRecord = { no: mockData.value.length + 1, levelName: formData.value.levelName, deviceType: formData.value.deviceType, alarmType: formData.value.alarmType.join(','), workOrderType: formData.value.workOrderType, status: '启用' } mockData.value.push(newRecord) showAddDialog.value = false } const handleSizeChange = (val) =&amp;gt; { pageSize.value = val currentPage.value = 1 } const handleCurrentChange = (val) =&amp;gt; { currentPage.value = val } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { height: 100%; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .header-right { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 15px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; } .filter-select { width: 180px; } .table-wrapper { flex: 1; overflow: auto; min-height: 0; } .data-table { width: 100%; min-width: 1200px; } .pagination-bar { display: flex; justify-content: center; padding: 15px 0; } .form-container { padding: 10px 0; } .form-select { width: 100%; } .dialog-footer { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 15px; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt;&lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-46&quot;&gt;src/views/workorder/WorkOrderCreate.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/workorder/WorkOrderCreate.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;新建工单&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;router-link to=&amp;quot;/workorder/list&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button&amp;gt;返回列表&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/router-link&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;120px&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;workorder-form&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;基本信息&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;工单类型&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot; required&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.type&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择工单类型&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;故障工单&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;fault&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;维修工单&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;maintenance&amp;quot;
