/&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;工单标题&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot; required&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.title&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入工单标题&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;详细描述&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;description&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-textarea v-model=&amp;quot;formData.description&amp;quot; rows=&amp;quot;4&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入详细描述&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;位置信息&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;地点&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;location&amp;quot; required&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.location&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入地点&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-section&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;section-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;优先级&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;优先级&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;priority&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.priority&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;高&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;high&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;中&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;medium&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;低&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;low&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;form-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;router-link to=&amp;quot;/workorder/list&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/router-link&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;submitForm&amp;quot;&amp;gt;提交&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref } from 'vue' import { useRouter } from 'vue-router' const router = useRouter() const formData = ref({ type: '', title: '', description: '', location: '', priority: 'medium', status: 'pending', assignee: '', createTime: '', updateTime: '' }) const generateId = () =&amp;gt; { const timestamp = Date.now().toString(36).toUpperCase() return 'WO' + timestamp.slice(-3) + String(Math.random()).slice(-3).toUpperCase() } const submitForm = () =&amp;gt; { if (!formData.value.type || !formData.value.title || !formData.value.location) { ElMessage.warning('请填写必填项') return } const now = new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN') formData.value.id = generateId() formData.value.createTime = now formData.value.updateTime = now ElMessage.success('工单创建成功') router.push('/workorder/list') } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .workorder-form { max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; } .form-section { margin-bottom: 25px; padding: 20px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 8px; } .section-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; color: #333; } .form-actions { display: flex; gap: 15px; justify-content: center; padding-top: 20px; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-47&quot;&gt;src/views/workorder/WorkOrderDetail.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/workorder/WorkOrderDetail.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;工单详情&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;router-link to=&amp;quot;/workorder/list&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button&amp;gt;返回列表&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/router-link&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-if=&amp;quot;order&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;detail-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;order-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;h2&amp;gt;{{ order.title }}&amp;lt;/h2&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;order-tags&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;order.type === 'fault' ? 'danger' : 'warning'&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ order.type === 'fault' ? '故障工单' : '维修工单' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getPriorityTagType(order.priority)&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getPriorityText(order.priority) }}优先级 &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(order.status)&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getStatusText(order.status) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;order-id&amp;quot;&amp;gt;工单编号: {{ order.id }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-grid&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;基本信息&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;工单类型&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;order.type === 'fault' ? 'danger' : 'warning'&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ order.type === 'fault' ? '故障工单' : '维修工单' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;优先级&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getPriorityTagType(order.priority)&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getPriorityText(order.priority) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;当前状态&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(order.status)&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getStatusText(order.status) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;处理人员&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ order.assignee || '未分配' }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;位置信息&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;地点&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ order.location }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-card full-width&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;详细描述&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;description-content&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ order.description }}&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-card&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;card-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;时间信息&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;创建时间&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ order.createTime }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;更新时间&amp;quot;&amp;gt;{{ order.updateTime }}&amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;status-timeline&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;timeline-title&amp;quot;&amp;gt;工单流程&amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-timeline&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-timeline-item timestamp=&amp;quot;创建&amp;quot;&amp;gt;工单已创建，等待处理&amp;lt;/el-timeline-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-timeline-item v-if=&amp;quot;order.status !== 'pending'&amp;quot; timestamp=&amp;quot;派发&amp;quot;&amp;gt;工单已派发给 {{ order.assignee }}&amp;lt;/el-timeline-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-timeline-item v-if=&amp;quot;order.status === 'completed'&amp;quot; timestamp=&amp;quot;完成&amp;quot;&amp;gt;工单已完成&amp;lt;/el-timeline-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-timeline&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;detail-actions&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button v-if=&amp;quot;order.status === 'pending'&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleAssign&amp;quot; &amp;gt; 派发工单 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button v-if=&amp;quot;order.status === 'processing'&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;success&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleComplete&amp;quot; &amp;gt; 完成工单 &amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;router-link to=&amp;quot;/workorder/create&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button&amp;gt;创建类似工单&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/router-link&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;派发工单&amp;quot; :visible.sync=&amp;quot;assignDialogVisible&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;450px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;assignForm&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;80px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;处理人员&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;assignForm.assignee&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择处理人员&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;张三&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;张三&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;李四&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;李四&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;王五&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;王五&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;赵六&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;赵六&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;assignDialogVisible = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;confirmAssign&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确认派发&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, onMounted } from 'vue' import { useRoute, useRouter } from 'vue-router' import { workOrders } from '@/data/mockData' const route = useRoute() const router = useRouter() const order = ref(null) const assignDialogVisible = ref(false) const assignForm = ref({ assignee: '' }) onMounted(() =&amp;gt; { const id = route.params.id order.value = workOrders.find(w =&amp;gt; w.id === id) || workOrders[0] }) const getPriorityTagType = (priority) =&amp;gt; { switch (priority) { case 'high': return 'danger' case 'medium': return 'warning' case 'low': return 'success' default: return 'info' } } const getPriorityText = (priority) =&amp;gt; { switch (priority) { case 'high': return '高' case 'medium': return '中' case 'low': return '低' default: return priority } } const getStatusTagType = (status) =&amp;gt; { switch (status) { case 'pending': return 'warning' case 'processing': return 'primary' case 'completed': return 'success' default: return 'info' } } const getStatusText = (status) =&amp;gt; { switch (status) { case 'pending': return '待处理' case 'processing': return '处理中' case 'completed': return '已完成' default: return status } } const handleAssign = () =&amp;gt; { assignForm.value = { assignee: '' } assignDialogVisible.value = true } const confirmAssign = () =&amp;gt; { if (!assignForm.value.assignee) { ElMessage.warning('请选择处理人员') return } if (order.value) { order.value.assignee = assignForm.value.assignee order.value.status = 'processing' order.value.updateTime = new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN') } ElMessage.success('派发成功') assignDialogVisible.value = false } const handleComplete = () =&amp;gt; { ElMessageBox.confirm( '确定要完成此工单吗？', '提示', { confirmButtonText: '确定', cancelButtonText: '取消', type: 'success' } ).then(() =&amp;gt; { if (order.value) { order.value.status = 'completed' order.value.updateTime = new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN') } ElMessage.success('工单已完成') }).catch(() =&amp;gt; { ElMessage.info('已取消') }) } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .detail-header { margin-bottom: 25px; padding: 20px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); border-radius: 8px; color: #fff; } .order-title { margin-bottom: 10px; } .order-title h2 { margin: 0 0 10px 0; font-size: 24px; } .order-tags { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .order-id { font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.9; } .detail-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 25px; } .detail-card { background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); &amp;amp;.full-width { grid-column: 1 / -1; } } .card-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 15px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0; color: #333; } .description-content { padding: 15px; background: #fafafa; border-radius: 4px; line-height: 1.6; color: #666; } .status-timeline { background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); margin-bottom: 25px; } .timeline-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 15px; color: #333; } .detail-actions { display: flex; gap: 15px; justify-content: center; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-48&quot;&gt;src/views/workorder/WorkOrderList.vue&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: src/views/workorder/WorkOrderList.vue&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;&amp;lt;template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;page-header&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;header-right&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleAdd&amp;quot;&amp;gt;创建工单&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; :disabled=&amp;quot;selectedRows.length === 0&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleBatchDelete&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-bar&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;status-tabs&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div v-for=&amp;quot;tab in statusTabs&amp;quot; :key=&amp;quot;tab.value&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;status-tab&amp;quot; :class=&amp;quot;{ active: currentStatus === tab.value }&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;currentStatus = tab.value&amp;quot; &amp;gt; {{ tab.label }}({{ tab.count }}) &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;filter-inputs&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;filterKeyword&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请输入工单名称查询&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;filter-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleSearch&amp;quot;&amp;gt;搜索&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;handleReset&amp;quot;&amp;gt;重置&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;table-wrapper&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table :data=&amp;quot;filteredData&amp;quot; border class=&amp;quot;data-table&amp;quot; @selection-change=&amp;quot;handleSelectionChange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column type=&amp;quot;selection&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;no&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;No&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;50&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;工单名称&amp;quot; min-width=&amp;quot;150&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;工单类型&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;120&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;creator&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;创建人&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;isTimeout&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;是否超时&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;90&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;row.isTimeout ? 'danger' : 'success'&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ row.isTimeout ? '是' : '否' }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;status&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;工单状态&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;100&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-tag :type=&amp;quot;getStatusTagType(row.status)&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot;&amp;gt; {{ getStatusText(row.status) }} &amp;lt;/el-tag&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column prop=&amp;quot;createTime&amp;quot; label=&amp;quot;工单发起时间&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;160&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-table-column label=&amp;quot;操作&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;200&amp;quot; align=&amp;quot;center&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #default=&amp;quot;{ row }&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleDetail(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;详情&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;text&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleEdit(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;编辑&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;danger&amp;quot; size=&amp;quot;small&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleDelete(row)&amp;quot;&amp;gt;删除&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table-column&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-table&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-dialog title=&amp;quot;创建工单&amp;quot; v-model=&amp;quot;showAddDialog&amp;quot; width=&amp;quot;600px&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form :model=&amp;quot;formData&amp;quot; label-width=&amp;quot;100px&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-container&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*工单类型&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;type&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-select v-model=&amp;quot;formData.type&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;请选择工单类型&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-select&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;爱克园区巡检&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;爱克园区巡检&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;11月6号灯具故障模板&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;11月6号灯具故障模板&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;灯具故障模板&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;灯具故障模板&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;单灯故障自动派单&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;单灯故障自动派单&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-option label=&amp;quot;巡检模板&amp;quot; value=&amp;quot;巡检模板&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-select&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;*工单名称&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;name&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input v-model=&amp;quot;formData.name&amp;quot; placeholder=&amp;quot;&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-input&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;数字输入框&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;number&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-input-number v-model=&amp;quot;formData.number&amp;quot; :min=&amp;quot;0&amp;quot; :max=&amp;quot;9999&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;日期范围&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;dateRange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-date-picker v-model=&amp;quot;formData.dateRange&amp;quot; type=&amp;quot;daterange&amp;quot; range-separator=&amp;quot;至&amp;quot; start-placeholder=&amp;quot;开始日期&amp;quot; end-placeholder=&amp;quot;结束日期&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-date&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;时间范围&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;timeRange&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-time-picker v-model=&amp;quot;formData.timeRange&amp;quot; is-range range-separator=&amp;quot;至&amp;quot; start-placeholder=&amp;quot;开始时间&amp;quot; end-placeholder=&amp;quot;结束时间&amp;quot; class=&amp;quot;form-time&amp;quot; /&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-form-item label=&amp;quot;图片上传&amp;quot; prop=&amp;quot;images&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-upload class=&amp;quot;image-uploader&amp;quot; action=&amp;quot;#&amp;quot; :show-file-list=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot; :auto-upload=&amp;quot;false&amp;quot; &amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;upload-placeholder&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-icon class=&amp;quot;upload-icon&amp;quot;&amp;gt;&amp;lt;Plus /&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/el-icon&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-upload&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form-item&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-form&amp;gt; &amp;lt;template #footer&amp;gt; &amp;lt;div class=&amp;quot;dialog-footer&amp;quot;&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button @click=&amp;quot;showAddDialog = false&amp;quot;&amp;gt;取消&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;el-button type=&amp;quot;primary&amp;quot; @click=&amp;quot;handleConfirm&amp;quot;&amp;gt;确定&amp;lt;/el-button&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/el-dialog&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/div&amp;gt; &amp;lt;/template&amp;gt; &amp;lt;script setup&amp;gt; import { ref, computed } from 'vue' import { Plus } from '@element-plus/icons-vue' const showAddDialog = ref(false) const currentStatus = ref('pending') const filterKeyword = ref('') const selectedRows = ref([]) const mockData = ref([ { no: 1, name: '园区路灯巡检', type: '爱克园区巡检', creator: '管理员', isTimeout: false, status: 'pending', createTime: '2024-05-15 09:30:00' }, { no: 2, name: '灯具故障维修', type: '灯具故障模板', creator: '张三', isTimeout: true, status: 'processing', createTime: '2024-05-14 14:20:00' } ]) const statusTabs = computed(() =&amp;gt; [ { label: '待处理', value: 'pending', count: mockData.value.filter(i =&amp;gt; i.status === 'pending').length }, { label: '我发起的', value: 'created', count: 2 }, { label: '已处理的', value: 'processed', count: 0 }, { label: '抄送我的', value: 'copied', count: 0 }, { label: '全部工单', value: 'all', count: mockData.value.length } ]) const filteredData = computed(() =&amp;gt; { let result = mockData.value if (currentStatus.value !== 'all') { if (currentStatus.value === 'pending') { result = result.filter(i =&amp;gt; i.status === 'pending') } else if (currentStatus.value === 'created') { result = result.filter(i =&amp;gt; i.creator === '管理员') } else if (currentStatus.value === 'processed') { result = result.filter(i =&amp;gt; i.status === 'completed') } } if (filterKeyword.value) { result = result.filter(i =&amp;gt; i.name.includes(filterKeyword.value)) } return result }) const formData = ref({ type: '', name: '', number: 0, dateRange: [], timeRange: [], images: [] }) const getStatusTagType = (status) =&amp;gt; { switch (status) { case 'pending': return 'warning' case 'processing': return 'primary' case 'completed': return 'success' default: return 'info' } } const getStatusText = (status) =&amp;gt; { switch (status) { case 'pending': return '待处理' case 'processing': return '处理中' case 'completed': return '已完成' default: return status } } const handleAdd = () =&amp;gt; { showAddDialog.value = true formData.value = { type: '', name: '', number: 0, dateRange: [], timeRange: [], images: [] } } const handleSearch = () =&amp;gt; {} const handleReset = () =&amp;gt; { filterKeyword.value = '' } const handleSelectionChange = (val) =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value = val } const handleDetail = (row) =&amp;gt; {} const handleEdit = (row) =&amp;gt; {} const handleDelete = (row) =&amp;gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.no === row.no) if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1) } } const handleBatchDelete = () =&amp;gt; { selectedRows.value.forEach(row =&amp;gt; { const index = mockData.value.findIndex(item =&amp;gt; item.no === row.no) if (index !== -1) { mockData.value.splice(index, 1) } }) selectedRows.value = [] } const handleConfirm = () =&amp;gt; { if (!formData.value.type || !formData.value.name) { alert('请填写必填字段') return } const newRecord = { no: mockData.value.length + 1, name: formData.value.name, type: formData.value.type, creator: '管理员', isTimeout: false, status: 'pending', createTime: new Date().toLocaleString() } mockData.value.push(newRecord) showAddDialog.value = false } &amp;lt;/script&amp;gt; &amp;lt;style scoped&amp;gt; .page-container { height: 100%; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px; } .page-header { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; padding-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .header-right { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .filter-bar { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 15px; } .status-tabs { display: flex; gap: 10px; padding: 10px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e8e8e8; border-radius: 4px; } .status-tab { padding: 8px 20px; color: #606266; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 4px; transition: all 0.3s; } .status-tab:hover { background: #f5f7fa; } .status-tab.active { background: #e6f7ff; color: #1890ff; border: 1px solid #91d5ff; } .filter-inputs { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; } .filter-input { width: 250px; } .table-wrapper { flex: 1; overflow: auto; min-height: 0; } .data-table { width: 100%; min-width: 1000px; } .form-container { padding: 10px 0; } .form-select, .form-input, .form-date, .form-time { width: 100%; } .image-uploader { width: 100px; height: 100px; border: 1px dashed #d9d9d9; border-radius: 4px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .upload-placeholder { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 100%; } .upload-icon { font-size: 24px; color: #999; } .dialog-footer { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 15px; } &amp;lt;/style&amp;gt; &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-49&quot;&gt;update-hierarchy.js&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: update-hierarchy.js&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;import fs from 'fs/promises'; import path from 'path'; // 需要更新的文件列表 const files = [ './src/views/device/LampPostManage.vue', './src/views/power/CircuitGroup.vue', './src/views/power/LineInfo.vue', './src/views/power/CircuitControl.vue', './src/views/power/CentralControl.vue', './src/views/power/DistributionBox.vue', './src/views/lighting/LampManage.vue', './src/views/lighting/GroupManage.vue', './src/views/lighting/LightingStrategy.vue', './src/views/lighting/HistoryStrategy.vue' ]; // 替换规则 const replacements = [ { from: /爱克股份产业园/g, to: '长沙' }, { from: /园区地面/g, to: '岳麓区' }, { from: /1栋地面/g, to: '先导路' }, { from: /1栋/g, to: '力唯中天1栋' }, { from: /4栋/g, to: '力唯中天2栋' }, { from: /园区290/g, to: '岳麓区290号' }, { from: /展厅集控/g, to: '先导路集控' } ]; async function updateFiles() { for (const filePath of files) { const fullPath = path.join(process.cwd(), filePath); try { const content = await fs.readFile(fullPath, 'utf8'); // 应用所有替换规则 let newContent = content; replacements.forEach(replace =&amp;gt; { newContent = newContent.replace(replace.from, replace.to); }); await fs.writeFile(fullPath, newContent, 'utf8'); console.log(`✅ 更新成功: ${filePath}`); } catch (error) { console.log(`❌ 文件不存在或读取失败: ${filePath}`); } } console.log('\n🎉 所有层级数据已更新完成！'); } updateFiles(); &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;h2 id=&quot;file-50&quot;&gt;vite.config.js&lt;/h2&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;file-info&quot;&gt;文件路径: vite.config.js&lt;/div&gt; &lt;div class=&quot;code-block&quot;&gt;import { defineConfig } from 'vite' import vue from '@vitejs/plugin-vue' import { resolve } from 'path' export default defineConfig({ plugins: [vue()], resolve: { alias: { '@': resolve(__dirname, 'src') } } }) &lt;/div&gt; &lt;hr class=&quot;section-divider&quot;&gt; &lt;/body&gt; &lt;/html&gt;</div> <hr class="section-divider"> </body> </html>
